Result: 在限价订单簿数据、小时电力需求和合成高维线性系统上，BR-iHMM相比竞争性在线贝叶斯方法将一步前预测误差降低了高达67%，同时提供有界后验影响函数的理论保证。

Conclusion: BR-iHMM方法在理论和实证上都证明了其对于包含异常值和模型误设的流数据在线学习的实用性和有效性，为预测和可解释的在线学习提供了实用工具。

Abstract: We derive a robust update rule for the online infinite hidden Markov model (iHMM) for when the streaming data contains outliers and the model is misspecified. Leveraging recent advances in generalised Bayesian inference, we define robustness via the posterior influence function (PIF), and provide conditions under which the online iHMM has bounded PIF. Imposing robustness inevitably induces an adaptation lag for regime switching. Our method, which is called Batched Robust iHMM (BR-iHMM), balances adaptivity and robustness with two additional tunable parameters. Across limit order book data, hourly electricity demand, and a synthetic high-dimensional linear system, BR-iHMM reduces one-step-ahead forecasting error by up to 67% relative to competing online Bayesian methods. Together with theoretical guarantees of bounded PIF, our results highlight the practicality of our approach for both forecasting and interpretable online learning.

</details>


### [335] [Covariance-adapting algorithm for semi-bandits with application to sparse rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13738)
*Pierre Perrault,Vianney Perchet,Michal Valko*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究随机组合半赌博机问题，提出使用更一般的次指数分布族替代传统次高斯分布，建立了基于未知协方差矩阵的遗憾下界，并设计了使用协方差估计的算法，最后将结果扩展到稀疏结果的应用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统随机组合半赌博机问题通常假设特定的参数化分布（如次高斯分布），这些分布需要先验知识但在实践中难以估计。本文旨在缓解这一问题，考虑更一般的次指数分布族，该族包含有界分布和高斯分布，从而降低对先验知识的依赖。

Method: 1. 提出使用次指数分布族替代次高斯分布族；2. 证明基于未知协方差矩阵的遗憾下界（比次高斯矩阵更紧）；3. 构建使用协方差估计的算法；4. 对算法进行严格的渐近遗憾分析；5. 将结果扩展到稀疏结果族，应用于推荐系统等场景。

Result: 1. 建立了次指数分布族下基于协方差矩阵的遗憾下界；2. 设计了使用协方差估计的算法并证明了其渐近最优性；3. 将理论结果成功应用于稀疏结果场景，为推荐系统等应用提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 本文通过考虑更一般的次指数分布族，降低了随机组合半赌博机问题对先验知识的依赖，建立了基于协方差矩阵的更紧遗憾下界，并设计了实用的算法。该框架可扩展到稀疏结果场景，具有实际应用价值，特别是在推荐系统等领域。

Abstract: We investigate stochastic combinatorial semi-bandits, where the entire joint distribution of outcomes impacts the complexity of the problem instance (unlike in the standard bandits). Typical distributions considered depend on specific parameter values, whose prior knowledge is required in theory but quite difficult to estimate in practice; an example is the commonly assumed sub-Gaussian family. We alleviate this issue by instead considering a new general family of sub-exponential distributions, which contains bounded and Gaussian ones. We prove a new lower bound on the expected regret on this family, that is parameterized by the unknown covariance matrix of outcomes, a tighter quantity than the sub-Gaussian matrix. We then construct an algorithm that uses covariance estimates, and provide a tight asymptotic analysis of the regret. Finally, we apply and extend our results to the family of sparse outcomes, which has applications in many recommender systems.

</details>


### [336] [Robust Low-Rank Tensor Completion based on M-product with Weighted Correlated Total Variation and Sparse Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13525)
*Biswarup Karmakar,Ratikanta Behera*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出TWCTV正则化方法，通过加权Schatten-p范数和稀疏分量处理，解决张量补全中均匀正则化破坏结构的问题，在图像补全、去噪等任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量补全方法依赖均匀正则化方案（张量核范数和ℓ1范数），对所有奇异值和稀疏分量施加相同收缩，破坏了关键张量结构，无法有效处理含缺失值、异常值和稀疏噪声的高维张量数据。

Method: 提出张量加权相关全变分(TWCTV)正则化器，基于M-积框架结合梯度张量的加权Schatten-p范数（用于低秩性和平滑性）和加权稀疏分量（用于噪声抑制）。采用自适应权重方案降低阈值水平，保护主导奇异值和稀疏分量。开发增强的ADMM算法，在M-积框架内提供计算效率和理论保证。

Result: 在图像补全、去噪和背景减除任务上的综合数值评估验证了该方法相对于现有基准方法的优越性能，能够更好地重建关键结构元素和细微细节。

Conclusion: TWCTV正则化方法通过自适应加权方案解决了均匀正则化的局限性，在M-积框架下实现了对含噪声和缺失值张量数据的高质量恢复，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

Abstract: The robust low-rank tensor completion problem addresses the challenge of recovering corrupted high-dimensional tensor data with missing entries, outliers, and sparse noise commonly found in real-world applications. Existing methodologies have encountered fundamental limitations due to their reliance on uniform regularization schemes, particularly the tensor nuclear norm and $\ell_1$ norm regularization approaches, which indiscriminately apply equal shrinkage to all singular values and sparse components, thereby compromising the preservation of critical tensor structures. The proposed tensor weighted correlated total variation (TWCTV) regularizer addresses these shortcomings through an $M$-product framework that combines a weighted Schatten-$p$ norm on gradient tensors for low-rankness with smoothness enforcement and weighted sparse components for noise suppression. The proposed weighting scheme adaptively reduces the thresholding level to preserve both dominant singular values and sparse components, thus improving the reconstruction of critical structural elements and nuanced details in the recovered signal. Through a systematic algorithmic approach, we introduce an enhanced alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) that offers both computational efficiency and theoretical substantiation, with convergence properties comprehensively analyzed within the $M$-product framework.Comprehensive numerical evaluations across image completion, denoising, and background subtraction tasks validate the superior performance of this approach relative to established benchmark methods.

</details>


### [337] [Identifiability of Potentially Degenerate Gaussian Mixture Models With Piecewise Affine Mixing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13218)
*Danru Xu,Sébastien Lachapelle,Sara Magliacane*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文研究因果表示学习中潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且通过分段仿射混合函数观测时的可识别性问题，提出基于稀疏正则化的两阶段估计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究因果表示学习(CRL)中，当潜在变量服从可能退化的高斯混合分布且仅通过分段仿射混合函数观测时的可识别性问题。这一设置具有挑战性，因为概率密度函数可能由于潜在退化而无法定义。

Method: 提出一系列渐进增强的可识别性结果，利用学习表示中的稀疏正则化实现置换和缩放级别的可识别性。基于理论结果，开发两阶段方法：第一阶段通过稀疏正则化学习表示，第二阶段通过高斯性约束估计潜在变量。

Result: 在合成数据和图像数据上的实验表明，该方法能有效恢复真实潜在变量，验证了理论可识别性结果的实际有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究为具有退化高斯混合潜在变量和分段仿射混合函数的因果表示学习提供了理论可识别性保证，并提出了实用的两阶段估计方法，在挑战性设置下实现了潜在变量的有效恢复。

Abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) aims to identify the underlying latent variables from high-dimensional observations, even when variables are dependent with each other. We study this problem for latent variables that follow a potentially degenerate Gaussian mixture distribution and that are only observed through the transformation via a piecewise affine mixing function. We provide a series of progressively stronger identifiability results for this challenging setting in which the probability density functions are ill-defined because of the potential degeneracy. For identifiability up to permutation and scaling, we leverage a sparsity regularization on the learned representation. Based on our theoretical results, we propose a two-stage method to estimate the latent variables by enforcing sparsity and Gaussianity in the learned representations. Experiments on synthetic and image data highlight our method's effectiveness in recovering the ground-truth latent variables.

</details>


### [338] [Rare Event Analysis via Stochastic Optimal Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13213)
*Yuanqi Du,Jiajun He,Dinghuai Zhang,Eric Vanden-Eijnden,Carles Domingo-Enrich*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 将过渡路径理论中的承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，通过反馈控制主动引导轨迹采样反应路径，提高稀有事件计算效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物分子构象变化、相变和化学反应等稀有事件在物理系统中至关重要，但传统无偏模拟难以有效采样。过渡路径理论提供了分析框架，但其核心承诺函数估计面临挑战

Method: 将承诺函数估计转化为随机最优控制问题，承诺函数定义反馈控制（正比于其对数的梯度），主动引导轨迹进入反应区域。开发两种互补目标函数：直接反向传播损失和理论上的离策略值匹配损失，并引入替代采样过程处理亚稳态问题

Result: 在基准系统上，该方法相比现有方法显著提高了承诺函数估计、反应速率和平衡常数的准确性

Conclusion: 随机最优控制框架为过渡路径理论中的承诺函数估计提供了高效解决方案，通过主动控制策略克服稀有事件采样困难，在复杂系统动力学研究中具有重要应用价值

Abstract: Rare events such as conformational changes in biomolecules, phase transitions, and chemical reactions are central to the behavior of many physical systems, yet they are extremely difficult to study computationally because unbiased simulations seldom produce them. Transition Path Theory (TPT) provides a rigorous statistical framework for analyzing such events: it characterizes the ensemble of reactive trajectories between two designated metastable states (reactant and product), and its central object--the committor function, which gives the probability that the system will next reach the product rather than the reactant--encodes all essential kinetic and thermodynamic information. We introduce a framework that casts committor estimation as a stochastic optimal control (SOC) problem. In this formulation the committor defines a feedback control--proportional to the gradient of its logarithm--that actively steers trajectories toward the reactive region, thereby enabling efficient sampling of reactive paths. To solve the resulting hitting-time control problem we develop two complementary objectives: a direct backpropagation loss and a principled off-policy Value Matching loss, for which we establish first-order optimality guarantees. We further address metastability, which can trap controlled trajectories in intermediate basins, by introducing an alternative sampling process that preserves the reactive current while lowering effective energy barriers. On benchmark systems, the framework yields markedly more accurate committor estimates, reaction rates, and equilibrium constants than existing methods.

</details>


### [339] [Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12992)
*Farbod Alinezhad,Jianfei Cao,Gary J. Young,Brady Post*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: CDM是首个基于去噪扩散概率模型的因果推断方法，用于生成序列干预下反事实结果的完整概率分布，无需显式去混杂调整，在复杂时间依赖混杂场景中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向数据中的反事实预测面临两大挑战：1) 序列治疗决策高度依赖患者状态的动态演变，存在复杂的时间依赖混杂；2) 现有方法在不确定性量化方面不足。需要一种能够生成完整概率分布且无需显式去混杂调整的方法。

Method: 提出因果扩散模型(CDM)，采用创新的残差去噪架构和关系自注意力机制，捕捉复杂的时间依赖性和多模态结果轨迹。该方法不依赖逆概率加权或对抗平衡等显式去混杂技术，而是通过扩散模型直接建模反事实结果的概率分布。

Result: 在药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上的评估显示，CDM在分布准确性(1-Wasserstein距离)上相对提升15-30%，在高混杂场景下保持竞争性或更优的点估计准确性(RMSE)。

Conclusion: CDM首次将不确定性量化和鲁棒反事实预测统一于复杂序列混杂场景中，无需定制化去混杂，为医学决策支持、政策评估等纵向领域提供了灵活高效的工具。

Abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.

</details>


<div id='cs.HC'></div>

# cs.HC [[Back]](#toc)

### [340] [Agentic Explainability at Scale: Between Corporate Fears and XAI Needs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14984)
*Yomna Elsayed,Cecily Jones*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 论文探讨企业采用智能体AI时的治理挑战，提出设计时和运行时可解释性技术，并开发Agentic AI Card原型来解决"智能体蔓延"问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业在竞相采用智能体AI时面临自主性风险担忧，特别是在通过低代码应用规模化部署时，治理流程和专业知识未能同步扩展，导致"智能体蔓延"现象。现有可观测性工具难以提供智能体配置、设置以及智能体间通信和编排决策过程的洞察。

Method: 研究企业环境中AI治理专业人员的关切，基于AI治理专家建议提出设计时和运行时可解释性技术，并开发了Agentic AI Card的初步原型，帮助企业规模化部署智能体时建立信心。

Result: 提出了针对智能体AI治理的具体可解释性解决方案，包括设计时和运行时技术，并展示了Agentic AI Card原型，为企业规模化部署智能体提供了治理框架和工具支持。

Conclusion: 通过结合AI治理专家见解和具体技术方案，论文为解决智能体AI规模化部署中的治理挑战提供了可行路径，特别是通过Agentic AI Card原型帮助企业缓解对智能体自主性的担忧，实现更安全可控的智能体AI采用。

Abstract: As companies enter the race for agentic AI adoption, fears surface around agentic autonomy and its subsequent risks. These fears compound as companies scale their agentic AI adoption with low-code applications, without a comparable scaling in their governance processes and expertise resulting in a phenomenon known as "Agent Sprawl". While shadow AI tools can help with agentic discovery and identification, few observability tools offer insights into the agents' configuration and settings or the decision-making process during agent-to-agent communication and orchestration. This paper explores AI governance professionals' concerns in enterprise settings, while offering design-time and runtime explainability techniques as suggested by AI governance experts for addressing those fears. Finally, we provide a preliminary prototype of an Agentic AI Card that can help companies feel at ease deploying agents at scale.

</details>


### [341] [Bias in Surface Electromyography Features across a Demographically Diverse Cohort](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14460)
*Aditi Agrawal,Celine John Philip,Giancarlo K. Sagastume,Marcus A. Battraw,Wilsaan M. Joiner,Jonathon S. Schofield,Lee M. Miller,Richard S. Whittle*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 该研究分析了人口统计学差异对表面肌电信号特征的影响，发现33%的常用sEMG特征与人口统计学特征显著相关，这对开发公平无偏的神经接口具有重要意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前sEMG技术在不同用户间性能不一致，个体差异（如年龄、BMI等）会显著改变信号质量，导致sEMG特征高度个性化，需要繁琐的个性化调整。这种变异性对基于sEMG的辅助设备和神经接口特别重要，因为sEMG特征中的人口统计学偏见可能阻碍广泛公平的部署。

Method: 研究分析了来自81名人口统计学多样化个体的数据集，提取了147个常见sEMG特征。使用混合效应线性模型和偏最小二乘法分析，考虑了年龄、性别、身高、体重、皮肤特性、皮下脂肪和毛发密度等人口统计学变量。

Result: 研究发现33%（147个中的49个）常用sEMG特征与人口统计学特征存在显著关联。这些人口统计学差异会影响基于机器学习的姿态解码性能。

Conclusion: 人口统计学差异显著影响sEMG信号特征，这一发现有助于指导开发适用于多样化人群的公平无偏的sEMG基神经接口，促进更广泛和公平的技术部署。

Abstract: Neuromotor decoding from upper-limb electromyography (sEMG) can enhance human-machine interfaces and offer a more natural means of controlling prosthetic limbs, virtual reality, and household electronics. Unfortunately, current sEMG technology does not always perform consistently across users because individual differences such as age and body mass index, among many others, can substantially alter signal quality. This variability makes sEMG characteristics highly idiosyncratic, often necessitating laborious personalization and iterative tuning to achieve reliable performance. This variability has particular import for sEMG-based assistive devices and neural interfaces, where demographic biases in sEMG features could undermine broad and fair deployment.
  In this study, we explore how demographic differences affect the sEMG signals produced and their implications for machine learning-based gesture decoding. We analyze the data set provided by, in which we derive 147 common sEMG features extracted from 81 demographically diverse individuals performing discrete hand gestures. Using mixed-effects linear models and partial least squares (PLS) analysis, which take into consideration demographic variables (including age, sex, height, weight, skin properties, subcutaneous fat, and hair density), we identify that 33\% (49 of 147) of commonly used sEMG features show significant associations with demographic characteristics. These results may help guide the development of fair and unbiased sEMG-based neural interfaces across a diverse population.

</details>


### [342] [Human Centered Non Intrusive Driver State Modeling Using Personalized Physiological Signals in Real World Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11549)
*David Puertas-Ramirez,Raul Fernandez-Matellan,David Martin Gomez,Jesus G. Boticario*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 个性化驾驶员状态监测在L2-L3级自动驾驶中至关重要，通用模型准确率仅54%，而个性化模型可达92.68%，凸显个性化生理监测的必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在SAE L2-L3级自动驾驶中，驾驶员仍需监督系统并响应接管请求，但现有驾驶员监测系统依赖通用模型，忽略了驾驶员个体生理差异，可能导致监测不准确。

Method: 使用Empatica E4可穿戴传感器在真实L2级车辆中采集多模态生理信号（皮电活动、心率、温度、运动数据），将生理信号转换为二维表示，采用基于预训练ResNet50特征提取器的多模态深度学习架构，对四位驾驶员进行个性化建模。

Result: 个性化模型平均准确率达92.68%，而跨用户训练的通用模型准确率降至54%，表明驾驶员生理模式存在显著个体差异，通用模型在跨用户泛化方面存在严重局限性。

Conclusion: 未来自动驾驶车辆需要自适应、个性化的驾驶员监测系统，自动驾驶系统应适应每位驾驶员的独特生理特征，个性化建模是实现安全人机协作的关键。

Abstract: In vehicles with partial or conditional driving automation (SAE Levels 2-3), the driver remains responsible for supervising the system and responding to take-over requests. Therefore, reliable driver monitoring is essential for safe human-automation collaboration. However, most existing Driver Monitoring Systems rely on generalized models that ignore individual physiological variability. In this study, we examine the feasibility of personalized driver state modeling using non-intrusive physiological sensing during real-world automated driving. We conducted experiments in an SAE Level 2 vehicle using an Empatica E4 wearable sensor to capture multimodal physiological signals, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, temperature, and motion data. To leverage deep learning architectures designed for images, we transformed the physiological signals into two-dimensional representations and processed them using a multimodal architecture based on pre-trained ResNet50 feature extractors. Experiments across four drivers demonstrate substantial interindividual variability in physiological patterns related to driver awareness. Personalized models achieved an average accuracy of 92.68%, whereas generalized models trained on multiple users dropped to an accuracy of 54%, revealing substantial limitations in cross-user generalization. These results underscore the necessity of adaptive, personalized driver monitoring systems for future automated vehicles and imply that autonomous systems should adapt to each driver's unique physiological profile.

</details>


### [343] [Creo: From One-Shot Image Generation to Progressive, Co-Creative Ideation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13956)
*Zoe De Simone,Angie Boggust,Fredo Durand,Ashia Wilson,Arvind Satyanarayan*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: Creo是一个多阶段文本到图像生成系统，通过从粗略草图到高分辨率输出的渐进式生成，提供中间抽象层让用户进行增量编辑，增强用户控制感和创意所有权。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像系统存在三个主要问题：1）系统为用户做出隐式视觉决策；2）过早引入精细细节会限制用户保持选项开放的能力；3）编辑时难以控制的意外变化会降低用户控制感。需要一种能支持创意发展过程、让用户保持控制权的生成系统。

Method: Creo采用多阶段生成方法：从粗略草图开始，逐步提升分辨率，暴露中间抽象层供用户编辑。系统提供手动更改和AI辅助操作，通过锁定机制保护先前决策，确保后续编辑仅影响指定区域或属性。系统应用差异而非重新生成完整图像，减少漂移问题。

Result: 与一次性生成基线相比，用户对Creo输出有更强的所有权感，能够追溯图像构建过程中的决策。基于嵌入的分析显示Creo输出比一次性结果更加多样化。参与者认为Creo能更好地支持创意探索和保持选项开放。

Conclusion: 多阶段生成结合中间控制和决策锁定是提高生成系统可控性、用户能动性、创造性和输出多样性的关键设计原则。Creo通过渐进式生成和用户参与决策循环，有效解决了现有文本到图像系统的对齐问题。

Abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) systems enable rapid generation of high-fidelity imagery but are misaligned with how visual ideas develop. T2I systems generate outputs that make implicit visual decisions on behalf of the user, often introduce fine-grained details that can anchor users prematurely and limit their ability to keep options open early on, and cause unintended changes during editing that are difficult to correct and reduce users' sense of control. To address these concerns, we present Creo, a multi-stage T2I system that scaffolds image generation by progressing from rough sketches to high-resolution outputs, exposing intermediary abstractions where users can make incremental changes. Sketch-like abstractions invite user editing and allow users to keep design options open when ideas are still forming due to their provisional nature. Each stage in Creo can be modified with manual changes and AI-assisted operations, enabling fine-grained, step-wise control through a locking mechanism that preserves prior decisions so subsequent edits affect only specified regions or attributes. Users remain in the loop, making and verifying decisions across stages, while the system applies diffs instead of regenerating full images, reducing drift as fidelity increases. A comparative study with a one-shot baseline shows that participants felt stronger ownership over Creo outputs, as they were able to trace their decisions in building up the image. Furthermore, embedding-based analysis indicates that Creo outputs are less homogeneous than one-shot results. These findings suggest that multi-stage generation, combined with intermediate control and decision locking, is a key design principle for improving controllability, user agency, creativity, and output diversity in generative systems.

</details>


### [344] [Teaching Robots to Interpret Social Interactions through Lexically-guided Dynamic Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10895)
*Tongfei Bian,Mathieu Chollet,Tanaya Guha*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: SocialLDG：一个用于机器人社交智能的多任务学习框架，通过动态图学习建模用户内部状态与可观察行为之间的关系，在人类-机器人社交交互数据集上达到SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为实现机器人的社交智能，需要能够从用户当前行为推断其内部状态、预测未来行为并适当响应。现有方法未能充分建模内部状态（潜在）与行为（可观察）之间的动态关系，而这些状态源于相同的底层社会认知过程并相互影响。

Method: 提出SocialLDG多任务学习框架：1）将用户内部状态和行为建模为六个不同任务；2）使用语言模型为每个任务引入词汇先验；3）采用动态图学习建模随时间演化的任务亲和性。框架支持任务可扩展性，避免灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在两个公开的具有挑战性的人类-机器人社交交互数据集上达到最先进性能；展示强大的任务可扩展性，能够无缝学习新任务而不发生灾难性遗忘；通过显式建模任务亲和性，提供对人类决策过程中不同交互如何随时间展开以及内部状态与可观察行为如何相互影响的洞察。

Conclusion: SocialLDG通过建模内部状态与行为之间的动态关系，为机器人社交智能提供了有效框架。其多任务学习架构、语言模型先验和动态图学习方法不仅实现了优越性能，还提供了对人类社会认知过程的可解释性理解，支持任务扩展而不遗忘。

Abstract: For a robot to be called socially intelligent, it must be able to infer users internal states from their current behaviour, predict the users future behaviour, and if required, respond appropriately. In this work, we investigate how robots can be endowed with such social intelligence by modelling the dynamic relationship between user's internal states (latent) and actions (observable state). Our premise is that these states arise from the same underlying socio-cognitive process and influence each other dynamically. Drawing inspiration from theories in Cognitive Science, we propose a novel multi-task learning framework, termed as \textbf{SocialLDG} that explicitly models the dynamic relationship among the states represent as six distinct tasks. Our framework uses a language model to introduce lexical priors for each task and employs dynamic graph learning to model task affinity evolving with time. SocialLDG has three advantages: First, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on two challenging human-robot social interaction datasets available publicly. Second, it supports strong task scalability by learning new tasks seamlessly without catastrophic forgetting. Finally, benefiting from explicit modelling task affinity, it offers insights on how different interactions unfolds in time and how the internal states and observable actions influence each other in human decision making.

</details>


### [345] [FocalLens: Visualizing Narratives through Focalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14456)
*S M Raihanul Alam,Md Dilshadur Rahman,Md Naimul Hoque*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: FocalLens：一种基于叙事聚焦理论的新型叙事可视化工具，通过捕捉角色视角、参与度和叙事层次来揭示复杂叙事结构


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有叙事可视化主要局限于角色和地点的共现时间线，忽略了聚焦、因果关系、言语等重要复杂叙事成分。需要开发能够捕捉和可视化这些未充分探索的叙事成分的工具，为文学分析和创作提供新的分析维度。

Method: 提出FocalLens可视化方法，基于叙事聚焦理论建立理论框架，定义聚焦的各种类型和层面。开发交互式工具实现文本与可视化之间的流畅交互，通过定性研究评估工具效果，邀请4位作家和学者分析自己的草稿和经典作品。

Result: FocalLens能够有效捕捉不同角色对事件的感知方式、直接参与者、间接观察者和叙事者等多层次叙事关系。定性研究表明，该工具为作家和学者提供了传统方法无法获得的分析视角，增加了工作流程的新维度。

Conclusion: FocalLens通过聚焦理论为叙事可视化提供了新的理论基础和实现方法，成功揭示了复杂叙事结构。研究识别了设计启示和未来方向，为叙事分析和创作工具的发展开辟了新路径。

Abstract: Visualizing narratives is useful to writers to reflect on unfinished drafts and identify unintentional biases and inconsistencies. Literary scholars can use the visualizations to identify nuanced patterns and literary styles from written text. Current narrative visualization is limited to representing character and location co-occurrences in a timeline, omitting important and complex narrative components such as focalization, causality, and speech. This paper aims to capture and visualize underexplored, complex narrative components as a basis for narrative visualization. As a starting point, we propose a new narrative visualization, named FocalLens, that uses focalization, the component that establishes who sees or perceives the events in a narrative, for representing the narrative. We provide the theoretical foundation of focalization and describe various types and facets of focalization. The details are incorporated in the novel visualization that captures how different characters perceive an event, who directly participate in an event, who indirectly observe the event, and who narrate the event. We also developed a tool that provides fluid interaction between the text and the proposed visualization. The tool was evaluated with four writers and scholars in a qualitative study, where writers analyzed their draft stories and scholars analyzed well-known stories. The findings suggest the tool added a new dimension to the workflow for writers and scholars, an analytical lens that is not available otherwise. We conclude by identifying design implications and future directions.

</details>


### [346] [Cognitive Offloading in Agile Teams: How Artificial Intelligence Reshapes Risk Assessment and Planning Quality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13814)
*Adriana Caraeni,Alexander Shick,Andrew Lan*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 研究通过实验比较AI-only、human-only和hybrid三种敏捷冲刺规划模式，发现AI-only虽高效但风险捕获率低且返工率高，human-only适应性强但开销大，提出混合规划理论框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI在敏捷项目管理中显示出自动化潜力，但其对团队认知的影响尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探究AI在敏捷冲刺规划中的认知卸载效应，评估不同规划模式在真实项目中的效果。

Method: 在中型数字机构进行三条件对照实验：AI-only、human-only和hybrid规划模式，应用于真实客户交付项目。使用定量指标（估算准确性、返工率、范围变更恢复时间）和定性指标（规划稳健性）评估效果。

Result: AI-only规划虽最小化时间和成本，但显著降低风险捕获率，因未明假设导致返工增加；human-only规划在适应性方面表现优异但产生大量开销；混合模式平衡了效率与风险识别。

Conclusion: 提出AI-人类混合冲刺规划理论框架：算法工具负责估算和待办事项格式化，人类负责风险评估和模糊性解决。研究挑战了效率等同于有效性的假设，为组织提供了增强而非削弱团队认知的治理策略。

Abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have shown promise in automating key aspects of Agile project management, yet their impact on team cognition remains underexplored. In this work, we investigate cognitive offloading in Agile sprint planning by conducting a controlled, three-condition experiment comparing AI-only, human-only, and hybrid planning models on a live client deliverable at a mid-sized digital agency. Using quantitative metrics -- including estimation accuracy, rework rates, and scope change recovery time -- alongside qualitative indicators of planning robustness, we evaluate each model's effectiveness beyond raw efficiency. We find that while AI-only planning minimizes time and cost, it significantly degrades risk capture rates and increases rework due to unstated assumptions, whereas human-only planning excels at adaptability but incurs substantial overhead. Drawing on these findings, we propose a theoretical framework for hybrid AI-human sprint planning that assigns algorithmic tools to estimation and backlog formatting while mandating human deliberation for risk assessment and ambiguity resolution. Our results challenge the assumption that efficiency equates to effectiveness, offering actionable governance strategies for organizations seeking to augment rather than erode team cognition.

</details>


### [347] [Young people's perceptions and recommendations for conversational generative artificial intelligence in youth mental health](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13381)
*Adam Poulsen,Ian B. Hickie,Carla Gorban,Zsofi de Haan,William Capon,Ebenezer Eyeson-Annan,Jalal Radwan,Elizabeth M. Scott,Frank Iorfino,Haley M. LaMonica*

Main category: cs.HC

TL;DR: 年轻用户对心理健康AI聊天机器人Mia的感知研究，通过协同设计探讨用户需求和服务整合建议


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI聊天机器人可能有益于青少年心理健康，但年轻人的观点尚未充分探索。研究旨在了解年轻人对心理健康AI聊天机器人的态度、需求和期望，为服务整合提供依据。

Method: 采用协同设计方法，32名年轻人参与在线研讨会，探讨他们对心理健康AI聊天机器人的看法，并为重新设计Mia（原为澳大利亚青年服务专业人员设计）以及将其整合到服务中制定建议。

Result: 研究得出四个主题：(1) 人性化AI而不去人性化关怀；(2) 我需要知道"引擎盖下"的内容；(3) 合适的工具、合适的地点、合适的时间？；(4) 在安全基础上使其个性化。这些发现揭示了年轻人对心理健康AI聊天机器人的态度、需求和具体要求。

Conclusion: 本研究为青少年心理健康领域生成式AI聊天机器人的伦理、设计、开发、实施和治理提供了重要见解，特别是通过协同设计系统需求，为服务整合提供了关键指导。

Abstract: Conversational generative artificial intelligence agents (or genAI chatbots) could benefit youth mental health, yet young people's perspectives remain underexplored. We examined the Mental health Intelligence Agent (Mia), a genAI chatbot originally designed for professionals in Australian youth services. Following co-design, 32 young people participated in online workshops exploring their perceptions of genAI chatbots in youth mental health and to develop recommendations for reconceptualising Mia for consumers and integrating it into services. Four themes were developed: (1) Humanising AI without dehumanising care, (2) I need to know what's under the hood, (3) Right tool, right place, right time?, and (4) Making it mine on safe ground. This study offers insights into young people's attitudes, needs, and requirements regarding genAI chatbots in youth mental health, with key implications for service integration. Additionally, by co-designing system requirements, this work informs the ethics, design, development, implementation, and governance of genAI chatbots in youth mental health contexts.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [348] [A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13427)
*Junlin Li,Xinhao Song,Siqi Wang,Haibin Huang,Yili Zhao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出统一框架，将文本驱动的运动编辑和同拓扑结构重定向视为条件传输的同一生成任务，仅通过调节语义或结构条件信号区分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法中，运动编辑和同拓扑结构重定向使用碎片化的流程，具有不兼容的输入和表示：编辑依赖专门的生成引导，而重定向则推迟到几何后处理。需要统一视角简化部署并提高结构一致性。

Method: 基于流匹配技术，构建联合条件化的整流流运动模型，同时以文本提示和目标骨骼结构为条件。采用DiT风格Transformer架构，通过逐关节标记化和显式关节自注意力严格实施运动学依赖，并使用多条件分类器自由引导策略平衡文本遵循与骨骼一致性。

Result: 在SnapMoGen和多角色Mixamo子集上的实验表明，单个训练模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本同拓扑结构重定向。统一方法简化了部署，相比任务特定基线提高了结构一致性。

Conclusion: 通过条件传输的统一生成框架，将运动编辑和重定向视为同一任务的不同实例，仅通过调节语义或结构条件信号区分，实现了更简化的部署和更好的结构一致性。

Abstract: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

</details>


### [349] [Fast Voxelization and Level of Detail for Microgeometry Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13191)
*Javier Fabre,Carlos Castillo,Carlos Rodriguez-Pardo,Jorge Lopez-Moreno*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种高效并行体素化方法和基于分层SGGX聚类的表示，用于处理具有各向异性散射特性的稀疏微结构材料的渲染


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多材料由于微观结构形状和局部排列而表现出各向异性光散射模式，如纤维表面或拉丝金属的脊线。这些稀疏结构需要高空间分辨率作为体数据表示，但体素数据获取耗时耗内存，且传统渲染方法需要额外的LOD数据结构来聚合视觉外观

Method: 1) 设计高效并行体素化方法，支持多分辨率级别的快速数据聚合；2) 提出基于分层SGGX聚类的新表示方法，比基线方法提供更好精度；3) 开发基于CUDA的体素化器实现，在三角形网格和显式纤维建模的体素织物上进行测试；4) 基于提出的LOD渲染模型实现路径追踪器

Result: 验证了CUDA实现的体素化器在三角形网格和体素织物上的性能，展示了基于提出的LOD渲染模型的路径追踪器生成的结果，证明新表示方法比基线方法具有更好的精度

Conclusion: 提出的高效并行体素化方法和分层SGGX聚类表示能够有效处理具有各向异性散射特性的稀疏微结构材料，在保持精度的同时提高了渲染效率

Abstract: Many materials show anisotropic light scattering patterns due to the shape and local alignment of their underlying micro structures: surfaces with small elements such as fibers, or the ridges of a brushed metal, are very sparse and require a high spatial resolution to be properly represented as a volume. The acquisition of voxel data from such objects is a time and memory-intensive task, and most rendering approaches require an additional Level-of-Detail (LoD) data structure to aggregate the visual appearance, as observed from multiple distances, in order to reduce the number of samples computed per pixel (E.g.: MIP mapping). In this work we introduce first, an efficient parallel voxelization method designed to facilitate fast data aggregation at multiple resolution levels, and second, a novel representation based on hierarchical SGGX clustering that provides better accuracy than baseline methods. We validate our approach with a CUDA-based implementation of the voxelizer, tested both on triangle meshes and volumetric fabrics modeled with explicit fibers. Finally, we show the results generated with a path tracer based on the proposed LoD rendering model.

</details>


<div id='cs.DS'></div>

# cs.DS [[Back]](#toc)

### [350] [Tight Bounds for Learning Polyhedra with a Margin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14614)
*Shyamal Patel,Santosh Vempala*

Main category: cs.DS

TL;DR: 提出了一种学习k个半空间交集的PAC算法，运行时间为多项式依赖k、ε和ρ，指数部分为O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k))，显著改进了先前工作，匹配了密码学和统计查询下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前关于学习半空间交集的工作要么在k上具有指数依赖，要么在ρ⁻¹上具有指数依赖，这在实际应用中不可行。需要开发更高效的算法来匹配已知的理论下界。

Method: 设计了一种新的PAC学习算法，能够处理具有ρ边距的k个半空间交集。算法扩展到更一般的设置，即只保证大多数点距离多面体边界至少ρ，使其适用于连续分布。

Result: 算法运行时间为poly(k, ε⁻¹, ρ⁻¹)·exp(O(√(n log(1/ρ) log k)))，改进了先前工作的指数依赖，匹配了密码学和统计查询下界（在指数中对数因子范围内）。

Conclusion: 该算法在理论和实际意义上都是最优的，因为它匹配了已知下界，同时扩展到更一般的分布设置，为高效学习半空间交集提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: We give an algorithm for PAC learning intersections of $k$ halfspaces with a $ρ$ margin to within error $\varepsilon$ that runs in time $\textsf{poly}(k, \varepsilon^{-1}, ρ^{-1}) \cdot \exp \left(O(\sqrt{n \log(1/ρ) \log k})\right)$. Notably, this improves on prior work which had an exponential dependence on either $k$ or $ρ^{-1}$ and matches known cryptographic and Statistical Query lower bounds up to the logarithmic factors in $k$ and $ρ$ in the exponent. Our learning algorithm extends to the more general setting when we are only promised that most points have distance at least $ρ$ from the boundary of the polyhedron, making it applicable to continuous distributions as well.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [351] [Metric-agnostic Learning-to-Rank via Boosting and Rank Approximation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15101)
*Camilo Gomez,Pengyang Wang,Yanjie Fu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出一种新颖的列表式学习排序框架，通过可微排序损失函数解决传统方法对单一排序指标的依赖问题，实现高效且泛化性强的排序


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前学习排序方法依赖单一前缀排序指标（如NDCG或MAP），存在两个主要问题：1）非可微问题：直接优化排序函数本质上是非平滑的，导致训练过程不稳定且低效；2）排序效用有限：基于单一指标优化难以泛化到其他感兴趣的排序指标

Method: 提出新颖的列表式学习排序框架：1）设计新的可微排序损失函数，结合排序算子的平滑近似和每个查询的平均均方损失；2）采用梯度提升机来最小化针对每个列表提出的损失函数

Result: 大量实验结果表明，该方法在信息检索指标上优于当前最先进方法，同时保持了相似的效率

Conclusion: 提出的框架解决了传统学习排序方法的局限性，通过可微排序损失实现了更高效和泛化性更强的排序性能

Abstract: Learning-to-Rank (LTR) is a supervised machine learning approach that constructs models specifically designed to order a set of items or documents based on their relevance or importance to a given query or context. Despite significant success in real-world information retrieval systems, current LTR methods rely on one prefix ranking metric (e.g., such as Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (NDCG) or Mean Average Precision (MAP)) for optimizing the ranking objective function. Such metric-dependent setting limits LTR methods from two perspectives: (1) non-differentiable problem: directly optimizing ranking functions over a given ranking metric is inherently non-smooth, making the training process unstable and inefficient; (2) limited ranking utility: optimizing over one single metric makes it difficult to generalize well to other ranking metrics of interest. To address the above issues, we propose a novel listwise LTR framework for efficient and generalizable ranking purpose. Specifically, we propose a new differentiable ranking loss that combines a smooth approximation to the ranking operator with the average mean square loss per query. Then, we adapt gradient-boosting machines to minimize our proposed loss with respect to each list, a novel contribution. Finally, extensive experimental results confirm that our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art in information retrieval measures with similar efficiency.

</details>


### [352] [GenRec: A Preference-Oriented Generative Framework for Large-Scale Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14878)
*Yanyan Zou,Junbo Qi,Lunsong Huang,Yu Li,Kewei Xu,Jiabao Gao,Binglei Zhao,Xuanhua Yang,Sulong Xu,Shengjie Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: GenRec是一个部署在京东App上的偏好导向生成推荐框架，通过页面级NTP训练、非对称线性令牌合并器和GRPO-SR强化学习，解决了生成式推荐在工业规模应用中的三个核心挑战，在线A/B测试中点击量和交易量分别提升9.5%和8.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决生成式推荐在大规模工业系统中面临的三个挑战：1) 分页请求机制下相同模型输入产生不一致输出；2) 基于语义ID的多令牌物品表示编码长用户行为序列成本过高；3) 生成策略与细微用户偏好信号的对齐问题。

Method: 提出GenRec框架：1) 页面级NTP任务，监督整个交互页面而非单个物品，提供更密集梯度信号并解决点式训练的一对多歧义；2) 非对称线性令牌合并器，压缩提示中的多令牌语义ID同时保持全分辨率解码，输入长度减少约2倍；3) GRPO-SR强化学习方法，结合组相对策略优化与NLL正则化保证训练稳定性，使用混合奖励（稠密奖励模型+相关性门控）缓解奖励攻击。

Result: 在为期一个月的在线A/B测试中，GenRec相比现有流水线实现了点击量9.5%和交易量8.7%的提升。

Conclusion: GenRec成功解决了生成式推荐在工业规模部署中的关键挑战，通过统一的仅解码器架构实现了性能显著提升，为大规模推荐系统的生成式检索提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Generative Retrieval (GR) offers a promising paradigm for recommendation through next-token prediction (NTP). However, scaling it to large-scale industrial systems introduces three challenges: (i) within a single request, the identical model inputs may produce inconsistent outputs due to the pagination request mechanism; (ii) the prohibitive cost of encoding long user behavior sequences with multi-token item representations based on semantic IDs, and (iii) aligning the generative policy with nuanced user preference signals. We present GenRec, a preference-oriented generative framework deployed on the JD App that addresses above challenges within a single decoder-only architecture. For training objective, we propose Page-wise NTP task, which supervises over an entire interaction page rather than each interacted item individually, providing denser gradient signal and resolving the one-to-many ambiguity of point-wise training. On the prefilling side, an asymmetric linear Token Merger compresses multi-token Semantic IDs in the prompt while preserving full-resolution decoding, reducing input length by ~2X with negligible accuracy loss. To further align outputs with user satisfaction, we introduce GRPO-SR, a reinforcement learning method that pairs Group Relative Policy Optimization with NLL regularization for training stability, and employs Hybrid Rewards combining a dense reward model with a relevance gate to mitigate reward hacking. In month-long online A/B tests serving production traffic, GenRec achieves 9.5% improvement in click count and 8.7% in transaction count over the existing pipeline.

</details>


### [353] [Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14613)
*Xiangrui Xiong,Hang Liang,Baiyang Chen,Zifei Pan,Yanli Lee*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: U-GLAD：一种不确定性感知的生成式学习路径推荐框架，通过高斯LSTM建模认知状态分布，使用目标导向概念编码器动态对齐概念语义与学习目标，并采用扩散模型生成下一个最优概念的潜在表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前学习路径推荐方法存在两个主要问题：1）未能考虑历史交互中的不确定性（如侥幸猜对或意外失误）；2）缺乏对不同学习目标的适应性。这导致推荐结果存在偏差且不够个性化。

Method: U-GLAD框架包含三个核心组件：1）高斯LSTM将认知状态建模为概率分布，捕捉学习者的真实潜在状态；2）目标导向概念编码器使用多头注意力和目标特定变换，动态对齐概念语义与个体学习目标；3）生成式扩散模型预测下一个最优概念的潜在表示，而非传统的判别式排序方法。

Result: 在三个公共数据集上的广泛评估表明，U-GLAD显著优于代表性基线方法。进一步分析证实了其在感知交互不确定性和提供稳定、目标驱动的推荐路径方面的卓越能力。

Conclusion: U-GLAD通过建模认知状态不确定性、动态对齐概念语义与学习目标，以及采用生成式扩散模型，实现了更准确、个性化且稳定的学习路径推荐，有效解决了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: Learning Path Recommendation (LPR) is critical for personalized education, yet current methods often fail to account for historical interaction uncertainty (e.g., lucky guesses or accidental slips) and lack adaptability to diverse learning goals. We propose U-GLAD (Uncertainty-aware Generative Learning Path Recommendation with Cognition-Adaptive Diffusion). To address representation bias, the framework models cognitive states as probability distributions, capturing the learner's underlying true state via a Gaussian LSTM. To ensure highly personalized recommendation, a goal-oriented concept encoder utilizes multi-head attention and objective-specific transformations to dynamically align concept semantics with individual learning goals, generating uniquely tailored embeddings. Unlike traditional discriminative ranking approaches, our model employs a generative diffusion model to predict the latent representation of the next optimal concept. Extensive evaluations on three public datasets demonstrate that U-GLAD significantly outperforms representative baselines. Further analyses confirm its superior capability in perceiving interaction uncertainty and providing stable, goal-driven recommendation paths.

</details>


### [354] [NewsTorch: A PyTorch-based Toolkit for Learner-oriented News Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14510)
*Rongyao Wang,Veronica Liesaputra,Zhiyi Huang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: NewsTorch是一个基于PyTorch的新闻推荐工具包，旨在为学习者提供模块化、可扩展的框架和用户友好的GUI平台，支持数据集处理、模型训练和标准化评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 新闻推荐系统研究日益重要，但缺乏专门面向学习者的工具包，这阻碍了新闻推荐领域的研究进展。需要提供一个既能帮助学习者理解概念又能获得实践经验的工具。

Method: 开发了基于PyTorch的NewsTorch工具包，采用模块化、解耦和可扩展的架构设计，提供学习者友好的GUI平台，支持数据集下载与预处理，以及最先进的神经新闻推荐模型的训练、验证和测试。

Result: 创建了一个开源工具包，支持标准化评估指标，确保公平比较和可复现实验。工具已在GitHub上发布：https://github.com/whonor/NewsTorch。

Conclusion: NewsTorch填补了新闻推荐领域缺乏专门学习者工具包的空白，为研究人员和学习者提供了一个实用的平台，有助于推动新闻推荐系统研究的进展。

Abstract: News recommender systems are devised to alleviate the information overload, attracting more and more researchers' attention in recent years. The lack of a dedicated learner-oriented news recommendation toolkit hinders the advancement of research in news recommendation. We propose a PyTorch-based news recommendation toolkit called NewsTorch, developed to support learners in acquiring both conceptual understanding and practical experience. This toolkit provides a modular, decoupled, and extensible framework with a learner-friendly GUI platform that supports dataset downloading and preprocessing. It also enables training, validation, and testing of state-of-the-art neural news recommendation models with standardized evaluation metrics, ensuring fair comparison and reproducible experiments. Our open-source toolkit is released on Github: https://github.com/whonor/NewsTorch.

</details>


### [355] [FRAGATA: Semantic Retrieval of HPC Support Tickets via Hybrid RAG over 20 Years of Request Tracker History](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13721)
*Santiago Paramés-Estévez,Nicolás Filloy-Montesino,Jorge Fernández-Fabeiro,José Carlos Mouriño-Gallego*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Fragata是一个语义票据搜索系统，用于改善超级计算中心技术支持的票务搜索能力，结合现代信息检索技术解决传统RT系统搜索限制问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Galician超级计算中心（CESGA）使用Request Tracker（RT）管理超过20年的已解决事件记录，但RT内置搜索引擎存在显著限制，阻碍了技术支持人员对历史知识的有效重用。

Method: 开发Fragata语义票据搜索系统，结合现代信息检索技术处理完整的RT历史数据。系统支持多语言、容错拼写错误和查询表达差异，架构部署在CESGA基础设施上，支持增量更新且不中断服务，并将计算密集型任务卸载到FinisTerrae III超级计算机。

Result: 初步结果显示，与RT原生搜索相比，Fragata系统在语义搜索能力方面取得了显著的定性改进。

Conclusion: Fragata系统成功解决了RT搜索限制问题，通过语义搜索技术提升了技术支持团队对历史事件知识的重用效率，为超级计算中心的技术支持工作提供了更有效的知识管理工具。

Abstract: The technical support team of a supercomputing centre accumulates, over the course of decades, a large volume of resolved incidents that constitute critical operational knowledge. At the Galician Supercomputing Center (CESGA) this history has been managed for over twenty years with Request Tracker (RT), whose built-in search engine has significant limitations that hinder knowledge reuse by the support staff. This paper presents Fragata, a semantic ticket search system that combines modern information retrieval techniques with the full RT history. The system can find relevant past incidents regardless of language, the presence of typos, or the specific wording of the query. The architecture is deployed on CESGA's infrastructure, supports incremental updates without service interruption, and offloads the most expensive stages to the FinisTerrae III supercomputer. Preliminary results show a substantial qualitative improvement over RT's native search.

</details>


<div id='cs.PL'></div>

# cs.PL [[Back]](#toc)

### [356] [Prism: Symbolic Superoptimization of Tensor Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15272)
*Mengdi Wu,Xiaoyu Jiang,Oded Padon,Zhihao Jia*

Main category: cs.PL

TL;DR: Prism是首个张量程序符号超级优化器，使用sGraph符号层次表示，通过两级搜索（符号图构造和具体实现实例化）实现优化，结合符号推理、代数恒等式和硬件约束进行结构化剪枝。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量程序优化方法在可扩展性和搜索空间处理方面存在局限，需要结合符号推理和硬件约束的系统化方法，以提升现代机器学习工作负载的优化效果。

Method: 提出sGraph符号层次表示，采用两级搜索策略：1) 构造表示程序族的符号图；2) 将符号图实例化为具体实现。开发了符号图生成、基于e-graph重写的等价性验证和通过自动调优的参数实例化技术。

Result: 在五个常用LLM工作负载上评估，Prism相比最佳超级优化器实现2.2倍加速，相比最佳基于编译器的方法实现4.9倍加速，同时将端到端优化时间减少最多3.4倍。

Conclusion: Prism通过符号表示和两级搜索策略，将穷举搜索的严谨性与现代ML工作负载所需可扩展性相结合，为张量程序优化提供了有效的新方法。

Abstract: This paper presents Prism, the first symbolic superoptimizer for tensor programs. The key idea is sGraph, a symbolic, hierarchical representation that compactly encodes large classes of tensor programs by symbolically representing some execution parameters. Prism organizes optimization as a two-level search: it constructs symbolic graphs that represent families of programs, and then instantiates them into concrete implementations. This formulation enables structured pruning of provably suboptimal regions of the search space using symbolic reasoning over operator semantics, algebraic identities, and hardware constraints.
  We develop techniques for efficient symbolic graph generation, equivalence verification via e-graph rewriting, and parameter instantiation through auto-tuning. Together, these components allow Prism to bridge the rigor of exhaustive search with the scalability required for modern ML workloads. Evaluation on five commonly used LLM workloads shows that Prism achieves up to $2.2\times$ speedup over best superoptimizers and $4.9\times$ over best compiler-based approaches, while reducing end-to-end optimization time by up to $3.4\times$.

</details>


### [357] [Nautilus: An Auto-Scheduling Tensor Compiler for Efficient Tiled GPU Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14825)
*Yifan Zhao,Yuchen Yang,Matei Budiu,Sasa Misailovic*

Main category: cs.PL

TL;DR: Nautilus是一个新颖的张量编译器，能够从高级数学描述自动生成高效的GPU内核，实现端到端的数学到内核优化，在注意力机制等复杂算子中自动发现类似FlashAttention-3的优化内核。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前张量编译器需要程序员手动进行大量优化工作，特别是在复杂算子如注意力机制中。现有系统难以自动化地应用高级数学优化和瓦片优化，导致优化负担重且效率受限。

Method: Nautilus采用连续降级设计，将高级代数规范编译为高效的瓦片GPU内核。系统包含新颖的自动调度器，能够发现高级优化序列，同时保持瓦片优化器所需的规则程序结构。支持高级优化、表达式重写和瓦片优化的联合应用。

Result: 在NVIDIA GH200和RTX 5090 GPU上，对5个基于Transformer的模型和150个评估配置进行测试，Nautilus在GH200上比最先进编译器吞吐量提升高达23%，在RTX 5090上提升高达42%。在许多长序列配置中，匹配或超过手动编写的cuDNN内核性能。

Conclusion: Nautilus是第一个能够从数学描述自动发现类似FlashAttention-3内核的端到端张量编译器，成功将优化负担从程序员转移到编译器，实现了完全自动化的数学到内核优化。

Abstract: We present Nautilus, a novel tensor compiler that moves toward fully automated math-to-kernel optimization. Nautilus compiles a high-level algebraic specification of tensor operators into efficient tiled GPU kernels. Nautilus's successive lowering design allows high-level optimizations, expression rewrites, and tile optimizations to be jointly applied in a single end-to-end system. Nautilus presents a novel auto-scheduler that discovers sequences of high-level optimizations, while preserving the regular program structure needed by tile optimizers. Nautilus's auto-scheduler captures complex interactions and trade-offs in the high-level optimizations, including aggressive global transformations like advanced reduction fusion. Nautilus is the first end-to-end tensor compiler capable of starting from a math-like description of attention and automatically discovering FlashAttention-3-like kernels, offloading the entire burden of optimization from the programmer to the compiler. Across five transformer-based models and 150 evaluation configurations on NVIDIA GH200 and RTX 5090 GPUs, Nautilus achieves up to 23% higher throughput than state-of-the-art compilers on GH200 and up to 42% on RTX 5090, while matching or exceeding manually written cuDNN kernels on many long-sequence configurations.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [358] [Robustness of Vision Foundation Models to Common Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14973)
*Hongbin Liu,Zhengyuan Jiang,Cheng Hong,Neil Zhenqiang Gong*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 首次系统研究视觉基础模型对常见图像编辑操作（如JPEG压缩、亮度对比度调整）的鲁棒性，提出三个鲁棒性度量指标，评估六个工业级基础模型，发现普遍不鲁棒，并提出微调方法提升鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉基础模型输出的图像嵌入向量会受到常见编辑操作（JPEG压缩、亮度对比度调整等）的影响，这些扰动可能改变嵌入向量并影响下游任务性能，但目前缺乏对此类扰动的系统性鲁棒性研究

Method: 提出三个鲁棒性度量指标，并制定五个期望的数学性质来分析这些指标；使用这些指标评估六个工业级基础模型（OpenAI、Meta等）在九种常见扰动类别下的表现；提出微调方法来提升鲁棒性而不牺牲实用性

Result: 发现基础模型普遍对常见扰动不鲁棒；常见扰动会降低下游应用性能（如分类准确率）；鲁棒性值可以预测性能影响；提出的微调方法能够有效提升鲁棒性

Conclusion: 这是首个系统研究基础模型对常见图像扰动鲁棒性的工作，揭示了工业级基础模型在此类扰动下的脆弱性，提出的鲁棒性度量指标和微调方法为提升模型鲁棒性提供了实用工具

Abstract: A vision foundation model outputs an embedding vector for an image, which can be affected by common editing operations (e.g., JPEG compression, brightness, contrast adjustments). These common perturbations alter embedding vectors and may impact the performance of downstream tasks using these embeddings. In this work, we present the first systematic study on foundation models' robustness to such perturbations. We propose three robustness metrics and formulate five desired mathematical properties for these metrics, analyzing which properties they satisfy or violate. Using these metrics, we evaluate six industry-scale foundation models (OpenAI, Meta) across nine common perturbation categories, finding them generally non-robust. We also show that common perturbations degrade downstream application performance (e.g., classification accuracy) and that robustness values can predict performance impacts. Finally, we propose a fine-tuning approach to improve robustness without sacrificing utility.

</details>


### [359] [Challenges and Future Directions in Agentic Reverse Engineering Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14317)
*Salem Radey,Jack West,Kassem Fawaz*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文分析了基于大语言模型的智能体系统在二进制逆向工程任务中的表现，识别了现有系统的局限性，并提出了未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于大语言模型的智能体系统在复杂安全任务（特别是二进制逆向工程）中应用日益广泛，但这些系统在实际场景中仍面临显著限制。现有系统在处理涉及混淆、时序和独特架构的复杂逆向工程场景时仍然失败，需要系统性地评估其性能并识别改进方向。

Method: 通过分析静态、动态和混合智能体在逆向工程任务中的表现，评估现有智能体工具的使用情况。研究识别了多个关键限制因素，包括令牌约束、混淆处理困难以及缺乏程序防护机制。

Result: 研究发现当前智能体系统在复杂逆向工程场景中存在显著局限性：令牌限制影响分析深度，混淆技术导致分析失败，缺乏程序防护机制增加安全风险。这些限制阻碍了智能体系统在实际安全任务中的有效应用。

Conclusion: 本文系统性地识别了基于大语言模型的智能体系统在二进制逆向工程中的当前挑战，包括令牌约束、混淆处理能力和防护机制缺失。研究为系统设计者从安全角度提出了明确的未来发展方向，以克服这些限制并提升智能体系统在复杂安全任务中的实用性。

Abstract: Agentic systems built on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used for complex security tasks, including binary reverse engineering (RE). Despite recent growth in popularity and capability, these systems continue to face limitations in realistic settings. Cutting-edge systems still fail in complex RE scenarios that involve obfuscation, timing, and unique architecture. In this work, we examine how agentic systems perform reverse engineering tasks with static, dynamic, and hybrid agents. Through an analysis of existing agentic tool usage, we identify several limitations, including token constraints, struggles with obfuscation, and a lack of program guardrails. From these findings, we outline current challenges and position future directions for system designers to overcome from a security perspective.

</details>


### [360] [MCPThreatHive: Automated Threat Intelligence for Model Context Protocol Ecosystems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13849)
*Yi Ting Shen,Kentaroh Toyoda,Alex Leung*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: MCPThreatHive：开源平台，自动化MCP威胁情报全生命周期管理，填补现有MCP安全工具的三个关键覆盖空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于MCP的智能体系统快速扩散带来了新的安全威胁类别，现有安全框架无法充分应对这些威胁。

Method: 开发MCPThreatHive平台，实现端到端MCP威胁情报自动化管理：包括多源数据收集、AI驱动的威胁提取分类、结构化知识图谱存储和交互式可视化。平台实施MCP-38威胁分类法（38个MCP特定威胁模式），映射到STRIDE、OWASP LLM应用Top 10和OWASP智能体应用Top 10框架，采用复合风险评分模型进行量化优先级排序。

Result: 通过对比分析现有代表性MCP安全工具，识别出MCPThreatHive解决的三个关键覆盖空白：不完整的组合攻击建模、缺乏持续威胁情报、缺少统一的多框架分类。

Conclusion: MCPThreatHive填补了现有MCP安全工具的不足，提供了全面的威胁情报管理平台，能够更好地应对MCP智能体系统面临的安全挑战。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based agentic systems has introduced a new category of security threats that existing frameworks are inadequately equipped to address. We present MCPThreatHive, an open-source platform that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of MCP threat intelligence: from continuous, multi-source data collection through AI-driven threat extraction and classification, to structured knowledge graph storage and interactive visualization. The platform operationalizes the MCP-38 threat taxonomy, a curated set of 38 MCP-specific threat patterns mapped to STRIDE, OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications, and OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications. A composite risk scoring model provides quantitative prioritization. Through a comparative analysis of representative existing MCP security tools, we identify three critical coverage gaps that MCPThreatHive addresses: incomplete compositional attack modeling, absence of continuous threat intelligence, and lack of unified multi-framework classification.

</details>


### [361] [Secure and Privacy-Preserving Vertical Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13474)
*Shan Jin,Sai Rahul Rachuri,Yizhen Wang,Anderson C. A. Nascimento,Yiwei Cai*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 提出面向垂直联邦学习的端到端隐私保护框架，包含三种高效协议，通过多服务器MPC和差分隐私实现输入输出隐私保护，大幅降低计算通信开销


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决垂直联邦学习场景下的隐私保护问题，其中特征分布在客户端且标签不完全共享，需要同时保护输入和输出隐私，同时降低传统MPC方案的高计算通信开销

Method: 将联邦学习聚合器角色分布到多个服务器，运行安全多方计算协议进行模型和特征聚合，对最终发布模型应用差分隐私；优化方案支持纯全局和全局-局部模型更新，大幅减少MPC计算通信量

Result: 实验结果表明协议的有效性，相比朴素方案显著降低了计算和通信开销，同时实现了端到端的隐私保护

Conclusion: 提出的框架为垂直联邦学习提供了实用的隐私保护解决方案，通过多服务器MPC和差分隐私的组合，在保证隐私的同时实现了高效训练

Abstract: We propose a novel end-to-end privacy-preserving framework, instantiated by three efficient protocols for different deployment scenarios, covering both input and output privacy, for the vertically split scenario in federated learning (FL), where features are split across clients and labels are not shared by all parties. We do so by distributing the role of the aggregator in FL into multiple servers and having them run secure multiparty computation (MPC) protocols to perform model and feature aggregation and apply differential privacy (DP) to the final released model. While a naive solution would have the clients delegating the entirety of training to run in MPC between the servers, our optimized solution, which supports purely global and also global-local models updates with privacy-preserving, drastically reduces the amount of computation and communication performed using multiparty computation. The experimental results also show the effectiveness of our protocols.

</details>


### [362] [Anomaly Detection in IEC-61850 GOOSE Networks: Evaluating Unsupervised and Temporal Learning for Real-Time Intrusion Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14233)
*Joseph Moore*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文评估了无监督时序模型在IEC-61850 GOOSE协议入侵检测中的应用，比较了五种模型在实时性约束下的性能表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: IEC-61850 GOOSE协议是现代数字化变电站中时间关键通信的基础，但缺乏原生安全机制，容易受到重放、伪装和数据注入攻击。由于严格的延迟约束（亚4毫秒）和标记攻击数据的有限可用性，在这种环境下的入侵检测具有挑战性。

Method: 在ERENO IEC-61850数据集上比较了五种模型：监督式随机森林基线、前馈自编码器以及三种循环序列自编码器（RNN、LSTM和GRU）。无监督模型的异常阈值在保留的验证分区上选择以避免测试集泄漏。

Result: 监督式随机森林达到最高检测性能（F1=0.9516）但无法满足实时约束（21.8ms/预测）。所有四种无监督模型都满足4ms要求，其中GRU在准确性和延迟之间达到最佳平衡（F1=0.8737 at 1.118ms）。跨环境评估显示所有模型在分布偏移下性能下降，但循环模型比监督基线保持更高的相对性能。

Conclusion: 无监督时序模型是实时GOOSE入侵检测的实用选择，特别是在标记训练数据可能不可用或需要在多样化变电站大规模部署的环境中。时序序列建模比拟合标记攻击分布具有更好的泛化能力。

Abstract: The IEC-61850 GOOSE protocol underpins time-critical communication in modern digital substations but lacks native security mechanisms, leaving it vulnerable to replay, masquerade, and data injection attacks. Intrusion detection in this setting is challenging due to strict latency constraints (sub-4ms) and limited availability of labeled attack data. This paper evaluates whether unsupervised temporal modeling can provide effective and deployable anomaly detection for GOOSE networks. Five models are compared on the ERENO IEC-61850 dataset: a supervised Random Forest baseline, a feedforward Autoencoder, and three recurrent sequence autoencoders (RNN, LSTM, and GRU). The supervised Random Forest achieves the highest detection performance (F1=0.9516) but fails to meet real-time constraints at 21.8ms per prediction. All four unsupervised models satisfy the 4ms requirement, with the GRU achieving the best accuracy to latency tradeoff among them (F1=0.8737 at 1.118ms). A cross-environment evaluation on an independent dataset shows that all models degrade under distribution shift. However, recurrent models retain substantially higher relative performance than the supervised baseline, suggesting that temporal sequence modeling generalizes better than fitting labeled attack distributions. Anomaly thresholds for the unsupervised models are selected on a held out validation partition to avoid test set leakage. These results support unsupervised temporal models as a practical choice for real-time GOOSE intrusion detection, particularly in environments where labeled training data may be unavailable or where large-scale deployment across diverse substations is required.

</details>


<div id='eess.SP'></div>

# eess.SP [[Back]](#toc)

### [363] [Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation-Based Transfer-Learning for Gas Turbine Vibration Fault Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14766)
*Ali Bagheri Nejad,Mahdi Aliyari-Shoorehdeli,Abolfazl Hasanzadeh*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: 提出TCMKDTL框架，通过时间跨模态知识蒸馏解决燃气轮机早期故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性矛盾，利用大时间窗口教师模型向紧凑学生模型蒸馏特征知识


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 燃气轮机等关键设备需要预防性故障检测，但现有深度学习模型面临架构复杂性与实时操作约束的权衡，且受限于振动信号窗口缺乏时间上下文信息

Method: 提出时间跨模态知识蒸馏迁移学习框架：使用包含过去和未来信号上下文的大时间窗口训练"特权"教师模型，将潜在特征知识蒸馏到紧凑学生模型中；通过基准数据集预训练缓解数据稀缺和域偏移问题

Result: 在实验和工业燃气轮机数据集上的评估表明，TCMKDTL相比传统预训练架构具有更优的特征可分性和诊断准确性，实现了适用于资源受限工业硬件的高性能无监督异常检测

Conclusion: TCMKDTL框架成功解决了故障检测中模型复杂度与实时性的矛盾，通过知识蒸馏迁移学习实现了高性能的早期故障检测，适合工业部署

Abstract: Preventing machine failure is inherently superior to reactive remediation, particularly for critical assets like gas turbines, where early fault detection (FD) is a cornerstone of industrial sustainability. However, modern deep learning-based FD models often face a significant trade-off between architectural complexity and real-time operational constraints, often hindered by a lack of temporal context within restricted vibration signal windows. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Temporal Cross-Modal Knowledge-Distillation Transfer-Learning (TCMKDTL) framework. The framework employs a "privileged" teacher model trained on expansive temporal windows incorporating both past and future signal context to distill latent feature-based knowledge into a compact student model. To mitigate issues of data scarcity and domain shift, the framework leverages robust pre-training on benchmark datasets (such as CWRU) followed by adaptation to target industrial data. Extensive evaluation using experimental and industrial gas turbine (MGT-40) datasets demonstrates that TCMKDTL achieves superior feature separability and diagnostic accuracy compared to conventional pre-trained architectures. Ultimately, this approach enables high-performance, unsupervised anomaly detection suitable for deployment on resource-constrained industrial hardware.

</details>


### [364] [VLMaterial: Vision-Language Model-Based Camera-Radar Fusion for Physics-Grounded Material Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11671)
*Jiangyou Zhu,He Chen*

Main category: eess.SP

TL;DR: VLMaterial：一种免训练的视觉语言模型与雷达融合框架，用于物理基础的材料识别，通过双管道架构和自适应融合机制，在真实世界实验中达到96.08%的识别准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的材料识别是智能感知系统与物理世界安全有效交互的基础能力。视觉方法在区分玻璃和塑料杯等视觉相似物体时面临挑战，而现有的相机-雷达融合方法仅限于封闭集类别且缺乏语义可解释性。

Method: 提出VLMaterial框架：1）双管道架构：光学管道使用SAM和VLM生成材料候选提案；电磁表征管道通过PRCA方法和加权向量合成从雷达信号中提取固有介电常数。2）上下文增强生成策略：为VLM配备雷达特定物理知识，使其能够解释电磁参数。3）自适应融合机制：基于不确定性估计解决跨模态冲突，智能整合双传感器输出。

Result: 在超过120个真实世界实验中，涉及41种日常物体和4种典型视觉欺骗仿制品，VLMaterial实现了96.08%的识别准确率，性能与最先进的封闭集基准相当，同时无需大量任务特定数据收集和训练。

Conclusion: VLMaterial通过融合视觉语言模型与领域特定雷达知识，实现了免训练的物理基础材料识别，解决了现有方法在开放集识别和语义可解释性方面的限制，为智能感知系统提供了更安全有效的材料识别能力。

Abstract: Accurate material recognition is a fundamental capability for intelligent perception systems to interact safely and effectively with the physical world. For instance, distinguishing visually similar objects like glass and plastic cups is critical for safety but challenging for vision-based methods due to specular reflections, transparency, and visual deception. While millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers robust material sensing regardless of lighting, existing camera-radar fusion methods are limited to closed-set categories and lack semantic interpretability. In this paper, we introduce VLMaterial, a training-free framework that fuses vision-language models (VLMs) with domain-specific radar knowledge for physics-grounded material identification. First, we propose a dual-pipeline architecture: an optical pipeline uses the segment anything model and VLM for material candidate proposals, while an electromagnetic characterization pipeline extracts the intrinsic dielectric constant from radar signals via an effective peak reflection cell area (PRCA) method and weighted vector synthesis. Second, we employ a context-augmented generation (CAG) strategy to equip the VLM with radar-specific physical knowledge, enabling it to interpret electromagnetic parameters as stable references. Third, an adaptive fusion mechanism is introduced to intelligently integrate outputs from both sensors by resolving cross-modal conflicts based on uncertainty estimation. We evaluated VLMaterial in over 120 real-world experiments involving 41 diverse everyday objects and 4 typical visually deceptive counterfeits across varying environments. Experimental results demonstrate that VLMaterial achieves a recognition accuracy of 96.08%, delivering performance on par with state-of-the-art closed-set benchmarks while eliminating the need for extensive task-specific data collection and training.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.CO'></div>

# astro-ph.CO [[Back]](#toc)

### [365] [FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge: Handling Uncertainties and Distribution Shifts for Precision Cosmology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14451)
*Biwei Dai,Po-Wen Chang,Wahid Bhimji,Paolo Calafiura,Ragansu Chakkappai,Yuan-Tang Chou,Sascha Diefenbacher,Jordan Dudley,Ibrahim Elsharkawy,Steven Farrell,Isabelle Guyon,Chris Harris,Elham E Khoda,Benjamin Nachman,David Rousseau,Uroš Seljak,Ihsan Ullah,Yulei Zhang*

Main category: astro-ph.CO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了首个包含多种现实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并启动了FAIR宇宙弱引力透镜机器学习不确定性挑战赛，旨在解决弱透镜分析中训练数据有限和分布偏移的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弱引力透镜是研究宇宙物质分布和约束宇宙学模型的有力工具。近年来，高阶统计和机器学习技术被应用于弱透镜数据分析以提取非线性信息，但这些方法通常依赖宇宙学模拟，面临计算成本高、系统效应建模不准确导致分布偏移、不同研究模拟设置不一致难以比较方法等挑战。

Method: 创建首个包含多种现实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并启动FAIR宇宙弱引力透镜机器学习不确定性挑战赛。挑战赛分为两个阶段，聚焦于在有限训练数据和潜在分布偏移条件下从弱透镜数据测量宇宙基本性质，同时提供标准化基准用于方法间的严格比较。

Result: 提出了一个标准化的弱引力透镜基准数据集和挑战赛框架，旨在促进物理学和机器学习社区的协作，推动处理系统不确定性、数据效率和分布偏移的方法学进展。

Conclusion: 该工作通过建立标准化基准和挑战赛，将促进弱引力透镜分析中机器学习方法的发展，最终推动这些方法在即将到来的弱透镜巡天分析中的实际应用。

Abstract: Weak gravitational lensing, the correlated distortion of background galaxy shapes by foreground structures, is a powerful probe of the matter distribution in our universe and allows accurate constraints on the cosmological model. In recent years, high-order statistics and machine learning (ML) techniques have been applied to weak lensing data to extract the nonlinear information beyond traditional two-point analysis. However, these methods typically rely on cosmological simulations, which poses several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, limiting most realistic setups to a low training data regime; inaccurate modeling of systematics in the simulations create distribution shifts that can bias cosmological parameter constraints; and varying simulation setups across studies make method comparison difficult. To address these difficulties, we present the first weak lensing benchmark dataset with several realistic systematics and launch the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Machine Learning Uncertainty Challenge. The challenge focuses on measuring the fundamental properties of the universe from weak lensing data with limited training set and potential distribution shifts, while providing a standardized benchmark for rigorous comparison across methods. Organized in two phases, the challenge will bring together the physics and ML communities to advance the methodologies for handling systematic uncertainties, data efficiency, and distribution shifts in weak lensing analysis with ML, ultimately facilitating the deployment of ML approaches into upcoming weak lensing survey analysis.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [366] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出设计域的场景，同时提供定量保证，增强自主系统在意外情况下的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保自主系统在超出操作设计域（ODD）情况下的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战。当前系统在面对未预见场景时缺乏适应能力和形式化保证。

Method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统情境能力的覆盖范围，支持在未预见情境下对系统行为进行验证和适应。

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法通过自适应系统行为并提供形式化保证，有效提高了系统在未预见的超出ODD情境下的可靠性。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应概率系统模型方法能够处理超出设计域的场景，为自主系统在意外情况下的可靠运行提供定量保证，增强了系统的弹性和适应性。

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.BM'></div>

# q-bio.BM [[Back]](#toc)

### [367] [Polyformer: a generative framework for thermodynamic modeling of polymeric molecules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14241)
*Alessio Valentini,David Pekker,Chungwen Liang,Todd Martinez,Swagatam Mukhopadhyay*

Main category: q-bio.BM

TL;DR: Polyformer是一个生成式框架，用于聚合物的热力学建模，能够根据序列和温度生成符合热力学构象系综的分子构象，解决了分子折叠、构象系综及其随温度变化三个问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统结构生物学范式认为序列决定构象，构象决定功能，但现有蛋白质折叠程序（如AlphaFold）仅预测单一最佳构象。实际上生物分子是动态的，其构象系综决定功能，因此需要能够生成热力学构象系综的模型。

Method: 提出Polyformer生成式框架，输入分子序列和温度（或其他热力学变量），生成符合分子热力学构象系综的构象。该模型首次同时解决分子折叠、构象系综确定以及构象系综随温度变化三个问题。

Result: 在50-111个残基的蛋白质结构域上测试，Polyformer的预测与分子动力学模拟轨迹有良好的一致性。

Conclusion: Polyformer是一个创新的生成式热力学建模框架，能够准确预测聚合物的构象系综及其随温度的变化，为理解生物分子动态结构与功能关系提供了新工具。

Abstract: The classic paradigm of structural biology is that the sequence of a biomolecule (protein, nucleic acid, lipid, etc) determines its conformation (shape) which determines its biological function. Protein folding programs like AlphaFold address this paradigm by predicting the single best conformation given a sequence that defines the molecule. However, biomolecules are not static structures, and their conformational ensemble determines their function. We present the Polyformer -- a generative framework for thermodynamic modeling of polymeric molecules. Given the sequence and temperature (or another thermodynamic variable), the Polyformer generates conformations faithful to the molecule's thermodynamic conformational ensemble. It is the first generative model that solves three problems simultaneously: how does a molecule fold, what is its conformational ensemble, and how does the conformational ensemble change as we change physical temperature. As a concrete test case, we apply Polyformer to protein domains with 50-111 residues and report good agreement of model predictions to Molecular Dynamics (MD) trajectories.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [368] [Coalition Formation in LLM Agent Networks: Stability Analysis and Convergence Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14386)
*Dongxin Guo,Jikun Wu,Siu-Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 该论文首次将LLM多智能体联盟形成问题形式化为享乐博弈论框架，提出LLM联盟形成游戏(LCFG)，建立纳什稳定分区的充分条件，并通过实验验证了CoalT协议的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM智能体越来越多地部署在需要战略协调的多智能体系统中，但现有研究主要集中在双人博弈分析，而联盟形成（n个智能体动态形成合作群体）问题在理论上尚未得到充分表征。

Method: 提出LLM联盟形成游戏(LCFG)框架，将联盟形成问题基于享乐博弈论进行形式化建模；建立纳什稳定分区的充分条件并证明复杂度结果；提出Coalition-of-Thought (CoalT)协议；在GPT-4、Claude-3和Llama-3上进行2400轮实验验证。

Result: 理论分析表明LLM智能体表现出ε理性偏好特征；实验结果显示CoalT协议下LLM联盟在73.2%的情况下达到纳什稳定，显著优于思维链(58.4%)和标准提示(41.8%)（p<0.001）。

Conclusion: 该研究为设计稳定的多智能体LLM系统提供了理论基础，首次将LLM联盟形成问题形式化为享乐博弈论框架，并通过理论和实验验证了其有效性。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems requiring strategic coordination. While recent work has analyzed LLM behavior in two-player games, coalition formation, where $n$ agents dynamically form cooperative groups, remains theoretically uncharacterized. We present the first framework grounding coalition formation in LLM agent networks in hedonic game theory with formal stability guarantees. We introduce the LLM Coalition Formation Game (LCFG), establish sufficient conditions for Nash-stable partitions, and prove complexity results. Our analysis reveals that LLM agents exhibit bounded rationality characterized by $ε$-rational preferences; we provide both deterministic existence guarantees and consistency-driven stability bounds whose predictions are consistent with empirical outcomes. Experiments with GPT-4, Claude-3, and Llama-3 across 2,400 episodes validate our framework: LLM coalitions achieve Nash stability in 73.2% of cases under our Coalition-of-Thought (CoalT) protocol, compared to 58.4% under chain-of-thought and 41.8% under standard prompting ($p < 0.001$). Our framework provides theoretical foundations for designing stable multi-agent LLM systems.

</details>


<div id='stat.ME'></div>

# stat.ME [[Back]](#toc)

### [369] [Combining Bayesian and Frequentist Inference for Laboratory-Specific Performance Guarantees in Copy Number Variation Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14305)
*Austin Talbot,Alex V. Kotlar,Yue Ke*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出一种混合框架，将贝叶斯后验函数在验证样本上评估，用Gamma分布建模平方损失，生成具有有效频率覆盖的容忍区间，解决了靶向扩增子面板中CNV检测的临床验证问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 靶向扩增子面板在肿瘤诊断中广泛使用，但由于扩增伪影、过程不匹配异质性和有限验证样本量，为拷贝数变异检测提供每基因性能保证仍然具有挑战性。贝叶斯CNV调用器虽然能自然量化每样本不确定性，但将其转化为临床验证所需的频率主义群体水平保证（覆盖率、假阳性界限、最小可检测拷贝数变化）是一个根本不同的推断问题。

Method: 提出混合框架：在验证样本上评估贝叶斯后验函数，用Gamma分布对所得平方损失建模，生成具有有效频率覆盖的容忍区间。包含三个实用组件：(1) 插值去除真实CNV阳性样本影响而不需要已知真实值；(2) 正则化处理小样本变异性；(3) 基于对数模型证据的分层以适应过程不匹配产生的非可交换噪声分布。

Result: 在两个靶向扩增子面板上使用留一交叉验证评估，所提方法在过程匹配和不匹配条件下，所有基因的平均绝对覆盖率误差均达到个位数，而贝叶斯比较器在ERBB2等临床相关基因上表现出超过60%的平均绝对误差。

Conclusion: 该方法为靶向扩增子面板的CNV检测提供了有效的频率主义性能保证，解决了贝叶斯方法在小扩增子计数基因上的校准问题，在临床验证中具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Targeted amplicon panels are widely used in oncology diagnostics, but providing per-gene performance guarantees for copy number variant (CNV) detection remains challenging due to amplification artifacts, process-mismatch heterogeneity, and limited validation sample sizes. While Bayesian CNV callers naturally quantify per-sample uncertainty, translating this into the frequentist population-level guarantees required for clinical validation, coverage rates, false-positive bounds, and minimum detectable copy-number changes, is a fundamentally different inferential problem. We show empirically that even robust Bayesian credible intervals, including coarsened posteriors and sandwich-adjusted intervals, are severely miscalibrated on panels with small amplicon counts per gene. To address this, we propose a hybrid framework that evaluates Bayesian posterior functionals on validation samples and models the resulting squared losses with a Gamma distribution, yielding tolerance intervals with valid frequentist coverage. Three components make the method practical under real-world constraints: (1) imputation that removes the influence of true CNV-positive samples without requiring known ground truth, (2) regularization to address small sample variability, and (3) evidence-based stratification on the log model evidence to accommodate non-exchangeable noise profiles arising from process mismatch. Evaluated on two targeted amplicon panels using leave-one-out cross-validation, the proposed method achieves single-digit mean absolute coverage error across all genes under both process-matched and unmatched conditions, whereas Bayesian comparators exhibit mean absolute errors exceeding 60\% on clinically relevant genes such as ERBB2.

</details>


### [370] [Estimating Continuous Treatment Effects with Two-Stage Kernel Ridge Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13410)
*Seok-Jin Kim,Kaizheng Wang*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 提出一种两阶段核岭回归方法，用于估计连续治疗的效应函数，通过构建伪结果校正分布偏移，并引入数据驱动的模型选择程序实现自适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在连续治疗设置中，混杂因素导致治疗分配依赖于协变量，产生选择偏差，使得直接回归不可靠。需要一种能够校正这种偏差并估计治疗效应函数的方法。

Method: 提出两阶段核岭回归方法：第一阶段学习响应作为治疗和协变量的函数；第二阶段使用该模型构建校正分布偏移的伪结果，然后拟合第二个模型估计治疗效应。引入完全数据驱动的模型选择程序，自适应于未知的重叠程度和核的特征值衰减。

Result: 该方法能够适应效应函数的结构（通常比响应函数更简单），并通过数据驱动选择实现理论上的自适应性能，能够处理混杂偏差并准确估计连续治疗效应。

Conclusion: 两阶段核岭回归方法为连续治疗效应估计提供了一种有效的解决方案，能够处理混杂偏差，并通过自适应模型选择实现理论保证，适用于实际应用中的连续治疗评估问题。

Abstract: We study the problem of estimating the effect function for a continuous treatment, which maps each treatment value to a population-averaged outcome. A central challenge in this setting is confounding: treatment assignment often depends on covariates, creating selection bias that makes direct regression of the response on treatment unreliable. To address this issue, we propose a two-stage kernel ridge regression method. In the first stage, we learn a model for the response as a function of both treatment and covariates; in the second stage, we use this model to construct pseudo-outcomes that correct for distribution shift, and then fit a second model to estimate the treatment effect. Although the response varies with both treatment and covariates, the induced effect function obtained by averaging over covariates is typically much simpler, and our estimator adapts to this structure. Furthermore, we introduce a fully data-driven model selection procedure that achieves provable adaptivity to both the unknown degree of overlap and the regularity (eigenvalue decay) of the underlying kernel.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [371] [ControlFoley: Unified and Controllable Video-to-Audio Generation with Cross-Modal Conflict Handling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15086)
*Jianxuan Yang,Xinyue Guo,Zhi Cheng,Kai Wang,Lipan Zhang,Jinjie Hu,Qiang Ji,Yihua Cao,Yihao Meng,Zhaoyue Cui,Mengmei Liu,Meng Meng,Jian Luan*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: ControlFoley是一个统一的多模态视频到音频生成框架，通过联合视觉编码、时域-音色解耦和模态鲁棒训练，实现了对视频、文本和参考音频的精确控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频到音频生成方法存在三个主要问题：1) 视觉-文本冲突下的弱文本可控性；2) 参考音频中时域和音色信息纠缠导致的风格控制不精确；3) 缺乏标准化基准限制了系统评估。

Method: 提出ControlFoley框架，包含：1) 联合视觉编码范式，整合CLIP和时空音频-视觉编码器以改善对齐和文本可控性；2) 时域-音色解耦，抑制冗余时域线索同时保留区分性音色特征；3) 模态鲁棒训练方案，包括统一多模态表示对齐和随机模态丢弃；4) 创建VGGSound-TVC基准，用于评估不同视觉-文本冲突程度下的文本可控性。

Result: 在多个视频到音频任务（文本引导、文本控制和音频控制生成）上实现了最先进的性能。ControlFoley在跨模态冲突下表现出优越的可控性，同时保持强同步性和音频质量，与工业级V2A系统相比具有竞争性或更好的性能。

Conclusion: ControlFoley通过创新的多模态控制机制解决了现有视频到音频生成方法的局限性，提供了精确的视频、文本和参考音频控制能力，为系统评估建立了标准化基准，推动了该领域的发展。

Abstract: Recent advances in video-to-audio (V2A) generation enable high-quality audio synthesis from visual content, yet achieving robust and fine-grained controllability remains challenging. Existing methods suffer from weak textual controllability under visual-text conflict and imprecise stylistic control due to entangled temporal and timbre information in reference audio. Moreover, the lack of standardized benchmarks limits systematic evaluation.
  We propose ControlFoley, a unified multimodal V2A framework that enables precise control over video, text, and reference audio. We introduce a joint visual encoding paradigm that integrates CLIP with a spatio-temporal audio-visual encoder to improve alignment and textual controllability. We further propose temporal-timbre decoupling to suppress redundant temporal cues while preserving discriminative timbre features. In addition, we design a modality-robust training scheme with unified multimodal representation alignment (REPA) and random modality dropout. We also present VGGSound-TVC, a benchmark for evaluating textual controllability under varying degrees of visual-text conflict.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across multiple V2A tasks, including text-guided, text-controlled, and audio-controlled generation. ControlFoley achieves superior controllability under cross-modal conflict while maintaining strong synchronization and audio quality, and shows competitive or better performance compared to an industrial V2A system.
  Code, models, datasets, and demos are available at: https://yjx-research.github.io/ControlFoley/.

</details>


### [372] [2D or 3D: Who Governs Salience in VLA Models? -- Tri-Stage Token Pruning Framework with Modality Salience Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09244)
*Zihao Zheng,Sicheng Tian,Zhihao Mao,Lingyue Zhang,Chenyue Li,Ziyun Zhang,Hong Gao,Yuchen Huang,Yutong Xu,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 该论文针对多视觉模态VLA模型提出了一种三阶段令牌剪枝框架，通过分析2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MVLA模型从2D-only扩展到2D+3D多模态后，输入令牌数量增加导致更大的加速需求，而现有令牌剪枝方案仅针对2D-only VLA设计，忽略了2D/3D模态显著性差异

Method: 提出三阶段分析捕捉2D/3D模态显著性差异和动态变化，并基于此设计三阶段令牌剪枝框架，实现最优2D/3D令牌选择和高效剪枝

Result: 实验显示该框架实现最高2.55倍推理加速，精度损失最小，仅需5.8%额外开销

Conclusion: 该研究为MVLA模型提供了一种考虑模态差异的高效令牌剪枝方案，显著提升推理效率

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as the mainstream of embodied intelligence. Recent VLA models have expanded their input modalities from 2D-only to 2D+3D paradigms, forming multi-visual-modal VLA (MVLA) models. Despite achieving improved spatial perception, MVLA faces a greater acceleration demand due to the increased number of input tokens caused by modal expansion. Token pruning is an effective optimization methods tailored to MVLA models. However, existing token pruning schemes are designed for 2D-only VLA models, ignoring 2D/3D modality salience differences. In this paper, we follow the application process of multi-modal data in MVLA models and develop a tri-stage analysis to capture the discrepancy and dynamics of 2D/3D modality salience. Based on these, we propose a corresponding tri-stage token pruning framework for MVLA models to achieve optimal 2D/3D token selection and efficient pruning.
