Experiments show that our framework achieves up to a 2.55x inference speedup with minimal accuracy loss, while only costing 5.8% overhead. Our Code is coming soon.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.TO'></div>

# q-bio.TO [[Back]](#toc)

### [373] [A deep learning framework for glomeruli segmentation with boundary attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14263)
*Behnaz Elhaminia,Catherine King,Jiaqi Lv,Lorraine Harper,Paul Moss,Owen Cain,Dimitrios Chanouzas,Shan E Ahmed Raza*

Main category: q-bio.TO

TL;DR: 提出基于U-Net的肾小球检测分割模型，通过边界分离和注意力解码器提升相邻肾小球的分割精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统语义分割方法难以精确分割相邻肾小球，需要改进边界分离能力以实现更准确的诊断应用

Method: 基于U-Net架构，结合病理基础模型，设计专门的注意力解码器来突出关键区域，增强实例级分割能力

Result: 实验评估显示该方法在Dice分数和IoU指标上均超越现有最佳方法，在肾小球轮廓描绘方面表现优异

Conclusion: 提出的边界分离方法有效解决了相邻肾小球分割难题，为肾脏病理诊断提供了更精确的自动化工具

Abstract: Accurate detection and segmentation of glomeruli in kidney tissue are essential for diagnostic applications. Traditional deep learning methods primarily rely on semantic segmentation, which often fails to precisely delineate adjacent glomeruli. To address this challenge, we propose a novel glomerulus detection and segmentation model that emphasises boundary separation. Leveraging pathology foundation models, the proposed U-Net-based architecture incorporates a specialised attention decoder designed to highlight critical regions and improve instancelevel segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our approach surpasses state-of-the-art methods in both Dice score and Intersection over Union, indicating superior performance in glomerular delineation.

</details>


### [374] [Continual Learning for fMRI-Based Brain Disorder Diagnosis via Functional Connectivity Matrices Generative Replay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14259)
*Qianyu Chen,Shujian Yu*

Main category: q-bio.TO

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个针对fMRI诊断的持续学习框架FORGE，通过结构感知变分自编码器生成功能连接矩阵，结合多级知识蒸馏和分层上下文老虎机采样，有效缓解多站点临床数据顺序到达时的灾难性遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有fMRI诊断模型通常在单一站点或完全多站点访问下训练，无法适应真实临床场景中数据从不同机构顺序到达的情况，导致泛化能力有限和严重的灾难性遗忘问题。

Method: 1. 结构感知变分自编码器：生成患者和对照组的真实功能连接矩阵；2. 多级知识蒸馏策略：对齐新站点数据和回放样本的预测与图表示；3. 分层上下文老虎机方案：自适应回放采样以提高效率。

Result: 在多站点数据集（重度抑郁症、精神分裂症、自闭症谱系障碍）上的实验表明，所提生成模型增强了数据增强质量，整体持续学习框架在缓解灾难性遗忘方面显著优于现有方法。

Conclusion: FORGE是首个专门为fMRI诊断设计的持续学习框架，通过生成建模和自适应知识保留策略，有效解决了临床多站点数据顺序到达时的灾难性遗忘问题，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is widely used for studying and diagnosing brain disorders, with functional connectivity (FC) matrices providing powerful representations of large-scale neural interactions. However, existing diagnostic models are trained either on a single site or under full multi-site access, making them unsuitable for real-world scenarios where clinical data arrive sequentially from different institutions. This results in limited generalization and severe catastrophic forgetting. This paper presents the first continual learning framework specifically designed for fMRI-based diagnosis across heterogeneous clinical sites. Our framework introduces a structure-aware variational autoencoder that synthesizes realistic FC matrices for both patient and control groups. Built on this generative backbone, we develop a multi-level knowledge distillation strategy that aligns predictions and graph representations between new-site data and replayed samples. To further enhance efficiency, we incorporate a hierarchical contextual bandit scheme for adaptive replay sampling. Experiments on multi-site datasets for major depressive disorder (MDD), schizophrenia (SZ), and autism spectrum disorder (ASD) show that the proposed generative model enhances data augmentation quality, and the overall continual learning framework substantially outperforms existing methods in mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Our code is available at https://github.com/4me808/FORGE.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [375] [Synthesis and Deployment of Maximal Robust Control Barrier Functions through Adversarial Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13192)
*Donggeon David Oh,Duy P. Nguyen,Haimin Hu,Jaime Fernández Fisac*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于强化学习的鲁棒控制屏障函数框架，用于具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统，通过Q函数方法减少保守性并实现最大鲁棒安全集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒控制屏障函数方法通常依赖于动力学的显式闭式结构（如控制仿射）和不确定性模型，导致可扩展性和通用性有限，只能认证最大鲁棒安全集的保守子集。

Method: 1. 证明求解动态规划Isaacs方程的安全值函数是有效的鲁棒离散时间CBF；2. 采用强化学习中的质量函数（Q函数）概念，将屏障证书提升到状态-动作空间，提出鲁棒Q-CBF约束；3. 结合对抗强化学习，在具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统上合成和部署鲁棒Q-CBF。

Result: 在经典倒立摆基准和36维四足机器人模拟器上验证了框架有效性：在倒立摆上比基于屏障的基线获得显著更不保守的安全集；在四足机器人上即使面对对抗性不确定性实现也能可靠执行安全约束。

Conclusion: 该框架通过结合强化学习和控制屏障函数，为具有黑盒动力学和未知不确定性结构的一般非线性系统提供了一种可扩展、通用的鲁棒安全控制方法，显著减少了保守性并实现了最大鲁棒安全集。

Abstract: Robust control barrier functions (CBFs) provide a principled mechanism for smooth safety enforcement under worst-case disturbances. However, existing approaches typically rely on explicit, closed-form structure in the dynamics (e.g., control-affine) and uncertainty models. This has led to limited scalability and generality, with most robust CBFs certifying only conservative subsets of the maximal robust safe set. In this paper, we introduce a new robust CBF framework for general nonlinear systems under bounded uncertainty. We first show that the safety value function solving the dynamic programming Isaacs equation is a valid robust discrete-time CBF that enforces safety on the maximal robust safe set. We then adopt the key reinforcement learning (RL) notion of quality function (or Q-function), which removes the need for explicit dynamics by lifting the barrier certificate into state-action space and yields a novel robust Q-CBF constraint for safety filtering. Combined with adversarial RL, this enables the synthesis and deployment of robust Q-CBFs on general nonlinear systems with black-box dynamics and unknown uncertainty structure. We validate the framework on a canonical inverted pendulum benchmark and a 36-D quadruped simulator, achieving substantially less conservative safe sets than barrier-based baselines on the pendulum and reliable safety enforcement even under adversarial uncertainty realizations on the quadruped.

</details>


### [376] [Dynamic Multi-Robot Task Allocation under Uncertainty and Communication Constraints: A Game-Theoretic Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11954)
*Maria G. Mendoza,Pan-Yang Su,Bryce L. Ferguson,S. Shankar Sastry*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究动态多机器人任务分配问题，考虑任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束和不完全信息，提出基于迭代最优响应(IBR)的分散式策略，在城市规模包裹配送场景中验证性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决动态多机器人任务分配中的关键挑战：任务完成不确定性、时间窗口约束和不完全信息。实际应用中，任务在线到达且必须在截止时间内完成，而机器人从分布式枢纽操作，感知和通信能力有限。

Method: 提出迭代最优响应(IBR)分散式策略，每个智能体选择能最大化其对局部观测社会福利边际贡献的任务。通过基于枢纽的感知区域建模不完全信息（决定任务可见性），并通过通信图建模枢纽间信息交换。在具有100个无人机的城市规模包裹配送场景中，与EDD、匈牙利算法和SCoBA三个基线方法进行比较。

Result: 在完全通信和稀疏通信条件下，IBR实现了具有竞争力的任务完成性能，同时计算时间更低。这表明IBR在保持良好分配效果的同时具有更高的计算效率。

Conclusion: IBR分散式策略能有效处理动态多机器人任务分配中的不确定性、时间窗口约束和不完全信息问题，在实际城市规模应用中表现出良好的性能效率和可扩展性。

Abstract: We study dynamic multi-robot task allocation under uncertain task completion, time-window constraints, and incomplete information. Tasks arrive online over a finite horizon and must be completed within specified deadlines, while agents operate from distributed hubs with limited sensing and communication. We model incomplete information through hub-based sensing regions that determine task visibility and a communication graph that governs inter-hub information exchange. Using this framework, we propose Iterative Best Response (IBR), a decentralized policy in which each agent selects the task that maximizes its marginal contribution to the locally observed welfare. We compare IBR against three baselines: Earliest Due Date first (EDD), Hungarian algorithm, and Stochastic Conflict-Based Allocation (SCoBA), on a city-scale package-delivery domain with up to 100 drones and varying task arrival scenarios. Under full and sparse communication, IBR achieves competitive task-completion performance with lower computation time.

</details>


### [377] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性矢量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的情况，通过修改创新项实现几乎全局渐近稳定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际应用中，惯性矢量往往无法完全观测，只能沿特定体坐标系向量进行标量测量。这种部分矢量观测问题出现在不完整矢量测量或异构传感器信息导出的姿态约束中，需要专门的方法来处理标量输出结构

Method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，提出一种具有修改创新项的观测器，专门针对标量输出结构设计。当至少三个惯性矢量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，在适当的持续激励条件下恢复几乎全局渐近稳定性

Result: 对于至少三个惯性矢量沿共同体坐标系向量测量的情况，在持续激励条件下实现了几乎全局渐近稳定性。对于两种标量配置（一个惯性矢量沿两个体坐标系向量测量，或两个惯性矢量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），推导了保证收敛的充分条件，但收敛域有所减小

Conclusion: 所提出的基于标量的互补滤波器在涉及减少传感和/或新型传感模式的挑战性场景中，对姿态估计具有有效性，数值结果验证了该方法在不同配置下的性能

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [378] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用记录智能体历史合作行为，调节冲突解决决策，在有限通信下实现长期公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器虽然能保证解的最优性，但指数级计算复杂度限制了大规模系统的可扩展性和实时应用；现有去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但会导致次优结果和高成本差异。需要一种既能保持效率又能促进公平的去中心化协调框架。

Method: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架：Karma是不可交易的人工信用，记录智能体过去的合作行为并调节未来的冲突解决决策。将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，通过成对重规划解决冲突，在有限通信和无全局优先级结构下促进长期公平性。

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取货-配送场景中评估，结果表明Karma机制能平衡智能体间的重规划工作量，减少服务时间差异，同时不牺牲整体效率。

Conclusion: Karma机制为多智能体路径规划提供了一种有效的去中心化协调框架，能够在有限通信条件下平衡效率与公平性，适用于大规模机器人系统。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


<div id='econ.GN'></div>

# econ.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [379] [A Comparative Study of Dynamic Programming and Reinforcement Learning in Finite Horizon Dynamic Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14059)
*Lev Razumovskiy,Nikolay Karenin*

Main category: econ.GN

TL;DR: 系统比较基于数据估计需求的拟合动态规划(DP)与强化学习(RL)在有限时域动态定价问题中的性能，涵盖从简单到复杂的环境设置


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常将DP限制在低维环境中进行简化比较，缺乏在更丰富、多维环境（多产品类型和约束）中系统比较DP和RL方法性能的研究

Method: 在逐渐增加结构复杂度的环境中分析DP和RL：从单一类型基准到具有异质需求和跨期收入约束的多类型设置；评估收入性能、稳定性、约束满足行为和计算扩展性

Result: 论文系统比较了两种方法在不同环境下的表现，突出了基于显式期望的优化与基于轨迹的学习之间的权衡

Conclusion: 为动态定价问题中DP和RL方法的选择提供了系统性的性能比较和权衡分析，有助于根据具体应用场景选择合适的方法

Abstract: This paper provides a systematic comparison between Fitted Dynamic Programming (DP), where demand is estimated from data, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods in finite-horizon dynamic pricing problems. We analyze their performance across environments of increasing structural complexity, ranging from a single typology benchmark to multi-typology settings with heterogeneous demand and inter-temporal revenue constraints. Unlike simplified comparisons that restrict DP to low-dimensional settings, we apply dynamic programming in richer, multi-dimensional environments with multiple product types and constraints. We evaluate revenue performance, stability, constraint satisfaction behavior, and computational scaling, highlighting the trade-offs between explicit expectation-based optimization and trajectory-based learning.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [380] [The Acoustic Camouflage Phenomenon: Re-evaluating Speech Features for Financial Risk Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14619)
*Dhruvin Dungrani,Disha Dungrani*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 语音特征（音高、抖动、犹豫）在预测企业财报电话会议中的尾部风险事件时，与NLP模型融合反而显著降低性能，揭示了"声学伪装"现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究声学特征提取在计算副语言学中的局限性，特别是在高度训练的专业人士（如企业高管）在真实电话会议环境中，用于预测灾难性股市波动的能力。

Method: 采用双流后期融合架构，对比声学特征流（提取音高、抖动、犹豫等特征）与基线NLP流。研究在真实电话会议环境中对高度训练说话者的应用。

Result: 孤立NLP模型对尾部风险下行事件的召回率达到66.25%，但通过后期融合集成声学特征后，召回率显著下降至47.08%，性能退化明显。

Conclusion: 发现了"声学伪装"现象：媒体训练的声音调节引入矛盾噪声，干扰多模态元学习器。这为高风险金融预测中的语音处理应用设定了边界条件。

Abstract: In computational paralinguistics, detecting cognitive load and deception from speech signals is a heavily researched domain. Recent efforts have attempted to apply these acoustic frameworks to corporate earnings calls to predict catastrophic stock market volatility. In this study, we empirically investigate the limits of acoustic feature extraction (pitch, jitter, and hesitation) when applied to highly trained speakers in in-the-wild teleconference environments. Utilizing a two-stream late-fusion architecture, we contrast an acoustic-based stream with a baseline Natural Language Processing (NLP) stream. The isolated NLP model achieved a recall of 66.25% for tail-risk downside events. Surprisingly, integrating acoustic features via late fusion significantly degraded performance, reducing recall to 47.08%. We identify this degradation as Acoustic Camouflage, where media-trained vocal regulation introduces contradictory noise that disrupts multimodal meta-learners. We present these findings as a boundary condition for speech processing applications in high-stakes financial forecasting.

</details>


### [381] [VoxSafeBench: Not Just What Is Said, but Who, How, and Where](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14548)
*Yuxiang Wang,Hongyu Liu,Yijiang Xu,Qinke Ni,Li Wang,Wan Lin,Kunyu Feng,Dekun Chen,Xu Tan,Lei Wang,Jie Shi,Zhizheng Wu*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: VoxSafeBench是首个联合评估语音语言模型在安全、公平和隐私三个维度社会对齐的基准测试，采用双层设计分别评估内容中心风险和音频条件风险，揭示了当前SLMs存在的普遍语音接地差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语音语言模型从个人设备扩展到共享的多用户环境，其响应必须考虑远不止文字本身的因素。说话者身份、语音特征和对话环境都可能使原本良性的请求变得不安全、不公平或侵犯隐私。现有基准主要关注基本音频理解能力，孤立研究个体风险，或将本质上有害的内容与仅因声学上下文而变得有问题的内容混为一谈。

Method: 采用双层设计：Tier1使用匹配的文本和音频输入评估内容中心风险；Tier2针对音频条件风险，其中转录文本是良性的，但适当响应取决于说话者、副语言线索或周围环境。包含中间感知探针验证Tier2，确认前沿SLMs能够成功检测这些声学线索但仍无法适当响应。覆盖22个任务，支持双语覆盖。

Result: 研究发现，文本上看似稳健的安全措施在语音中经常退化：对说话者和场景条件风险的安全意识下降；当人口统计学差异通过声音传达时公平性受损；当上下文线索以声学方式到达时隐私保护失效。前沿SLMs能够成功检测声学线索但仍无法适当响应。

Conclusion: 揭示了当前语音语言模型存在的普遍语音接地差距：经常能在文本中识别相关社会规范，但当决定性线索必须基于语音接地时却无法应用。这表明需要开发更强大的语音感知对齐方法。

Abstract: As speech language models (SLMs) transition from personal devices into shared, multi-user environments, their responses must account for far more than the words alone. Who is speaking, how they sound, and where the conversation takes place can each turn an otherwise benign request into one that is unsafe, unfair, or privacy-violating. Existing benchmarks, however, largely focus on basic audio comprehension, study individual risks in isolation, or conflate content that is inherently harmful with content that only becomes problematic due to its acoustic context. We introduce VoxSafeBench, among the first benchmarks to jointly evaluate social alignment in SLMs across three dimensions: safety, fairness, and privacy. VoxSafeBench adopts a Two-Tier design: Tier1 evaluates content-centric risks using matched text and audio inputs, while Tier2 targets audio-conditioned risks in which the transcript is benign but the appropriate response hinges on the speaker, paralinguistic cues, or the surrounding environment. To validate Tier2, we include intermediate perception probes and confirm that frontier SLMs can successfully detect these acoustic cues yet still fail to act on them appropriately. Across 22 tasks with bilingual coverage, we find that safeguards appearing robust on text often degrade in speech: safety awareness drops for speaker- and scene-conditioned risks, fairness erodes when demographic differences are conveyed vocally, and privacy protections falter when contextual cues arrive acoustically. Together, these results expose a pervasive speech grounding gap: current SLMs frequently recognize the relevant social norm in text but fail to apply it when the decisive cue must be grounded in speech. Code and data are publicly available at: https://amphionteam.github.io/VoxSafeBench_demopage/

</details>


### [382] [Towards Fine-grained Temporal Perception: Post-Training Large Audio-Language Models with Audio-Side Time Prompt](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13715)
*Yanfeng Shi,Pengfei Cai,Jun Liu,Qing Gu,Nan Jiang,Lirong Dai,Ian McLoughlin,Yan Song*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: TimePro-RL框架通过音频侧时间提示和强化学习提升大音频语言模型的时间感知能力，在音频定位、声音事件检测等任务上取得显著性能提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的大音频语言模型在时间感知方面存在局限，难以推断事件的开始和结束时间，限制了在细粒度场景中的应用。需要解决模型对音频时间维度的精确感知问题。

Method: 提出TimePro-RL框架：1）音频侧时间提示：将时间戳编码为嵌入，与音频特征序列交错作为时间坐标提示模型；2）强化学习优化：在监督微调后引入强化学习，直接优化时间对齐性能。

Result: 实验表明TimePro-RL在音频定位、声音事件检测和密集音频描述等音频时间任务上取得了显著的性能提升，验证了其鲁棒有效性。

Conclusion: TimePro-RL框架通过结合时间提示和强化学习，有效提升了大音频语言模型的时间感知能力，为细粒度音频理解任务提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) enable general audio understanding and demonstrate remarkable performance across various audio tasks. However, these models still face challenges in temporal perception (e.g., inferring event onset and offset), leading to limited utility in fine-grained scenarios. To address this issue, we propose Audio-Side Time Prompt and leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to develop the TimePro-RL framework for fine-grained temporal perception. Specifically, we encode timestamps as embeddings and interleave them within the audio feature sequence as temporal coordinates to prompt the model. Furthermore, we introduce RL following Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to directly optimize temporal alignment performance. Experiments demonstrate that TimePro-RL achieves significant performance gains across a range of audio temporal tasks, such as audio grounding, sound event detection, and dense audio captioning, validating its robust effectiveness.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.SR'></div>

# astro-ph.SR [[Back]](#toc)

### [383] [Irregularly Sampled Time Series Interpolation for Binary Evolution Simulations Using Dynamic Time Warping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13604)
*Ugur Demir,Philipp M. Srivastava,Aggelos Katsaggelos,Vicky Kalogera,Santiago L. Tapia,Manuel Ballester,Shamal Lalvani,Patrick Koller,Jeff J. Andrews,Seth Gossage,Max M. Briel,Elizabeth Teng*

Main category: astro-ph.SR

TL;DR: 提出基于动态时间规整的联合对齐方法，解决双星演化轨迹插值中的时间错位问题，显著提升计算效率和精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双星演化模拟计算成本高昂，传统单星轨迹插值方法不适用于双星系统，因为双星相互作用导致演化轨迹复杂且存在不连续性，需要新的插值方法

Method: 提出基于动态时间规整的轨迹对齐和迭代轨迹平均方法，通过计算所有物理参数的共享规整路径，将参数置于一致的时间网格上，保持参数间的因果关系

Result: 联合对齐策略能保持关键物理关系（如斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律），在多种双星配置评估中表现优于现有方法，实现更准确的双星群体样本高效生成

Conclusion: 适当的时间对齐对轨迹插值方法至关重要，提出的方法能有效解决双星演化轨迹插值中的时间错位问题，为天体物理研究提供更高效准确的计算工具

Abstract: Binary stellar evolution simulations are computationally expensive. Stellar population synthesis relies on these detailed evolution models at a fundamental level. Producing thousands of such models requires hundreds of CPU hours, but stellar track interpolation provides one approach to significantly reduce this computational cost. Although single-star track interpolation is straightforward, stellar interactions in binary systems introduce significant complexity to binary evolution, making traditional single-track interpolation methods inapplicable. Binary tracks present fundamentally different challenges compared to single stars, which possess relatively straightforward evolutionary phases identifiable through distinct physical properties. Binary systems are complicated by mutual interactions that can dramatically alter evolutionary trajectories and introduce discontinuities difficult to capture through standard interpolation. In this work, we introduce a novel approach for track alignment and iterative track averaging based on Dynamic Time Warping to address misalignments between neighboring tracks. Our method computes a single shared warping path across all physical parameters simultaneously, placing them on a consistent temporal grid that preserves the causal relationships between parameters. We demonstrate that this joint-alignment strategy maintains key physical relationships such as the Stefan-Boltzmann law in the interpolated tracks. Our comprehensive evaluation across multiple binary configurations demonstrates that proper temporal alignment is crucial for track interpolation methods. The proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches and enables the efficient generation of more accurate binary population samples for astrophysical studies.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [384] [Abstract Sim2Real through Approximate Information States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15289)
*Yunfu Deng,Yuhao Li,Josiah P. Hanna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究抽象模拟到真实世界（abstract sim2real）问题，提出通过状态抽象框架和基于真实数据校正抽象模拟器动力学的方法，实现从抽象模拟器训练的策略向真实世界的成功迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人在复杂和大规模领域部署，模拟器难以建模所有任务细节，因此需要研究在抽象模拟器（忽略关键任务细节）中训练策略并成功迁移到真实世界的问题。

Method: 使用强化学习中的状态抽象语言形式化抽象sim2real问题，提出利用真实世界任务数据校正抽象模拟器动力学的方法，通过考虑状态历史来使抽象模拟器与目标任务对齐。

Result: 该方法在sim2sim和sim2real评估中均实现了成功的策略迁移，验证了抽象模拟器校正方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过状态抽象框架和基于真实数据的动力学校正，可以在抽象模拟器中训练强化学习策略并成功迁移到真实世界，为解决复杂领域中的sim2real问题提供了新途径。

Abstract: In recent years, reinforcement learning (RL) has shown remarkable success in robotics when a fast and accurate simulator is available for a given task. When using RL and simulation, more simulator realism is generally beneficial but becomes harder to obtain as robots are deployed in increasingly complex and widescale domains. In such settings, simulators will likely fail to model all relevant details of a given target task and this observation motivates the study of sim2real with simulators that leave out key task details. In this paper, we formalize and study the abstract sim2real problem: given an abstract simulator that models a target task at a coarse level of abstraction, how can we train a policy with RL in the abstract simulator and successfully transfer it to the real-world? Our first contribution is to formalize this problem using the language of state abstraction from the RL literature. This framing shows that an abstract simulator can be grounded to match the target task if the grounded abstract dynamics take the history of states into account. Based on the formalism, we then introduce a method that uses real-world task data to correct the dynamics of the abstract simulator. We then show that this method enables successful policy transfer both in sim2sim and sim2real evaluation.

</details>


### [385] [Vision-Based Safe Human-Robot Collaboration with Uncertainty Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15221)
*Jakob Thumm,Marian Frei,Tianle Ni,Matthias Althoff,Marco Pavone*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个视觉人体姿态估计与运动预测框架，提供共形预测保证以实现可认证安全的人机协作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为人机协作场景提供可认证的安全性保证，通过概率置信度确保预测的可靠性，以支持安全关键应用

Method: 结合认知不确定性估计与分布外检测，提出具有共形预测集的人类运动预测方法，集成到可认证安全框架中

Result: 在记录的人类运动数据和真实人机协作场景中评估了该框架，实现了高有效置信度的预测

Conclusion: 该框架通过共形预测为人类姿态估计和运动预测提供了可认证的安全保证，适用于安全关键的人机协作应用

Abstract: We propose a framework for vision-based human pose estimation and motion prediction that gives conformal prediction guarantees for certifiably safe human-robot collaboration. Our framework combines aleatoric uncertainty estimation with OOD detection for high probabilistic confidence. To integrate our pipeline in certifiable safety frameworks, we propose conformal prediction sets for human motion predictions with high, valid confidence. We evaluate our pipeline on recorded human motion data and a real-world human-robot collaboration setting.

</details>


### [386] [A Hierarchical Spatiotemporal Action Tokenizer for In-Context Imitation Learning in Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15215)
*Fawad Javed Fateh,Ali Shah Ali,Murad Popattia,Usman Nizamani,Andrey Konin,M. Zeeshan Zia,Quoc-Huy Tran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于上下文模仿学习的层次化时空动作分词器HiST-AT，通过两级向量量化和时空信息利用，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动作表示方法在上下文模仿学习中存在局限性，需要更有效的动作编码方式来捕捉复杂动作的层次结构和时空特性。

Method: 提出层次化方法：第一级将输入动作分配到细粒度子簇，第二级将子簇映射到簇。进一步扩展为时空版本HiST-AT，通过多级聚类同时恢复输入动作及其时间戳。

Result: 层次化方法优于非层次化方法，HiST-AT在多个模拟和真实机器人操作基准测试中建立了新的最先进性能。

Conclusion: HiST-AT通过层次化时空动作分词有效提升了上下文模仿学习的性能，为机器人动作表示提供了新思路。

Abstract: We present a novel hierarchical spatiotemporal action tokenizer for in-context imitation learning. We first propose a hierarchical approach, which consists of two successive levels of vector quantization. In particular, the lower level assigns input actions to fine-grained subclusters, while the higher level further maps fine-grained subclusters to clusters. Our hierarchical approach outperforms the non-hierarchical counterpart, while mainly exploiting spatial information by reconstructing input actions. Furthermore, we extend our approach by utilizing both spatial and temporal cues, forming a hierarchical spatiotemporal action tokenizer, namely HiST-AT. Specifically, our hierarchical spatiotemporal approach conducts multi-level clustering, while simultaneously recovering input actions and their associated timestamps. Finally, extensive evaluations on multiple simulation and real robotic manipulation benchmarks show that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art performance in in-context imitation learning.

</details>


### [387] [Benchmarking Classical Coverage Path Planning Heuristics on Irregular Hexagonal Grids for Maritime Coverage Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15202)
*Carlos S. Sepúlveda,Gonzalo A. Ruz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于不规则六边形网格上确定性单车辆覆盖路径规划启发式算法的可重复基准测试，包含10,000个哈密顿可行实例和17种启发式算法，评估了哈密顿成功率、完全覆盖成功率、重访次数等指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海上监视、搜救和环境监测等应用需要在不规则六边形网格上进行覆盖路径规划，但现有方法通常在小型特例或矩形网格上进行比较，缺乏系统性的基准测试。

Method: 创建了一个包含10,000个哈密顿可行实例的基准测试集，这些实例基于合成的海上动机感兴趣区域生成，覆盖紧凑、细长和不规则形态。评估了来自7个家族的17种启发式算法，使用统一的评估协议，包括哈密顿成功率、完全覆盖成功率、重访次数、路径长度、航向变化和CPU延迟等指标。

Result: 具有显式最短路径重连的启发式算法能可靠解决松弛覆盖任务，但几乎无法产生零重访路径。精确深度优先搜索确认所有实例都是哈密顿可行的。最强的经典哈密顿基线是使用基于索引的平局决胜和终端包含残差度策略的Warnsdorff变体，达到79.0%的哈密顿成功率。关键设计选择不是平局决胜本身，而是在端点保留到最后一步时如何定义残差度。

Conclusion: 在稀疏几何图（存在瓶颈）上，未充分报告的实现细节会显著影响性能。该基准测试旨在为启发式算法分析提供受控测试平台，而非声称在舰队规模上达到操作最优性。

Abstract: Coverage path planning on irregular hexagonal grids is relevant to maritime surveillance, search and rescue and environmental monitoring, yet classical methods are often compared on small ad hoc examples or on rectangular grids. This paper presents a reproducible benchmark of deterministic single-vehicle coverage path planning heuristics on irregular hexagonal graphs derived from synthetic but maritime-motivated areas of interest. The benchmark contains 10,000 Hamiltonian-feasible instances spanning compact, elongated, and irregular morphologies, 17 heuristics from seven families, and a common evaluation protocol covering Hamiltonian success, complete-coverage success, revisits, path length, heading changes, and CPU latency. Across the released dataset, heuristics with explicit shortest-path reconnection solve the relaxed coverage task reliably but almost never produce zero-revisit tours. Exact Depth-First Search confirms that every released instance is Hamiltonian-feasible. The strongest classical Hamiltonian baseline is a Warnsdorff variant that uses an index-based tie-break together with a terminal-inclusive residual-degree policy, reaching 79.0% Hamiltonian success. The dominant design choice is not tie-breaking alone, but how the residual degree is defined when the endpoint is reserved until the final move. This shows that underreported implementation details can materially affect performance on sparse geometric graphs with bottlenecks. The benchmark is intended as a controlled testbed for heuristic analysis rather than as a claim of operational optimality at fleet scale.

</details>


### [388] [Dual Pose-Graph Semantic Localization for Vision-Based Autonomous Drone Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15168)
*David Perez-Saura,Miguel Fernandez-Cortizas,Alvaro J. Gaona,Pascual Campoy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种用于自主无人机竞速的双位姿图架构，通过融合里程计与语义检测实现鲁棒定位，相比单图基线在相同计算成本下精度提升10-12%


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主无人机竞速需要在高速飞行、剧烈机动和载荷受限条件下实现鲁棒实时定位。现有视觉SLAM系统在竞速场景中面临运动模糊和特征不稳定问题，且未充分利用竞速环境的结构化特性。

Method: 提出双位姿图架构：临时图在关键帧之间累积多个门框观测并优化为单个精炼约束，然后提升到持久主图中。该设计保留了频繁检测的信息丰富性，同时防止图增长影响实时性能。系统设计为传感器无关，本文使用单目视觉惯性里程计和视觉门框检测进行验证。

Result: 在TII-RATM数据集上，相比独立VIO，ATE减少56%至74%。消融实验表明，双图架构在相同计算成本下比单图基线精度高10%至12%。在A2RL竞赛部署中，系统实现飞行中实时板载定位，每圈减少里程计基线漂移达4.2米。

Conclusion: 双位姿图架构通过融合里程计与语义检测，有效解决了自主无人机竞速中的定位挑战，在保持实时性能的同时显著提升了定位精度和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Autonomous drone racing demands robust real-time localization under extreme conditions: high-speed flight, aggressive maneuvers, and payload-constrained platforms that often rely on a single camera for perception. Existing visual SLAM systems, while effective in general scenarios, struggle with motion blur and feature instability inherent to racing dynamics, and do not exploit the structured nature of racing environments. In this work, we present a dual pose-graph architecture that fuses odometry with semantic detections for robust localization. A temporary graph accumulates multiple gate observations between keyframes and optimizes them into a single refined constraint per landmark, which is then promoted to a persistent main graph. This design preserves the information richness of frequent detections while preventing graph growth from degrading real-time performance. The system is designed to be sensor-agnostic, although in this work we validate it using monocular visual-inertial odometry and visual gate detections. Experimental evaluation on the TII-RATM dataset shows a 56% to 74% reduction in ATE compared to standalone VIO, while an ablation study confirms that the dual-graph architecture achieves 10% to 12% higher accuracy than a single-graph baseline at identical computational cost. Deployment in the A2RL competition demonstrated that the system performs real-time onboard localization during flight, reducing the drift of the odometry baseline by up to 4.2 m per lap.

</details>


### [389] [Trajectory Planning for a Multi-UAV Rigid-Payload Cascaded Transportation System Based on Enhanced Tube-RRT*](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15074)
*Jianqiao Yu,Jia Li,Tianhua Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出两阶段多无人机刚性负载级联运输系统轨迹规划框架，解决密集障碍环境中的规划挑战


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多无人机刚性负载级联运输系统在密集障碍环境中的轨迹规划难题，需要同时考虑安全避障、负载动力学约束和电缆引起的振荡问题

Method: 第一阶段：开发增强型Tube-RRT*算法，集成主动混合采样和自适应扩展策略，在边成本中显式加入轨迹平滑度成本；第二阶段：建立凸二次规划，考虑负载平动和转动动力学、电缆张力约束和碰撞安全约束；最后应用集中式几何控制方案

Result: 增强型Tube-RRT*相比混合采样Tube-RRT*和自适应扩展Tube-RRT*具有更高成功率和有效采样率，产生更短最优路径和更小累积转弯角度；第二阶段生成平滑、无碰撞的期望负载轨迹；集中式几何控制验证了规划框架的有效性和可行性

Conclusion: 提出的两阶段轨迹规划框架为多无人机刚性负载级联运输系统在密集障碍环境中提供了实用解决方案，有效解决了负载姿态操纵的规划挑战

Abstract: This paper presents a two-stage trajectory planning framework for a multi-UAV rigid-payload cascaded transportation system, aiming to address planning challenges in densely cluttered environments. In Stage I, an Enhanced Tube-RRT* algorithm is developed by integrating active hybrid sampling and an adaptive expansion strategy, enabling rapid generation of a safe and feasible virtual tube in environments with dense obstacles. Moreover, a trajectory smoothness cost is explicitly incorporated into the edge cost to reduce excessive turns and thereby mitigate cable-induced oscillations. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed Enhanced Tube-RRT* achieves a higher success rate and effective sampling rate than mixed-sampling Tube-RRT* (STube-RRT*) and adaptive-extension Tube-RRT* (AETube-RRT*), while producing a shorter optimal path with a smaller cumulative turning angle. In Stage II, a convex quadratic program is formulated by considering payload translational and rotational dynamics, cable tension constraints, and collision-safety constraints, yielding a smooth, collision-free desired payload trajectory. Finally, a centralized geometric control scheme is applied to the cascaded system to validate the effectiveness and feasibility of the proposed planning framework, offering a practical solution for payload attitude maneuvering in densely cluttered environments.

</details>


### [390] [CAVERS: Multimodal SLAM Data from a Natural Karstic Cave with Ground Truth Motion Capture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15052)
*Giacomo Franchini,David Rodríguez-Martínez,Alfonso Martínez-Petersen,C. J. Pérez-del-Pulgar,Marcello Chiaberge*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CAVERS是一个针对天然喀斯特洞穴环境的多模态机器人感知数据集，包含RGB-D-I、热成像和LiDAR数据，提供毫米级精度地面真值，用于评估SLAM和建图算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天然喀斯特洞穴环境具有不规则几何形状、反光潮湿表面、近乎零环境光照和复杂分支通道等独特挑战，而现有公开数据集稀缺且传感模态和环境多样性有限。

Method: 在西班牙马拉加的Cueva de la Victoria洞穴两个结构不同的房间中采集数据，包含24个序列约335GB数据。传感器套件包括Intel RealSense D435i RGB-D-I相机、Optris PI640i近红外热成像相机和Velodyne VLP-16 LiDAR，采用手持和轮式机器人两种方式在完全黑暗和人工照明条件下操作。大多数序列通过洞穴内安装的Optirack运动捕捉系统提供120Hz的毫米级精度6自由度位姿和速度地面真值。

Result: 数据集包含多模态传感器数据和高精度地面真值，可用于评估七种最先进的SLAM和里程计算法（涵盖视觉、视觉-惯性、热成像-惯性和LiDAR基管道）以及3D重建管道，验证了数据集的可用性。

Conclusion: CAVERS填补了天然喀斯特洞穴环境多模态机器人感知数据集的空白，为开发鲁棒的洞穴导航和感知算法提供了重要资源，数据集已公开可用。

Abstract: Autonomous robots operating in natural karstic caves face perception and navigation challenges that are qualitatively distinct from those encountered in mines or tunnels: irregular geometry, reflective wet surfaces, near-zero ambient light, and complex branching passages. Yet publicly available datasets targeting this environment remain scarce and offer limited sensing modalities and environmental diversity. We present CAVERS, a multimodal dataset acquired in two structurally distinct rooms of Cueva de la Victoria, Málaga, Spain, comprising 24 sequences totaling approximately 335 GB of recorded data. The sensor suite combines an Intel RealSense D435i RGB-D-I camera, an Optris PI640i near-IR thermal camera, and a Velodyne VLP-16 LiDAR, operated both handheld and mounted on a wheeled rover under full darkness and artificial illumination. For most of the sequences, mm-accurate 6-DoF ground truth pose and velocity at 120 Hz are provided by an Optirack motion capture system installed directly inside the cave. We benchmark seven state-of-the-art SLAM and odometry algorithms spanning visual, visual-inertial, thermal-inertial, and LiDAR-based pipelines, as well as a 3D reconstruction pipeline, demonstrating the dataset's usability. %The dataset and all supplementary material are publicly available at: https://github.com/spaceuma/cavers.

</details>


### [391] [DockAnywhere: Data-Efficient Visuomotor Policy Learning for Mobile Manipulation via Novel Demonstration Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15023)
*Ziyu Shan,Yuheng Zhou,Gaoyuan Wu,Ziheng Ji,Zhenyu Wu,Ziwei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DockAnywhere：一种低成本演示生成框架，通过将单次演示提升到多种可行的对接配置，解决移动操作中的视角泛化问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动操作方法采用两阶段范式（先导航到对接点，再进行固定基座操作），但在实际部署中由于对接点偏移导致视角泛化问题，限制了策略在真实环境中的泛化能力

Method: 1. 将轨迹解耦为对接相关的基座运动和视角不变的接触丰富操作技能；2. 在可行性约束下采样可行的对接提议；3. 通过结构保持增强生成对应轨迹；4. 使用点云表示机器人和物体，通过点级空间编辑合成3D空间中的视觉观测，确保跨视角的观测和动作一致性

Result: 在ManiSkill和真实平台上的大量实验表明，DockAnywhere显著提高了策略成功率，能够轻松泛化到训练中未见对接点的新视角，大幅增强了移动操作策略在真实部署中的泛化能力

Conclusion: DockAnywhere通过低成本演示生成框架有效解决了移动操作中的视角泛化问题，通过解耦基座运动与操作技能、3D空间观测合成等方法，显著提升了策略在对接点变化情况下的泛化性能

Abstract: Mobile manipulation is a fundamental capability that enables robots to interact in expansive environments such as homes and factories. Most existing approaches follow a two-stage paradigm, where the robot first navigates to a docking point and then performs fixed-base manipulation using powerful visuomotor policies. However, real-world mobile manipulation often suffers from the view generalization problem due to shifts of docking points. To address this issue, we propose a novel low-cost demonstration generation framework named DockAnywhere, which improves viewpoint generalization under docking variability by lifting a single demonstration to diverse feasible docking configurations. Specifically, DockAnywhere lifts a trajectory to any feasible docking points by decoupling docking-dependent base motions from contact-rich manipulation skills that remain invariant across viewpoints. Feasible docking proposals are sampled under feasibility constraints, and corresponding trajectories are generated via structure-preserving augmentation. Visual observations are synthesized in 3D space by representing the robot and objects as point clouds and applying point-level spatial editing to ensure the consistency of observation and action across viewpoints. Extensive experiments on ManiSkill and real-world platforms demonstrate that DockAnywhere substantially improves policy success rates and easily generalizes to novel viewpoints from unseen docking points during training, significantly enhancing the generalization capability of mobile manipulation policy in real-world deployment.

</details>


### [392] [DEX-Mouse: A Low-cost Portable and Universal Interface with Force Feedback for Data Collection of Dexterous Robotic Hands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15013)
*Joonho Koh,Haechan Jung,Nayoung Kim,Wook Ko,Changjoo Nam*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DEX-Mouse：一种便携、免校准、手持式遥操作接口，用于灵巧手操作数据采集，成本低于150美元，具有集成动觉力反馈功能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有灵巧手操作数据采集方法存在多种问题：仿真方法有sim-to-real差距，视频方法有重定向问题，MoCap手套系统需要每操作者校准且缺乏便携性，便携方案又缺乏跨平台和跨操作者兼容性

Method: 开发DEX-Mouse接口，使用商用现成组件构建，成本低于150美元。采用操作者无关设计，无需校准或结构修改。支持两种配置：目标机器人手直接安装在操作者前臂上（机器人对齐数据），以及空间分离配置

Result: 在比较性用户研究中，使用附着配置的操作者在各种灵巧操作任务中达到86.67%的任务完成率。附着配置相比空间分离遥操作设置，在所有比较接口中都降低了操作者的感知工作负荷

Conclusion: DEX-Mouse提供了一种低成本、便携、免校准的遥操作解决方案，能够生成机器人对齐数据，显著降低操作者工作负荷，并通过开源硬件和软件栈促进复制和采用

Abstract: Data-driven dexterous hand manipulation requires large-scale, physically consistent demonstration data. Simulation and video-based methods suffer from sim-to-real gaps and retargeting problems, while MoCap glove-based teleoperation systems require per-operator calibration and lack portability, as the robot hand is typically fixed to a stationary arm. Portable alternatives improve mobility but lack cross-platform and cross-operator compatibility. We present DEX-Mouse, a portable, calibration-free hand-held teleoperation interface with integrated kinesthetic force feedback, built from commercial off-the-shelf components under USD 150. The operator-agnostic design requires no calibration or structural modification, enabling immediate deployment across diverse environments and platforms. The interface supports a configuration in which the target robot hand is mounted directly on the forearm of an operator, producing robot-aligned data. In a comparative user study across various dexterous manipulation tasks, operators using the proposed system achieved an 86.67% task completion rate under the attached configuration. Also, we found that the attached configuration reduced the perceived workload of the operators compared to spatially separated teleoperation setups across all compared interfaces. The complete hardware and software stack, including bill of materials, CAD models, and firmware, is open-sourced at https://dex-mouse.github.io/ to facilitate replication and adoption.

</details>


### [393] [Momentum-constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework with Residual-enhanced DRL for Visually Impaired Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14986)
*Yuting Zeng,Zhiwen Zheng,Jingya Wang,You Zhou,JiaLing Xiao,Yongbin Yu,Manping Fan,Bo Gong,Liyong Ren*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MHHTOF框架，通过动量约束混合启发式轨迹优化解决视障辅助规划中的多目标优化、泛化和可解释性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视障辅助规划方法在多目标优化、泛化能力和可解释性方面存在不足，需要平衡舒适性、安全性等多重目标

Method: 1) HTSC与MTO平衡舒适性和安全性；2) 残差增强DRL模块细化候选轨迹；3) DCMM双阶段成本建模机制在Frenet空间确保一致性，在Cartesian空间集成用户偏好

Result: 收敛速度比基线快近一倍，成本更低更稳定；复杂动态场景中速度和加速度曲线更稳定，风险降低

Conclusion: MHHTOF在鲁棒性、安全性和效率方面具有优势，为视障辅助规划提供了有效的解决方案

Abstract: Safe and efficient assistive planning for visually impaired scenarios remains challenging, since existing methods struggle with multi-objective optimization, generalization, and interpretability. In response, this paper proposes a Momentum-Constrained Hybrid Heuristic Trajectory Optimization Framework (MHHTOF). To balance multiple objectives of comfort and safety, the framework designs a Heuristic Trajectory Sampling Cluster (HTSC) with a Momentum-Constrained Trajectory Optimization (MTO), which suppresses abrupt velocity and acceleration changes. In addition, a novel residual-enhanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) module refines candidate trajectories, advancing temporal modeling and policy generalization. Finally, a dual-stage cost modeling mechanism (DCMM) is introduced to regulate optimization, where costs in the Frenet space ensure consistency, and reward-driven adaptive weights in the Cartesian space integrate user preferences for interpretability and user-centric decision-making. Experimental results show that the proposed framework converges in nearly half the iterations of baselines and achieves lower and more stable costs. In complex dynamic scenarios, MHHTOF further demonstrates stable velocity and acceleration curves with reduced risk, confirming its advantages in robustness, safety, and efficiency.

</details>


### [394] [HRDexDB: A Large-Scale Dataset of Dexterous Human and Robotic Hand Grasps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14944)
*Jongbin Lim,Taeyun Ha,Mingi Choi,Jisoo Kim,Byungjun Kim,Subin Jeon,Hanbyul Joo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HRDexDB是一个大规模多模态数据集，包含人类和多种机器人手的高保真灵巧抓取序列，涵盖100个不同物体，提供视觉、运动学和触觉数据，用于多模态策略学习和跨领域灵巧操作研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对人类和多种机器人手灵巧抓取的综合覆盖，且缺少高精度时空3D地面真值运动数据。需要建立一个包含视觉、运动学和触觉多模态信息的数据集，以促进物理交互研究和跨领域灵巧操作学习。

Method: 利用最先进的视觉方法和专门的多摄像头系统，采集人类和多种机器人手在100个不同物体上的抓取序列。数据集包含1.4K个抓取试验（成功和失败），提供高精度时空3D地面真值运动、高分辨率触觉信号、同步多视角视频和自我中心视频流。

Result: HRDexDB成为首个大规模多模态灵巧抓取数据集，包含人类和多种机器人手在相同目标物体上的对齐捕获，涵盖视觉、运动学和触觉三种模态，为多模态策略学习和跨领域灵巧操作提供了基础基准。

Conclusion: HRDexDB通过提供人类灵巧性和机器人执行在相同目标物体上的紧密对齐捕获，为多模态策略学习和跨领域灵巧操作研究建立了重要基准，将促进物理交互理解和机器人灵巧操作能力的发展。

Abstract: We present HRDexDB, a large-scale, multi-modal dataset of high-fidelity dexterous grasping sequences featuring both human and diverse robotic hands. Unlike existing datasets, HRDexDB provides a comprehensive collection of grasping trajectories across human hands and multiple robot hand embodiments, spanning 100 diverse objects. Leveraging state-of-the-art vision methods and a new dedicated multi-camera system, our HRDexDB offers high-precision spatiotemporal 3D ground-truth motion for both the agent and the manipulated object. To facilitate the study of physical interaction, HRDexDB includes high-resolution tactile signals, synchronized multi-view video, and egocentric video streams. The dataset comprises 1.4K grasping trials, encompassing both successes and failures, each enriched with visual, kinematic, and tactile modalities. By providing closely aligned captures of human dexterity and robotic execution on the same target objects under comparable grasping motions, HRDexDB serves as a foundational benchmark for multi-modal policy learning and cross-domain dexterous manipulation.

</details>


### [395] [An Intelligent Robotic and Bio-Digestor Framework for Smart Waste Management](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14882)
*Radhika Khatri,Adit Tewari,Nikhil Sharma,M. B. Srinivas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种集成机器人垃圾分类与优化生物消化器的智能废物管理框架，实现98%的垃圾分类精度和高效生物转化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 快速城市化和人口增长使城市固体废物管理日益困难，需要更智能、自动化的废物管理解决方案来减少人工干预并提高效率。

Method: 设计了一个集成框架，包含两个连接系统：1）使用MyCobot 280 Jetson Nano机械臂配合YOLOv8目标检测和ROS路径规划的机器人垃圾分类模块；2）配备多传感器监测温度、pH、压力、转速等参数的生物消化器系统，采用粒子群优化算法结合回归模型动态调整参数。

Result: 在动态条件下的系统测试显示，分类精度达到98%，同时实现了高效的生物转化。该框架在变化的环境条件下确保了稳定运行并最大化了消化效率。

Conclusion: 提出的框架为现代废物管理提供了一个可扩展、智能且实用的解决方案，适用于住宅和工业应用，通过自动化分类和智能优化显著提高了废物处理效率。

Abstract: Rapid urbanization and continuous population growth have made municipal solid waste management increasingly challenging. These challenges highlight the need for smarter and automated waste management solutions. This paper presents the design and evaluation of an integrated waste management framework that combines two connected systems, a robotic waste segregation module and an optimized bio-digestor. The robotic waste segregation system uses a MyCobot 280 Jetson Nano robotic arm along with YOLOv8 object detection and robot operating system (ROS)-based path planning to identify and sort waste in real time. It classifies waste into four different categories with high precision, reducing the need for manual intervention. After segregation, the biodegradable waste is transferred to a bio-digestor system equipped with multiple sensors. These sensors continuously monitor key parameters, including temperature, pH, pressure, and motor revolutions per minute. The Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm, combined with a regression model, is used to dynamically adjust system parameters. This intelligent optimization approach ensures stable operation and maximizes digestion efficiency under varying environmental conditions. System testing under dynamic conditions demonstrates a sorting accuracy of 98% along with highly efficient biological conversion. The proposed framework offers a scalable, intelligent, and practical solution for modern waste management, making it suitable for both residential and industrial applications.

</details>


### [396] [4D Radar Gaussian Modeling and Scan Matching with RCS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14868)
*Fernando Amodeo,Luis Merino,Fernando Caballero*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将RCS物理特性融入3D高斯模型，提升4D毫米波雷达点云配准精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 4D毫米波雷达在机器人领域应用日益广泛，但现有方法通常只利用XYZ位置和Doppler速度信息，而忽略了RCS（雷达散射截面）这一重要物理特性。RCS信息在场景建模和扫描匹配过程中往往被忽视，未能充分发挥其潜在价值。

Method: 基于先前的3D高斯建模和扫描匹配工作，提出将RCS的物理行为特性整合到模型中。通过将RCS作为场景的附加特征维度，丰富场景的概括性信息，从而改进扫描匹配过程。

Result: 论文未提供具体实验结果，但从方法描述可推断，通过整合RCS物理特性，预期能够提升4D毫米波雷达点云的场景建模精度和扫描匹配性能。

Conclusion: 将RCS物理特性纳入4D毫米波雷达的3D高斯建模框架，能够充分利用雷达提供的完整信息，增强场景表征能力，从而改善扫描匹配效果，为机器人感知系统提供更鲁棒的环境理解。

Abstract: 4D millimeter-wave (mmWave) radars are increasingly used in robotics, as they offer robustness against adverse environmental conditions. Besides the usual XYZ position, they provide Doppler velocity measurements as well as Radar Cross Section (RCS) information for every point. While Doppler is widely used to filter out dynamic points, RCS is often overlooked and not usually used in modeling and scan matching processes. Building on previous 3D Gaussian modeling and scan matching work, we propose incorporating the physical behavior of RCS in the model, in order to further enrich the summarized information about the scene, and improve the scan matching process.

</details>


### [397] [Graph Theoretical Outlier Rejection for 4D Radar Registration in Feature-Poor Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14857)
*Georg Dorndorf,Daniel Adolfsson,Masrur Doostdar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 将基于图的成对一致性最大化（PCM）集成到ICP循环中，通过雷达自适应评分函数和贪婪启发式算法改进稀疏4D成像雷达在特征贫乏露天矿环境中的扫描配准


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 4D成像雷达在灰尘和低能见度环境中表现良好，但在特征贫乏的露天矿中，扫描稀疏性和噪声/多径反射导致的虚假检测使扫描配准具有挑战性，缺乏显著地标降低了对应关系的可靠性

Method: 将基于图的成对一致性最大化（PCM）作为离群点剔除步骤集成到ICP循环中，提出雷达自适应的成对距离不变评分函数，结合各向异性、每个检测的不确定性（源自雷达测量模型），使用贪婪启发式算法在成对一致性图中寻找大团来近似一致性最大化问题

Result: 在露天矿数据集上评估，相比不使用PCM的广义ICP（GICP）基线，该方法在1米段上减少相对位置误差（RPE）29.6%，在100米段上减少高达55%

Conclusion: 该方法通过PCM改进对应关系集，在初始关联集严重污染时提高鲁棒性，适合在线使用，可集成到定位管道中

Abstract: Automotive 4D imaging radar is well suited for operation in dusty and low-visibility environments, but scan registration remains challenging due to scan sparsity and spurious detections caused by noise and multipath reflections. This difficulty is compounded in feature-poor open-pit mines, where the lack of distinctive landmarks reduces correspondence reliability. We integrate graph-based pairwise consistency maximization (PCM) as an outlier rejection step within the iterative closest points (ICP) loop. We propose a radar-adapted pairwise distance-invariant scoring function for graph-based (PCM) that incorporates anisotropic, per-detection uncertainty derived from a radar measurement model. The consistency maximization problem is approximated with a greedy heuristic that finds a large clique in the pairwise consistency graph. The refined correspondence set improves robustness when the initial association set is heavily contaminated. We evaluate a standard Euclidean distance residual and our uncertainty-aware residual on an open-pit mine dataset collected with a 4D imaging radar. Compared to the generalized ICP (GICP) baseline without PCM, our method reduces segment relative position error (RPE) by 29.6% on 1 m segments and by up to 55% on 100 m segments. The presented method is intended for integration into localization pipelines and is suitable for online use due to the greedy heuristic in graph-based (PCM).

</details>


### [398] [Switch: Learning Agile Skills Switching for Humanoid Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14834)
*Yuen-Fui Lau,Qihan Zhao,Yinhuai Wang,Runyi Yu,Hok Wai Tsui,Qifeng Chen,Ping Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Switch：一种基于技能图的分层多技能系统，实现人形机器人任意时刻的无缝技能切换


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全身控制方法在实现不同技能间的灵活转换方面存在困难，导致安全问题和实际应用限制。需要一种能够实现任意时刻无缝技能切换的系统。

Method: 提出分层多技能系统Switch，包含三个关键组件：1) 基于多技能运动数据中运动学相似性建立潜在跨技能转换的技能图；2) 通过深度强化学习在技能图上训练的全身跟踪策略；3) 在线技能调度器，驱动跟踪策略实现鲁棒技能执行和平滑转换。当技能切换或跟踪偏差较大时，调度器执行在线图搜索找到最优可行路径。

Result: 综合实验表明，Switch使人形机器人能够以高成功率执行敏捷的技能转换，同时保持强大的运动模仿性能。

Conclusion: Switch系统通过技能图、强化学习策略和在线调度器的结合，解决了人形机器人多技能无缝转换的挑战，实现了高效、稳定、实时的多样化运动技能执行。

Abstract: Recent advancements in whole-body control through deep reinforcement learning have enabled humanoid robots to achieve remarkable progress in real-world chal lenging locomotion skills. However, existing approaches often struggle with flexible transitions between distinct skills, cre ating safety concerns and practical limitations. To address this challenge, we introduce a hierarchical multi-skill system, Switch, enabling seamless skill transitions at any moment. Our approach comprises three key components: (1) a Skill Graph (SG) that establishes potential cross-skill transitions based on kinematic similarity within multi-skill motion data, (2) a whole-body tracking policy trained on this skill graph through deep reinforcement learning, and (3) an online skill scheduler to drive the tracking policy for robust skill execution and smooth transitions. For skill switching or significant tracking deviations, the scheduler performs online graph search to find the optimal feasible path, which ensures efficient, stable, and real-time execution of diverse locomotion skills. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Switch empowers humanoid to execute agile skill transitions with high success rates while maintaining strong motion imitation performance.

</details>


### [399] [Keep It CALM: Toward Calibration-Free Kilometer-Level SLAM with Visual Geometry Foundation Models via an Assistant Eye](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14795)
*Tianjun Zhang,Fengyi Zhang,Tianchen Deng,Lin Zhang,Hesheng Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CAL2M是一个无需校准的辅助眼大规模定位与建图框架，通过非线性变换解决视觉几何基础模型在大规模SLAM中的几何失真问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉几何基础模型在零样本局部重建中表现出色，但在千米级SLAM部署中存在挑战。现有方法依赖线性变换进行子图对齐，但单一线性变换无法建模VGFM输出中的复杂非线性几何失真，导致残差累积、轨迹漂移和地图发散

Method: 1) 引入"辅助眼"利用恒定物理间距先验消除尺度模糊；2) 提出基于对极几何约束的内参和位姿校正模型，通过基础矩阵分解校正内参不准确导致的旋转和平移误差；3) 提出基于锚点传播的全局一致建图策略，通过非线性变换弹性对齐子图

Result: CAL2M是一个即插即用框架，兼容任意VGFM，无需时空预校准，能够有效消除几何错位，确保全局一致的重建

Conclusion: CAL2M通过非线性变换方法解决了VGFM在大规模SLAM中的几何失真问题，相比传统线性变换方法能更有效地处理复杂几何变形，实现更准确的大规模定位与建图

Abstract: Visual Geometry Foundation Models (VGFMs) demonstrate remarkable zero-shot capabilities in local reconstruction. However, deploying them for kilometer-level Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) remains challenging. In such scenarios, current approaches mainly rely on linear transforms (e.g., Sim3 and SL4) for sub-map alignment, while we argue that a single linear transform is fundamentally insufficient to model the complex, non-linear geometric distortions inherent in VGFM outputs. Forcing such rigid alignment leads to the rapid accumulation of uncorrected residuals, eventually resulting in significant trajectory drift and map divergence. To address these limitations, we present CAL2M (Calibration-free Assistant-eye based Large-scale Localization and Mapping), a plug-and-play framework compatible with arbitrary VGFMs. Distinct from traditional systems, CAL2M introduces an "assistant eye" solely to leverage the prior of constant physical spacing, effectively eliminating scale ambiguity without any temporal or spatial pre-calibration. Furthermore, leveraging the assumption of accurate feature matching, we propose an epipolar-guided intrinsic and pose correction model. Supported by an online intrinsic search module, it can effectively rectify rotation and translation errors caused by inaccurate intrinsics through fundamental matrix decomposition. Finally, to ensure accurate mapping, we introduce a globally consistent mapping strategy based on anchor propagation. By constructing and fusing anchors across the trajectory, we establish a direct local-to-global mapping relationship. This enables the application of nonlinear transformations to elastically align sub-maps, effectively eliminating geometric misalignments and ensuring a globally consistent reconstruction. The source code of CAL2M will be publicly available at https://github.com/IRMVLab/CALM.

</details>


### [400] [Differentiable Object Pose Connectivity Metrics for Regrasp Sequence Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14733)
*Liang Qin,Weiwei Wan,Kensuke Harada*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于可微分姿态序列连通性度量的隐式多步重抓取规划框架，通过能量基模型建模抓取可行性，利用能量可加性构建连续能量景观，实现梯度优化中间姿态，并引入自适应迭代深化策略自动确定最小中间步数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当单次拾放无法在保持抓取可行性的情况下将物体从初始姿态转移到目标姿态时，需要重抓取规划。主要挑战在于推理中间姿态间的共享抓取连通性，离散搜索方法在此问题上表现脆弱。

Method: 使用能量基模型(EBM)建模物体姿态下的抓取可行性，利用能量可加性构建测量姿态对连通性的连续能量景观，实现基于梯度的中间物体姿态优化。引入自适应迭代深化策略自动确定最小中间步数。

Result: 实验表明提出的成本公式提供平滑且信息丰富的梯度，相比其他替代方法提高了规划鲁棒性。模型能够泛化到未见过的抓取姿态和跨末端执行器转移，使用吸盘约束训练的模型可以指导平行夹爪抓取操作。多步规划结果进一步证明了自适应深化和最小步数搜索的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于可微分姿态序列连通性度量的隐式多步重抓取规划框架能够有效解决重抓取规划中的连通性推理问题，通过连续能量景观和梯度优化提高了规划鲁棒性，自适应策略能够自动确定最优步数，并展示了良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: Regrasp planning is often required when one pick-and-place cannot transfer an object from an initial pose to a goal pose while maintaining grasp feasibility. The main challenge is to reason about shared-grasp connectivity across intermediate poses, where discrete search becomes brittle. We propose an implicit multi-step regrasp planning framework based on differentiable pose sequence connectivity metrics. We model grasp feasibility under an object pose using an Energy-Based Model (EBM) and leverage energy additivity to construct a continuous energy landscape that measures pose-pair connectivity, enabling gradient-based optimization of intermediate object poses. An adaptive iterative deepening strategy is introduced to determine the minimum number of intermediate steps automatically. Experiments show that the proposed cost formulation provides smooth and informative gradients, improving planning robustness over other alternatives. They also demonstrate generalization to unseen grasp poses and cross-end-effector transfer, where a model trained with suction constraints can guide parallel gripper grasp manipulation. The multi-step planning results further highlight the effectiveness of adaptive deepening and minimum-step search.

</details>


### [401] [World-Value-Action Model: Implicit Planning for Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14732)
*Runze Li,Hongyin Zhang,Junxi Jin,Qixin Zeng,Zifeng Zhuang,Yiqi Tang,Shangke Lyu,Donglin Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: WAV模型通过隐式规划解决VLA模型在长时域决策中的局限性，使用结构化潜在轨迹表示、世界模型预测和轨迹价值评估，在潜在空间中进行推理以生成高价值动作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型大多依赖直接动作预测，缺乏对长时域轨迹的推理能力和后果评估，限制了在复杂决策任务中的表现。需要解决长时域规划中可行轨迹概率指数衰减的问题。

Method: 提出World-Value-Action (WAV)统一框架：1) 学习基于视觉观察和语言指令的结构化潜在轨迹表示；2) 世界模型预测未来状态；3) 轨迹价值函数评估长时域效用；4) 在潜在空间中进行推理，将概率质量集中在高价值和动态可行的轨迹上。

Result: WAV模型在仿真和真实世界实验中一致优于最先进方法，在任务成功率、泛化能力和鲁棒性方面取得显著提升，特别是在长时域和组合场景中表现突出。

Conclusion: WAV模型通过潜在空间推理实现了高效的隐式规划，解决了动作空间直接规划中可行轨迹概率指数衰减的问题，为构建能够进行复杂长时域决策的具身智能体提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for building embodied agents that ground perception and language into action. However, most existing approaches rely on direct action prediction, lacking the ability to reason over long-horizon trajectories and evaluate their consequences, which limits performance in complex decision-making tasks. In this work, we introduce World-Value-Action (WAV) model, a unified framework that enables implicit planning in VLA systems. Rather than performing explicit trajectory optimization, WAV model learn a structured latent representation of future trajectories conditioned on visual observations and language instructions. A learned world model predicts future states, while a trajectory value function evaluates their long-horizon utility. Action generation is then formulated as inference in this latent space, where the model progressively concentrates probability mass on high-value and dynamically feasible trajectories. We provide a theoretical perspective showing that planning directly in action space suffers from an exponential decay in the probability of feasible trajectories as the horizon increases. In contrast, latent-space inference reshapes the search distribution toward feasible regions, enabling efficient long-horizon decision making. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the WAV model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving significant improvements in task success rate, generalization ability, and robustness, especially in long-horizon and compositional scenarios.

</details>


### [402] [DigiForest: Digital Analytics and Robotics for Sustainable Forestry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14652)
*Marco Camurri,Enrico Tomelleri,Matías Mattamala,Sebastián Barbas Laina,Martin Jacquet,Jens Behley,Sunni Kanta Prasad Kushwaha,Fang Nan,Nived Chebrolu,Leonard Freißmuth,Marvin Chayton Harms,Meher V. R. Malladi,Fan Yang,Jonas Frey,Cesar Cadena,Marco Hutter,Janine Schweier,Kostas Alexis,Cyrill Stachniss,Maurice Fallon,Stefan Leutenegger*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DigiForest是一个大规模精准林业系统，利用数字技术和自主机器人实现森林监测、管理和选择性采伐，已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等地验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 森林覆盖地球三分之一陆地面积，对全球生物多样性、气候调节和人类福祉至关重要。欧洲森林占陆地面积约40%，林业部门对实现欧盟气候中和与生物多样性目标具有核心作用，需要可持续森林管理、长效木制品使用和弹性森林生态系统。当前实践需要进一步创新以应对挑战。

Method: DigiForest采用四组件架构：1) 自主异构移动机器人（空中、腿式和袋式）进行树木级数据采集；2) 自动提取树木性状构建森林清单；3) 决策支持系统预测森林生长并辅助决策；4) 专用自主采伐机进行低影响选择性采伐。

Result: 该技术已在芬兰、英国和瑞士等多个地点的真实森林环境中进行了广泛验证。

Conclusion: DigiForest通过数字技术和自主机器人系统为可持续森林管理提供创新解决方案，支持欧盟气候和生物多样性目标的实现。

Abstract: Covering one third of Earth's land surface, forests are vital to global biodiversity, climate regulation, and human well-being. In Europe, forests and woodlands reach approximately 40% of land area, and the forestry sector is central to achieving the EU's climate neutrality and biodiversity goals; these emphasize sustainable forest management, increased use of long-lived wood products, and resilient forest ecosystems. To meet these goals and properly address their inherent challenges, current practices require further innovation. This chapter introduces DigiForest, a novel, large-scale precision forestry approach leveraging digital technologies and autonomous robotics. DigiForest is structured around four main components: (1) autonomous, heterogeneous mobile robots (aerial, legged, and marsupial) for tree-level data collection; (2) automated extraction of tree traits to build forest inventories; (3) a Decision Support System (DSS) for forecasting forest growth and supporting decision-making; and (4) low-impact selective logging using purpose-built autonomous harvesters. These technologies have been extensively validated in real-world conditions in several locations, including forests in Finland, the UK, and Switzerland.

</details>


### [403] [A multi-platform LiDAR dataset for standardized forest inventory measurement at long term ecological monitoring sites](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14635)
*Michael R. Chang,Anna Candotti,Karl von Ellenrieder,Enrico Tomelleri,Marco Camurri*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究构建了一个多平台LiDAR参考数据集，集成了无人机、地面和背包移动激光扫描，用于森林结构测量与生态观测的校准和整合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为支持3D结构数据与生态观测、标准异速生长模型的校准、基准测试和整合，需要高质量的多平台LiDAR参考数据集。现有数据集往往缺乏多平台集成和与长期生态观测站点的明确联系。

Method: 在ICOS森林样地采集多平台LiDAR数据：无人机激光扫描(ULS)测量冠层覆盖，地面激光扫描(TLS)详细测绘树干，背包移动激光扫描(MLS)结合实时SLAM高效获取林下数据。采用无标记、SLAM感知协议减少野外和处理时间，结合手动和自动方法进行数据配准。

Result: 创建了包含约3.33亿TLS点云的多平台数据集，整合了ULS和MLS数据，覆盖冠层和林下层。数据以LAZ和E57格式提供，包含UTM坐标和配准报告，确保可重复性。该数据集为配准方法测试、扫描效率评估以及点云与分割、定量结构模型、生物量估算的链接提供了基准。

Conclusion: 该数据集展示了如何将TLS、MLS和ULS结合用于森林生态系统的重复清查和数字孪生，通过与长期ICOS站点的关联，将3D结构与数十年的生态和通量测量明确联系起来，为森林监测和研究提供了重要资源。

Abstract: We present a curated multi-platform LiDAR reference dataset from an instrumented ICOS forest plot, explicitly designed to support calibration, benchmarking, and integration of 3D structural data with ecological observations and standard allometric models. The dataset integrates UAV-borne laser scanning (ULS) to measure canopy coverage, terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) for detailed stem mapping, and backpack mobile laser scanning (MLS) with real-time SLAM for efficient sub-canopy acquisition. We focus on the control plot with the most complete and internally consistent registration, where TLS point clouds (~333 million points) are complemented by ULS and MLS data capturing canopy and understory strata. Marker-free, SLAM-aware protocols were used to reduce field and processing time, while manual and automated methods were combined. Final products are available in LAZ and E57 formats with UTM coordinates, together with registration reports for reproducibility. The dataset provides a benchmark for testing registration methods, evaluating scanning efficiency, and linking point clouds with segmentation, quantitative structure models, and allometric biomass estimation. By situating the acquisitions at a long-term ICOS site, it is explicitly linked to 3D structure with decades of ecological and flux measurements. More broadly, it illustrates how TLS, MLS, and ULS can be combined for repeated inventories and digital twins of forest ecosystems.

</details>


### [404] [Model-Based Reinforcement Learning Exploits Passive Body Dynamics for High-Performance Biped Robot Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14565)
*Tomoya Kamimura,Haruka Washiyama,Akihito Sano*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 利用模型深度强化学习研究被动元素对双足机器人行走和奔跑运动生成的影响，发现具有被动元素的机器人能通过系统吸引子驱动学习获得鲁棒且节能的运动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究被动身体特性在双足机器人运动生成中的作用，探索被动元素如何影响基于模型的深度强化学习训练过程，以及如何利用系统吸引子实现鲁棒且节能的运动

Method: 在模拟器中构建两种模型：一种包含被动元素（如弹簧），另一种类似通用人形机器人不包含被动元素。使用基于模型的深度强化学习训练这两种模型，分析被动元素对训练过程和运动性能的影响

Result: 具有被动元素的模型训练受到系统吸引子的显著影响：轨迹快速收敛到极限环，但获得高奖励需要较长时间。然而，通过吸引子驱动学习获得的运动具有鲁棒性和高能效。被动元素使机器人能够利用身体与地面动态交互产生的稳定极限环高效获得高性能运动

Conclusion: 被动身体特性对实现高效运动生成至关重要，具有被动元素的机器人能够利用系统吸引子和稳定极限环获得鲁棒且节能的运动。这项研究证明了在身体中实现被动特性对未来具身AI的重要性

Abstract: Embodiment is a significant keyword in recent machine learning fields. This study focused on the passive nature of the body of a biped robot to generate walking and running locomotion using model-based deep reinforcement learning. We constructed two models in a simulator, one with passive elements (e.g., springs) and the other, which is similar to general humanoids, without passive elements. The training of the model with passive elements was highly affected by the attractor of the system. This lead that although the trajectories quickly converged to limit cycles, it took a long time to obtain large rewards. However, thanks to the attractor-driven learning, the acquired locomotion was robust and energy-efficient. The results revealed that robots with passive elements could efficiently acquire high-performance locomotion by utilizing stable limit cycles generated through dynamic interaction between the body and ground. This study demonstrates the importance of implementing passive properties in the body for future embodied AI.

</details>


### [405] [CT-VIR: Continuous-Time Visual-Inertial-Ranging Fusion for Indoor Localization with Sparse Anchors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14545)
*Yu-An Liu,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于样条的连续时间状态估计方法，用于视觉-惯性-测距融合定位，通过虚拟锚点构建和异常值剔除解决几何退化和测距可靠性问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉惯性里程计长期精度会因缺乏全局约束而下降，现有视觉-惯性-测距融合方法多基于离散时间滤波或优化，难以在异步多传感器采样下平衡定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率

Method: 采用基于B样条的连续时间状态估计方法：预处理阶段使用VIO运动先验和UWB测距构建虚拟锚点并剔除异常值；估计阶段使用B样条参数化位姿轨迹，将惯性、视觉和测距约束构建为滑动窗口图中的因子，联合优化样条控制点和少量辅助参数

Result: 在公开数据集和真实世界实验中验证了方法的有效性和实际潜力

Conclusion: 提出的基于样条的连续时间VIO-UWB融合方法能够有效解决几何退化问题，提高测距可靠性，在异步多传感器采样下实现更好的定位精度、轨迹一致性和融合效率平衡

Abstract: Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) is widely used for mobile robot localization, but its long-term accuracy degrades without global constraints. Incorporating ranging sensors such as ultra-wideband (UWB) can mitigate drift; however, high-accuracy ranging usually requires well-deployed anchors, which is difficult to ensure in narrow or low-power environments. Moreover, most existing visual-inertial-ranging (VIR) fusion methods rely on discrete time-based filtering or optimization, making it difficult to balance positioning accuracy, trajectory consistency, and fusion efficiency under asynchronous multi-sensor sampling. To address these issues, we propose a spline-based continuous-time state estimation method for VIR fusion localization. In the preprocessing stage, VIO motion priors and UWB ranging measurements are used to construct virtual anchors and reject outliers, thereby alleviating geometric degeneration and improving range reliability. In the estimation stage, the pose trajectory is parameterized in continuous time using a B-spline, while inertial, visual, and ranging constraints are formulated as factors in a sliding-window graph. The spline control points, together with a small set of auxiliary parameters, are then jointly optimized to obtain a continuous-time trajectory estimate. Evaluations on public datasets and real-world experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and practical potential of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [406] [CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14454)
*Deyuan Qu,Qi Chen,Takayuki Shimizu,Onur Altintas*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CooperDrive是一个轻量级协同感知框架，通过车辆间对象级信息共享和融合，增强遮挡和非视距场景下的态势感知能力，实现更早、更安全的驾驶决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在遮挡和非视距场景下感知能力受限，延迟反应会增加碰撞风险。需要在不改变现有感知定位规划架构的前提下，通过协同感知提升安全性和反应时间。

Method: 1) 重用检测器的鸟瞰图特征估计车辆姿态，避免额外重编码器；2) 轻量级对象级共享和融合策略连接感知与规划；3) 利用扩展的对象集合提前预测潜在冲突，主动调整速度和轨迹。

Result: 真实世界闭环测试显示：在遮挡严重的非视距交叉口，CooperDrive提高了反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间和停车余量，仅需90 kbps带宽，平均端到端延迟为89 ms。

Conclusion: CooperDrive通过轻量级协同感知框架，在不改变现有车辆架构的前提下，有效提升了自动驾驶在遮挡和非视距场景下的安全性和反应能力，将被动反应转变为预测性安全决策。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles equipped with robust onboard perception, localization, and planning still face limitations in occlusion and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) scenarios, where delayed reactions can increase collision risk. We propose CooperDrive, a cooperative perception framework that augments situational awareness and enables earlier, safer driving decisions. CooperDrive offers two key advantages: (i) each vehicle retains its native perception, localization, and planning stack, and (ii) a lightweight object-level sharing and fusion strategy bridges perception and planning. Specifically, CooperDrive reuses detector Bird's-Eye View (BEV) features to estimate accurate vehicle poses without additional heavy encoders, thereby reconstructing BEV representations and feeding the planner with low latency. On the planning side, CooperDrive leverages the expanded object set to anticipate potential conflicts earlier and adjust speed and trajectory proactively, thereby transforming reactive behaviors into predictive and safer driving decisions. Real-world closed-loop tests at occlusion-heavy NLOS intersections demonstrate that CooperDrive increases reaction lead time, minimum time-to-collision (TTC), and stopping margin, while requiring only 90 kbps bandwidth and maintaining an average end-to-end latency of 89 ms.

</details>


### [407] [BIEVR-LIO: Robust LiDAR-Inertial Odometry through Bump-Image-Enhanced Voxel Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14421)
*Patrick Pfreundschuh,Turcan Tuna,Cedric Le Gentil,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena,Helen Oleynikova*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BIEVR-LIO：一种新颖的LiDAR-惯性里程计方法，通过高分辨率地图表示和地图引导点采样策略，在几何信息稀疏的挑战性环境中提高鲁棒性和精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人进入挑战性环境时，环境中往往缺乏足够的几何信息来约束点云配准，导致LiDAR-惯性里程计精度下降甚至发散。需要一种能够利用可用几何细微变化来提高鲁棒性的方法。

Method: 提出BIEVR-LIO方法：1）使用高分辨率地图表示，将表面存储为紧凑的体素级定向高度图像，可直接用于配准而无需计算中间几何基元；2）提出地图引导点采样策略，专注于几何信息丰富的区域进行配准，在非信息性环境中提高鲁棒性并降低计算成本。

Result: 在多种传感器、平台和环境中的实验表明，该方法在约束良好的场景中达到最先进性能，在基线方法发散的挑战性场景中显著改进。此外，BIEVR-LIO捕获的细粒度几何可用于下游任务，如机器人运动的高程映射。

Conclusion: BIEVR-LIO通过创新的地图表示和采样策略，有效解决了几何信息稀疏环境中的LiDAR-惯性里程计问题，提高了鲁棒性和精度，同时支持下游应用。

Abstract: Reliable odometry is essential for mobile robots as they increasingly enter more challenging environments, which often contain little information to constrain point cloud registration, resulting in degraded LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO) accuracy or even divergence. To address this, we present BIEVR-LIO, a novel approach designed specifically to exploit subtle variations in the available geometry for improved robustness. We propose a high-resolution map representation that stores surfaces as compact voxel-wise oriented height images. This representation can directly be used for registration without the calculation of intermediate geometric primitives while still supporting efficient updates. Since informative geometry is often sparsely distributed in the environment, we further propose a map-informed point sampling strategy to focus registration on geometrically informative regions, improving robustness in uninformative environments while reducing computational cost compared to global high-resolution sampling. Experiments across multiple sensors, platforms, and environments demonstrates state-of-the-art performance in well-constrained scenes and substantial improvements in challenging scenarios where baseline methods diverge. Additionally, we demonstrate that the fine-grained geometry captured by BIEVR-LIO can be used for downstream tasks such as elevation mapping for robot locomotion.

</details>


### [408] [RoSLAC: Robust Simultaneous Localization and Calibration of Multiple Magnetometers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14353)
*Qiyang Lyu,Zhenyu Wu,Wei Wang,Hongming Shen,Danwei Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出RoSLAC方法，通过交替优化同时估计机器人位姿和磁力计校准参数，解决GPS缺失环境下AMR定位问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPS信号弱或无信号环境（如室内、地下空间）中AMR定位困难，基础设施方案成本高维护难，基于传感器方法受动态障碍物影响，磁力计易受平台铁磁材料干扰需要校准，传统旋转校准方法不适用于大型重型平台

Method: 提出鲁棒的同时定位与校准（RoSLAC）方法，基于交替优化迭代估计平台位姿和磁力计校准参数，无需旋转磁力计

Result: 在高保真仿真和真实环境中的广泛评估表明，RoSLAC方法相比最先进的磁力计校准技术，实现了高定位精度同时保持低计算成本

Conclusion: RoSLAC方法为GPS缺失环境中的AMR定位提供了一种实用解决方案，通过同时处理定位和校准问题，克服了传统方法的局限性

Abstract: Localization of autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in enclosed or semi-enclosed environments such as offices, hotels, hospitals, indoor parking facilities, and underground spaces where GPS signals are weak or unavailable remains a major obstacle to the deployment of fully autonomous systems. Infrastructure-based localization approaches, such as QR codes and RFID, are constrained by high installation and maintenance costs as well as limited flexibility, while onboard sensor-based methods, including LiDAR- and vision-based solutions, are affected by ambiguous geometric features and frequent occlusions caused by dynamic obstacles such as pedestrians. Ambient magnetic field (AMF)-based localization has therefore attracted growing interest in recent years because it does not rely on external infrastructure or geometric features, making it well-suited for AMR applications such as service robots and security robots. However, magnetometer measurements are often corrupted by distortions caused by ferromagnetic materials present on the sensor platform, which bias the AMF and degrade localization reliability. As a result, accurate magnetometer calibration to estimate distortion parameters becomes essential. Conventional calibration methods that rely on rotating the magnetometer are impractical for large and heavy platforms. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a robust simultaneous localization and calibration (RoSLAC) approach based on alternating optimization, which iteratively and efficiently estimates both the platform pose and magnetometer calibration parameters. Extensive evaluations conducted in high-fidelity simulation and real-world environments demonstrate that the proposed RoSLAC method achieves high localization accuracy while maintaining low computational cost compared with state-of-the-art magnetometer calibration techniques.

</details>


### [409] [CART: Context-Aware Terrain Adaptation using Temporal Sequence Selection for Legged Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14344)
*Kartikeya Singh,Youngjin Kim,Yash Turkar,Karthik Dantu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CART是一种基于上下文感知的地形适应方法的高层控制器，通过整合本体感知和外感受感知来实现对地形的鲁棒理解，在复杂地形上提高了腿式机器人的稳定性和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地形适应方法主要依赖视觉传感器的先验经验，在复杂越野地形上容易失败，存在视觉-纹理悖论（所见与所感不一致）。需要开发能够整合多种感知模态的方法，使腿式机器人像动物一样结合视觉和触觉来稳定行走。

Method: 提出CART高层控制器，采用上下文感知的地形适应方法，整合本体感知（proprioception）和外感受感知（exteroception）的机载传感数据。使用机器人基座的振动稳定性作为评估学习到的上下文地形特性的指标。

Result: 在IsaacSim模拟器中使用ANYmal-C机器人，在真实世界中使用Boston Dynamics SPOT机器人进行评估。CART在模拟中平均成功率比所有基线提高5%，在真实世界中整体稳定性分别提高45%和24%，且未增加完成运动任务的时间。

Conclusion: CART通过整合多模态感知实现了对地形的鲁棒理解，有效解决了视觉-纹理悖论问题，显著提高了腿式机器人在复杂地形上的稳定性和适应性，为机器人地形适应提供了新方法。

Abstract: Animals in nature combine multiple modalities, such as sight and feel, to perceive terrain and develop an understanding of how to walk on uneven terrain in a stable manner. Similarly, legged robots need to develop their ability to stably walk on complex terrains by developing an understanding of the relationship between vision and proprioception. Most current terrain adaptation methods are susceptible to failure on complex, off-road terrain as they rely on prior experience, particularly observations from a vision sensor. This experience-based learning often creates a Visual-Texture Paradox between what has been seen and how it actually feels. In this work, we introduce CART, a high-level controller built on a context-aware terrain adaptation approach that integrates proprioception and exteroception from onboard sensing to achieve a robust understanding of terrain. We evaluate our method on multiple terrains using an ANYmal-C robot on the IsaacSim simulator and a Boston Dynamics SPOT robot for our real-world experiments. To evaluate the learned contextual terrain properties, we adapt vibrational stability on the base of the robot as a metric. We compare CART with various state-of-the-art baselines equipped with multimodal sensing in both simulation and the real world. CART achieves an average success rate improvement of 5% over all baselines in simulation and improves the overall stability up to 45% and 24% in the real world without increasing the time taken by the robot to accomplish locomotion tasks.

</details>


### [410] [UMI-3D: Extending Universal Manipulation Interface from Vision-Limited to 3D Spatial Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14089)
*Ziming Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: UMI-3D是通用操纵接口(UMI)的多模态扩展，通过集成低成本LiDAR传感器解决原系统在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败方面的局限性，提升数据收集质量和策略性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 原UMI系统依赖单目视觉SLAM，在遮挡、动态场景和跟踪失败时表现脆弱，限制了其在真实环境中的应用。需要更鲁棒和可扩展的数据收集系统。

Method: 将轻量级低成本LiDAR传感器集成到腕戴式接口中，实现LiDAR-centric SLAM；开发硬件同步的多模态感知流水线和统一的时空校准框架，对齐视觉观测与LiDAR点云。

Result: 显著提高收集数据的质量和可靠性，直接转化为增强的策略性能；不仅在高标准操纵任务上取得高成功率，还能学习原视觉系统难以处理的任务，如大变形物体操纵和关节物体操作。

Conclusion: UMI-3D在保持原UMI便携性和可访问性的同时，通过多模态感知解决了其局限性，支持端到端的数据采集、对齐、训练和部署流程，所有硬件和软件组件均已开源。

Abstract: We present UMI-3D, a multimodal extension of the Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI) for robust and scalable data collection in embodied manipulation. While UMI enables portable, wrist-mounted data acquisition, its reliance on monocular visual SLAM makes it vulnerable to occlusions, dynamic scenes, and tracking failures, limiting its applicability in real-world environments. UMI-3D addresses these limitations by introducing a lightweight and low-cost LiDAR sensor tightly integrated into the wrist-mounted interface, enabling LiDAR-centric SLAM with accurate metric-scale pose estimation under challenging conditions. We further develop a hardware-synchronized multimodal sensing pipeline and a unified spatiotemporal calibration framework that aligns visual observations with LiDAR point clouds, producing consistent 3D representations of demonstrations. Despite maintaining the original 2D visuomotor policy formulation, UMI-3D significantly improves the quality and reliability of collected data, which directly translates into enhanced policy performance. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate that UMI-3D not only achieves high success rates on standard manipulation tasks, but also enables learning of tasks that are challenging or infeasible for the original vision-only UMI setup, including large deformable object manipulation and articulated object operation. The system supports an end-to-end pipeline for data acquisition, alignment, training, and deployment, while preserving the portability and accessibility of the original UMI.
