We critically assess the evaluation infrastructure for Aerial VLN, including datasets, simulation platforms, and metrics, and identify their gaps in scale, environmental diversity, real-world grounding, and metric coverage. We consolidate cross-method comparisons on shared benchmarks and analyze key architectural trade-offs, including discrete versus continuous actions, end-to-end versus hierarchical designs, and the simulation-to-reality gap. Finally, we synthesize seven concrete open problems: long-horizon instruction grounding, viewpoint robustness, scalable spatial representation, continuous 6-DoF action execution, onboard deployment, benchmark standardization, and multi-UAV swarm navigation, with specific research directions grounded in the evidence presented throughout the survey.

</details>


### [561] [Bird-Inspired Spatial Flapping Wing Mechanism via Coupled Linkages with Single Actuator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07677)
*Daniel Huczala,Sun-Pill Jung,Frank C. Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于Bennett连杆的鸟类仿生扑翼机构，采用两个耦合的空间四杆机构，仅需单电机驱动即可实现扫掠-折叠协调运动


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空间单环机构如Bennett连杆具有单自由度驱动和非平凡空间轨迹的优点，适合轻量化仿生机器人设计，但其几何任务综合因数学复杂性而常被回避

Method: 提出简化的运动学方法，从包含所需表面积的四边形构建Bennett连杆；采用两个耦合的空间四杆机构，一个主动驱动产生空间扫掠行程，另一个串联耦合的连杆保持非驱动状态，在行程周期中被动切换伸展和折叠构型

Result: 实现了单驱动输入的协调扫掠-折叠翼运动，降低了重量和控制复杂性；3D打印原型机测试展示了预期的空间行程和被动折叠行为

Conclusion: 该架构成功将Bennett连杆的复杂几何综合简化为实用工程方法，实现了轻量化、单驱动的仿生扑翼机构，为空间连杆在机器人领域的应用提供了新思路

Abstract: Spatial single-loop mechanisms such as Bennett linkages offer a unique combination of one-degree-of-freedom actuation and nontrivial spatial trajectories, making them attractive for lightweight bio-inspired robotic design. However, although they appear simple and elegant, the geometric task-based synthesis is rather complicated and often avoided in engineering tasks due to the mathematical complexity involved. This paper presents a bird-inspired flapping-wing mechanism built from two coupled spatial four-bars, driven by a single motor. One linkage is actuated to generate the desired spatial sweeping stroke, while the serially coupled linkage remains unactuated and passively switches between extended and folded wing configurations over the stroke cycle. We introduce a simplified kinematic methodology for constructing Bennett linkages from quadrilaterals that contain a desired surface area and further leverage mechanically induced passive state switching. This architecture realizes a coordinated sweep-and-fold wing motion with a single actuation input, reducing weight and control complexity. A 3D-printed prototype is assembled and tested, demonstrating the intended spatial stroke and passive folding behavior.

</details>


### [562] [Reset-Free Reinforcement Learning for Real-World Agile Driving: An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07672)
*Kohei Honda,Hirotaka Hosogaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 实证研究无重置强化学习在真实世界敏捷驾驶中的应用，比较了三种RL算法在物理平台上的表现，揭示了仿真与真实世界之间的显著差距


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在真实世界中进行无重置强化学习的挑战，特别是在高速极限驾驶场景下，由于复杂的车辆动力学、执行延迟和未建模效应，仿真难以准确反映真实情况，需要开发适合野外训练的算法

Method: 使用模型预测路径积分控制(MPPI)作为重置策略和残差学习的基础策略，系统比较了PPO、SAC和TD-MPC2三种代表性RL算法在仿真和真实世界实验中的表现，包括有/无残差学习的情况

Result: 仿真与真实世界存在明显差距：SAC+残差学习在仿真中表现最佳，但只有TD-MPC2在物理平台上持续优于MPPI基线；残差学习在仿真中明显有益，但在真实世界中无法转移其优势，甚至可能降低性能

Conclusion: 真实世界中的无重置RL面临仿真中不存在的独特挑战，需要进一步开发专门针对野外训练的算法；TD-MPC2在真实世界表现最稳定，而残差学习在真实世界中的有效性需要重新评估

Abstract: This paper presents an empirical study of reset-free reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world agile driving, in which a physical 1/10-scale vehicle learns continuously on a slippery indoor track without manual resets. High-speed driving near the limits of tire friction is particularly challenging for learning-based methods because complex vehicle dynamics, actuation delays, and other unmodeled effects hinder both accurate simulation and direct sim-to-real transfer of learned policies. To enable autonomous training on a physical platform, we employ Model Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI) as both the reset policy and the base policy for residual learning, and systematically compare three representative RL algorithms, i.e., PPO, SAC, and TD-MPC2, with and without residual learning in simulation and real-world experiments. Our results reveal a clear gap between simulation and real-world: SAC with residual learning achieves the highest returns in simulation, yet only TD-MPC2 consistently outperforms the MPPI baseline on the physical platform. Moreover, residual learning, while clearly beneficial in simulation, fails to transfer its advantage to the real world and can even degrade performance. These findings reveal that reset-free RL in the real world poses unique challenges absent from simulation, calling for further algorithmic development tailored to training in the wild.

</details>


### [563] [Safe Large-Scale Robust Nonlinear MPC in Milliseconds via Reachability-Constrained System Level Synthesis on the GPU](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07644)
*Jeffrey Fang,Glen Chou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GPU-SLS：一个GPU并行化的安全鲁棒非线性模型预测控制框架，适用于高维不确定机器人系统和长规划时域，实现实时联合优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以在高维不确定机器人系统和长规划时域下实现实时安全鲁棒控制，需要开发能够高效处理大规模优化问题的GPU并行化框架。

Method: 开发了基于顺序二次规划的GPU加速QP求解器，使用并行关联扫描和自适应缓存的ADMM框架；同时采用系统级综合方法优化鲁棒跟踪控制器和闭环可达集，实现可达性约束控制。

Result: 相比最先进CPU求解器减少97.7%的名义轨迹求解时间，相比GPU求解器减少71.8%，SLS控制和可达性计算加速237倍；在复杂非线性系统（61D四足机器人、75D人形机器人）上实现100%经验安全性，平均20毫秒在线合成鲁棒控制策略。

Conclusion: GPU-SLS框架成功实现了高维不确定机器人系统的实时安全鲁棒控制，显著提升了计算效率，为复杂机器人系统的在线控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: We present GPU-SLS, a GPU-parallelized framework for safe, robust nonlinear model predictive control (MPC) that scales to high-dimensional uncertain robotic systems and long planning horizons. Our method jointly optimizes an inequality-constrained, dynamically-feasible nominal trajectory, a tracking controller, and a closed-loop reachable set under disturbance, all in real-time. To efficiently compute nominal trajectories, we develop a sequential quadratic programming procedure with a novel GPU-accelerated quadratic program (QP) solver that uses parallel associative scans and adaptive caching within an alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) framework. The same GPU QP backend is used to optimize robust tracking controllers and closed-loop reachable sets via system level synthesis (SLS), enabling reachability-constrained control in both fixed- and receding-horizon settings. We achieve substantial performance gains, reducing nominal trajectory solve times by 97.7% relative to state-of-the-art CPU solvers and 71.8% compared to GPU solvers, while accelerating SLS-based control and reachability by 237x. Despite large problem scales, our method achieves 100% empirical safety, unlike high-dimensional learning-based reachability baselines. We validate our approach on complex nonlinear systems, including whole-body quadrupeds (61D) and humanoids (75D), synthesizing robust control policies online on the GPU in 20 milliseconds on average and scaling to problems with 2 x 10^5 decision variables and 8 x 10^4 constraints. The implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/Jeff300fang/gpu_sls.

</details>


### [564] [EgoVerse: An Egocentric Human Dataset for Robot Learning from Around the World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07607)
*Ryan Punamiya,Simar Kareer,Zeyi Liu,Josh Citron,Ri-Zhao Qiu,Xiongyi Cai,Alexey Gavryushin,Jiaqi Chen,Davide Liconti,Lawrence Y. Zhu,Patcharapong Aphiwetsa,Baoyu Li,Aniketh Cheluva,Pranav Kuppili,Yangcen Liu,Dhruv Patel,Aidan Gao,Hye-Young Chung,Ryan Co,Renee Zbizika,Jeff Liu,Xiaomeng Xu,Haoyu Xiong,Geng Chen,Sebastiano Oliani,Chenyu Yang,Xi Wang,James Fort,Richard Newcombe,Josh Gao,Jason Chong,Garrett Matsuda,Aseem Doriwala,Marc Pollefeys,Robert Katzschmann,Xiaolong Wang,Shuran Song,Judy Hoffman,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EgoVerse是一个用于机器人学习的协作平台，统一了人类数据收集、处理和访问，包含1,362小时人类演示数据，并通过多实验室研究验证了人类数据对机器人策略性能的积极影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习依赖大规模多样化数据，但机器人数据收集成本高且难以扩展。人类自我中心数据提供了丰富操作行为，但现有数据集范围有限、难以扩展且分散在不同机构。

Method: 开发EgoVerse协作平台，统一数据收集、处理和访问框架；收集1,362小时人类演示数据，涵盖1,965个任务、240个场景和2,087个演示者；进行大规模人类到机器人转移研究，在多个实验室、任务和机器人实体上复制实验。

Result: 当前版本包含1,362小时（80k片段）人类演示数据，具有标准化格式、操作相关标注和下游学习工具；研究发现策略性能通常随人类数据增加而提升，但有效扩展取决于人类数据与机器人学习目标的对齐程度。

Conclusion: EgoVerse的数据集、平台和研究为人类数据驱动的机器人学习建立了可重复进展的基础，证明了协作数据收集和标准化协议对推动该领域发展的重要性。

Abstract: Robot learning increasingly depends on large and diverse data, yet robot data collection remains expensive and difficult to scale. Egocentric human data offer a promising alternative by capturing rich manipulation behavior across everyday environments. However, existing human datasets are often limited in scope, difficult to extend, and fragmented across institutions. We introduce EgoVerse, a collaborative platform for human data-driven robot learning that unifies data collection, processing, and access under a shared framework, enabling contributions from individual researchers, academic labs, and industry partners. The current release includes 1,362 hours (80k episodes) of human demonstrations spanning 1,965 tasks, 240 scenes, and 2,087 unique demonstrators, with standardized formats, manipulation-relevant annotations, and tooling for downstream learning. Beyond the dataset, we conduct a large-scale study of human-to-robot transfer with experiments replicated across multiple labs, tasks, and robot embodiments under shared protocols. We find that policy performance generally improves with increased human data, but that effective scaling depends on alignment between human data and robot learning objectives. Together, the dataset, platform, and study establish a foundation for reproducible progress in human data-driven robot learning. Videos and additional information can be found at https://egoverse.ai/

</details>


### [565] [SANDO: Safe Autonomous Trajectory Planning for Dynamic Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07599)
*Kota Kondo,Jesús Tordesillas,Jonathan P. How*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SANDO是一种用于3D动态未知环境的安全轨迹规划器，通过热图A*全局规划、时空安全飞行走廊和混合整数二次规划优化，在保证安全的同时实现快速重规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软约束规划器速度快但无法保证无碰撞路径，硬约束方法确保安全但计算时间长。在3D动态未知环境中，障碍物位置和运动未知，无碰撞计划可能随时变得不安全，需要快速重规划，需要解决速度与安全性之间的权衡问题。

Method: 1. 热图A*全局规划器使用软成本引导路径远离高风险区域；2. 时空安全飞行走廊生成器产生时间分层多面体，仅按每个时间层的最坏情况可达集膨胀障碍物；3. 轨迹优化采用混合整数二次规划，通过变量消除技术减少决策变量；4. 形式化安全分析在明确速度边界和估计误差假设下建立无碰撞保证。

Result: 变量消除技术使优化时间加速高达7.4倍；时空安全飞行走廊在密集动态环境中对可行性至关重要；在标准化静态基准、障碍物丰富的静态森林和动态环境中，SANDO在所有难度级别上始终实现最高成功率且无约束违反；感知实验证实了在现实传感下的鲁棒性能；无人机硬件实验展示了6次静态环境和10次动态障碍物中的安全飞行。

Conclusion: SANDO成功解决了动态未知环境中轨迹规划的速度与安全性权衡问题，通过创新的热图规划、时空安全走廊和高效优化方法，在保证形式化安全的同时实现了快速计算，在仿真和硬件实验中均表现出优越性能。

Abstract: SANDO is a safe trajectory planner for 3D dynamic unknown environments, where obstacle locations and motions are unknown a priori and a collision-free plan can become unsafe at any moment, requiring fast replanning. Existing soft-constraint planners are fast but cannot guarantee collision-free paths, while hard-constraint methods ensure safety at the cost of longer computation. SANDO addresses this trade-off through three contributions. First, a heat map-based A* global planner steers paths away from high-risk regions using soft costs, and a spatiotemporal safe flight corridor (STSFC) generator produces time-layered polytopes that inflate obstacles only by their worst-case reachable set at each time layer, rather than by the worst case over the entire horizon. Second, trajectory optimization is formulated as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) with hard collision-avoidance constraints, and a variable elimination technique reduces the number of decision variables, enabling fast computation. Third, a formal safety analysis establishes collision-free guarantees under explicit velocity-bound and estimation-error assumptions. Ablation studies show that variable elimination yields up to 7.4x speedup in optimization time, and that STSFCs are critical for feasibility in dense dynamic environments. Benchmark simulations against state-of-the-art methods across standardized static benchmarks, obstacle-rich static forests, and dynamic environments show that SANDO consistently achieves the highest success rate with no constraint violations across all difficulty levels; perception-only experiments without ground truth obstacle information confirm robust performance under realistic sensing. Hardware experiments on a UAV with fully onboard planning, perception, and localization demonstrate six safe flights in static environments and ten safe flights among dynamic obstacles.

</details>


### [566] [Grasp as You Dream: Imitating Functional Grasping from Generated Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07517)
*Chao Tang,Jiacheng Xu,Haofei Lu,Bolin Zou,Wenlong Dong,Hong Zhang,Danica Kragic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GraspDreamer利用视觉生成模型合成人类演示，实现零样本功能抓取，无需大规模数据收集


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建能在开放世界环境中执行功能抓取的通用机器人面临巨大挑战，现有方法要么局限于狭窄的对象/任务集，要么依赖大规模数据收集来捕捉真实世界多样性

Method: 利用在互联网规模人类数据上预训练的视觉生成模型（如视频生成模型）合成人类演示，这些模型隐式编码了人类与物理世界交互的广义先验，结合特定具身动作优化实现功能抓取

Result: 在不同机器人手上的公共基准测试中展示了卓越的数据效率和泛化性能，优于先前方法；真实世界评估进一步验证了在实际机器人上的有效性；可自然扩展到下游操作任务，并能生成数据支持视觉运动策略学习

Conclusion: GraspDreamer提供了一种替代方法，利用视觉生成模型合成的人类演示实现零样本功能抓取，避免了劳动密集型数据收集，展示了在机器人功能抓取任务中的高效性和泛化能力

Abstract: Building generalist robots capable of performing functional grasping in everyday, open-world environments remains a significant challenge due to the vast diversity of objects and tasks. Existing methods are either constrained to narrow object/task sets or rely on prohibitively large-scale data collection to capture real-world variability. In this work, we present an alternative approach, GraspDreamer, a method that leverages human demonstrations synthesized by visual generative models (VGMs) (e.g., video generation models) to enable zero-shot functional grasping without labor-intensive data collection. The key idea is that VGMs pre-trained on internet-scale human data implicitly encode generalized priors about how humans interact with the physical world, which can be combined with embodiment-specific action optimization to enable functional grasping with minimal effort. Extensive experiments on the public benchmarks with different robot hands demonstrate the superior data efficiency and generalization performance of GraspDreamer compared to previous methods. Real-world evaluations further validate the effectiveness on real robots. Additionally, we showcase that GraspDreamer can (1) be naturally extended to downstream manipulation tasks, and (2) can generate data to support visuomotor policy learning.

</details>


### [567] [Active Reward Machine Inference From Raw State Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07480)
*Mohamad Louai Shehab,Antoine Aspeel,Necmiye Ozay*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 从原始状态和策略信息中学习奖励机器，无需奖励、标签或机器节点观测，并扩展到主动学习以提高效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动指定奖励机器（包括捕捉决策依据的高级特征的标注函数）是一项艰巨任务，需要从原始数据中自动学习奖励机器的方法

Method: 提出在信息稀缺条件下从原始状态和策略信息学习奖励机器的方法，无需奖励、标签或机器节点观测；扩展到主动学习设置，通过增量查询轨迹扩展来提高数据效率

Result: 确定了在信息稀缺条件下学习奖励机器所需的充分轨迹数据条件，并通过网格世界示例验证了方法的有效性

Conclusion: 证明了在缺乏奖励、标签和机器节点观测的情况下，仅从原始状态和策略信息中学习奖励机器的可行性，并通过主动学习提高了数据效率

Abstract: Reward machines are automaton-like structures that capture the memory required to accomplish a multi-stage task. When combined with reinforcement learning or optimal control methods, they can be used to synthesize robot policies to achieve such tasks. However, specifying a reward machine by hand, including a labeling function capturing high-level features that the decisions are based on, can be a daunting task. This paper deals with the problem of learning reward machines directly from raw state and policy information. As opposed to existing works, we assume no access to observations of rewards, labels, or machine nodes, and show what trajectory data is sufficient for learning the reward machine in this information-scarce regime. We then extend the result to an active learning setting where we incrementally query trajectory extensions to improve data (and indirectly computational) efficiency. Results are demonstrated with several grid world examples.

</details>


### [568] [CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07457)
*Ziyang Cheng,Haoyu Wei,Hang Yin,Xiuwei Xu,Bingyao Yu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Competence Manifold Projection (CMP)方法，通过能力流形投影提升腿式移动机械臂全身控制策略对分布外输入的鲁棒性，同时保持任务性能连续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有腿式移动机械臂的全身控制策略在跟踪全局末端执行器位姿时，对传感器噪声或不可行用户命令引起的分布外输入表现脆弱，需要在不牺牲任务性能和连续性的前提下提升鲁棒性。

Method: 提出能力流形投影方法：1) 采用逐帧安全方案将无限时域安全约束转化为计算高效的单步流形包含问题；2) 使用下界安全估计器区分训练分布外的未掌握意图；3) 引入同构潜在空间对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现O(1)复杂度对任意分布外意图的无缝防御。

Result: 实验表明CMP在典型分布外场景中实现高达10倍的生存率提升（基线方法出现灾难性失败），同时跟踪性能下降低于10%。系统展现出对分布外目标的"尽力而为"泛化行为，通过遵循能力边界逐步完成任务。

Conclusion: CMP方法有效提升了腿式移动机械臂全身控制策略对分布外输入的鲁棒性，在保持任务性能的同时实现了安全边界内的自适应泛化能力。

Abstract: While decoupled control schemes for legged mobile manipulators have shown robustness, learning holistic whole-body control policies for tracking global end-effector poses remains fragile against Out-of-Distribution (OOD) inputs induced by sensor noise or infeasible user commands. To improve robustness against these perturbations without sacrificing task performance and continuity, we propose Competence Manifold Projection (CMP). Specifically, we utilize a Frame-Wise Safety Scheme that transforms the infinite-horizon safety constraint into a computationally efficient single-step manifold inclusion. To instantiate this competence manifold, we employ a Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator that distinguishes unmastered intentions from the training distribution. We then introduce an Isomorphic Latent Space (ILS) that aligns manifold geometry with safety probability, enabling efficient O(1) seamless defense against arbitrary OOD intents. Experiments demonstrate that CMP achieves up to a 10-fold survival rate improvement in typical OOD scenarios where baselines suffer catastrophic failure, incurring under 10% tracking degradation. Notably, the system exhibits emergent ``best-effort'' generalization behaviors to progressively accomplish OOD goals by adhering to the competence boundaries. Result videos are available at: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP.

</details>


### [569] [TAMEn: Tactile-Aware Manipulation Engine for Closed-Loop Data Collection in Contact-Rich Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07335)
*Longyan Wu,Jieji Ren,Chenghang Jiang,Junxi Zhou,Shijia Peng,Ran Huang,Guoying Gu,Li Chen,Hongyang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAMEn是一个触觉感知的机器人操作引擎，用于接触丰富的双手机器人操作任务的闭环数据收集，通过跨形态可穿戴接口和双模态采集管道提高演示质量和策略鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手持式演示方法在收集大规模机器人操作数据时效率高且直观，但在实现接触丰富的双手机器人操作方面面临关键挑战：硬件适应性差、数据效率低、缺乏在线可行性检查导致重放性差，以及无法收集执行期间的交互恢复数据。

Method: 提出TAMEn系统，包含：1）跨形态可穿戴接口，快速适应异构夹爪；2）双模态采集管道：高精度模式（运动捕捉）用于高保真演示，便携模式（VR跟踪）用于野外采集和触觉可视化恢复遥操作；3）金字塔结构数据体系，统一大规模触觉预训练、任务特定双手机演示和人在环恢复数据。

Result: 可行性感知管道显著提高演示重放性；提出的视觉-触觉学习框架将多样双手机器人操作任务的成功率从34%提升到75%；硬件和数据集已开源。

Conclusion: TAMEn通过硬件适应性设计、双模态数据采集和闭环策略精炼，有效解决了接触丰富双手机器人操作的数据收集挑战，显著提高了任务成功率和系统鲁棒性。

Abstract: Handheld paradigms offer an efficient and intuitive way for collecting large-scale demonstration of robot manipulation. However, achieving contact-rich bimanual manipulation through these methods remains a pivotal challenge, which is substantially hindered by hardware adaptability and data efficacy. Prior hardware designs remain gripper-specific and often face a trade-off between tracking precision and portability. Furthermore, the lack of online feasibility checking during demonstration leads to poor replayability. More importantly, existing handheld setups struggle to collect interactive recovery data during robot execution, lacking the authentic tactile information necessary for robust policy refinement. To bridge these gaps, we present TAMEn, a tactile-aware manipulation engine for closed-loop data collection in contact-rich tasks. Our system features a cross-morphology wearable interface that enables rapid adaptation across heterogeneous grippers. To balance data quality and environmental diversity, we implement a dual-modal acquisition pipeline: a precision mode leveraging motion capture for high-fidelity demonstrations, and a portable mode utilizing VR-based tracking for in-the-wild acquisition and tactile-visualized recovery teleoperation. Building on this hardware, we unify large-scale tactile pretraining, task-specific bimanual demonstrations, and human-in-the-loop recovery data into a pyramid-structured data regime, enabling closed-loop policy refinement. Experiments show that our feasibility-aware pipeline significantly improves demonstration replayability, and that the proposed visuo-tactile learning framework increases task success rates from 34% to 75% across diverse bimanual manipulation tasks. We further open-source the hardware and dataset to facilitate reproducibility and support research in visuo-tactile manipulation.

</details>


### [570] [RoSHI: A Versatile Robot-oriented Suit for Human Data In-the-Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07331)
*Wenjing Margaret Mao,Jefferson Ng,Luyang Hu,Daniel Gehrig,Antonio Loquercio*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoSHI是一种混合可穿戴系统，融合低成本稀疏IMU和Project Aria眼镜，通过第一人称视角感知估计穿戴者的完整3D姿态和身体形状，用于机器人学习数据收集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习需要丰富、长时程的野外交互数据，现有数据收集方法在便携性、遮挡鲁棒性和全局一致性之间存在权衡。需要一种能同时满足这些需求的数据收集系统。

Method: 开发RoSHI混合可穿戴系统，结合稀疏IMU（提供遮挡鲁棒性和高速运动跟踪）和Project Aria眼镜（通过第一人称SLAM锚定长时程运动并稳定上半身姿态），在全局坐标系中估计完整3D姿态和身体形状。

Result: 在敏捷活动数据集上，RoSHI通常优于其他第一人称基线方法，与最先进的外部基准方法（SAM3D）性能相当。系统记录的运动数据适用于真实世界人形机器人策略学习。

Conclusion: RoSHI系统通过融合IMU和第一人称感知，提供了一种便携、鲁棒且全局一致的数据收集方案，能够支持机器人学习所需的高质量人类运动数据采集。

Abstract: Scaling up robot learning will likely require human data containing rich and long-horizon interactions in the wild. Existing approaches for collecting such data trade off portability, robustness to occlusion, and global consistency. We introduce RoSHI, a hybrid wearable that fuses low-cost sparse IMUs with the Project Aria glasses to estimate the full 3D pose and body shape of the wearer in a metric global coordinate frame from egocentric perception. This system is motivated by the complementarity of the two sensors: IMUs provide robustness to occlusions and high-speed motions, while egocentric SLAM anchors long-horizon motion and stabilizes upper body pose. We collect a dataset of agile activities to evaluate RoSHI. On this dataset, we generally outperform other egocentric baselines and perform comparably to a state-of-the-art exocentric baseline (SAM3D). Finally, we demonstrate that the motion data recorded from our system are suitable for real-world humanoid policy learning. For videos, data and more, visit the project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/

</details>


### [571] [OpenPRC: A Unified Open-Source Framework for Physics-to-Task Evaluation in Physical Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07423)
*Yogesh Phalak,Wen Sin Lor,Apoorva Khairnar,Benjamin Jantzen,Noel Naughton,Suyi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OpenPRC是一个开源Python框架，为物理储层计算提供统一的物理到任务流程，通过五个模块实现GPU加速仿真、实验数据摄取、学习、分析和优化，使用通用HDF5模式确保可重复性和互操作性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理储层计算利用物理基板的固有非线性动力学作为固定计算储层，为能效和嵌入式机器学习提供了有前景的范式。然而，当前开发评估PRC系统的实践工作流程是碎片化的：现有工具通常只处理管道的孤立部分，如特定基板仿真、数字储层基准测试或读出训练。缺少一个统一框架，能够通过相同数据接口表示高保真仿真轨迹和真实实验测量，实现跨基板和数据源的可重复评估、分析和物理感知优化。

Method: OpenPRC采用模式驱动的物理到任务管道，围绕五个模块构建：1) GPU加速的混合RK4-PBD物理引擎(demlat)；2) 基于视频的实验摄取层(openprc.vision)；3) 模块化学习层(reservoir)；4) 信息论分析和基准测试工具(analysis)；5) 物理感知优化(optimize)。通用HDF5模式强制执行可重复性和互操作性，允许GPU仿真和实验获取的轨迹无需修改即可进入相同下游工作流程。

Result: 演示能力包括折纸镶嵌仿真、从物理储层基于视频的轨迹提取，以及用于标准化PRC基准测试、相关性诊断和容量分析的通用接口。框架与外部物理引擎兼容，包括PyBullet、PyElastica和MERLIN。

Conclusion: OpenPRC填补了物理储层计算领域的空白，提供了一个统一框架来桥接仿真和实验工作流程。其长期愿景是作为PRC社区的标准化层，促进可重复研究、跨基板比较和物理感知优化。

Abstract: Physical Reservoir Computing (PRC) leverages the intrinsic nonlinear dynamics of physical substrates, mechanical, optical, spintronic, and beyond, as fixed computational reservoirs, offering a compelling paradigm for energy-efficient and embodied machine learning. However, the practical workflow for developing and evaluating PRC systems remains fragmented: existing tools typically address only isolated parts of the pipeline, such as substrate-specific simulation, digital reservoir benchmarking, or readout training. What is missing is a unified framework that can represent both high-fidelity simulated trajectories and real experimental measurements through the same data interface, enabling reproducible evaluation, analysis, and physics-aware optimization across substrates and data sources. We present OpenPRC, an open-source Python framework that fills this gap through a schema-driven physics-to-task pipeline built around five modules: a GPU-accelerated hybrid RK4-PBD physics engine (demlat), a video-based experimental ingestion layer (openprc.vision), a modular learning layer (reservoir), information-theoretic analysis and benchmarking tools (analysis), and physics-aware optimization (optimize). A universal HDF5 schema enforces reproducibility and interoperability, allowing GPU-simulated and experimentally acquired trajectories to enter the same downstream workflow without modification. Demonstrated capabilities include simulations of Origami tessellations, video-based trajectory extraction from a physical reservoir, and a common interface for standardized PRC benchmarking, correlation diagnostics, and capacity analysis. The longer-term vision is to serve as a standardizing layer for the PRC community, compatible with external physics engines including PyBullet, PyElastica, and MERLIN.

</details>


### [572] [Robust Quadruped Locomotion via Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07224)
*Brian McAteer,Karl Mason*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究比较了四种强化学习方法在四足机器人行走任务中的表现，发现结合进化搜索的CEM-TD3方法在训练和迁移到未见过地形时表现最佳，显著提升了策略的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在四足机器人运动控制中取得了良好效果，但在仿真环境中训练的策略往往难以适应环境变化。研究旨在探索如何通过结合梯度优化和群体驱动的进化搜索来提升策略的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

Method: 研究评估了四种方法：标准深度强化学习基线DDPG和TD3，以及两种结合交叉熵方法(CEM)的变体CEM-DDPG和CEM-TD3。所有智能体在平坦地形上训练，然后在平坦地形和未见过的不平坦地形上进行测试。

Result: 在平坦地形上，TD3表现最佳（平均奖励5927.26），但CEM-TD3在整体训练和评估中表现最好（17611.41）。在不平坦地形迁移测试中，深度强化学习方法性能急剧下降（DDPG：-1016.32，TD3：-99.73），而进化变体保持了大部分能力，CEM-TD3表现最强（19574.33）。

Conclusion: 结合进化搜索可以显著减少过拟合并提升运动控制任务的策略鲁棒性，特别是在部署条件与训练条件不同的情况下。CEM-TD3方法在训练和迁移测试中均表现最优，证明了进化强化学习在提升策略泛化能力方面的有效性。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has recently achieved strong results in quadrupedal locomotion, yet policies trained in simulation often fail to transfer when the environment changes. Evolutionary reinforcement learning aims to address this limitation by combining gradient-based policy optimisation with population-driven exploration. This work evaluates four methods on a simulated walking task: DDPG, TD3, and two Cross-Entropy-based variants CEM-DDPG and CEM-TD3. All agents are trained on flat terrain and later tested both on this domain and on a rough terrain not encountered during training. TD3 performs best among the standard deep RL baselines on flat ground with a mean reward of 5927.26, while CEM-TD3 achieves the highest rewards overall during training and evaluation 17611.41. Under the rough-terrain transfer test, performance of the deep RL methods drops sharply. DDPG achieves -1016.32 and TD3 achieves -99.73, whereas the evolutionary variants retain much of their capability. CEM-TD3 records the strongest transfer performance with a mean reward of 19574.33. These findings suggest that incorporating evolutionary search can reduce overfitting and improve policy robustness in locomotion tasks, particularly when deployment conditions differ from those seen during training.

</details>


### [573] [An RTK-SLAM Dataset for Absolute Accuracy Evaluation in GNSS-Degraded Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07151)
*Wei Zhang,Vincent Ress,David Skuddis,Uwe Soergel,Norbert Haala*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文指出RTK-SLAM系统评估中标准ATE指标存在缺陷，通过SE(3)对齐会掩盖全局误差，提出新的数据集和评估方法，揭示RTK-SLAM真实全局精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RTK-SLAM系统结合了SLAM和RTK GNSS定位，承诺提供相对一致性和全局参考坐标。但现有评估方法存在严重问题：标准ATE指标通过SE(3)对齐会吸收全局漂移和系统误差，使轨迹看起来比实际更准确，不适合评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度。需要新的数据集和评估方法来揭示这一差距。

Method: 提出地理参考数据集和评估方法：1）RTK接收器仅作为系统输入，地面真值通过地理全站仪独立建立；2）数据集使用手持RTK-SLAM设备采集，包含两个场景；3）评估激光雷达-惯性、视觉-惯性和激光雷达-视觉-惯性RTK-SLAM系统以及独立RTK；4）报告直接全局精度和SE(3)对齐的相对精度以明确差距。

Result: 结果显示：1）SE(3)对齐可能低估绝对定位误差达76%；2）RTK-SLAM在开阔天空条件下达到厘米级绝对精度；3）在室内环境中，RTK-SLAM保持分米级全局精度，而独立RTK退化到数十米级误差；4）数据集、校准文件和评估脚本已公开。

Conclusion: 标准ATE评估方法不适合评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度，SE(3)对齐会显著低估实际误差。提出的新数据集和评估方法能够更准确地评估RTK-SLAM系统的真实性能，特别是在全局精度方面。RTK-SLAM在室内外环境中都能提供优于独立RTK的定位精度。

Abstract: RTK-SLAM systems integrate simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with real-time kinematic (RTK) GNSS positioning, promising both relative consistency and globally referenced coordinates for efficient georeferenced surveying. A critical and underappreciated issue is that the standard evaluation metric, Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE), first fits an optimal rigid-body transformation between the estimated trajectory and reference before computing errors. This so-called SE(3) alignment absorbs global drift and systematic errors, making trajectories appear more accurate than they are in practice, and is unsuitable for evaluating the global accuracy of RTK-SLAM. We present a geodetically referenced dataset and evaluation methodology that expose this gap. A key design principle is that the RTK receiver is used solely as a system input, while ground truth is established independently via a geodetic total station. This separation is absent from all existing datasets, where GNSS typically serves as (part of) the ground truth. The dataset is collected with a handheld RTK-SLAM device, comprising two scenes. We evaluate LiDAR-inertial, visual-inertial, and LiDAR-visual-inertial RTK-SLAM systems alongside standalone RTK, reporting direct global accuracy and SE(3)-aligned relative accuracy to make the gap explicit. Results show that SE(3) alignment can underestimate absolute positioning error by up to 76\%. RTK-SLAM achieves centimeter-level absolute accuracy in open-sky conditions and maintains decimeter-level global accuracy indoors, where standalone RTK degrades to tens of meters. The dataset, calibration files, and evaluation scripts are publicly available at https://rtk-slam-dataset.github.io/.

</details>


### [574] [Flow Motion Policy: Manipulator Motion Planning with Flow Matching Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07084)
*Davood Soleymanzadeh,Xiao Liang,Minghui Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Flow Motion Policy是一种用于机械臂的端到端神经运动规划器，利用流匹配方法生成多模态路径分布，支持推理时优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开环端到端神经运动规划器通常为给定工作空间生成单一路径，无法利用开环结构进行推理时优化，且未充分利用规划数据集的多模态特性

Method: 基于流匹配方法的随机生成公式，对可行路径分布进行建模，通过推理时最佳N采样生成多个端到端候选路径，评估碰撞状态后执行首个无碰撞解

Result: 相比代表性采样基和神经运动规划方法，Flow Motion Policy提高了规划成功率和效率，证明了随机生成策略在端到端运动规划和推理时优化中的有效性

Conclusion: 流匹配的随机生成公式能够有效捕捉规划数据集的多模态特性，支持推理时优化，为开环端到端神经运动规划提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Open-loop end-to-end neural motion planners have recently been proposed to improve motion planning for robotic manipulators. These methods enable planning directly from sensor observations without relying on a privileged collision checker during planning. However, many existing methods generate only a single path for a given workspace across different runs, and do not leverage their open-loop structure for inference-time optimization. To address this limitation, we introduce Flow Motion Policy, an open-loop, end-to-end neural motion planner for robotic manipulators that leverages the stochastic generative formulation of flow matching methods to capture the inherent multi-modality of planning datasets. By modeling a distribution over feasible paths, Flow Motion Policy enables efficient inference-time best-of-$N$ sampling. The method generates multiple end-to-end candidate paths, evaluates their collision status after planning, and executes the first collision-free solution. We benchmark the Flow Motion Policy against representative sampling-based and neural motion planning methods. Evaluation results demonstrate that Flow Motion Policy improves planning success and efficiency, highlighting the effectiveness of stochastic generative policies for end-to-end motion planning and inference-time optimization. Experimental evaluation videos are available via this \href{https://zh.engr.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/sites/310/2026/03/FMP-Website.mp4}{link}.

</details>


### [575] [AEROS: A Single-Agent Operating Architecture with Embodied Capability Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07039)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AEROS框架将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体，通过可安装的具身能力模块扩展功能，实现模块化扩展、可组合执行和系统级安全保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人系统缺乏统一的智能组织抽象，要么采用单体架构耦合技能，要么分解为松散协调的模块，缺乏一致的身份和控制权限模型

Method: 提出AEROS框架：每个机器人对应一个持久智能体，功能通过具身能力模块提供，ECM封装可执行技能、模型和工具，策略分离运行时强制执行约束和安全保证

Result: 在PyBullet仿真中，Franka Panda机械臂的8个实验显示：AEROS在三个任务中达到100%成功率（基线为67-93%），策略层完全阻止无效动作，运行时优势跨任务泛化，ECM热插拔后100%成功

Conclusion: AEROS为机器人系统提供了统一的智能组织抽象，通过单一持久智能主体和模块化能力扩展，实现了可组合执行和系统级安全，为机器人软件架构提供了新范式

Abstract: Robotic systems lack a principled abstraction for organizing intelligence, capabilities, and execution in a unified manner. Existing approaches either couple skills within monolithic architectures or decompose functionality into loosely coordinated modules or multiple agents, often without a coherent model of identity and control authority. We argue that a robot should be modeled as a single persistent intelligent subject whose capabilities are extended through installable packages. We formalize this view as AEROS (Agent Execution Runtime Operating System), in which each robot corresponds to one persistent agent and capabilities are provided through Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs). Each ECM encapsulates executable skills, models, and tools, while execution constraints and safety guarantees are enforced by a policy-separated runtime. This separation enables modular extensibility, composable capability execution, and consistent system-level safety. We evaluate a reference implementation in PyBullet simulation with a Franka Panda 7-DOF manipulator across eight experiments covering re-planning, failure recovery, policy enforcement, baseline comparison, cross-task generality, ECM hot-swapping, ablation, and failure boundary analysis. Over 100 randomized trials per condition, AEROS achieves 100% task success across three tasks versus baselines (BehaviorTree.CPP-style and ProgPrompt-style at 92--93%, flat pipeline at 67--73%), the policy layer blocks all invalid actions with zero false acceptances, runtime benefits generalize across tasks without task-specific tuning, and ECMs load at runtime with 100% post-swap success.

</details>


### [576] [KITE: Keyframe-Indexed Tokenized Evidence for VLM-Based Robot Failure Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07034)
*Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,King Hang Wong,Feras Dayoub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KITE是一个无需训练、基于关键帧的布局基础前端，将长机器人执行视频转换为紧凑、可解释的token化证据，用于视觉语言模型进行机器人故障分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理长机器人执行视频时缺乏结构化表示，难以有效支持故障检测、识别、定位、解释和纠正等多种分析任务。需要一种能够将视频信息压缩为紧凑、可解释表示的前端系统。

Method: KITE通过提取运动显著的关键帧，结合开放词汇检测，为每个关键帧生成包含相对物体布局、坐标轴、时间戳和检测置信度的鸟瞰图表示。将这些视觉线索与机器人配置和场景上下文token序列化到统一提示中。

Result: 在RoboFAC基准测试中，KITE与Qwen2.5-VL结合在无需训练设置下显著优于原始Qwen2.5-VL，在仿真故障检测、识别和定位方面提升尤其明显，同时与RoboFAC调优基线保持竞争力。QLoRA微调进一步提升了解释和纠正质量。

Conclusion: KITE作为结构化、可解释的前端系统，能够有效支持多种机器人故障分析任务，在实际双臂机器人上展示了实用价值，为机器人视频分析提供了有效的表示方法。

Abstract: We present KITE, a training-free, keyframe-anchored, layout-grounded front-end that converts long robot-execution videos into compact, interpretable tokenized evidence for vision-language models (VLMs). KITE distills each trajectory into a small set of motion-salient keyframes with open-vocabulary detections and pairs each keyframe with a schematic bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation that encodes relative object layout, axes, timestamps, and detection confidence. These visual cues are serialized with robot-profile and scene-context tokens into a unified prompt, allowing the same front-end to support failure detection, identification, localization, explanation, and correction with an off-the-shelf VLM. On the RoboFAC benchmark, KITE with Qwen2.5-VL substantially improves over vanilla Qwen2.5-VL in the training-free setting, with especially large gains on simulation failure detection, identification, and localization, while remaining competitive with a RoboFAC-tuned baseline. A small QLoRA fine-tune further improves explanation and correction quality. We also report qualitative results on real dual-arm robots, demonstrating the practical applicability of KITE as a structured and interpretable front-end for robot failure analysis. Code and models are released on our project page: https://m80hz.github.io/kite/

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [577] [Agentic Microphysics: A Manifesto for Generative AI Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15236)
*Federico Pierucci,Matteo Prandi,Marcantonio Bracale Syrnikov,Marcello Galisai,Piercosma Bisconti*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 提出一种用于智能体AI安全研究的方法论框架，强调从单一模型分析转向群体交互层面的安全分析


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统获得规划、记忆、工具使用、持久身份和持续交互能力，安全分析不能仅停留在孤立模型层面，需要关注群体层面的风险

Method: 引入两个核心概念：智能体微观物理学（分析局部交互动态）和生成式安全（从微观条件生成现象和风险以识别机制、检测阈值并设计干预）

Result: 提出一个连接局部交互结构与群体动态的因果明确框架，填补了单一智能体分析与聚合结果分析之间的方法论空白

Conclusion: 需要一种新的方法论框架来分析和干预智能体AI系统中的群体风险，通过明确连接微观交互与宏观动态来实现解释和干预

Abstract: This paper advances a methodological proposal for safety research in agentic AI. As systems acquire planning, memory, tool use, persistent identity, and sustained interaction, safety can no longer be analysed primarily at the level of the isolated model. Population-level risks arise from structured interaction among agents, through processes of communication, observation, and mutual influence that shape collective behaviour over time. As the object of analysis shifts, a methodological gap emerges. Approaches focused either on single agents or on aggregate outcomes do not identify the interaction-level mechanisms that generate collective risks or the design variables that control them. A framework is required that links local interaction structure to population-level dynamics in a causally explicit way, allowing both explanation and intervention. We introduce two linked concepts. Agentic microphysics defines the level of analysis: local interaction dynamics where one agent's output becomes another's input under specific protocol conditions. Generative safety defines the methodology: growing phenomena and elicit risks from micro-level conditions to identify sufficient mechanisms, detect thresholds, and design effective interventions.

</details>


### [578] [Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13776)
*Alexander Nemecek,Osama Zafar,Yuqiao Xu,Wenbiao Li,Erman Ayday*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文指出AI水印技术存在内容依赖性偏见，当前基准测试缺乏跨语言、文化和人口群体的评估，呼吁在部署前进行公平性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水印技术已成为AI内容认证的默认机制，但其信号强度、可检测性和鲁棒性依赖于内容本身的统计特性，这些特性在不同语言、文化视觉传统和人口群体中系统性变化。当前水印基准测试大多未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现，存在公平性风险。

Method: 通过审查跨模态的主要水印基准测试，分析内容依赖性如何创建特定模态的偏见路径。提出三个具体的评估维度：跨语言检测均等性、文化多样性内容覆盖、检测指标的群体分解。

Result: 发现除一个例外，所有基准测试均未报告跨语言、文化内容类型或人口群体的性能表现。水印技术被要求的标准低于其旨在治理的生成系统，存在公平性双重标准。

Conclusion: 评估必须优先于部署，应用于AI模型的偏见审计要求应扩展到验证层。需要建立多元化的水印基准测试框架，确保水印技术在多样内容上的公平性能。

Abstract: Watermarking is becoming the default mechanism for AI content authentication, with governance policies and frameworks referencing it as infrastructure for content provenance. Yet across text, image, and audio modalities, watermark signal strength, detectability, and robustness depend on statistical properties of the content itself, properties that vary systematically across languages, cultural visual traditions, and demographic groups. We examine how this content dependence creates modality-specific pathways to bias. Reviewing the major watermarking benchmarks across modalities, we find that, with one exception, none report performance across languages, cultural content types, or population groups. To address this, we propose three concrete evaluation dimensions for pluralistic watermark benchmarking: cross-lingual detection parity, culturally diverse content coverage, and demographic disaggregation of detection metrics. We connect these to the governance frameworks currently mandating watermarking deployment and show that watermarking is held to a lower fairness standard than the generative systems it is meant to govern. Our position is that evaluation must precede deployment, and that the same bias auditing requirements applied to AI models should extend to the verification layer.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [579] [Generative Modeling of Complex-Valued Brain MRI Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14800)
*Marco Schlimbach,Moritz Rempe,Jessica Mnischek,Lukas T. Rotkopf,Jens Weingarten,Jens Kleesiek,Kevin Kröninger*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一个生成式框架，能够联合建模复杂值MRI扫描的幅度和相位信息，通过条件变分自编码器和流匹配生成模型，在合成数据质量评估和下游异常组织检测任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准的MRI重建流程丢弃了采集过程中捕获的相位信息，尽管证据表明这些信息编码了与肿瘤诊断相关的组织特性。当前的机器学习方法继承了这一限制，仅对重建的幅度图像进行操作。本研究旨在构建一个能够联合建模复杂值MRI扫描的幅度和相位信息的生成式框架。

Method: 提出的生成式框架结合了条件变分自编码器（将复杂值MRI扫描压缩为紧凑的潜在表示，同时保持相位相干性）和基于流匹配的生成模型。通过真实与合成分类器评估合成样本质量，并在合成数据上训练下游分类器进行异常组织检测。

Result: 自编码器保持相位相干性高于0.997。真实与合成分类在所有采集序列中产生0.50至0.66的低AUROC值，表明生成样本几乎无法与真实数据区分。在下游正常与异常分类中，完全在合成数据上训练的分类器达到0.880的AUROC，超过了fastMRI公开数据集上0.842的真实数据基线。这一优势在不同机构的独立外部测试集上持续存在。

Conclusion: 该框架证明了联合建模正常和异常复杂值脑MRI数据的幅度和相位信息的可行性。除了合成数据生成外，它为未来诊断应用中完整脑MRI信息的使用奠定了基础，并使得能够系统研究幅度和相位如何共同编码病理特异性特征。

Abstract: Objective. Standard Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction pipelines discard phase information captured during acquisition, despite evidence that it encodes tissue properties relevant to tumor diagnosis. Current machine learning approaches inherit this limitation by operating exclusively on reconstructed magnitude images. The aim of this study is to build a generative framework which is capable of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information of complex-valued MRI scans. Approach. The proposed generative framework combines a conditional variational autoencoder, which compresses complex-valued MRI scans into compact latent representations while preserving phase coherence, with a flow-matching-based generative model. Synthetic sample quality is assessed via a real-versus-synthetic classifier and by training downstream classifiers on synthetic data for abnormal tissue detection. Main results. The autoencoder preserves phase coherence above 0.997. Real-versus-synthetic classification yields low AUROC values between 0.50 and 0.66 across all acquisition sequences, indicating generated samples are nearly indistinguishable from real data. In downstream normal-versus-abnormal classification, classifiers trained entirely on synthetic data achieve an AUROC of 0.880, surpassing the real-data baseline of 0.842 on a publicly available dataset (fastMRI). This advantage persists on an independent external test set from a different institution with biopsy-confirmed labels. Significance. The proposed framework demonstrates the feasibility of jointly modeling magnitude and phase information for normal and abnormal complex-valued brain MRI data. Beyond synthetic data generation, it establishes a foundation for the usage of complete brain MRI information in future diagnostic applications and enables systematic investigation of how magnitude and phase jointly encode pathology-specific features.

</details>


### [580] [Learning Class Difficulty in Imbalanced Histopathology Segmentation via Dynamic Focal Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13479)
*Lakmali Nadeesha Kumari,Sen-Ching Samson Cheung*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: DFA通过在学习到的交叉注意力中引入可学习的类别偏置，直接在表示层面进行类别难度感知的重新加权，替代传统的基于频率的损失重加权方法，在组织病理学图像分割中取得更好效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于频率的损失重加权方法假设稀有类别就是困难类别，但实际困难还来自形态学变异性、边界模糊性和上下文相似性等因素，这些是频率无法捕捉的。需要一种能直接学习类别难度的方法。

Method: 提出动态焦点注意力（DFA），在基于查询的掩码解码器的交叉注意力中引入可学习的每类别偏置到注意力logits中。从对数频率先验初始化以防止梯度饥饿，通过端到端优化使模型自适应捕捉难度信号，在预测前进行表示层面的重新加权。

Result: 在三个组织病理学基准测试（BDSA、BCSS、CRAG）上，DFA一致提高了Dice和IoU指标，匹配或超过了需要单独估计器或额外训练阶段的难度感知基线方法。

Conclusion: 在表示层面编码类别难度为不平衡分割提供了一种原则性的替代传统损失重加权的方法，将基于频率和难度感知的方法统一在共同的注意力偏置框架下。

Abstract: Semantic segmentation of histopathology images under class imbalance is typically addressed through frequency-based loss reweighting, which implicitly assumes that rare classes are difficult. However, true difficulty also arises from morphological variability, boundary ambiguity, and contextual similarity-factors that frequency cannot capture. We propose Dynamic Focal Attention (DFA), a simple and efficient mechanism that learns class-specific difficulty directly within the cross-attention of query-based mask decoders. DFA introduces a learnable per-class bias to attention logits, enabling representation-level reweighting prior to prediction rather than gradient-level reweighting after prediction. Initialised from a log-frequency prior to prevent gradient starvation, the bias is optimised end-to-end, allowing the model to adaptively capture difficulty signals through training, effectively unifying frequency-based and difficulty-aware approaches under a common attention-bias framework. On three histopathology benchmarks (BDSA, BCSS, CRAG), DFA consistently improves Dice and IoU, matching or exceeding a difficulty-aware baseline without a separate estimator or additional training stage. These results demonstrate that encoding class difficulty at the representation level provides a principled alternative to conventional loss reweighting for imbalanced segmentation.

</details>


<div id='physics.flu-dyn'></div>

# physics.flu-dyn [[Back]](#toc)

### [581] [Learning step-level dynamic soaring in shear flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12413)
*Lunbing Chen,Jixin Lu,Yufei Yin,Jinpeng Huang,Yang Xiang,Hong Liu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 动态翱翔可以通过局部状态反馈控制实现，无需显式的轨迹规划，使用深度强化学习获得能在不同剪切流条件下实现稳健全向导航的策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动态翱翔被理解为需要稳定流动条件的循环级机动，但在现实非稳态环境中，这种假设常被违反。研究旨在探索是否必须进行显式的循环级规划，以及是否可以通过局部传感和反馈控制实现动态翱翔。

Method: 使用深度强化学习作为工具，获得仅基于局部传感的状态反馈控制策略。这些策略通过协调转向和垂直运动，形成结构化控制律，产生由能量提取和方向进展权衡支配的两阶段策略。

Result: 学习到的策略能在不同剪切流条件下实现稳健的全向导航。该策略泛化到各种条件，并重现了生物飞行和最优控制解决方案中观察到的关键特征。研究发现了一种基于反馈的控制结构，能够实现动态翱翔。

Conclusion: 高效的能量收集飞行可以通过与流动的局部相互作用实现，无需显式规划。这为复杂流动耦合环境中的生物飞行和自主系统提供了重要见解，表明动态翱翔可以基于反馈控制结构自然涌现。

Abstract: Dynamic soaring enables sustained flight by extracting energy from wind shear, yet it is commonly understood as a cycle-level maneuver that assumes stable flow conditions. In realistic unsteady environments, however, such assumptions are often violated, raising the question of whether explicit cycle-level planning is necessary. Here, we show that dynamic soaring can emerge from step-level, state-feedback control using only local sensing, without explicit trajectory planning. Using deep reinforcement learning as a tool, we obtain policies that achieve robust omnidirectional navigation across diverse shear-flow conditions. The learned behavior organizes into a structured control law that coordinates turning and vertical motion, giving rise to a two-phase strategy governed by a trade-off between energy extraction and directional progress. The resulting policy generalizes across varying conditions and reproduces key features observed in biological flight and optimal-control solutions. These findings identify a feedback-based control structure underlying dynamic soaring, demonstrating that efficient energy-harvesting flight can emerge from local interactions with the flow without explicit planning, and providing insights for biological flight and autonomous systems in complex, flow-coupled environments.

</details>


### [582] [Timescale Separation Enables Deep Reinforcement Learning Control of Rotating Detonation Engine Mode Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14398)
*Kristian Holme,Jean Rabault,Ricardo Vinuesa,Mikael Mortensen*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在移动参考系中应用深度强化学习（DRL）控制旋转爆震发动机（RDE）的方法，通过将DRL问题重新表述为跟随爆震波模式的移动参考系，实现了快速爆震传播与较慢运行模式动力学之间的尺度分离，从而更有效地控制RDE的多时间尺度非线性动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旋转爆震发动机（RDEs）作为一种有前景的推进概念，具有比传统系统更高的热力学效率和比冲，但其非线性现象（包括向振荡或混沌传播模式的转变）会阻碍实际运行。深度强化学习（DRL）是控制RDEs等复杂非线性动力学的有前景方法，但RDE系统的多时间尺度特性使得直接应用DRL具有挑战性。

Method: 通过将DRL问题重新表述在跟随爆震波模式的移动参考系中，使波结构对智能体呈现准稳态，从而实现快速爆震传播与较慢运行模式动力学之间的尺度分离。在简化的一维RDE模型中，训练DRL控制器调制空间分段注入压力，诱导不同模式锁定状态之间的快速转变。

Result: 在移动参考系中训练的控制器比在静止参考系中训练的控制器学习更可靠，并且在更广泛的驱动周期范围内保持有效。这些控制器能够在各种驱动周期、初始状态和目标模式下成功诱导模式转变。

Conclusion: 对称感知的移动参考系表述可能对相关的多尺度流动控制问题有用，应尽可能利用尺度分离来实现DRL对多时间尺度系统的控制。该方法为解决RDEs等复杂系统的控制挑战提供了有前景的途径。

Abstract: Rotating detonation engines (RDEs) are a promising propulsion concept that may offer higher thermodynamic efficiency and specific impulse than conventional systems, but nonlinear phenomena, including transitions to oscillatory or chaotic propagation modes, can hinder practical operation. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising method for controlling complex nonlinear dynamics such as those observed in RDEs. However, the multi-timescale nature of the RDE system makes direct application of DRL challenging. We address this challenge by reformulating the DRL problem in a moving reference frame that follows the detonation-wave pattern, making the wave structure appear quasi-steady to the agent. This reformulation enables scale separation between fast detonation propagation and slower operating-mode dynamics. We train DRL controllers to modulate spatially segmented injection pressure in a one-dimensional reduced-order RDE model and induce rapid transitions between different mode-locked states. Across a range of actuation periods, initial states, and target modes, controllers trained in the moving frame learn more reliably than those trained in a stationary frame and remain effective over a broader range of actuation periods. These results suggest that symmetry-aware moving reference frame formulations may be useful for related multiscale flow-control problems and that scale separation should be exploited whenever possible to enable DRL control of multi-timescale systems.

</details>


### [583] [Nested Fourier-enhanced neural operator for efficient modeling of radiation transfer in fires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13919)
*Anran Jiao,Wengyao Jiang,Xiaoyi Lu,Yi Wang,Lu Lu*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 提出基于傅里叶增强多输入神经算子(Fourier-MIONet)的机器学习框架，替代传统辐射传输方程数值求解，用于CFD火灾模拟中的辐射计算加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 火灾模拟中辐射传热是主要传热机制，但传统辐射传输方程数值求解计算成本高，成为性能瓶颈，需要更高效的替代方法。

Method: 1. 采用傅里叶增强多输入神经算子(Fourier-MIONet)作为辐射传输方程的替代求解器；2. 针对多级网格细化场景，提出嵌套Fourier-MIONet架构；3. 在2D池火和3D McCaffrey池火上进行验证，包括固定火源尺寸和连续热释放率范围训练。

Result: 1. 在3D变热释放率场景中实现2-4%的全局相对误差；2. 推理速度比FireFOAM中16立体角有限体积辐射求解更快；3. 在2D池火中Fourier-MIONet提供最准确的辐射解预测。

Conclusion: 该方法使高保真辐射处理变得实用，能够将更光谱分辨的辐射模型集成到CFD火灾模拟中，为工程应用提供快速准确的辐射计算替代方案。

Abstract: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) has become an essential tool for predicting fire behavior, yet maintaining both efficiency and accuracy remains challenging. A major source of computational cost in fire simulations is the modeling of radiation transfer, which is usually the dominant heat transfer mechanism in fires. Solving the high-dimensional radiative transfer equation (RTE) with traditional numerical methods can be a performance bottleneck. Here, we present a machine learning framework based on Fourier-enhanced multiple-input neural operators (Fourier-MIONet) as an efficient alternative to direct numerical integration of the RTE. We first investigate the performance of neural operator architectures for a small-scale 2D pool fire and find that Fourier-MIONet provides the most accurate radiative solution predictions. The approach is then extended to 3D CFD fire simulations, where the computational mesh is locally refined across multiple levels. In these high-resolution settings, monolithic surrogate models for direct field-to-field mapping become difficult to train and computationally inefficient. To address this issue, a nested Fourier-MIONet is proposed to predict radiation solutions across multiple mesh-refinement levels. We validate the approach on 3D McCaffrey pool fires simulated with FireFOAM, including fixed fire sizes and a unified model trained over a continuous range of heat release rates (HRRs). The proposed method achieves global relative errors of 2-4% for 3D varying-HRR scenarios while providing faster inference than the estimated cost of one finite-volume radiation solve in FireFOAM for the 16-solid-angle case. With fast and accurate inference, the surrogate makes higher-fidelity radiation treatments practical and enables the incorporation of more spectrally resolved radiation models into CFD fire simulations for engineering applications.

</details>


### [584] [Data-driven Learning of Probabilistic Model of Binary Droplet Collision for Spray Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13594)
*Weiming Xu,Tao Yang,Peng Zhang*

Main category: physics.flu-dyn

TL;DR: 开发基于LightGBM的二元液滴碰撞概率模型，准确预测八种碰撞状态，实现喷雾模拟中的物理一致随机行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统确定性模型无法充分表示二元液滴碰撞的过渡和随机行为，需要开发能准确捕捉非线性状态边界和过渡区域敏感性的概率模型

Method: 使用LightGBM机器学习方法，基于33,540个实验案例的全面数据集训练分类器，涵盖韦伯数、奥内佐格数、冲击参数、尺寸比和环境压力等参数，然后将模型转换为多项式逻辑回归的概率形式

Result: LightGBM分类器达到99.2%的准确率，能捕捉高度非线性的状态边界；概率模型保留93.2%的准确率，能映射连续的状态间过渡；通过偏置骰子采样机制将概率转换为确定的随机结果

Conclusion: 这是首个基于实验数据的概率性高维液滴碰撞模型，为喷雾模拟提供了物理一致、全面且用户友好的解决方案

Abstract: Binary droplet collisions are ubiquitous in dense sprays. Traditional deterministic models cannot adequately represent transitional and stochastic behaviors of binary droplet collision. To bridge this gap, we developed a probabilistic model by using a machine learning approach, the Light Gradient-Boosting Machine (LightGBM). The model was trained on a comprehensive dataset of 33,540 experimental cases covering eight collision regimes across broad ranges of Weber number, Ohnesorge number, impact parameter, size ratio, and ambient pressure. The resulting machine learning classifier captures highly nonlinear regime boundaries with 99.2% accuracy and retains sensitivity in transitional regions. To facilitate its implementation in spray simulation, the model was translated into a probabilistic form, a multinomial logistic regression, which preserves 93.2% accuracy and maps continuous inter-regime transitions. A biased-dice sampling mechanism then converts these probabilities into definite yet stochastic outcomes. This work presents the first probabilistic, high-dimensional droplet collision model derived from experimental data, offering a physically consistent, comprehensive, and user-friendly solution for spray simulation.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [585] [VeriGraphi: A Multi-Agent Framework of Hierarchical RTL Generation for Large Hardware Designs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14550)
*Sazzadul Islam,Tasnim Tabassum,Hao Zheng*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: VeriGraphi框架使用知识图谱作为架构基板，通过多智能体分析规范构建结构化知识图，然后渐进生成可综合的Verilog代码，解决了LLM在生成复杂分层硬件设计时的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在生成复杂分层硬件设计的可综合Verilog时面临重大挑战：难以复制人类专家的结构化推理，经常在模块间丢失上下文、产生接口幻觉、虚构模块间连线，且随着设计复杂度增加和规范涉及非正式文本、图表等难以直接操作的内容，这些问题会加剧。

Method: 提出VeriGraphi框架，引入规范锚定的知识图谱作为RTL生成管道的架构基板。该方法通过迭代多智能体分析规范构建HDA（结构化知识图），显式编码模块层次结构、端口级接口、连线语义和模块间依赖关系作为一等图实体和关系。基于知识图谱，渐进编码模块逐步生成伪代码和可综合RTL，在每个子模块阶段强制执行接口一致性和依赖正确性。

Result: 在NIST的三个代表性规范文档及其对应实现上评估VeriGraphi，并以RV32I处理器作为详细案例研究展示完整流程。结果表明VeriGraphi能够以最少人工干预为RISC-V实现可靠的分层RTL生成，在保持强大功能正确性的同时，标志着LLM生成硬件设计的重大里程碑。

Conclusion: VeriGraphi通过知识图谱驱动的结构化方法，成功解决了LLM在生成复杂分层硬件设计时的问题，实现了可靠的分层RTL生成，为LLM生成的硬件设计开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Generating synthesizable Verilog for large, hierarchical hardware designs remains a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs), which struggle to replicate the structured reasoning that human experts employ when translating complex specifications into RTL. When tasked with producing hierarchical Verilog, LLMs frequently lose context across modules, hallucinate interfaces, fabricate inter-module wiring, and fail to maintain structural coherence - failures that intensify as design complexity grows and specifications involve informal prose, figures, and tables that resist direct operationalization. To address these challenges, we present VeriGraphi, a framework that introduces a spec-anchored Knowledge Graph as the architectural substrate driving the RTL generation pipeline. VeriGraphi constructs a HDA, a structured knowledge graph that explicitly encodes module hierarchy, port-level interfaces, wiring semantics, and inter-module dependencies as first-class graph entities and relations. Built through iterative multi-agent analysis of the specification, this Knowledge Graph provides a deterministic, machine-checkable structural scaffold before code generation. Guided by the KG, a progressive coding module incrementally generates pseudo-code and synthesizable RTL while enforcing interface consistency and dependency correctness at each submodule stage. We evaluate VeriGraphi on a benchmark of three representative specification documents from the National Institute of Standards and Technology and their corresponding implementations, and we present a RV32I processor as a detailed case study to illustrate the full pipeline. The results demonstrate that VeriGraphi enables reliable hierarchical RTL generation with minimal human intervention for RISC-V, marking a significant milestone for LLM-generated hardware design while maintaining strong functional correctness.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [586] [Regret Tail Characterization of Optimal Bandit Algorithms with Generic Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14876)
*Subhodip Panda,Shubhada Agrawal*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到满足温和假设的非参数奖励分布类，建立了其期望渐近最优性，并推导了遗憾尾概率的新上界，为渐近最优KL-based UCB算法提供了统一且紧致的遗憾尾特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然最小化期望遗憾是经典目标，但最近研究表明即使渐近最优算法也可能表现出重尾遗憾，以不可忽略的概率产生大遗憾。现有的遗憾尾特征主要局限于参数化设置（如单参数指数族），需要扩展到更广泛的非参数分布类。

Method: 将KLinf-UCB算法扩展到满足温和假设的广泛非参数奖励分布类，建立其期望渐近最优性，然后分析其遗憾尾行为并推导遗憾尾概率的新上界。

Result: 结果恢复了有界支撑和重尾（矩有界）老虎机模型的遗憾尾保证。对于有限支撑奖励分布的特殊情况，上界与已知下界精确匹配，为渐近最优KL-based UCB算法提供了统一且紧致的遗憾尾特征。

Conclusion: 该工作超越了参数模型，为渐近最优KL-based UCB算法提供了统一且紧致的遗憾尾特征，适用于包括有界支撑和重尾分布在内的广泛非参数奖励分布类。

Abstract: We study the tail behavior of regret in stochastic multi-armed bandits for algorithms that are asymptotically optimal in expectation. While minimizing expected regret is the classical objective, recent work shows that even such algorithms can exhibit heavy regret tails, incurring large regret with non-negligible probability. Existing sharp characterizations of regret tails are largely restricted to parametric settings, such as single-parameter exponential families.
  In this work, we extend the $\KLinf$-UCB algorithm of to a broad nonparametric class of reward distributions satisfying mild assumptions, and establish its asymptotic optimality in expectation. We then analyze the tail behavior of its regret and derive a novel upper bound on the regret tail probability. As special cases, our results recover regret-tail guarantees for both bounded-support and heavy-tailed (moment-bounded) bandit models. Moreover, for the special case of finitely-supported reward distributions, our upper bound matches the known lower bound exactly. Our results thus provide a unified and tight characterization of regret tails for asymptotically optimal KL-based UCB algorithms, going beyond parametric models.

</details>


### [587] [Exploiting Correlations in Federated Learning: Opportunities and Practical Limitations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14751)
*Adrian Edin,Michel Kieffer,Mikael Johansson,Zheng Chen*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于相关性（结构、时间、空间）的统一分类框架来分析联邦学习中的梯度/模型压缩技术，并通过实验发现相关性程度因任务、模型和配置而异，进而提出了两种基于相关性强度自适应切换压缩模式的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中客户端与参数服务器之间的通信瓶颈促使了各种压缩技术的研究。本文旨在提供一个统一的理论框架来系统分类和理解现有的梯度与模型压缩方案，揭示不同压缩方法所利用的相关性类型，并为开发更有效的应用特定压缩技术奠定基础。

Method: 1. 将梯度/模型压缩方案系统分类为三类：利用结构相关性、时间相关性和空间相关性的方法；2. 分析这些相关性的来源；3. 提出定量指标来衡量相关性强度；4. 在此统一框架下重新解释现有压缩方法；5. 通过实验研究不同任务复杂度、模型架构和算法配置下的相关性变化；6. 提出两种自适应压缩设计，根据测量的相关性强度在不同压缩模式间主动切换。

Result: 实验研究表明：1. 结构、时间和空间相关性的程度因任务复杂度、模型架构和算法配置的不同而有显著差异；2. 算法设计者不应假设相关性总是存在，而应在特定部署场景下仔细评估相关性假设；3. 提出的自适应压缩设计相对于传统非自适应方法取得了性能提升。

Conclusion: 本文提出的统一分类框架为联邦学习系统开发更有效和应用特定的压缩技术提供了清晰且有原则的基础。研究强调了根据实际相关性强度自适应选择压缩策略的重要性，而非盲目假设相关性存在。自适应压缩设计展示了相对于固定压缩方法的性能优势。

Abstract: The communication bottleneck in federated learning (FL) has spurred extensive research into techniques to reduce the volume of data exchanged between client devices and the central parameter server. In this paper, we systematically classify gradient and model compression schemes into three categories based on the type of correlations they exploit: structural, temporal, and spatial. We examine the sources of such correlations, propose quantitative metrics for measuring their magnitude, and reinterpret existing compression methods through this unified correlation-based framework. Our experimental studies demonstrate that the degrees of structural, temporal, and spatial correlations vary significantly depending on task complexity, model architecture, and algorithmic configurations. These findings suggest that algorithm designers should carefully evaluate correlation assumptions under specific deployment scenarios rather than assuming that they are always present. Motivated by these findings, we propose two adaptive compression designs that actively switch between different compression modes based on the measured correlation strength, and we evaluate their performance gains relative to conventional non-adaptive approaches. In summary, our unified taxonomy provides a clean and principled foundation for developing more effective and application-specific compression techniques for FL systems.

</details>


### [588] [A Synonymous Variational Perspective on the Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14603)
*Zijian Liang,Kai Niu,Changshuo Wang,Jin Xu,Ping Zhang*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 该论文从同义词语义信息视角重新定义感知重建，提出同义源编码架构和同义变分推理框架，证明同义性-感知一致性原理，并推导出同义率失真感知权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统率失真理论仅关注重建失真，而率失真感知框架中的感知质量度量缺乏理论根源。本文从同义词语义信息视角出发，旨在澄清感知优化的理论起源，建立更本质的感知重建理论框架。

Method: 1. 将感知重建重新定义为恢复源信号在同义集合（synset）中的任意可接受样本；2. 建立同义源编码架构；3. 开发同义变分推理分析框架，包含同义变分下界；4. 推导同义性-感知一致性原理；5. 证明同义率失真感知权衡。

Result: 1. 证明了分布散度项自然源于基于同义集合的重建目标；2. 澄清了该框架与现有率失真感知公式和经典率失真理论的兼容性；3. 显示了同义源编码的潜在优势；4. 建立了感知优化的理论基础。

Conclusion: 从同义词语义信息视角出发，感知重建可理解为恢复源信号同义集合中的可接受样本。这一视角不仅为率失真感知框架提供了理论依据，还揭示了同义源编码的优越性，为信号压缩理论提供了新的语义基础。

Abstract: The fundamental limit of natural signal compression has traditionally been characterized by classical rate-distortion (RD) theory through the tradeoff between coding rate and reconstruction distortion, while the rate-distortion-perception (RDP) framework introduces a divergence-based measure of perceptual quality as a modeling principle rather than a theoretically-derived principle, leaving its theoretical origin unclear. In this paper, motivated by a synonymity-based semantic information perspective, we reformulate perceptual reconstruction as recovering any admissible sample within an ideal synonymous set (synset) associated with the source, rather than the source sample itself, and correspondingly establish a synonymous source coding architecture. On this basis, we develop a synonymous variational inference (SVI) analysis framework with a synonymous variational lower bound (SVLBO) for tractable analysis of synset-oriented compression. Within this framework, we establish a synonymity-perception consistency principle, showing that optimal identification of semantic information is theoretically consistent with perceptual optimization. Based on its derivation result, we prove a synonymous RDP tradeoff for the proposed synonymous source coding. These analytical results show that the distributional divergence term arises naturally from the synset-based reconstruction objective, clarify its compatibility with existing RDP formulations and classical RD theory, and suggest the potential advantages of synonymous source coding.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [589] [Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14075)
*Buse Şen,Yifan Hu,Daniel Kuhn*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出多阶段条件组合优化(MCCO)新范式，结合多阶段随机规划和条件随机优化，用于不确定性下的决策，解决嵌套条件期望和非线性成本函数最小化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统嵌套采样方法面临维度灾难，场景复杂度随嵌套层数指数增长，需要开发更高效的计算方法来解决多阶段决策问题。

Method: 开发新的多级蒙特卡洛技术，其场景复杂度仅随所需精度多项式增长，而非指数增长。

Result: 提出的多级蒙特卡洛方法显著降低了计算复杂度，使MCCO问题在实际应用中变得可行。

Conclusion: MCCO为不确定性下的决策提供了新框架，而多级蒙特卡洛技术有效解决了其计算挑战，具有广泛的应用前景。

Abstract: We introduce Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization (MCCO) as a new paradigm for decision-making under uncertainty that combines aspects of multistage stochastic programming and conditional stochastic optimization. MCCO minimizes a nest of conditional expectations and nonlinear cost functions. It has numerous applications and arises, for example, in optimal stopping, linear-quadratic regulator problems, distributionally robust contextual bandits, as well as in problems involving dynamic risk measures. The naïve nested sampling approach for MCCO suffers from the curse of dimensionality familiar from scenario tree-based multistage stochastic programming, that is, its scenario complexity grows exponentially with the number of nests. We develop new multilevel Monte Carlo techniques for MCCO whose scenario complexity grows only polynomially with the desired accuracy.

</details>


### [590] [Gradient Descent's Last Iterate is Often (slightly) Suboptimal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13870)
*Guy Kornowski,Ohad Shamir*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 证明了在不知道总迭代次数T的情况下，梯度下降(GD)和随机梯度下降(SGD)的最后迭代无法达到最优收敛率1/√T，必须承受额外的对数因子损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究凸Lipschitz函数优化中梯度下降和随机梯度下降的最后迭代收敛问题。Jain等人(2019)通过构造非标准步长序列达到了最优1/√T收敛率，但需要预先知道总迭代次数T。他们猜想在不知道T的情况下，任何步长序列都无法保证SGD最后迭代的最优误差，这一猜想一直未被证明。

Method: 通过理论证明的方法，证明了Jain等人的猜想。特别地，即使在无噪声的梯度下降(GD)情况下，当考虑任意时间(last iterate guarantee)保证时，也无法避免T的多对数因子超额损失。证明进一步表明这种(略微)次优的停止时间在本质上是不可能避免的。

Result: 证明了在不知道总迭代次数T的情况下，梯度下降和随机梯度下降的最后迭代收敛率无法达到最优的1/√T，必须承受额外的多对数因子损失。这一结果证实了Jain等人的猜想，并表明这种次优性是不可避免的。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了凸优化中一个重要的理论问题：在不知道时间范围T的情况下，梯度下降和随机梯度下降的最后迭代无法达到最优收敛率。这一结果对实际算法设计有重要启示，表明需要接受一定的次优性，或者采用其他策略如平均迭代来获得更好的理论保证。

Abstract: We consider the well-studied setting of minimizing a convex Lipschitz function using either gradient descent (GD) or its stochastic variant (SGD), and examine the last iterate convergence. By now, it is known that standard stepsize choices lead to a last iterate convergence rate of $\log T/\sqrt{T}$ after $T$ steps. A breakthrough result of Jain et al. [2019] recovered the optimal $1/\sqrt{T}$ rate by constructing a non-standard stepsize sequence. However, this sequence requires choosing $T$ in advance, as opposed to common stepsize schedules which apply for any time horizon. Moreover, Jain et al. conjectured that without prior knowledge of $T$, no stepsize sequence can ensure the optimal error for SGD's last iterate, a claim which so far remained unproven. We prove this conjecture, and in fact show that even in the noiseless case of GD, it is impossible to avoid an excess poly-log factor in $T$ when considering an anytime last iterate guarantee. Our proof further suggests that such (slightly) suboptimal stopping times are unavoidably common.

</details>


### [591] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)框架，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离实现经验分布向目标密度的收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，难以在具有高空间优先级和资源约束的任务中实现高效覆盖。需要一种能够桥接个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配的严格拉格朗日框架。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个随机MPC类问题，以Wasserstein距离作为运行成本进行最小化。在随机LTI动力学下，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。通过可达性分析建立形式收敛保证。

Result: 数值结果表明，随机D²OC实现了鲁棒的分布式覆盖，在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。可达性分析提供了有界跟踪误差，即使在存在过程和测量噪声的情况下也能保证收敛。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体非均匀区域覆盖提供了一种严格、去中心化的解决方案，通过Wasserstein距离最小化和形式收敛保证，实现了优于现有方法的性能。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


### [592] [A short proof of near-linear convergence of adaptive gradient descent under fourth-order growth and convexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13393)
*Damek Davis,Dmitriy Drusvyatskiy*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Lyapunov函数的简化收敛性分析，用于凸且具有唯一最小值的函数上的自适应步长梯度下降，相比原方法更直接且获得了改进的自适应算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Davis、Drusvyatskiy和Jiang提出的自适应步长梯度下降收敛性分析复杂，依赖于监测算法相对于"沟壑"流形的性能。本文旨在为凸且具有唯一最小值的函数提供更简单的Lyapunov分析框架。

Method: 采用基于Lyapunov函数的直接论证方法，绕过了原分析中对"沟壑"流形的复杂监测。该方法针对凸且具有唯一最小值的函数，提出了比原算法更具适应性的变体。

Result: 获得了更简洁的收敛性证明，并开发出比原始算法更具适应性的新变体。数值实验显示该变体具有令人鼓舞的性能表现。

Conclusion: 对于凸且具有唯一最小值的函数，基于Lyapunov的分析方法比原方法更直接简单，同时产生的自适应算法变体在数值上表现良好。

Abstract: Davis, Drusvyatskiy, and Jiang showed that gradient descent with an adaptive stepsize converges locally at a nearly-linear rate for smooth functions that grow at least quartically away from their minimizers. The argument is intricate, relying on monitoring the performance of the algorithm relative to a certain manifold of slow growth -- called the ravine. In this work, we provide a direct Lyapunov-based argument that bypasses these difficulties when the objective is in addition convex and a has a unique minimizer. As a byproduct of the argument, we obtain a more adaptive variant than the original algorithm with encouraging numerical performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [593] [Benchmarking Optimizers for MLPs in Tabular Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15297)
*Yury Gorishniy,Ivan Rubachev,Dmitrii Feoktistov,Artem Babenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种优化器在表格数据MLP模型训练中的表现，发现Muon优化器在性能上持续优于当前主流AdamW，可作为实践中的强力选择，前提是能承受其训练效率开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管MLP是表格数据深度学习的主流架构，AdamW是默认优化器，但优化器选择在表格DL领域缺乏系统性研究，而其他领域的新优化器已显示出潜力，需要填补这一研究空白。

Method: 在标准监督学习设置下，使用共享实验协议，在多个表格数据集上对多种优化器进行基准测试，训练MLP基础模型，系统比较不同优化器的性能表现。

Result: 主要发现是Muon优化器在性能上持续优于AdamW；同时发现模型权重的指数移动平均是简单有效的技术，能改善AdamW在普通MLP上的表现，但其效果在不同模型变体间一致性较差。

Conclusion: Muon优化器应被视为实践者和研究者的强力实用选择，前提是可接受其训练效率开销；指数移动平均技术对AdamW有改进作用但效果不稳定。

Abstract: MLP is a heavily used backbone in modern deep learning (DL) architectures for supervised learning on tabular data, and AdamW is the go-to optimizer used to train tabular DL models. Unlike architecture design, however, the choice of optimizer for tabular DL has not been examined systematically, despite new optimizers showing promise in other domains. To fill this gap, we benchmark \Noptimizers optimizers on \Ndatasets tabular datasets for training MLP-based models in the standard supervised learning setting under a shared experiment protocol. Our main finding is that the Muon optimizer consistently outperforms AdamW, and thus should be considered a strong and practical choice for practitioners and researchers, if the associated training efficiency overhead is affordable. Additionally, we find exponential moving average of model weights to be a simple yet effective technique that improves AdamW on vanilla MLPs, though its effect is less consistent across model variants.

</details>


### [594] [Optimal last-iterate convergence in matrix games with bandit feedback using the log-barrier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15242)
*Come Fiegel,Pierre Menard,Tadashi Kozuno,Michal Valko,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出使用对数障碍正则化和对偶分析实现了零和矩阵博弈中不耦合玩家情况下Õ(t^{-1/4})的最终迭代收敛率，并将方法扩展到扩展式博弈


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fiegel等人(2025)最近证明在不耦合玩家的零和矩阵博弈中实现最终迭代收敛更难，存在Ω(t^{-1/4})的利用差距下界。现有在线镜像下降算法尚未真正达到这一速率

Method: 使用对数障碍正则化(log-barrier regularization)结合对偶聚焦分析(dual-focused analysis)的方法

Result: 以高概率实现了Õ(t^{-1/4})收敛率，达到了理论下界，并将该方法扩展到扩展式博弈，证明了相同速率的收敛界

Conclusion: 对数障碍正则化与对偶分析相结合能够实现零和矩阵博弈中不耦合玩家情况下的最优最终迭代收敛率，该方法也适用于扩展式博弈

Abstract: We study the problem of learning minimax policies in zero-sum matrix games. Fiegel et al. (2025) recently showed that achieving last-iterate convergence in this setting is harder when the players are uncoupled, by proving a lower bound on the exploitability gap of Omega(t^{-1/4}). Some online mirror descent algorithms were proposed in the literature for this problem, but none have truly attained this rate yet. We show that the use of a log-barrier regularization, along with a dual-focused analysis, allows this O-tilde(t^{-1/4}) convergence with high-probability. We additionally extend our idea to the setting of extensive-form games, proving a bound with the same rate.

</details>


### [595] [One-shot learning for the complex dynamical behaviors of weakly nonlinear forced oscillators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15181)
*Teng Ma,Luca Rosafalco,Wei Cui,Lin Zhao,Attilio Frangi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MEv-SINDy方法，通过单次激励时间历程学习控制方程，实现非线性系统全局频率响应曲线的外推预测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂非线性动力学的预测是工程领域的核心挑战，传统方法需要大量数据采集，数据获取负担重

Method: 提出MEv-SINDy（多频进化稀疏识别非线性动力学）方法，结合广义谐波平衡法将受迫响应分解为慢变演化方程，从单次激励时间历程识别控制方程

Result: 在MEMS非线性梁谐振器和MEMS微镜上验证，仅用单点训练就能准确预测宽激励范围内的软化/硬化效应和跳跃现象

Conclusion: 该方法显著降低了非线性微系统表征和设计的数据获取负担，为复杂非线性动力学预测提供了高效解决方案

Abstract: Extrapolative prediction of complex nonlinear dynamics remains a central challenge in engineering. This study proposes a one-shot learning method to identify global frequency-response curves from a single excitation time history by learning governing equations. We introduce MEv-SINDy (Multi-frequency Evolutionary Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics) to infer the governing equations of non-autonomous and multi-frequency systems. The methodology leverages the Generalized Harmonic Balance (GHB) method to decompose complex forced responses into a set of slow-varying evolution equations. We validated the capabilities of MEv-SINDy on two critical Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems (MEMS). These applications include a nonlinear beam resonator and a MEMS micromirror. Our results show that the model trained on a single point accurately predicts softening/hardening effects and jump phenomena across a wide range of excitation levels. This approach significantly reduces the data acquisition burden for the characterization and design of nonlinear microsystems.

</details>


### [596] [AdaSplash-2: Faster Differentiable Sparse Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15180)
*Nuno Gonçalves,Hugo Pitorro,Vlad Niculae,Edoardo Ponti,Lei Li,Andre Martins,Marcos Treviso*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaSplash-2通过直方图初始化技术显著加速α-entmax注意力计算，在长上下文训练中实现高效稀疏注意力，匹配或超越FlashAttention-2性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统softmax注意力在长上下文训练中存在二次方计算成本问题，而α-entmax作为可微分稀疏替代方案因计算归一化参数τ的迭代开销过大而未能广泛应用

Method: 提出AdaSplash-2方法：1）基于直方图的初始化技术，在SRAM中存储注意力分数直方图，将τ计算迭代次数降至1-2次；2）稀疏感知GPU实现，跳过零值块以减少开销

Result: 在块稀疏度中高（>60%）时，AdaSplash-2匹配或超越FlashAttention-2的每步训练时间；在长上下文任务中，使用高效α-entmax训练的模型显著优于softmax基线

Conclusion: AdaSplash-2通过直方图初始化和稀疏感知实现解决了α-entmax的计算瓶颈，使稀疏注意力在长上下文训练中变得实用高效

Abstract: Sparse attention has been proposed as a way to alleviate the quadratic cost of transformers, a central bottleneck in long-context training. A promising line of work is $α$-entmax attention, a differentiable sparse alternative to softmax that enables input-dependent sparsity yet has lagged behind softmax due to the computational overhead necessary to compute the normalizer $τ$. In this paper, we introduce AdaSplash-2, which addresses this limitation through a novel histogram-based initialization that reduces the number of iterations needed to compute $τ$ to typically 1--2. The key idea is to compute a coarse histogram of attention scores on the fly and store it in on-chip SRAM, yielding a more accurate initialization that enables fast forward and backward computation. Combined with a sparsity-aware GPU implementation that skips zero blocks with low overhead, AdaSplash-2 matches or improves per-step training time relative to FlashAttention-2 when block sparsity is moderate-to-high (e.g., $>$60\%), which often occurs at long-context lengths. On downstream tasks, models trained with our efficient $α$-entmax attention match softmax baselines at short-context lengths and achieve substantial gains in long-context settings.

</details>


### [597] [When Flat Minima Fail: Characterizing INT4 Quantization Collapse After FP32 Convergence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15167)
*Marcus Armstrong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现训练收敛后的模型并非总是量化就绪，揭示了INT4量化在训练后期会出现爆炸性发散的三阶段模式，而INT8量化则完全免疫。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统后训练量化假设训练收敛的模型就是量化就绪的模型，但作者发现这一假设存在结构性、可测量且先前未描述的问题，需要深入探究量化鲁棒性与训练动态的关系。

Method: 使用无校准的每组INT4探针对所有154个公开可用的Pythia-160m训练检查点进行分析，识别量化鲁棒性的三阶段发散结构。通过直接峰度测量排除权重异常值积累机制，并进行受控分叉实验比较三种学习率调度策略。

Result: 发现三阶段发散结构：快速学习阶段、持续约70,000步的元稳定平台期、以及INT4差距从11%爆炸性增长到517%的发散阶段。INT8量化在所有阶段完全免疫。振荡锁定调度能平均降低INT4差距2.2个百分点。

Conclusion: 训练收敛后的权重更新而非衰减幅度本身是INT4量化发散的直接原因，调度幅度校准而非单纯振荡决定了扰动对量化鲁棒性的影响方向，为设计量化友好的训练策略提供了新见解。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) assumes that a well-converged model is a quantization-ready model. We show this assumption fails in a structured, measurable, and previously uncharacterized way. Using a calibration-free per-group INT4 probe applied to all 154 publicly available Pythia-160m training checkpoints, we identify a three-phase divergence structure: a rapid-learning phase where both FP32 perplexity and quantization robustness improve together, a meta-stable plateau lasting roughly 70,000 steps where FP32 perplexity stagnates but INT4 gap remains bounded, and an explosive divergence phase where the INT4 gap compounds from 11% to 517% while FP32 perplexity barely moves. Critically, this divergence begins not when the learning rate starts decaying, but precisely when FP32 perplexity converges a finer-grained onset predictor that implies post-convergence weight updates, rather than decay magnitude alone, are the proximate cause. We further show that INT8 quantization is entirely immune throughout all three phases, constraining the mechanism to the coarseness of the 16-level INT4 grid specifically, and rule out weight outlier accumulation as the mechanism via direct kurtosis measurement.
