Batch Sharpness (the expected directional mini-batch curvature) stabilizes in two distinct regimes: at small batch sizes it converges to a lower plateau $2(1-β)/η$, reflecting amplification of stochastic fluctuations by momentum and favoring flatter regions than vanilla SGD; at large batch sizes it converges to a higher plateau $2(1+β)/η$, where momentum recovers its classical stabilizing effect and favors sharper regions consistent with full-batch dynamics. We further show that this aligns with linear stability thresholds and discuss the implications for hyperparameter tuning and coupling.

</details>


### [635] [Reinforcement Learning via Value Gradient Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14265)
*Haoran Xu,Kaiwen Hu,Somayeh Sojoudi,Amy Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VGF是一种用于行为正则化强化学习的新范式，将问题转化为最优传输问题，通过离散梯度流求解，无需显式策略参数化，在离线RL和LLM RL任务中取得SOTA结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有行为正则化RL方法存在局限性：基于重参数化策略梯度的方法难以扩展到大型生成模型，而拒绝采样方法在尝试超越行为支持时可能过于保守。需要一种可扩展且灵活的新方法来解决值函数过优化问题。

Method: 将行为正则化RL转化为最优传输问题，将参考分布映射到值函数诱导的最优策略分布。通过离散梯度流求解，其中值函数梯度引导从参考分布初始化的粒子。通过控制传输预算实现隐式正则化。

Result: VGF在离线RL基准（D4RL、OGBench）和LLM RL任务上显著优于现有方法，实现了最先进的结果。该方法无需显式策略参数化，同时保持表达性和灵活性，支持通过调整传输预算进行自适应测试时缩放。

Conclusion: VGF为行为正则化RL提供了一个可扩展的新范式，通过最优传输框架和离散梯度流方法有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在多个任务中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: We study behavior-regularized reinforcement learning (RL), where regularization toward a reference distribution (the dataset in offline RL or the base model in LLM RL finetuning) is essential to prevent value over-optimization caused by erroneous out-of-distribution extrapolation. Existing methods either rely on reparameterized policy gradient, which are difficult to scale to large generative models, or on reject sampling, which can be overly conservative when attempting to move beyond the behavior support. In this paper, we propose Value Gradient Flow (VGF), a scalable new paradigm for behavior-regularized RL. VGF casts behavior-regularized RL as an optimal transport problem that maps the reference distribution to the value-induced optimal policy distribution. We solve this transport problem via discrete gradient flow, where value gradients guide particles initialized from the reference distribution. Our analysis shows that VGF imposes regularization implicitly by controlling the transport budget. VGF eliminates explicit policy parameterization while remaining expressive and flexible, this enables adaptive test-time scaling by adjusting the transport budget. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VGF significantly outperforms prior methods, achieving state-of-the-art results on offline RL benchmarks (D4RL, OGBench) and LLM RL tasks. Code and runs can be found at https://ryanxhr.github.io/vgf.

</details>


### [636] [Neural architectures for resolving references in program code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14073)
*Gergő Szalay,Gergely Zsolt Kovács,Sándor Teleki,Balázs Pintér,Tibor Gregorics*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出针对编程语言中引用重写问题的直接和间接索引排列任务，开发新的序列到序列架构，在合成基准测试和实际反编译任务中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受实际反编译任务启发，将编程语言中的引用重写问题抽象为直接和间接索引排列问题，现有序列到序列机器学习架构在这些任务上表现不佳。

Method: 创建合成基准测试，为直接和间接索引排列问题设计新的序列到序列架构，通过消融研究验证各组件的重要性。

Result: 新架构在鲁棒性和可扩展性上显著优于基线：能处理比最佳基线长10倍的序列；在实际switch语句反编译任务中，扩展模型将错误率降低42%。

Conclusion: 针对索引排列问题设计专门的序列到序列架构能有效解决编程语言中的引用重写任务，在合成基准和实际应用中都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Resolving and rewriting references is fundamental in programming languages. Motivated by a real-world decompilation task, we abstract reference rewriting into the problems of direct and indirect indexing by permutation. We create synthetic benchmarks for these tasks and show that well-known sequence-to-sequence machine learning architectures are struggling on these benchmarks. We introduce new sequence-to-sequence architectures for both problems. Our measurements show that our architectures outperform the baselines in both robustness and scalability: our models can handle examples that are ten times longer compared to the best baseline. We measure the impact of our architecture in the real-world task of decompiling switch statements, which has an indexing subtask. According to our measurements, the extended model decreases the error rate by 42%. Multiple ablation studies show that all components of our architectures are essential.

</details>


### [637] [ASTER: Latent Pseudo-Anomaly Generation for Unsupervised Time-Series Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13924)
*Romain Hermary,Samet Hicsonmez,Dan Pineau,Abd El Rahman Shabayek,Djamila Aouada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ASTER框架通过潜在空间生成伪异常，结合预训练LLM增强时序表示，在无监督时间序列异常检测中实现SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列异常检测面临异常稀少、异质性强和标注数据稀缺的挑战。现有无监督方法依赖重构或预测，难以处理复杂数据；嵌入方法需要领域特定的异常合成和固定距离度量。

Method: 提出ASTER框架：1) 在潜在空间直接生成伪异常，避免手工异常注入和领域专业知识需求；2) 潜在空间解码器生成定制化伪异常训练Transformer异常分类器；3) 预训练LLM增强该空间的时序和上下文表示。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，ASTER实现了最先进的性能，为基于LLM的时间序列异常检测设立了新标准。

Conclusion: ASTER通过潜在空间伪异常生成和LLM增强表示，有效解决了时间序列异常检测中的数据稀缺和复杂模式挑战，为无监督异常检测提供了新方向。

Abstract: Time-series anomaly detection (TSAD) is critical in domains such as industrial monitoring, healthcare, and cybersecurity, but it remains challenging due to rare and heterogeneous anomalies and the scarcity of labelled data. This scarcity makes unsupervised approaches predominant, yet existing methods often rely on reconstruction or forecasting, which struggle with complex data, or on embedding-based approaches that require domain-specific anomaly synthesis and fixed distance metrics. We propose ASTER, a framework that generates pseudo-anomalies directly in the latent space, avoiding handcrafted anomaly injections and the need for domain expertise. A latent-space decoder produces tailored pseudo-anomalies to train a Transformer-based anomaly classifier, while a pre-trained LLM enriches the temporal and contextual representations of this space. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that ASTER achieves state-of-the-art performance and sets a new standard for LLM-based TSAD.

</details>


### [638] [GUI-Perturbed: Domain Randomization Reveals Systematic Brittleness in GUI Grounding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14262)
*Yangyue Wang,Harshvardhan Sikka,Yash Mathur,Tony Zhou,Jinu Nyachhyon,Pranav Guruprasad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GUI-Perturbed框架通过独立扰动视觉场景和指令来评估GUI grounding模型的鲁棒性，发现现有模型在空间推理任务上表现显著下降，而当前基准测试无法检测这一问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GUI grounding模型在标准基准测试中报告超过85%的准确率，但当指令需要空间推理而非直接元素命名时，性能下降27-56个百分点。当前基准测试的局限性在于每个截图只使用单一固定指令进行评估，无法全面衡量模型的实际鲁棒性。

Method: 引入GUI-Perturbed框架，通过独立变化视觉场景和指令来测量grounding鲁棒性。评估了来自同一架构谱系的三个7B模型，使用受控扰动方法分析空间推理、视觉鲁棒性和推理校准等特定能力轴。

Result: 关系性指令导致所有模型系统性准确率崩溃；70%浏览器缩放产生统计显著性能退化；使用增强数据和rank-8 LoRA微调反而降低性能而非改善。通过独立轴扰动，GUI-Perturbed能够隔离受影响的特定能力轴。

Conclusion: GUI-Perturbed框架提供了聚合基准测试无法提供的诊断信号，揭示了现有GUI grounding模型在空间推理和视觉鲁棒性方面的系统性弱点。作者发布了数据集、增强管道和微调模型。

Abstract: GUI grounding models report over 85% accuracy on standard benchmarks, yet drop 27-56 percentage points when instructions require spatial reasoning rather than direct element naming. Current benchmarks miss this because they evaluate each screenshot once with a single fixed instruction. We introduce GUI-Perturbed, a controlled perturbation framework that independently varies visual scenes and instructions to measure grounding robustness. Evaluating three 7B models from the same architecture lineage, we find that relational instructions cause systematic accuracy collapse across all models, a 70% browser zoom produces statistically significant degradation, and rank-8 LoRA fine-tuning with augmented data degrades performance rather than improving it. By perturbing along independent axes, GUI-Perturbed isolates which specific capability axes are affected-spatial reasoning, visual robustness, reasoning calibration-providing diagnostic signal that aggregate benchmarks cannot. We release the dataset, augmentation pipeline, and a fine-tuned model.

</details>


### [639] [MAny: Merge Anything for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14016)
*Zijian Gao,Wangwang Jia,Xingxing Zhang,Pengfei Qian,Tao Sun,Bo Ding,Yong Dou,Huaimin Wang,Kele Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MAny框架通过跨模态投影合并和低秩参数合并解决多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘问题，无需额外训练即可实现知识融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态持续指令调优面临灾难性遗忘问题，现有研究主要关注推理语言主干，但忽视了跨模态投影空间中的感知漂移和低秩参数空间中的推理崩溃这一双重遗忘现象。

Method: 提出MAny框架，包含跨模态投影合并（CPM）和低秩参数合并（LPM）。CPM通过视觉原型引导自适应合并跨模态视觉表示，恢复感知对齐；LPM通过递归最小二乘法递归合并低秩权重矩阵，提供最优融合轨迹保证推理稳定性。

Result: 在UCIT基准测试中，MAny在两个不同的MLLM上分别比最先进方法领先8.57%和2.85%的最终平均准确率，表现出优越性能和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MAny框架有效解决了多模态持续指令调优中的双重遗忘问题，通过无训练的代数操作实现知识融合，在多模态大语言模型和基准测试中展现出显著优势。

Abstract: Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) is essential for sequential task adaptation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) but is severely restricted by catastrophic forgetting. While existing literature focuses on the reasoning language backbone, in this work, we expose a critical yet neglected dual-forgetting phenomenon across both perception drift in Cross-modal Projection Space and reasoning collapse in Low-rank Parameter Space. To resolve this, we present \textbf{MAny} (\textbf{M}erge \textbf{Any}thing), a framework that merges task-specific knowledge through \textbf{C}ross-modal \textbf{P}rojection \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{CPM}) and \textbf{L}ow-rank \textbf{P}arameter \textbf{M}erging (\textbf{LPM}). Specifically, CPM recovers perceptual alignment by adaptively merging cross-modal visual representations via visual-prototype guidance, ensuring accurate feature recovery during inference. Simultaneously, LPM eliminates mutual interference among task-specific low-rank modules by recursively merging low-rank weight matrices. By leveraging recursive least squares, LPM provides a closed-form solution that mathematically guarantees an optimal fusion trajectory for reasoning stability. Notably, MAny operates as a training-free paradigm that achieves knowledge merging via efficient CPU-based algebraic operations, eliminating additional gradient-based optimization beyond initial tuning. Our extensive evaluations confirm the superior performance and robustness of MAny across multiple MLLMs and benchmarks. Specifically, on the UCIT benchmark, MAny achieves significant leads of up to 8.57\% and 2.85\% in final average accuracy over state-of-the-art methods across two different MLLMs, respectively.

</details>


### [640] [Parameter Importance is Not Static: Evolving Parameter Isolation for Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14010)
*Zekai Lin,Chao Xue,Di Liang,Xingsheng Han,Peiyang Liu,Xianjie Wu,Lei Jiang,Yu Lu,Haibo Shi,Shuang Liang,Minlong Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EPI提出动态参数隔离框架，通过周期性更新隔离掩码来适应训练过程中参数重要性的时变特性，相比静态隔离方法能更好地减少任务干扰和灾难性遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态参数隔离方法假设参数重要性固定不变，但实际训练中参数重要性会随时间漂移，这种静态方案无法适应动态学习过程，导致次优性能。

Method: 提出Evolving Parameter Isolation (EPI)框架，基于梯度信号在线估计参数重要性，周期性更新隔离掩码，动态保护新出现的任务关键参数同时释放过时参数以恢复模型可塑性。

Result: 在多任务基准测试中，EPI相比静态隔离和标准微调方法，能一致性地减少任务干扰和遗忘，同时提升整体泛化能力。

Conclusion: 隔离机制需要与学习动态同步演化，动态参数隔离能更好地适应训练过程中参数重要性的时变特性，是提升多任务微调性能的关键。

Abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) of large language models often suffers from task interference and catastrophic forgetting. Recent approaches alleviate this issue by isolating task-critical parameters during training. However, these methods represent a static solution to a dynamic problem, assuming that parameter importance remains fixed once identified. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that parameter importance exhibits temporal drift over the course of training. To address this, we propose Evolving Parameter Isolation (EPI), a fine-tuning framework that adapts isolation decisions based on online estimates of parameter importance. Instead of freezing a fixed subset of parameters, EPI periodically updates isolation masks using gradient-based signals, enabling the model to protect emerging task-critical parameters while releasing outdated ones to recover plasticity. Experiments on diverse multi-task benchmarks demonstrate that EPI consistently reduces interference and forgetting compared to static isolation and standard fine-tuning, while improving overall generalization. Our analysis highlights the necessity of synchronizing isolation mechanisms with the evolving dynamics of learning diverse abilities.

</details>


### [641] [PRiMeFlow: Capturing Complex Expression Heterogeneity in Perturbation Response Modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13986)
*Zichao Yan,Yan Wu,Mica Xu Ji,Chaitra Agrahar,Esther Wershof,Marcel Nassar,Mehrshad Sadria,Ridvan Eksi,Vladimir Trifonov,Ignacio Ibarra,Telmo Felgueira,Błażej Osiński,Rory Stark*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRiMeFlow是一种基于流匹配的端到端方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应，能够准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在计算机中预测细胞状态的扰动效应可以大规模识别细胞行为的驱动因素并加速药物发现。然而，由于单细胞基因表达固有的异质性和复杂的潜在基因依赖性，建模仍然面临挑战。

Method: PRiMeFlow采用端到端的流匹配方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模遗传和小分子扰动效应。该方法使用分布拟合方法，并通过U-Net架构参数化速度场。

Result: 在PerturBench中进行广泛基准测试表明，PRiMeFlow能够准确近似单细胞基因表达的经验分布。消融研究验证了在基因表达空间操作和使用U-Net架构参数化速度场等重要设计选择。该架构为基础构建的模型在首届ARC虚拟细胞挑战赛中获得了通用奖。

Conclusion: PRiMeFlow提供了一种有效的端到端流匹配方法，用于在基因表达空间中直接建模扰动效应，能够准确捕获单细胞基因表达的异质性，为大规模细胞行为驱动因素识别和药物发现提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Predicting the effects of perturbations in-silico on cell state can identify drivers of cell behavior at scale and accelerate drug discovery. However, modeling challenges remain due to the inherent heterogeneity of single cell gene expression and the complex, latent gene dependencies. Here, we present PRiMeFlow, an end-to-end flow matching based approach to directly model the effects of genetic and small molecule perturbations in the gene expression space. The distribution-fitting approach taken by PRiMeFlow enables it to accurately approximate the empirical distribution of single-cell gene expression, which we demonstrate through extensive benchmarking inside PerturBench. Through ablation studies, we also validate important model design choices such as operating in gene expression space and parameterizing the velocity field with a U-Net architecture. The PRiMeFlow architecture was used as the basis for the model that won the Generalist Prize in the first ARC Virtual Cell Challenge.

</details>


### [642] [Provably Efficient Offline-to-Online Value Adaptation with General Function Approximation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13966)
*Shangzhe Li,Weitong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究离线到在线强化学习中的价值函数适应问题，建立了理论下界并提出了改进算法O2O-LSVI


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在离线预训练Q函数不完美的情况下，如何通过有限的在线交互将其适应到目标环境，以提高样本效率

Method: 首先建立极小极大下界证明适应难度，然后在离线预训练价值函数满足特定结构条件下提出O2O-LSVI算法

Result: 理论证明在某些困难实例上在线适应不比纯在线RL更高效，但在满足结构条件时O2O-LSVI能提供问题相关的样本复杂度改进

Conclusion: 离线到在线价值适应具有理论局限性，但在特定结构条件下可通过O2O-LSVI算法实现优于纯在线RL的性能提升

Abstract: We study value adaptation in offline-to-online reinforcement learning under general function approximation. Starting from an imperfect offline pretrained $Q$-function, the learner aims to adapt it to the target environment using only a limited amount of online interaction. We first characterize the difficulty of this setting by establishing a minimax lower bound, showing that even when the pretrained $Q$-function is close to optimal $Q^\star$, online adaptation can be no more efficient than pure online RL on certain hard instances. On the positive side, under a novel structural condition on the offline-pretrained value functions, we propose O2O-LSVI, an adaptation algorithm with problem-dependent sample complexity that provably improves over pure online RL. Finally, we complement our theory with neural-network experiments that demonstrate the practical effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [643] [HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13954)
*Jiacheng Wang,Jinchang Hou,Fabian Wang,Ping Jian,Chenfu Bao,Zhonghou Lv*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HINTBench基准，用于评估智能体在非攻击条件下的内在风险，包含629个轨迹支持风险检测、风险步骤定位和故障类型识别三个任务，揭示了现有模型在风险步骤定位和细粒度故障诊断方面的能力不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体安全评估主要关注外部诱导风险，但智能体在良性条件下仍可能进入不安全轨迹。本研究关注内在风险这一补充但未被充分探索的设置，其中内在故障保持潜伏状态，在长时程执行中传播，最终导致严重后果。

Method: 引入非攻击内在风险审计方法，提出HINTBench基准，包含629个智能体轨迹（523个有风险，106个安全；平均33步），支持三个任务：风险检测、风险步骤定位和内在故障类型识别。注释基于统一的五约束分类法组织。

Result: 实验显示显著能力差距：强LLM在轨迹级风险检测上表现良好，但在风险步骤定位上的性能降至35 Strict-F1以下，细粒度故障诊断更加困难。现有防护模型在此设置下迁移效果差。

Conclusion: 这些发现确立了内在风险审计作为智能体安全的一个开放挑战，强调了需要超越外部攻击的评估方法，以捕捉智能体在良性条件下仍可能出现的系统性故障。

Abstract: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.

</details>


### [644] [Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Process-Complex Industrial Time Series: A Real-World Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13928)
*Sergej Krasnikov,Lukas Meitz,Samineh Bagheri,Michael Heider,Thorsten Schöler,Jörg Hähner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究评估了不同异常检测模型在复杂工业时序数据上的表现，发现传统方法如孤立森林难以处理非周期性多尺度动态，而自编码器表现更好，其中时序卷积自编码器最为稳健。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业时序数据比常用基准数据集复杂得多，主要由于异构、多阶段的操作过程。在简化条件下验证的异常检测方法往往无法推广到工业环境，因此需要评估哪些模型能够捕捉这种复杂性。

Method: 使用从完全运行的工业机械收集的独特数据集进行实证研究，评估不同模型类别：从经典的孤立森林基线扩展到多种自编码器架构，包括时序卷积自编码器、循环自编码器和变分自编码器。

Result: 孤立森林不足以建模数据中的非周期性、多尺度动态，而自编码器表现更好。其中时序卷积自编码器实现最稳健的性能，而循环和变分变体需要更仔细的调优。

Conclusion: 工业时序数据的复杂性需要专门设计的模型，时序卷积自编码器在捕捉工业环境中的过程诱导变异性方面表现最佳，为工业异常检测提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Industrial time-series data from real production environments exhibits substantially higher complexity than commonly used benchmark datasets, primarily due to heterogeneous, multi-stage operational processes. As a result, anomaly detection methods validated under simplified conditions often fail to generalize to industrial settings. This work presents an empirical study on a unique dataset collected from fully operational industrial machinery, explicitly capturing pronounced process-induced variability.
  We evaluate which model classes are capable of capturing this complexity, starting with a classical Isolation Forest baseline and extending to multiple autoencoder architectures. Experimental results show that Isolation Forest is insufficient for modeling the non-periodic, multi-scale dynamics present in the data, whereas autoencoders consistently perform better. Among them, temporal convolutional autoencoders achieve the most robust performance, while recurrent and variational variants require more careful tuning.

</details>


### [645] [DiPO: Disentangled Perplexity Policy Optimization for Fine-grained Exploration-Exploitation Trade-Off](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13902)
*Xiaofan Li,Ming Yang,Zhiyuan Ma,Shichao Ma,Jintao Du,Yu Cheng,Weiqiang Wang,Zhizhong Zhang,Xin Tan,Yanyun Qu,Lizhuang Ma,Yuan Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RLVR-PET方法，通过困惑度空间解耦和双向奖励分配机制，实现细粒度的探索-利用权衡，提升LLM在数学推理和函数调用任务上的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管可验证奖励的强化学习显著提升了LLM的推理能力，但在训练过程中对极难和极易样本的探索与利用权衡管理仍是一个关键挑战，需要更精细的权衡机制

Method: 1) 困惑度空间解耦策略：将样本空间划分为高困惑度（探索）和低困惑度（利用）子空间，识别需要权衡的细粒度样本；2) 双向奖励分配机制：以最小化对验证奖励影响的方式实现困惑度引导的探索与利用，确保稳定的策略优化

Result: 在数学推理和函数调用两个主流任务上的实验结果表明，该方法具有优越性，证实了通过细粒度探索-利用权衡能够有效提升LLM性能

Conclusion: 提出的RLVR-PET方法通过精细的探索-利用权衡机制，解决了RLVR训练中的关键挑战，为提升LLM推理能力提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has catalyzed significant advances in the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, effectively managing the exploration and exploitation trade-off remains a critical challenge. In this paper, we fully analyze the exploration and exploitation dilemma of extremely hard and easy samples during the training and propose a new fine-grained trade-off mechanism. Concretely, we introduce a perplexity space disentangling strategy that divides the sample space into distinct exploration (high perplexity) and exploitation (low perplexity) subspaces, thereby mining fine-grained samples requiring exploration-exploitation trade-off. Subsequently, we propose a bidirectional reward allocation mechanism with a minimum impact on verification rewards to implement perplexity-guided exploration and exploitation, enabling more stable policy optimization. Finally, we have evaluated our method on two mainstream tasks: mathematical reasoning and function calling, and experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing LLM performance by fine-grained exploration-exploitation trade-off.

</details>


### [646] [MolCryst-MLIPs: A Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials Database for Molecular Crystals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13897)
*Adam Lahouari,Shen Ai,Jihye Han,Jillian Hoffstadt,Philipp Hoellmer,Charlotte Infante,Pulkita Jain,Sangram Kadam,Maya M. Martirossyan,Amara McCune,Hypatia Newton,Shlok J. Paul,Willmor Pena,Jonathan Raghoonanan,Sumon Sahu,Oliver Tan,Andrea Vergara,Jutta Rogal,Mark E. Tuckerman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发了一个名为MolCryst-MLIPs的开放分子晶体机器学习原子间势数据库，包含9个分子晶体系统的精细调优MACE模型，平均能量MAE为0.141 kJ/mol/原子，平均力MAE为0.648 kJ/mol/Å。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为分子晶体多态性研究提供经过验证的、可直接用于生产级分子动力学模拟的机器学习原子间势数据库，解决传统势函数开发流程复杂、重复性差的问题。

Method: 采用自动化机器学习管道(AMLP)从参考数据生成到模型训练和验证的完整工作流程，基于MACE-MH-1基础模型进行精细调优，通过分子动力学模拟评估动态稳定性和结构完整性。

Result: 建立了包含9个分子晶体系统的数据库，模型平均能量MAE为0.141 kJ/mol/原子，平均力MAE为0.648 kJ/mol/Å，通过能量守恒、P2取向序参数和径向分布函数验证了模型的动态稳定性。

Conclusion: MolCryst-MLIPs数据库提供了经过验证的机器学习原子间势，可直接用于不同热力学条件下分子晶体多态性的生产级分子动力学模拟，为相关研究提供了可靠的计算工具。

Abstract: We present an open Molecular Crystal (MC) database of Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials (MLIP) called MolCryst-MLIPs. The first release comprises fine-tuned MACE models for nine molecular crystal systems -- Benzamide, Benzoic acid, Coumarin, Durene, Isonicotinamide, Niacinamide, Nicotinamide, Pyrazinamide, and Resorcinol -- developed using the Automated Machine Learning Pipeline (AMLP), which streamlines the entire MLIP development workflow, from reference data generation to model training and validation, into a reproducible and user-friendly pipeline. Models are fine-tuned from the MACE-MH-1 foundation model (omol head), yielding a mean energy MAE of 0.141 kJ/mol/atom and a mean force MAE of 0.648 kJ/mol/Angstrom across all systems. Dynamical stability and structural integrity, as assessed through energy conservation, P2 orientational order parameters, and radial distribution functions, are evaluated using molecular dynamics simulations. The released models and datasets constitute a growing open database of validated MLIPs, ready for production MD simulations of molecular crystal polymorphism under different thermodynamic conditions.

</details>


### [647] [Evaluating Supervised Machine Learning Models: Principles, Pitfalls, and Metric Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13882)
*Xuanyan Liu,Ignacio Cabrera Martin,Marcello Trovati,Xiaolong Xu,Nikolaos Polatidis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了监督机器学习模型的评估原则、挑战和实践考虑，强调评估应作为面向决策、上下文依赖的过程，而非简单依赖聚合指标，以避免误导性结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器学习库和自动化工作流广泛可用，但模型评估通常简化为报告少量聚合指标，这可能导致对真实世界性能的误导性结论。当前评估实践存在系统性缺陷，需要更全面、上下文敏感的评估框架。

Method: 通过使用多样化基准数据集进行一系列受控实验场景，分析评估结果如何受数据集特征、验证设计、类别不平衡、非对称错误成本和性能指标选择的影响。比较替代验证策略，强调评估与任务操作目标的对齐。

Result: 研究揭示了常见陷阱，如准确率悖论、数据泄露、不适当的指标选择以及过度依赖标量汇总度量。实验表明，传统聚合指标在特定场景下可能严重误导模型性能评估。

Conclusion: 监督机器学习评估应作为面向决策、上下文依赖的过程。本文提供了选择指标和验证协议的结构化基础，以支持统计上可靠、稳健且可信赖的监督机器学习系统，强调评估必须与任务的实际操作目标保持一致。

Abstract: The evaluation of supervised machine learning models is a critical stage in the development of reliable predictive systems. Despite the widespread availability of machine learning libraries and automated workflows, model assessment is often reduced to the reporting of a small set of aggregate metrics, which can lead to misleading conclusions about real-world performance. This paper examines the principles, challenges, and practical considerations involved in evaluating supervised learning algorithms across classification and regression tasks. In particular, it discusses how evaluation outcomes are influenced by dataset characteristics, validation design, class imbalance, asymmetric error costs, and the choice of performance metrics. Through a series of controlled experimental scenarios using diverse benchmark datasets, the study highlights common pitfalls such as the accuracy paradox, data leakage, inappropriate metric selection, and overreliance on scalar summary measures. The paper also compares alternative validation strategies and emphasizes the importance of aligning model evaluation with the intended operational objective of the task. By presenting evaluation as a decision-oriented and context-dependent process, this work provides a structured foundation for selecting metrics and validation protocols that support statistically sound, robust, and trustworthy supervised machine learning systems.

</details>


### [648] [Simulation-Based Optimisation of Batting Order and Bowling Plans in T20 Cricket](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13861)
*Tinniam V Ganesh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发了一个统一的MDP框架来优化T20板球中的击球顺序选择和投球计划分配，使用获胜/防守概率而非期望得分作为优化目标，通过三阶段球员档案引擎和向量化蒙特卡洛模拟进行优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统板球决策通常基于期望得分等聚合指标，但实际比赛决策（如击球顺序和投球分配）需要考虑比赛不同阶段（强力击球、中场、死亡阶段）的球员表现差异，以及如何直接优化获胜概率而非中间指标。

Method: 1. 建立统一的马尔可夫决策过程框架；2. 开发三阶段球员档案引擎（强力击球、中场、死亡阶段），使用James-Stein收缩法处理稀疏数据；3. 基于1,161个IPL逐球记录估计球员档案；4. 使用向量化蒙特卡洛模拟（N=50,000次局轨迹）评估获胜/防守概率；5. 通过比较所有可行排列优化击球顺序；6. 通过引导搜索优化投球计划分配，考虑约束条件（如同一投球手不能连续投球）。

Result: 应用于2026年IPL两场比赛：1. 最优击球顺序使孟买印度人队的获胜概率提高4.1个百分点（52.4%到56.5%）；2. 最优古吉拉特泰坦队投球计划使防守概率提高5.2个百分点（39.1%到44.3%）。次优决策主要源于阶段无关的部署方式。

Conclusion: 基于阶段特定球员档案的优化框架能显著提高比赛决策质量，揭示聚合指标下看似合理的决策在实际阶段特定情境中可能是次优的，证明了直接优化获胜/防守概率而非中间指标的价值。

Abstract: This paper develops a unified Markov Decision Process (MDP) framework for optimising two recurring in-match decisions in T20 cricket, namely batting order selection and bowling plan assignment, directly in terms of win and defend probability rather than expected runs. A three-phase player profile engine (Powerplay, Middle, Death) with James-Stein shrinkage (a technique that blends a player's individual statistics toward the league average when their phase-specific data is sparse) is estimated from 1,161 IPL ball-by-ball records (2008-2025). Win/defend probabilities are evaluated using vectorised Monte Carlo simulation over N = 50,000 innings trajectories. Batting orders are evaluated by comparing all feasible arrangements of the remaining players and selecting the one that maximises win probability. Bowling plans are optimised through a guided search over possible over assignments, progressively improving the allocation while respecting constraints such as the prohibition on consecutive overs by the same bowler. Applied to two 2026 IPL matches, the optimal batting order improves Mumbai Indians' win probability by 4.1 percentage points (52.4% to 56.5%), and the optimal Gujarat Titans bowling plan improves defend probability by 5.2 percentage points (39.1% to 44.3%). In both cases, the observed sub-optimality is consistent with phase-agnostic deployment: decisions that appear reasonable under aggregate metrics are shown to be costly when phase-specific profiles are applied.

</details>


### [649] [Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10009)
*Kening Wang,Di Wen,Yufan Chen,Ruiping Liu,Junwei Zheng,Jiale Wei,Kailun Yang,Rainer Stiefelhagen,Kunyu Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FF-TRUST：首个针对多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声问题的基准与框架，通过联合时频早期学习正则化提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动睡眠分期作为多模态学习问题，面临跨机构、设备和人群的域偏移挑战，同时实际数据常受噪声标注影响。现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降，而这一问题尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，包含域不变多模态睡眠分期架构和联合时频早期学习正则化（JTF-ELR）。该方法联合利用时域和频域一致性，结合置信度多样性正则化，提升噪声监督下的鲁棒性。

Result: 在五个公共数据集上的实验表明，FF-TRUST在多种对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致的SOTA性能，显著优于现有噪声标签学习方法。

Conclusion: 该工作首次建立了多源域泛化睡眠分期中标签噪声问题的基准，提出的FF-TRUST框架有效解决了域偏移和标签噪声共存时的鲁棒学习挑战，为实际临床应用提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

</details>


### [650] [SparseBalance: Load-Balanced Long Context Training with Dynamic Sparse Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13847)
*Hongtao Xu,Jianchao Tan,Yuxuan Hu,Pengju Lu,Hongyu Wang,Pingwei Sun,Yerui Sun,Yuchen Xie,Xunliang Cai,Mingzhen Li,Weile Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SparseBalance：一种算法-系统协同设计框架，通过动态稀疏度调整和稀疏感知批处理策略，解决长上下文LLM训练中的序列长度和稀疏敏感性的异构性问题，提升训练效率和模型精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏注意力虽然缓解了长上下文LLM训练的计算瓶颈，但其分布式训练过程存在序列长度和稀疏敏感性的极端异构性，导致严重的负载不平衡问题和次优的模型精度。现有算法和训练框架通常只关注单一问题，未能系统性地协同优化这两个问题。

Method: 提出SparseBalance框架，包含两个核心技术：1) 工作负载感知的动态稀疏度调整，采用双向稀疏度调整消除掉队者并利用固有气泡实现免费精度提升；2) 稀疏感知的批处理策略，实现粗粒度平衡，与动态稀疏度调整形成互补。

Result: 实验结果表明，SparseBalance在LongBench基准测试上实现了最高1.33倍的端到端加速，同时将长上下文能力提升了0.46%。

Conclusion: SparseBalance通过算法-系统协同设计，有效解决了长上下文LLM稀疏注意力训练中的异构性问题，在提升系统效率的同时改善了模型精度，为大规模语言模型训练提供了有效的优化方案。

Abstract: While sparse attention mitigates the computational bottleneck of long-context LLM training, its distributed training process exhibits extreme heterogeneity in both \textit{1)} sequence length and \textit{2)} sparsity sensitivity, leading to a severe imbalance problem and sub-optimal model accuracy. Existing algorithms and training frameworks typically focus on single issue, failing to systematically co-optimize these two problems. Therefore, we propose SparseBalance, a novel algorithm-system co-design framework, which exploits the sparsity and sequence heterogeneity to optimize model accuracy and system efficiency jointly. First, we propose workload-aware dynamic sparsity tuning, which employs a bidirectional sparsity adjustment to eliminate stragglers and exploit inherent bubbles for free accuracy. Second, we propose a sparsity-aware batching strategy to achieve coarse-grained balance, which complements dynamic sparsity tuning. Experimental results demonstrate that SparseBalance achieves up to a 1.33$\times$ end-to-end speedup while still improving the long-context capability by 0.46\% on the LongBench benchmark.

</details>


### [651] [Composite Silhouette: A Subsampling-based Aggregation Strategy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13816)
*Aggelos Semoglou,Aristidis Likas,John Pavlopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Composite Silhouette方法，通过重复子采样聚类和自适应加权融合micro/macro平均Silhouette分数，解决聚类数量确定中传统方法在规模不平衡时的偏差问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无监督学习中确定聚类数量是一个核心挑战。传统的Silhouette系数存在两个问题：1) 标准micro平均形式在规模不平衡时偏向较大聚类；2) macro平均虽然缓解了这种偏差，但可能过度强调少数群体的噪声。需要一种能够平衡这两种方法优点的内部验证指标。

Method: 提出Composite Silhouette方法：1) 对数据进行重复子采样聚类；2) 对每个子样本计算micro和macro平均Silhouette分数；3) 通过自适应凸权重组合这两种分数，权重由它们的归一化差异决定并经过有界非线性平滑处理；4) 最终得分通过对所有子样本级组合分数平均得到。该方法还建立了理论性质并推导了子采样估计的有限样本集中性保证。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，Composite Silhouette有效地调和了micro和macro平均的优点，能够更准确地恢复真实聚类数量。该方法在聚类规模不平衡的情况下表现出色，优于传统的单一分区评估方法。

Conclusion: Composite Silhouette通过重复子采样聚类和自适应加权融合策略，提供了一种鲁棒的聚类数量选择标准，能够平衡大小聚类的贡献，在规模不平衡场景下比传统方法表现更好。

Abstract: Determining the number of clusters is a central challenge in unsupervised learning, where ground-truth labels are unavailable. The Silhouette coefficient is a widely used internal validation metric for this task, yet its standard micro-averaged form tends to favor larger clusters under size imbalance. Macro-averaging mitigates this bias by weighting clusters equally, but may overemphasize noise from under-represented groups. We introduce Composite Silhouette, an internal criterion for cluster-count selection that aggregates evidence across repeated subsampled clusterings rather than relying on a single partition. For each subsample, micro- and macro-averaged Silhouette scores are combined through an adaptive convex weight determined by their normalized discrepancy and smoothed by a bounded nonlinearity; the final score is then obtained by averaging these subsample-level composites. We establish key properties of the criterion and derive finite-sample concentration guarantees for its subsampling estimate. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that Composite Silhouette effectively reconciles the strengths of micro- and macro-averaging, yielding more accurate recovery of the ground-truth number of clusters.

</details>


### [652] [Robust Ultra Low-Bit Post-Training Quantization via Stable Diagonal Curvature Estimate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13806)
*Jaemin Kim,Sungkyun Kim,Junyeol Lee,Jiwon Seo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DASH-Q：一种基于对角Hessian近似和迭代加权最小二乘的鲁棒后训练量化框架，在超低比特量化中显著提升LLM性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型部署面临规模挑战，后训练量化可减少内存占用但无需重新训练。现有基于Hessian的PTQ方法通过跨通道依赖补偿量化误差，但在低比特量化时由于有限校准数据导致的噪声曲率估计而性能下降。

Method: 提出DASH-Q框架，使用对角Hessian近似和迭代加权最小二乘法。通过丢弃噪声敏感的依赖关系，过滤采样噪声，同时优先保留显著特征功率。

Result: 在超低比特量化中优于其他PTQ基线，在五个基线LLM模型上平均提升零样本准确率7.01%，最高提升14.01%，且在极小校准数据下表现出鲁棒稳定性能。

Conclusion: DASH-Q通过简化Hessian估计和噪声过滤机制，有效解决了低比特量化中的噪声问题，为LLM的高效部署提供了鲁棒的量化解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely used across many domains, but their scale makes deployment challenging. Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) reduces memory footprint without retraining by leveraging a small calibration set. Recent Hessian-based PTQ methods compensate quantization error via cross-channel dependencies, but such approaches degrade at low bit-widths due to noisy curvature estimates from limited calibration data. We propose DASH-Q, a robust PTQ framework using diagonal Hessian approximation and iterative weighted least squares. By discarding noise-prone dependencies, DASH-Q filters sampling noise while prioritizing the preservation of salient feature power. We outperform other PTQ baselines in ultra low-bit regime, improving zero-shot accuracy by 7.01% on average and up to 14.01% over the strongest baselines across five baseline LLM models, while showing robust and stable performance with very small calibration data.

</details>


### [653] [Soft $Q(λ)$: A multi-step off-policy method for entropy regularised reinforcement learning using eligibility traces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13780)
*Pranav Mahajan,Ben Seymour*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种新的软Q(λ)算法，将软Q学习扩展到多步、离线和资格迹框架，支持任意行为策略下的高效信用分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软Q学习虽然成功，但其多步扩展相对未被充分探索，且仅限于玻尔兹曼策略下的在线动作采样。需要开发能够处理离线策略和任意行为策略的通用多步软Q学习框架。

Method: 首先提出软Q学习的正式n步公式，然后通过引入新颖的软树备份算子扩展到完全离线策略情况，最后统一为软Q(λ)框架——一个优雅的在线、离线、资格迹框架。

Result: 开发了软Q(λ)算法，这是一个模型无关的方法，用于学习熵正则化的价值函数，支持任意行为策略下的高效信用分配。

Conclusion: 该研究为软Q学习提供了完整的多步扩展框架，解决了现有方法的局限性，为未来实验研究提供了理论基础和实用工具。

Abstract: Soft Q-learning has emerged as a versatile model-free method for entropy-regularised reinforcement learning, optimising for returns augmented with a penalty on the divergence from a reference policy. Despite its success, the multi-step extensions of soft Q-learning remain relatively unexplored and limited to on-policy action sampling under the Boltzmann policy. In this brief research note, we first present a formal $n$-step formulation for soft Q-learning and then extend this framework to the fully off-policy case by introducing a novel Soft Tree Backup operator. Finally, we unify these developments into Soft $Q(λ)$, an elegant online, off-policy, eligibility trace framework that allows for efficient credit assignment under arbitrary behaviour policies. Our derivations propose a model-free method for learning entropy-regularised value functions that can be utilised in future empirical experiments.

</details>


### [654] [Online learning with noisy side observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13740)
*Tomáš Kocák,Gergely Neu,Michal Valko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种新的在线学习部分可观测模型，其中学习者除了自身损失外，还能观察到关于其他动作的噪声反馈，反馈质量由加权有向图结构决定。算法实现参数无关的$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$遗憾界，其中$α^*$是有效独立数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线学习模型通常假设学习者只能观察到所选动作的反馈，但在许多实际场景中，学习者可能获得关于其他动作的部分信息。本文旨在建立更一般的部分可观测模型，通过图结构表示动作间的反馈共享关系，并设计高效算法。

Method: 提出基于加权有向图的反馈结构模型，边权重表示节点间反馈质量。设计参数无关算法，无需预先知道图属性$α^*$（有效独立数）。算法通过自适应策略处理噪声反馈，实现高效学习。

Result: 算法保证$\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$遗憾界，其中$α^*$是图的有效独立数。对于二元边权重的特殊情况，模型退化为Mannor和Shamir（2011）以及Alon等人（2013）的部分可观测模型，算法恢复近最优遗憾界。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一种新的部分可观测在线学习框架，通过图结构建模动作间的反馈共享关系。所设计的参数无关算法实现了与图结构复杂度相关的遗憾界，为更广泛的实际应用场景提供了理论基础和算法支持。

Abstract: We propose a new partial-observability model for online learning problems where the learner, besides its own loss, also observes some noisy feedback about the other actions, depending on the underlying structure of the problem. We represent this structure by a weighted directed graph, where the edge weights are related to the quality of the feedback shared by the connected nodes. Our main contribution is an efficient algorithm that guarantees a regret of $\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{α^* T})$ after $T$ rounds, where $α^*$ is a novel graph property that we call the effective independence number. Our algorithm is completely parameter-free and does not require knowledge (or even estimation) of $α^*$. For the special case of binary edge weights, our setting reduces to the partial-observability models of Mannor and Shamir (2011) and Alon et al. (2013) and our algorithm recovers the near-optimal regret bounds.

</details>


### [655] [Spectral Thompson sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13739)
*Tomas Kocak,Michal Valko,Remi Munos,Shipra Agrawal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SpectralTS算法：基于图结构的光谱汤普森采样，用于解决具有图平滑约束的多臂老虎机问题，计算效率高且性能有理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汤普森采样在计算广告等领域表现出色，但缺乏理论分析工具。传统算法在处理图结构选择问题时，随着选择数量增加计算复杂度急剧上升，需要更高效的算法。

Method: 提出SpectralTS算法，利用图的光谱分解将高维选择空间投影到低维有效维度d，在光谱空间中应用汤普森采样，利用相邻节点期望收益相似的图平滑假设。

Result: 理论分析表明SpectralTS的遗憾界为d√(T ln N)，与已知结果相当但计算效率更高。在合成和真实数据上的实验验证了算法的竞争力。

Conclusion: SpectralTS为具有图结构约束的多臂老虎机问题提供了计算高效且有理论保证的解决方案，特别适用于推荐系统和广告等实际应用场景。

Abstract: Thompson Sampling (TS) has attracted a lot of interest due to its good empirical performance, in particular in the computational advertising. Though successful, the tools for its performance analysis appeared only recently. In this paper, we describe and analyze SpectralTS algorithm for a bandit problem, where the payoffs of the choices are smooth given an underlying graph. In this setting, each choice is a node of a graph and the expected payoffs of the neighboring nodes are assumed to be similar. Although the setting has application both in recommender systems and advertising, the traditional algorithms would scale poorly with the number of choices. For that purpose we consider an effective dimension d, which is small in real-world graphs. We deliver the analysis showing that the regret of SpectralTS scales as d*sqrt(T ln N) with high probability, where T is the time horizon and N is the number of choices. Since a d*sqrt(T ln N) regret is comparable to the known results, SpectralTS offers a computationally more efficient alternative. We also show that our algorithm is competitive on both synthetic and real-world data.

</details>


### [656] [Calibrate-Then-Delegate: Safety Monitoring with Risk and Budget Guarantees via Model Cascades](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14251)
*Edoardo Pona,Milad Kazemi,Mehran Hosseini,Yali Du,David Watson,Osvaldo Simeone,Nicola Paoletti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CTD是一种LLM安全监控的级联方法，通过预测委托价值而非不确定性来优化计算成本分配，在保证预算约束的同时提高安全检测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于不确定性的委托方法存在问题：不确定性不能准确反映专家模型能否真正纠正错误，导致计算资源分配效率低下。需要一种能够直接预测委托价值的方法，在保证计算成本约束的同时最大化安全检测效果。

Method: 提出Calibrate-Then-Delegate (CTD)框架：1) 设计委托价值(DV)探针，基于与安全探针相同的内部表示直接预测委托给专家模型的收益；2) 使用多重假设检验在校准数据上设置DV阈值，确保满足计算预算约束；3) 支持流式实例级决策，无需组标签即可自适应分配预算。

Result: 在四个安全数据集上的评估显示：CTD在所有预算水平上都优于基于不确定性的委托方法；避免了有害的过度委托；能够根据输入难度自适应分配预算，无需组标签信息。

Conclusion: CTD通过直接预测委托价值而非依赖不确定性，实现了更有效的计算成本分配，为大规模LLM安全监控提供了具有概率保证的级联解决方案，显著提升了安全检测的准确性和效率。

Abstract: Monitoring LLM safety at scale requires balancing cost and accuracy: a cheap latent-space probe can screen every input, but hard cases should be escalated to a more expensive expert. Existing cascades delegate based on probe uncertainty, but uncertainty is a poor proxy for delegation benefit, as it ignores whether the expert would actually correct the error. To address this problem, we introduce Calibrate-Then-Delegate (CTD), a model-cascade approach that provides probabilistic guarantees on the computation cost while enabling instance-level (streaming) decisions. CTD builds on a novel delegation value (DV) probe, a lightweight model operating on the same internal representations as the safety probe that directly predicts the benefit of escalation. To enforce budget constraints, CTD calibrates a threshold on the DV signal using held-out data via multiple hypothesis testing, yielding finite-sample guarantees on the delegation rate. Evaluated on four safety datasets, CTD consistently outperforms uncertainty-based delegation at every budget level, avoids harmful over-delegation, and adapts budget allocation to input difficulty without requiring group labels.

</details>


### [657] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Derivative-Constrained PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13723)
*Kentaro Hoshisashi,Carolyn E Phelan,Paolo Barucca*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DC-PINNs：一种在PINNs中嵌入状态和导数非线性约束的通用框架，通过最小化目标函数准则求解约束PDE，利用自动微分高效计算约束，并采用自适应损失平衡减少对人工超参数的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINNs通过最小化残差目标函数求解PDE，但许多应用需要额外的导数约束（如边界、单调性、凸性、不可压缩性等），这些约束与控制方程同等重要。现有方法在处理这些约束方面存在不足。

Method: 提出DC-PINNs框架：1) 将约束PDE求解转化为基于最小目标函数准则的优化问题；2) 通过自动微分高效嵌入状态和导数的非线性约束；3) 采用自适应损失平衡技术调节各目标的影响；4) 基于能量最小原理提供可靠的约束PDE解。

Result: DC-PINNs在多个基准测试中（热扩散边界约束、金融波动率无套利约束、流体涡旋脱落）相比基线PINN变体和硬约束方法，显著减少了约束违反，提高了物理保真度。显式编码导数约束稳定了训练过程，即使PDE残差很小也能引导优化朝向物理可接受的极小值。

Conclusion: DC-PINNs为约束PDE求解提供了一个通用框架，通过显式编码导数约束提高了物理保真度和训练稳定性，基于能量最小原理为约束PDE提供了可靠解决方案，减少了对人工超参数和问题特定架构的依赖。

Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) recast PDE solving as an optimisation problem in function space by minimising a residual-based objective, yet many applications require additional derivative-based relations that are just as fundamental as the governing equations. In this paper, we present Derivative-Constrained PINNs (DC-PINNs), a general framework that treats constrained PDE solving as an optimisation guided by a minimum objective function criterion where the physics resides in the minimum principle. DC-PINNs embed general nonlinear constraints on states and derivatives, e.g., bounds, monotonicity, convexity, incompressibility, computed efficiently via automatic differentiation, and they employ self-adaptive loss balancing to tune the influence of each objective, reducing reliance on manual hyperparameters and problem-specific architectures. DC-PINNs consistently reduce constraint violations and improve physical fidelity versus baseline PINN variants, representative hard-constraint formulations on benchmarks, including heat diffusion with bounds, financial volatilities with arbitrage-free, and fluid flow with vortices shed. Explicitly encoding derivative constraints stabilises training and steers optimisation toward physically admissible minima even when the PDE residual alone is small, providing reliable solutions of constrained PDEs grounded in energy minimum principles.

</details>


### [658] [A Bayesian Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Explanations in Power Quality Disturbance Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13658)
*Yinsong Chen,Samson S. Yu,Kashem M. Muttaqi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出贝叶斯解释框架，通过生成每个实例的相关性归因分布来建模解释不确定性，提高电力质量扰动分类器的透明度和可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统可解释AI方法产生确定性解释，忽略了不确定性，限制了在安全关键应用中的可靠性。需要一种能够量化解释不确定性的方法来增强模型透明度

Method: 提出贝叶斯解释框架，为每个实例生成相关性归因分布来建模解释不确定性。专家可以根据置信百分位数选择解释，针对特定扰动类型定制可解释性

Result: 在合成和真实世界电力质量数据集上的广泛实验表明，所提框架通过不确定性感知解释提高了PQD分类器的透明度和可靠性

Conclusion: 贝叶斯解释框架通过建模解释不确定性，为电力质量扰动分类提供了更透明和可靠的可解释性方法，特别适用于安全关键应用

Abstract: Advanced deep learning methods have shown remarkable success in power quality disturbance (PQD) classification. To enhance model transparency, explainable AI (XAI) techniques have been developed to provide instance-specific interpretations of classifier decisions. However, conventional XAI methods yield deterministic explanations, overlooking uncertainty and limiting reliability in safety-critical applications. This paper proposes a Bayesian explanation framework that models explanation uncertainty by generating a relevance attribution distribution for each instance. This method allows experts to select explanations based on confidence percentiles, thereby tailoring interpretability according to specific disturbance types. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world power quality datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework improves the transparency and reliability of PQD classifiers through uncertainty-aware explanations.

</details>


### [659] [(How) Learning Rates Regulate Catastrophic Overtraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13627)
*Mark Rofin,Aditya Varre,Nicolas Flammarion*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了监督微调(SFT)中的灾难性过度训练现象，发现学习率通过隐式正则化影响模型收敛性质，学习率衰减会增加预训练模型的锐度，从而加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 监督微调(SFT)作为LLM后训练的第一阶段，虽然能教会模型遵循指令并塑造其作为助手的行文，但可能损害LLM的基本能力，特别是在长时间预训练后会出现灾难性过度训练现象。需要理解过度训练的机制及其与优化动态的关系。

Method: 首先从学习率的隐式正则化角度研究微调中的灾难性遗忘现象，分析不同学习率下模型收敛性质的差异。然后建立遗忘与过度训练之间的联系，研究学习率衰减如何增加预训练模型的锐度，进而加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘。

Result: 研究发现：1) 对于达到相同SFT损失的模型，学习率调节优化过程，大学习率和小学习率微调会收敛到性质不同的模型；2) 学习率衰减会增加预训练模型的锐度，这反过来会加剧SFT期间的灾难性遗忘，导致过度训练。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM中过度训练的机制，对理解预训练和微调期间优化动态的相互作用有广泛贡献，为缓解灾难性过度训练提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is a common first stage of LLM post-training, teaching the model to follow instructions and shaping its behavior as a helpful assistant. At the same time, SFT may harm the fundamental capabilities of an LLM, particularly after long pretraining: a phenomenon known as catastrophic overtraining (Springer et al., 2025). To understand overtraining, we first investigate catastrophic forgetting in finetuning through the lens of implicit regularization of the learning rate. For models trained to the same SFT loss, we identify how the learning rate mediates optimization: finetuning with large and small steps converges to qualitatively different models. Next, we link forgetting to overtraining: learning rate decay increases the sharpness of the pretrained model, which in turn exacerbates catastrophic forgetting during SFT, leading to overtraining. Our findings paint a picture of the overtraining mechanism in LLMs and broadly contribute to the understanding of the interplay between optimization dynamics during pretraining and finetuning.

</details>


### [660] [Golden Handcuffs make safer AI agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13609)
*Aram Ebtekar,Michael K. Cohen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种贝叶斯强化学习安全框架，通过扩展主观奖励范围包含大负值来防止智能体采用意外危险策略，并设计导师覆盖机制确保安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习智能体可能通过意外策略获得高奖励，但这些策略可能具有危险性。需要设计一种既能保持学习能力又能确保安全的框架。

Method: 扩展智能体的主观奖励范围至包含大负值-L（真实环境奖励在[0,1]），设计导师覆盖机制：当预测值低于阈值时，将控制权交给安全导师。

Result: 证明了两个关键性质：(1)能力性：使用导师引导探索（频率趋近于零），智能体相对于最佳导师获得次线性遗憾；(2)安全性：任何可判定的低复杂度谓词在优化策略触发前都会被导师触发。

Conclusion: 该贝叶斯安全框架能够在保持学习能力的同时，通过导师覆盖机制确保智能体不会触发危险状态，为强化学习安全提供理论保证。

Abstract: Reinforcement learners can attain high reward through novel unintended strategies. We study a Bayesian mitigation for general environments: we expand the agent's subjective reward range to include a large negative value $-L$, while the true environment's rewards lie in $[0,1]$. After observing consistently high rewards, the Bayesian policy becomes risk-averse to novel schemes that plausibly lead to $-L$. We design a simple override mechanism that yields control to a safe mentor whenever the predicted value drops below a fixed threshold. We prove two properties of the resulting agent: (i) Capability: using mentor-guided exploration with vanishing frequency, the agent attains sublinear regret against its best mentor. (ii) Safety: no decidable low-complexity predicate is triggered by the optimizing policy before it is triggered by a mentor.

</details>


### [661] [WOMBET: World Model-based Experience Transfer for Robust and Sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08958)
*Mintae Kim,Koushil Sreenath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出WOMBET框架，通过世界模型生成高质量离线数据并自适应混合在线数据，提升机器人强化学习的样本效率和性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人强化学习中数据收集成本高、风险大，现有离线到在线RL方法通常假设已有固定数据集，未解决如何生成可靠迁移数据的问题

Method: WOMBET框架：1) 在源任务学习世界模型，通过不确定性惩罚规划生成离线数据；2) 筛选高回报低认知不确定性的轨迹；3) 目标任务在线微调时自适应采样离线与在线数据

Result: 理论证明不确定性惩罚目标提供真实回报下界，推导有限样本误差分解；实验表明在连续控制基准上优于强基线，提升样本效率和最终性能

Conclusion: 联合优化数据生成和迁移的WOMBET框架有效解决了机器人RL的数据效率问题，通过世界模型生成高质量先验数据并自适应混合在线学习实现稳定迁移

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) in robotics is often limited by the cost and risk of data collection, motivating experience transfer from a source task to a target task. Offline-to-online RL leverages prior data but typically assumes a given fixed dataset and does not address how to generate reliable data for transfer. We propose \textit{World Model-based Experience Transfer} (WOMBET), a framework that jointly generates and utilizes prior data. WOMBET learns a world model in the source task and generates offline data via uncertainty-penalized planning, followed by filtering trajectories with high return and low epistemic uncertainty. It then performs online fine-tuning in the target task using adaptive sampling between offline and online data, enabling a stable transition from prior-driven initialization to task-specific adaptation. We show that the uncertainty-penalized objective provides a lower bound on the true return and derive a finite-sample error decomposition capturing distribution mismatch and approximation error. Empirically, WOMBET improves sample efficiency and final performance over strong baselines on continuous control benchmarks, demonstrating the benefit of jointly optimizing data generation and transfer.

</details>


### [662] [Metric-Aware Principal Component Analysis (MAPCA):A Unified Framework for Scale-Invariant Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14249)
*Michael Leznik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了度量感知主成分分析（MAPCA），一个基于广义特征问题的尺度不变表示学习统一框架，通过度量矩阵M控制表示几何，连接了多种自监督学习方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表示学习方法缺乏统一的几何框架，不同方法（如PCA、Barlow Twins、VICReg等）之间的关系不明确，特别是尺度不变性和谱偏置控制缺乏系统分析。

Method: 基于广义特征问题 max Tr(W^T Σ W) subject to W^T M W = I，其中M是对称正定度量矩阵。引入规范β族M(β)=Σ^β（β∈[0,1]）提供连续谱偏置控制，对角线度量M=D=diag(Σ)恢复不变PCA（IPCA）。

Result: 建立了尺度不变性的充要条件：度量变换为M̃=CMC。揭示了多种自监督学习方法的几何对应关系：Barlow Twins和ZCA白化对应β=1（输出白化），VICReg方差项对应对角线度量，W-MSE对应M=Σ^{-1}（β=-1）。

Conclusion: MAPCA提供了一个统一的几何语言，揭示了不同表示学习方法之间的内在联系，特别是输入白化和输出白化的区别在损失函数层面不可见，只有在MAPCA框架下才变得精确。

Abstract: We introduce Metric-Aware Principal Component Analysis (MAPCA), a unified framework for scale-invariant representation learning based on the generalised eigenproblem max Tr(W^T Sigma W) subject to W^T M W = I, where M is a symmetric positive definite metric matrix. The choice of M determines the representation geometry. The canonical beta-family M(beta) = Sigma^beta, beta in [0,1], provides continuous spectral bias control between standard PCA (beta=0) and output whitening (beta=1), with condition number kappa(beta) = (lambda_1/lambda_p)^(1-beta) decreasing monotonically to isotropy. The diagonal metric M = D = diag(Sigma) recovers Invariant PCA (IPCA), a method rooted in Frisch (1928) diagonal regression, as a distinct member of the broader framework. We prove that scale invariance holds if and only if the metric transforms as M_tilde = CMC under rescaling C, a condition satisfied exactly by IPCA but not by the general beta-family at intermediate values.
  Beyond its classical interpretation, MAPCA provides a geometric language that unifies several self-supervised learning objectives. Barlow Twins and ZCA whitening correspond to beta=1 (output whitening); VICReg's variance term corresponds to the diagonal metric. A key finding is that W-MSE, despite being described as a whitening-based method, corresponds to M = Sigma^{-1} (beta = -1), outside the spectral compression range entirely and in the opposite spectral direction to Barlow Twins. This distinction between input and output whitening is invisible at the level of loss functions and becomes precise only within the MAPCA framework.

</details>


### [663] [Enhancing Reinforcement Learning for Radiology Report Generation with Evidence-aware Rewards and Self-correcting Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13598)
*Qin Zhou,Guoyan Liang,Qianyi Yang,Jingyuan Chen,Sai Wu,Chang Yao,Zhe Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ESC-RL：一种用于放射学报告生成的临床对齐证据感知自校正强化学习方法，通过组级证据对齐奖励和自我校正偏好学习解决现有方法的局限性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于强化学习的放射学报告生成方法存在两个核心限制：1) 报告级奖励对临床忠实性提供有限证据基础指导；2) 缺乏明确的自改进机制以对齐临床偏好

Method: 提出ESC-RL框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 组级证据感知对齐奖励(GEAR)，提供组级、证据感知的反馈；2) 自我校正偏好学习(SPL)策略，自动构建可靠疾病感知偏好数据集并利用LLM合成精炼报告

Result: 在两个公开胸部X射线数据集上的广泛实验显示了一致的性能提升和最先进的性能表现

Conclusion: ESC-RL促进了临床忠实、疾病对齐的奖励，并支持训练期间的持续自我改进，在放射学报告生成任务中表现出优越性能

Abstract: Recent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches have advanced radiology report generation (RRG), yet two core limitations persist: (1) report-level rewards offer limited evidence-grounded guidance for clinical faithfulness; and (2) current methods lack an explicit self-improving mechanism to align with clinical preference. We introduce clinically aligned Evidence-aware Self-Correcting Reinforcement Learning (ESC-RL), comprising two key components. First, a Group-wise Evidence-aware Alignment Reward (GEAR) delivers group-wise, evidence-aware feedback. GEAR reinforces consistent grounding for true positives, recovers missed findings for false negatives, and suppresses unsupported content for false positives. Second, a Self-correcting Preference Learning (SPL) strategy automatically constructs a reliable, disease-aware preference dataset from multiple noisy observations and leverages an LLM to synthesize refined reports without human supervision. ESC-RL promotes clinically faithful, disease-aligned reward and supports continual self-improvement during training. Extensive experiments on two public chest X-ray datasets demonstrate consistent gains and state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [664] [Parameter-efficient Quantum Multi-task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13560)
*Hevish Cowlessur,Chandra Thapa,Tansu Alpcan,Seyit Camtepe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出参数高效的量子多任务学习框架，用全量子预测头替代传统任务特定线性头，在保持性能的同时显著减少参数数量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多任务学习中任务特定参数随任务数量快速增长，需要设计既能保持任务特异性又提高参数效率的多任务头。量子机器学习中的变分量子电路在受限参数预算下提供紧凑的数据映射机制，适合解决此问题

Method: 提出混合架构的量子多任务学习框架：共享的任务无关量子编码阶段后接轻量级任务特定ansatz块，实现局部任务适应同时保持紧凑参数化。在共享表示维度随任务数增长的控制条件下，量子头参数成本呈线性增长而非传统头的二次增长

Result: 在自然语言处理、医学成像和多模态讽刺检测三个多任务基准测试中，性能与经典硬参数共享基线相当或更好，同时以显著更少的头参数持续优于现有混合量子多任务学习模型。在噪声模拟器和真实量子硬件上验证了可行性

Conclusion: 量子多任务学习框架通过全量子预测头实现了参数高效的多任务学习，在保持性能的同时显著减少参数数量，为量子机器学习在多任务场景中的应用提供了可行方案

Abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) improves generalization and data efficiency by jointly learning related tasks through shared representations. In the widely used hard-parameter-sharing setting, a shared backbone is combined with task-specific prediction heads. However, task-specific parameters can grow rapidly with the number of tasks. Therefore, designing multi-task heads that preserve task specialization while improving parameter efficiency remains a key challenge. In Quantum Machine Learning (QML), variational quantum circuits (VQCs) provide a compact mechanism for mapping classical data to quantum states residing in high-dimensional Hilbert spaces, enabling expressive representations within constrained parameter budgets. We propose a parameter-efficient quantum multi-task learning (QMTL) framework that replaces conventional task-specific linear heads with a fully quantum prediction head in a hybrid architecture. The model consists of a VQC with a shared, task-independent quantum encoding stage, followed by lightweight task-specific ansatz blocks enabling localized task adaptation while maintaining compact parameterization. Under a controlled and capacity-matched formulation where the shared representation dimension grows with the number of tasks, our parameter-scaling analysis demonstrates that a standard classical head exhibits quadratic growth, whereas the proposed quantum head parameter cost scales linearly. We evaluate QMTL on three multi-task benchmarks spanning natural language processing, medical imaging, and multimodal sarcasm detection, where we achieve performance comparable to, and in some cases exceeding, classical hard-parameter-sharing baselines while consistently outperforming existing hybrid quantum MTL models with substantially fewer head parameters. We further demonstrate QMTL's executability on noisy simulators and real quantum hardware, illustrating its feasibility.

</details>


### [665] [Awakening Dormant Experts:Counterfactual Routing to Mitigate MoE Hallucinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14246)
*Wentao Hu,Yanbo Zhai,Xiaohui Hu,Mingkuan Zhao,Shanhong yu,Xue Liu,Kaidong Yu,Shuangyong Song,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Counterfactual Routing (CoR)训练无关推理框架，通过反事实专家影响度量动态唤醒稀疏MoE模型中的休眠专家，在不增加计算预算下提升长尾知识准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏MoE模型虽然扩展性强，但在处理长尾知识时容易产生幻觉。问题根源在于静态Top-k路由机制倾向于高频模式而非罕见事实关联，导致拥有关键长尾知识的"专家专家"被分配低门控分数而"休眠"

Method: 提出Counterfactual Routing (CoR)训练无关推理框架：1) 使用层间扰动分析与反事实专家影响(CEI)度量；2) 动态将计算资源从语法主导层转移到知识密集层；3) 保持总激活数不变；4) 通过虚拟消融检索因果决定性专家

Result: 在TruthfulQA、FACTOR和TriviaQA上的广泛实验表明，CoR平均提升事实准确性3.1%，且不增加推理计算预算，相比静态扩展策略建立了更优的帕累托前沿

Conclusion: CoR框架有效解决了稀疏MoE模型中长尾知识处理的脆弱性问题，通过动态路由机制唤醒休眠专家，在固定计算预算下显著提升事实准确性，为MoE模型优化提供了新方向

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable scalability, yet they remain vulnerable to hallucinations, particularly when processing long-tail knowledge. We identify that this fragility stems from static Top-$k$ routing: routers tend to favor high-frequency patterns over rare factual associations. Consequently, ``specialist experts'' possessing critical long-tail knowledge are often assigned low gating scores and remain ``dormant'' -- under-prioritized for specific tokens despite their proven causal importance on other inputs. To address this, we propose Counterfactual Routing (CoR), a training-free inference framework designed to awaken these dormant experts. CoR integrates layer-wise perturbation analysis with the Counterfactual Expert Impact (CEI) metric to dynamically shift computational resources from syntax-dominant to knowledge-intensive layers while maintaining a constant total activation count, effectively retrieving causally decisive experts via virtual ablation. Extensive experiments on TruthfulQA, FACTOR, and TriviaQA demonstrate that CoR improves factual accuracy by 3.1\% on average without increasing the inference budget, establishing a superior Pareto frontier compared to static scaling strategies.

</details>


### [666] [From Alignment to Prediction: A Study of Self-Supervised Learning and Predictive Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13518)
*Mintu Dutta,Ritesh Vyas,Mohendra Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的自监督学习范式——预测表示学习(PRL)，专注于基于观测数据预测未观测部分，并将JEPA作为该范式的典型代表。通过比较BYOL、MAE和I-JEPA，发现MAE在相似性上表现最佳但鲁棒性较弱，而BYOL和I-JEPA在准确性和鲁棒性上取得更好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自监督学习方法主要围绕表示对齐和输入重构，这些方法虽然在实际中表现良好，但局限于从观测数据中学习，未能提供对数据分布具有预测性的学习结构。因此需要探索新的自监督学习范式。

Method: 提出预测表示学习(PRL)作为自监督学习的新类别，专注于基于观测数据预测未观测部分。建立了包含PRL、对齐学习和重构学习的统一分类法。将JEPA作为PRL的典型代表进行理论分析，并实现BYOL、MAE和I-JEPA进行对比实验。

Result: MAE获得完美的相似性得分1.00，但鲁棒性相对较弱(0.55)。BYOL和I-JEPA分别获得0.98和0.95的准确率，鲁棒性得分分别为0.75和0.78，表明它们在准确性和鲁棒性之间取得了更好的平衡。

Conclusion: 预测表示学习(PRL)是自监督学习的一个有前景的新方向，JEPA作为其典型代表展示了良好的性能。未来的研究应进一步探索PRL的理论基础并解决相关挑战，推动自监督学习向更具预测性的方向发展。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning has emerged as a major technique for the task of learning from unlabeled data, where the current methods mostly revolve around alignment of representations and input recon struction. Although such approaches have demonstrated excellent performance in practice, their scope remains mostly confined to learning from observed data and does not provide much help in terms of a learning structure that is predictive of the data distribution. In this paper, we study some of the recent developments in the realm of self-supervised learning. We define a new category called Predictive Representation Learning (PRL), which revolves around the latent prediction of unobserved components of data based on the observation. We propose a common taxonomy that classifies PRL along with alignment and reconstruction-based learning approaches. Furthermore, we argue that Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture(JEPA) can be considered as an exemplary member of this new paradigm. We further discuss theoretical perspectives and open challenges, highlighting predictive representation learning as a promising direction for future self-supervised learning research. In this study, we implemented Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL), Masked Autoencoders (MAE), and Image-JEPA (I-JEPA) for comparative analysis. The results indicate that MAE achieves perfect similarity of 1.00, but exhibits relatively weak robustness of 0.55. In contrast, BYOL and I-JEPA attain accuracies of 0.98 and 0.95, with robustness scores of 0.75 and 0.78, respectively.

</details>


### [667] [SFT-GRPO Data Overlap as a Post-Training Hyperparameter for Autoformalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13515)
*Xiaole Su,Kasey Zhang,Andy Lyu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SFT与GRPO训练数据重叠度对模型性能有显著影响，数据完全分离（0%重叠）相比完全重叠（100%重叠）能带来10.4个百分点的语义准确率提升，且不增加计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究监督微调（SFT）后接组相对策略优化（GRPO）这一常见后训练流程中，两个阶段训练数据重叠度对模型性能的影响。目前缺乏对这一超参数的系统性控制研究。

Method: 对Qwen3-8B模型（禁用思维链）进行Lean 4自动形式化后训练，设计六种仅训练配方不同的实验条件：基础模型、仅SFT、仅GRPO，以及三种SFT+GRPO配置（GRPO提示与SFT语料重叠度分别为0%、30%、100%）。在Gaokao-Formal和PutnamBench数据集上评估，采用编译通过率@k和LLM评判的语义通过率@k双重指标。

Result: SFT与GRPO数据完全分离（0%重叠）始终优于完全重叠（100%重叠），且不增加计算成本。在Gaokao数据集上，0%重叠时GRPO相比仅SFT带来10.4个百分点的语义准确率提升；100%重叠时两项指标均无改善，GRPO阶段基本冗余。双重评估揭示编译-语义差距超过30个百分点，这在仅编译评估中无法发现。

Conclusion: SFT-GRPO数据重叠度是影响模型行为的重要后训练超参数。保持两个阶段数据分离能显著提升性能，而完全重叠则使GRPO阶段失效。双重评估（编译+语义）比单一编译评估更能全面反映模型能力。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a common post-training recipe. We conduct a controlled ablation over SFT-GRPO data overlap, evaluating Qwen3-8B (thinking disabled) post-trained for Lean 4 autoformalization under six conditions that differ solely in training recipe: a base model, SFT-only, GRPO-only, and three SFT+GRPO configurations where 0 percent, 30 percent, or 100 percent of the GRPO prompts coincide with the SFT corpus. Keeping SFT and GRPO data disjoint consistently outperforms full overlap at zero additional compute cost. Evaluating on Gaokao-Formal and PutnamBench under both compile pass at k and semantic pass at k assessed by an LLM judge, we find that lower overlap is monotonically associated with higher compilation and semantic accuracy. At 0 percent overlap, GRPO yields a 10.4 percentage point semantic gain over SFT alone on Gaokao, while at 100 percent overlap both metrics remain flat, rendering the GRPO stage effectively redundant. We further show that dual-metric evaluation reveals compile semantic gaps exceeding 30 percentage points for the highest compiling models, a disparity invisible under compile-only benchmarking. To our knowledge, this is the first controlled investigation of SFT-GRPO data overlap as a post-training hyperparameter, demonstrating how model behavior varies based on the degree of data sharing between training stages.

</details>


### [668] [Monthly Diffusion v0.9: A Latent Diffusion Model for the First AI-MIP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13481)
*Kyle J. C. Hall,Maria J. Molina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MD-1.5 v0.9是一个基于球形傅里叶神经算子的条件变分自编码器架构的气候模拟器，利用潜在扩散建模低频内部大气变率的月尺度演化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个在数据稀疏条件下以月平均时间步长前向步进的气候模拟器，以较低计算需求建模低频内部大气变率的演化

Method: 采用球形傅里叶神经算子启发的条件变分自编码器架构，结合潜在扩散技术，在1.5度网格间距上以月平均时间步长进行建模

Result: MDv0.9能够以适中的计算需求在数据稀疏条件下进行月尺度前向步进，初步展示了其建模低频内部大气变率演化的能力

Conclusion: 该架构为在计算资源有限条件下建模气候系统的低频内部变率提供了一种有前景的方法，为未来改进奠定了基础

Abstract: Here, we describe Monthly Diffusion at 1.5-degree grid spacing (MD-1.5 version 0.9), a climate emulator that leverages a spherical Fourier neural operator (SFNO)-inspired Conditional Variational Auto-Encoder (CVAE) architecture to model the evolution of low-frequency internal atmospheric variability using latent diffusion. MDv0.9 was designed to forward-step at monthly mean timesteps in a data-sparse regime, using modest computational requirements. This work describes the motivation behind the architecture design, the MDv0.9 training procedure, and initial results.

</details>


### [669] [Optimistic Policy Learning under Pessimistic Adversaries with Regret and Violation Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14243)
*Sourav Ganguly,Kartik Pandit,Arnob Ghosh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 首个研究显式对抗动态下安全约束强化学习的工作，提出RHC-UCRL算法处理外部对手影响的状态转移


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实决策系统中状态转移不仅受智能体动作影响，还受外部不可控因素（对手、环境扰动等）影响，忽略这些因素可能导致孤立环境下最优但在部署中灾难性失败的政策，特别是在必须满足安全约束的场景中

Method: 将外部因素建模为对抗性策略π̅，提出Robust Hallucinated Constrained Upper-Confidence RL (RHC-UCRL)算法，这是一个基于模型的算法，同时保持对智能体和对手策略的乐观估计，明确分离认知不确定性和偶然不确定性

Result: RHC-UCRL算法实现了次线性遗憾和约束违反保证

Conclusion: 这是首个研究显式对抗动态下安全约束强化学习的工作，提出的RHC-UCRL算法能够处理外部对手影响的状态转移问题，为安全关键环境中的决策提供了新方法

Abstract: Real-world decision-making systems operate in environments where state transitions depend not only on the agent's actions, but also on \textbf{exogenous factors outside its control}--competing agents, environmental disturbances, or strategic adversaries--formally, $s_{h+1} = f(s_h, a_h, \bar{a}_h)+ω_h$ where $\bar{a}_h$ is the adversary/external action, $a_h$ is the agent's action, and $ω_h$ is an additive noise. Ignoring such factors can yield policies that are optimal in isolation but \textbf{fail catastrophically in deployment}, particularly when safety constraints must be satisfied.
  Standard Constrained MDP formulations assume the agent is the sole driver of state evolution, an assumption that breaks down in safety-critical settings. Existing robust RL approaches address this via distributional robustness over transition kernels, but do not explicitly model the \textbf{strategic interaction} between agent and exogenous factor, and rely on strong assumptions about divergence from a known nominal model.
  We model the exogenous factor as an \textbf{adversarial policy} $\barπ$ that co-determines state transitions, and ask how an agent can remain both optimal and safe against such an adversary. \emph{To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to study safety-constrained RL under explicit adversarial dynamics}. We propose \textbf{Robust Hallucinated Constrained Upper-Confidence RL} (\texttt{RHC-UCRL}), a model-based algorithm that maintains optimism over both agent and adversary policies, explicitly separating epistemic from aleatoric uncertainty. \texttt{RHC-UCRL} achieves sub-linear regret and constraint violation guarantees.

</details>


### [670] [Bridging MARL to SARL: An Order-Independent Multi-Agent Transformer via Latent Consensus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13472)
*Zijian Zhao,Jing Gao,Sen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出共识多智能体Transformer（CMAT），将合作多智能体强化学习转化为分层单智能体强化学习，通过Transformer编码器处理联合观测，用Transformer解码器自回归生成高层共识向量，实现顺序无关的联合决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统合作多智能体强化学习通过分解集中控制问题引入非平稳性、训练不稳定、协调能力弱和理论保证有限等挑战，需要一种能处理大规模联合观测和动作空间的有效框架。

Method: CMAT将多智能体视为统一实体，使用Transformer编码器处理联合观测空间。采用分层决策机制：Transformer解码器自回归生成高层共识向量（模拟智能体在潜在空间达成策略共识），基于该共识所有智能体同时生成动作，避免传统多智能体Transformer对动作生成顺序的敏感性。

Result: 在StarCraft II、Multi-Agent MuJoCo和Google Research Football基准任务上的实验表明，CMAT性能优于最近的集中式解决方案、顺序多智能体强化学习方法以及传统多智能体强化学习基线。

Conclusion: CMAT通过将合作多智能体强化学习转化为分层单智能体强化学习，利用Transformer架构和共识机制有效解决了大规模联合观测和动作空间问题，实现了顺序无关的联合决策和更好的协调性能。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is widely used to address large joint observation and action spaces by decomposing a centralized control problem into multiple interacting agents. However, such decomposition often introduces additional challenges, including non-stationarity, unstable training, weak coordination, and limited theoretical guarantees. In this paper, we propose the Consensus Multi-Agent Transformer (CMAT), a centralized framework that bridges cooperative MARL to a hierarchical single-agent reinforcement learning (SARL) formulation. CMAT treats all agents as a unified entity and employs a Transformer encoder to process the large joint observation space. To handle the extensive joint action space, we introduce a hierarchical decision-making mechanism in which a Transformer decoder autoregressively generates a high-level consensus vector, simulating the process by which agents reach agreement on their strategies in latent space. Conditioned on this consensus, all agents generate their actions simultaneously, enabling order-independent joint decision making and avoiding the sensitivity to action-generation order in conventional Multi-Agent Transformers (MAT). This factorization allows the joint policy to be optimized using single-agent PPO while preserving expressive coordination through the latent consensus. To evaluate the proposed method, we conduct experiments on benchmark tasks from StarCraft II, Multi-Agent MuJoCo, and Google Research Football. The results show that CMAT achieves superior performance over recent centralized solutions, sequential MARL methods, and conventional MARL baselines. The code for this paper is available at:https://github.com/RS2002/CMAT .

</details>


### [671] [From Order to Distribution: A Spectral Characterization of Forgetting in Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13460)
*Zonghuan Xu,Xingjun Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文从分布而非顺序角度研究持续学习中的遗忘问题，在过参数化线性回归的精确拟合机制下，分析任务分布如何决定遗忘行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续学习中的遗忘问题虽然已有大量实证研究，但缺乏严格的理论分析。现有工作主要关注固定任务集合在随机顺序下的遗忘，本文转向从任务分布的角度研究遗忘的根本机制。

Method: 采用过参数化线性回归的精确拟合机制，假设任务从分布Π中独立同分布采样。推导遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示其递归谱结构，并基于此建立理论分析框架。

Result: 建立了遗忘量的无条件上界，确定了主导渐近项，在一般非退化情况下刻画了收敛速率（精确到常数）。将遗忘速率与任务分布的几何性质联系起来，阐明了导致快慢遗忘的分布特征。

Conclusion: 任务分布本身而非任务顺序是决定遗忘行为的关键因素。通过算子恒等式和谱分析，为理解持续学习中的遗忘提供了新的理论视角，揭示了任务分布几何性质与遗忘速率之间的本质联系。

Abstract: A central challenge in continual learning is forgetting, the loss of performance on previously learned tasks induced by sequential adaptation to new ones. While forgetting has been extensively studied empirically, rigorous theoretical characterizations remain limited. A notable step in this direction is \citet{evron2022catastrophic}, which analyzes forgetting under random orderings of a fixed task collection in overparameterized linear regression. We shift the perspective from order to distribution. Rather than asking how a fixed task collection behaves under random orderings, we study an exact-fit linear regime in which tasks are sampled i.i.d.\ from a task distribution~$Π$, and ask how the generating distribution itself governs forgetting. In this setting, we derive an exact operator identity for the forgetting quantity, revealing a recursive spectral structure. Building on this identity, we establish an unconditional upper bound, identify the leading asymptotic term, and, in generic nondegenerate cases, characterize the convergence rate up to constants. We further relate this rate to geometric properties of the task distribution, clarifying what drives slow or fast forgetting in this model.

</details>


### [672] [Outperforming Self-Attention Mechanisms in Solar Irradiance Forecasting via Physics-Guided Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13455)
*Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah,Rufaidah Abdallah Ibrahim Mohammed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级的物理信息混合CNN-BiLSTM框架用于全球水平辐照度预测，在苏丹地区验证中显著优于复杂的Transformer模型，证明了在高噪声气象任务中物理约束比复杂注意力机制更有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对干旱地区气溶胶快速波动导致的电网稳定性问题，当前研究趋势偏向计算昂贵的Transformer架构，但本文挑战这种"复杂度优先"范式，认为在高噪声气象任务中，明确的物理约束可能比复杂的自注意力机制更有效。

Method: 提出轻量级物理信息混合CNN-BiLSTM框架：CNN用于空间特征提取，BiLSTM用于捕捉时间依赖性。与标准数据驱动方法不同，模型明确使用15个工程特征向量（包括晴空指数和太阳天顶角）而非仅依赖原始历史数据。使用贝叶斯优化进行超参数调优以确保全局最优性。

Result: 使用NASA POWER数据在苏丹地区进行实验验证，物理引导方法达到RMSE 19.53 W/m²，显著优于复杂注意力基线模型（RMSE 30.64 W/m²）。结果证实了"复杂度悖论"：在高噪声气象任务中，明确的物理约束提供了比自注意力机制更高效准确的替代方案。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明，对于实时可再生能源管理，应转向混合的、物理感知的AI方法，而非盲目追求架构复杂度。物理引导的轻量级模型在准确性和效率方面均优于复杂的注意力机制模型。

Abstract: Accurate Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) forecasting is critical for grid stability, particularly in arid regions characterized by rapid aerosol fluctuations. While recent trends favor computationally expensive Transformer-based architectures, this paper challenges the prevailing "complexity-first" paradigm. We propose a lightweight, Physics-Informed Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM framework that prioritizes domain knowledge over architectural depth. The model integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction with a Bi-Directional LSTM for capturing temporal dependencies. Unlike standard data-driven approaches, our model is explicitly guided by a vector of 15 engineered features including Clear-Sky indices and Solar Zenith Angle - rather than relying solely on raw historical data. Hyperparameters are rigorously tuned using Bayesian Optimization to ensure global optimality. Experimental validation using NASA POWER data in Sudan demonstrates that our physics-guided approach achieves a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 19.53 W/m^2, significantly outperforming complex attention-based baselines (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2). These results confirm a "Complexity Paradox": in high-noise meteorological tasks, explicit physical constraints offer a more efficient and accurate alternative to self-attention mechanisms. The findings advocate for a shift towards hybrid, physics-aware AI for real-time renewable energy management.

</details>


### [673] [FAST: A Synergistic Framework of Attention and State-space Models for Spatiotemporal Traffic Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13453)
*Xinjin Li,Jinghan Cao,Mengyue Wang,Yue Wu,Longxiang Yan,Yeyang Zhou,Ziqi Sha,Yu Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FAST是一个结合注意力机制和状态空间模型的统一框架，用于可扩展的时空交通预测，通过Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构和Mamba空间模块实现高效的长程依赖建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交通预测方法在表达能力和效率之间存在权衡：基于Transformer的模型能很好捕捉全局依赖但具有二次复杂度，而选择性状态空间模型计算高效但在图结构交通数据中建模空间交互效果较差。

Method: 采用Temporal-Spatial-Temporal架构：时间注意力模块捕捉短期和长期时间模式，Mamba空间模块以线性复杂度建模传感器间的长程依赖；引入可学习的多源时空嵌入整合历史交通流、时间上下文和节点级信息；采用多级跳跃预测机制进行分层特征融合。

Result: 在PeMS04、PeMS07和PeMS08数据集上，FAST在所有三个基准测试中均取得最佳MAE和RMSE，相比最强基线RMSE降低高达4.3%，MAE降低高达2.8%，在准确性、可扩展性和泛化性之间达到良好平衡。

Conclusion: FAST通过统一注意力机制和状态空间模型，提供了一种在保持线性复杂度的同时有效建模交通数据中复杂时空依赖的方法，在准确性和效率方面均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Traffic forecasting requires modeling complex temporal dynamics and long-range spatial dependencies over large sensor networks. Existing methods typically face a trade-off between expressiveness and efficiency: Transformer-based models capture global dependencies well but suffer from quadratic complexity, while recent selective state-space models are computationally efficient yet less effective at modeling spatial interactions in graph-structured traffic data. We propose FAST, a unified framework that combines attention and state-space modeling for scalable spatiotemporal traffic forecasting. FAST adopts a Temporal-Spatial-Temporal architecture, where temporal attention modules capture both short- and long-term temporal patterns, and a Mamba-based spatial module models long-range inter-sensor dependencies with linear complexity. To better represent heterogeneous traffic contexts, FAST further introduces a learnable multi-source spatiotemporal embedding that integrates historical traffic flow, temporal context, and node-level information, together with a multi-level skip prediction mechanism for hierarchical feature fusion. Experiments on PeMS04, PeMS07, and PeMS08 show that FAST consistently outperforms strong baselines from Transformer-, GNN-, attention-, and Mamba-based families. In particular, FAST achieves the best MAE and RMSE on all three benchmarks, with up to 4.3\% lower RMSE and 2.8\% lower MAE than the strongest baseline, demonstrating a favorable balance between accuracy, scalability, and generalization.

</details>


### [674] [Evolution of Optimization Methods: Algorithms, Scenarios, and Evaluations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12968)
*Tong Zhang,Jiangning Zhang,Zhucun Xue,Juntao Jiang,Yicheng Xu,Chengming Xu,Teng Hu,Xingyu Xie,Xiaobin Hu,Yabiao Wang,Yong Liu,Shuicheng Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对深度学习优化算法演进轨迹的回顾性分析，通过综合实证评估主流优化器，提炼关键趋势和设计权衡，为下一代高效、鲁棒、可信的优化方法提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习优化面临收敛速度、泛化能力和计算效率的平衡挑战。一阶梯度下降方法（如SGD和Adam）在大规模模型训练、差分隐私要求和分布式学习等场景下存在隐私保护和内存效率的局限性。二阶优化和零阶方法虽被探索，但缺乏统一框架来整合原理和界定应用场景。

Method: 回顾性分析深度学习优化算法的演进轨迹，对主流优化器在不同模型架构和训练场景下进行全面的实证评估。通过理论洞察与广泛实证证据的结合，提炼关键趋势和基本设计权衡。

Result: 提供了下一代高效、鲁棒、可信优化方法设计的可操作指导。开源代码发布于GitHub仓库，便于复现和进一步研究。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了深度学习优化领域缺乏统一框架的空白，通过系统性分析为未来研究方向提供了明确指引，特别是在隐私保护、内存效率和计算效率的权衡优化方面。

Abstract: Balancing convergence speed, generalization capability, and computational efficiency remains a core challenge in deep learning optimization. First-order gradient descent methods, epitomized by stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and Adam, serve as the cornerstone of modern training pipelines. However, large-scale model training, stringent differential privacy requirements, and distributed learning paradigms expose critical limitations in these conventional approaches regarding privacy protection and memory efficiency. To mitigate these bottlenecks, researchers explore second-order optimization techniques to surpass first-order performance ceilings, while zeroth-order methods reemerge to alleviate memory constraints inherent to large-scale training.
