Despite this proliferation of methodologies, the field lacks a cohesive framework that unifies underlying principles and delineates application scenarios for these disparate approaches. In this work, we retrospectively analyze the evolutionary trajectory of deep learning optimization algorithms and present a comprehensive empirical evaluation of mainstream optimizers across diverse model architectures and training scenarios. We distill key emerging trends and fundamental design trade-offs, pinpointing promising directions for future research. By synthesizing theoretical insights with extensive empirical evidence, we provide actionable guidance for designing next-generation highly efficient, robust, and trustworthy optimization methods. The code is available at https://github.com/APRIL-AIGC/Awesome-Optimizer.

</details>


### [675] [PriPG-RL: Privileged Planner-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Partially Observable Systems with Anytime-Feasible MPC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08036)
*Mohsen Amiri,Mohsen Amiri,Ali Beikmohammadi,Sindri Magnuśson,Mehdi Hosseinzadeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种在部分可观测环境下训练强化学习策略的方法，利用训练期间可用的特权规划器来指导学习智能体，通过知识蒸馏缓解部分可观测性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）中训练强化学习策略的挑战，其中学习智能体只能观测到真实状态的有损投影，而规划器智能体拥有特权状态信息和近似动力学模型。

Method: 1. 将问题形式化为POMDP，其中规划器智能体拥有近似动力学模型和特权状态信息，学习智能体只能观测有损状态投影。2. 引入随时可行的模型预测控制（MPC）算法作为规划器智能体。3. 提出Planner-to-Policy Soft Actor-Critic（P2P-SAC）方法，通过知识蒸馏将规划器的特权知识迁移给学习智能体。

Result: 1. 提供了严格的理论分析支持该框架。2. 在NVIDIA Isaac Lab仿真环境中验证了方法有效性。3. 成功在真实世界的Unitree Go2四足机器人上部署，实现了在复杂、障碍物丰富的环境中的导航任务。

Conclusion: 该方法通过利用训练期间可用的特权规划器指导学习智能体，有效缓解了部分可观测性问题，提高了样本效率和最终策略性能，并在仿真和真实机器人平台上得到了验证。

Abstract: This paper addresses the problem of training a reinforcement learning (RL) policy under partial observability by exploiting a privileged, anytime-feasible planner agent available exclusively during training. We formalize this as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) in which a planner agent with access to an approximate dynamical model and privileged state information guides a learning agent that observes only a lossy projection of the true state. To realize this framework, we introduce an anytime-feasible Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm that serves as the planner agent. For the learning agent, we propose Planner-to-Policy Soft Actor-Critic (P2P-SAC), a method that distills the planner agent's privileged knowledge to mitigate partial observability and thereby improve both sample efficiency and final policy performance. We support this framework with rigorous theoretical analysis. Finally, we validate our approach in simulation using NVIDIA Isaac Lab and successfully deploy it on a real-world Unitree Go2 quadruped navigating complex, obstacle-rich environments.

</details>


### [676] [WIN-U: Woodbury-Informed Newton-Unlearning as a retain-free Machine Unlearning Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13438)
*Xingjian Zhao,Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri,Malik Magdon-Ismail*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WIN-U：一种无需保留数据的遗忘学习框架，仅需原始完整数据训练模型的二阶信息，通过牛顿风格单步更新实现高效遗忘


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遗忘学习方法大多需要直接访问保留数据，这在隐私或成本限制下不切实际。需要开发无需保留数据的遗忘学习框架来解决LLM中的隐私问题，特别是数据"被遗忘权"的需求。

Method: WIN-U使用仅需原始完整数据训练模型二阶信息的框架。通过Woodbury矩阵恒等式和遗忘集曲率的广义高斯-牛顿近似，采用牛顿风格单步更新，恢复闭式线性解并作为黄金标准重新训练最优解的局部二阶近似。

Result: 在多种视觉和语言基准测试中，WIN-U在遗忘效率和效用保持方面达到SOTA性能，相比现有方法对重新学习攻击更具鲁棒性。重要的是，WIN-U不需要访问保留数据。

Conclusion: WIN-U提供了一种实用且高效的无需保留数据的遗忘学习解决方案，通过二阶信息近似实现了接近黄金标准重新训练的性能，为实际应用中的隐私保护提供了可行方法。

Abstract: Privacy concerns in LLMs have led to the rapidly growing need to enforce a data's "right to be forgotten". Machine unlearning addresses precisely this task, namely the removal of the influence of some specific data, i.e., the forget set, from a trained model. The gold standard for unlearning is to produce the model that would have been learned on only the rest of the training data, i.e., the retain set. Most existing unlearning methods rely on direct access to the retained data, which may not be practical due to privacy or cost constraints. We propose WIN-U, a retained-data free unlearning framework that requires only second order information for the originally trained model on the full data. The unlearning is performed using a single Newton-style step. Using the Woodbury matrix identity and a generalized Gauss-Newton approximation for the forget set curvature, the WIN-U update recovers the closed-form linear solution and serves as a local second-order approximation to the gold-standard retraining optimum. Extensive experiments on various vision and language benchmarks demonstrate that WIN-U achieves SOTA performance in terms of unlearning efficacy and utility preservation, while being more robust against relearning attacks compared to existing methods. Importantly, WIN-U does not require access to the retained data.

</details>


### [677] [Minimax Optimality and Spectral Routing for Majority-Vote Ensembles under Markov Dependence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13414)
*Ibne Farabi Shihab,Sanjeda Akter,Anuj Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究了在马尔可夫依赖数据下多数投票集成方法的性能退化问题，提出了最小最大风险下界和自适应谱路由算法，在多种场景下验证了理论预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当训练数据存在马尔可夫依赖性时（如时间序列预测、强化学习回放缓冲区和空间网格），传统的集成学习方差减少保证会退化，现有理论未能完全量化这种退化现象。

Method: 1. 建立固定维马尔可夫设置下离散分类的最小最大风险下界；2. 分析依赖无关的均匀装袋方法的次优性；3. 提出自适应谱路由算法，通过依赖图的经验Fiedler特征向量划分训练数据。

Result: 1. 证明了在平稳、可逆、几何遍历链中，任何可测估计器的超额分类风险下界为Ω(√(T_mix/n))；2. 均匀装袋方法存在√T_mix的算法差距；3. 自适应谱路由在图形正则子类上达到最小最大速率O(√(T_mix/n))。

Conclusion: 马尔可夫依赖性显著影响集成学习性能，自适应谱路由算法能够匹配最小最大速率，在合成马尔可夫链、2D空间网格、UCR数据集和Atari DQN集成中验证了理论预测，对深度强化学习目标方差、可扩展性和非平稳性有重要影响。

Abstract: Majority-vote ensembles achieve variance reduction by averaging over diverse, approximately independent base learners. When training data exhibits Markov dependence, as in time-series forecasting, reinforcement learning (RL) replay buffers, and spatial grids, this classical guarantee degrades in ways that existing theory does not fully quantify. We provide a minimax characterization of this phenomenon for discrete classification in a fixed-dimensional Markov setting, together with an adaptive algorithm that matches the rate on a graph-regular subclass. We first establish an information-theoretic lower bound for stationary, reversible, geometrically ergodic chains in fixed ambient dimension, showing that no measurable estimator can achieve excess classification risk better than $Ω(\sqrt{\Tmix/n})$. We then prove that, on the AR(1) witness subclass underlying the lower-bound construction, dependence-agnostic uniform bagging is provably suboptimal with excess risk bounded below by $Ω(\Tmix/\sqrt{n})$, exhibiting a $\sqrt{\Tmix}$ algorithmic gap. Finally, we propose \emph{adaptive spectral routing}, which partitions the training data via the empirical Fiedler eigenvector of a dependency graph and achieves the minimax rate $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{\Tmix/n})$ up to a lower-order geometric cut term on a graph-regular subclass, without knowledge of $\Tmix$. Experiments on synthetic Markov chains, 2D spatial grids, the 128-dataset UCR archive, and Atari DQN ensembles validate the theoretical predictions. Consequences for deep RL target variance, scalability via Nyström approximation, and bounded non-stationarity are developed as supporting material in the appendix.

</details>


### [678] [Dataset-Level Metrics Attenuate Non-Determinism: A Fine-Grained Non-Determinism Evaluation in Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13413)
*Zhengyu Fang,Zhimeng Jiang,Huiyuan Chen,Xiaoge Zhang,Tianyi Li,Kaiyu Tang,Xiao Li,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文指出扩散语言模型(DLMs)的非确定性行为评估存在局限，提出基于样本级预测差异的细粒度评估方法，并引入因子方差归因(FVA)来分解非确定性来源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM非确定性评估主要依赖数据集级指标和固定推理配置，无法揭示模型行为在不同运行和评估条件下的变化，特别是对于扩散语言模型，数据集级指标会通过聚合不同运行的样本级预测质量来系统性地减弱非确定性表现。

Method: 1) 进行基于样本级预测差异的细粒度非确定性评估，涵盖模型相关因素（引导尺度、扩散步数、蒙特卡洛采样）和系统相关因素（批大小、硬件、数值精度）；2) 引入因子方差归因(FVA)方法，通过跨因子分析将观察到的非确定性分解为可归因于不同评估因子设置的方差。

Result: 分析显示DLMs的非确定性是普遍存在且结构化的，代码生成对因子级选择的敏感性显著高于问答任务；具有相似聚合性能的配置在单个输入上可能表现出截然不同的行为，细粒度的不稳定性和不同的错误模式未被现有评估方法捕捉。

Conclusion: 需要进行细粒度的、因子感知的评估来实现对扩散语言模型非确定性的可靠评估，FVA方法能够有效归因非确定性来源，为理解DLMs的非确定性行为提供了更深入的见解。

Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for large language models (LLMs), yet the non-deterministic behavior of DLMs remains poorly understood. The existing non-determinism evaluations for LLMs predominantly rely on dataset-level metrics under fixed inference configurations, providing limited insight into how model behavior varies across runs and evaluation conditions. In this work, we show that dataset-level metrics systematically attenuate non-determinism in diffusion language models by aggregating sample-level prediction quality across different runs. As a result, configurations with similar aggregate performance can exhibit substantially different behaviors on individual inputs, leaving fine-grained instability and distinct error patterns uncharacterized. To address this limitation, we conduct a fine-grained evaluation of non-determinism based on sample-level prediction differences across a range of model-related factors-including guidance scale, diffusion steps, and Monte Carlo sampling-as well as system-related factors such as batch size, hardware, and numerical precision. Our analysis reveals that non-determinism in DLMs is pervasive and structured, with code generation exhibiting markedly higher sensitivity to factor-level choices than question answering. To attribute sources of non-determinism evaluation, we introduce Factor Variance Attribution (FVA), a cross-factor analysis metric that decomposes observed non-determinism into variance attributable to different evaluation factor settings. Our findings highlight the need for fine-grained, factor-aware evaluation to enable reliable non-determinism assessment of diffusion language models.

</details>


### [679] [Linear Probe Accuracy Scales with Model Size and Benefits from Multi-Layer Ensembling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13386)
*Erik Nordby,Tasha Pais,Aviel Parrack*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 多层级探针集成显著提升语言模型欺骗检测性能，单层探针脆弱而多层集成稳健，检测准确率随模型规模增加而提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性探针可用于检测语言模型输出其"知道"错误的内容（涉及欺骗和奖励攻击），但单层探针存在脆弱性问题：最佳检测层因模型和任务而异，且在某些欺骗类型上完全失效

Method: 将多个层的探针组合成集成探针，通过几何分析发现欺骗方向在层间逐渐旋转而非出现在单一位置，解释了单层探针脆弱性和多层集成成功的原因

Result: 多层集成探针在单层探针失效的情况下仍能恢复强性能：在Insider Trading任务上AUROC提升+29%，在Harm-Pressure Knowledge任务上提升+78%；在12个模型（0.5B-176B参数）上，探针准确率随规模增加：约每10倍参数AUROC提升5%（R=0.81）

Conclusion: 欺骗检测需要多层集成方法而非单层探针，因为欺骗方向在模型层间逐渐旋转；模型规模越大，欺骗检测能力越强，这对理解语言模型的内部表征和检测欺骗行为具有重要意义

Abstract: Linear probes can detect when language models produce outputs they "know" are wrong, a capability relevant to both deception and reward hacking. However, single-layer probes are fragile: the best layer varies across models and tasks, and probes fail entirely on some deception types. We show that combining probes from multiple layers into an ensemble recovers strong performance even where single-layer probes fail, improving AUROC by +29% on Insider Trading and +78% on Harm-Pressure Knowledge. Across 12 models (0.5B--176B parameters), we find probe accuracy improves with scale: ~5% AUROC per 10x parameters (R=0.81). Geometrically, deception directions rotate gradually across layers rather than appearing at one location, explaining both why single-layer probes are brittle and why multi-layer ensembles succeed.

</details>


### [680] [TOPCELL: Topology Optimization of Standard Cell via LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14237)
*Zhan Song,Yu-Tung Liu,Chen Chen,Guoheng Sun,Jiaqi Yin,Chia-tung Ho,Ang Li,Haoxing Ren,Cunxi Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TOPCELL是一个基于大语言模型的晶体管拓扑优化框架，将高维拓扑探索重新定义为生成任务，在先进工艺节点中显著提升标准单元设计效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电路复杂度在先进工艺节点中的增加，传统的穷举搜索方法在晶体管拓扑优化中变得计算不可行，这成为标准单元设计的瓶颈，需要一种可扩展的解决方案。

Method: 提出TOPCELL框架，将高维拓扑探索重新定义为生成任务，使用大语言模型进行拓扑生成，并采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）来微调模型，使其策略符合逻辑（电路）和空间（布局）约束。

Result: 在面向先进2nm工艺节点的工业流程中，TOPCELL显著优于基础模型，能够发现可布线的、物理感知的拓扑结构。在7nm库生成任务中，TOPCELL展示了强大的零样本泛化能力，匹配了穷举求解器的布局质量，同时实现了85.91倍的加速。

Conclusion: TOPCELL是一个新颖且可扩展的框架，通过将拓扑优化重新定义为生成任务并利用大语言模型，有效解决了传统方法在先进工艺节点中的计算瓶颈问题，为自动化标准单元设计提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Transistor topology optimization is a critical step in standard cell design, directly dictating diffusion sharing efficiency and downstream routability. However, identifying optimal topologies remains a persistent bottleneck, as conventional exhaustive search methods become computationally intractable with increasing circuit complexity in advanced nodes. This paper introduces TOPCELL, a novel and scalable framework that reformulates high-dimensional topology exploration as a generative task using Large Language Models (LLMs). We employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to fine-tune the model, aligning its topology optimization strategy with logical (circuit) and spatial (layout) constraints. Experimental results within an industrial flow targeting an advanced 2nm technology node demonstrate that TOPCELL significantly outperforms foundation models in discovering routable, physically-aware topologies. When integrated into a state-of-the-art (SOTA) automation flow for a 7nm library generation task, TOPCELL exhibits robust zero-shot generalization and matches the layout quality of exhaustive solvers while achieving an 85.91x speedup.

</details>


### [681] [When Less Latent Leads to Better Relay: Information-Preserving Compression for Latent Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13349)
*Yiping Li,Zhiyu An,Wan Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出正交回填(OBF)方法，通过KV缓存压缩减少LLM多智能体系统的通信开销，在保持性能的同时显著降低通信成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM多智能体系统中，基于完整KV缓存的通信（如LatentMAS）虽然能保留丰富上下文，但存在高内存和通信成本问题，需要更高效的压缩方法。

Method: 采用驱逐式KV压缩，并引入正交回填(OBF)技术，将丢弃KV状态的低秩正交残差注入保留的KV状态中，以减轻硬驱逐造成的信息损失。

Result: 在数学推理、编码和知识密集型QA等9个标准基准测试中，OBF方法在减少79.8%-89.4%通信成本的同时，性能与完整KV中继相当，并在7个基准上取得最佳结果。

Conclusion: 更多信息不一定带来更好的通信效果，保留最有用的信息更为重要；正交回填方法在显著降低通信成本的同时保持甚至提升了多智能体系统的性能。

Abstract: Communication in Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems is moving beyond discrete tokens to preserve richer context. Recent work such as LatentMAS enables agents to exchange latent messages through full key-value (KV) caches. However, full KV relay incurs high memory and communication cost. We adapt eviction-style KV compression to this setting and introduce Orthogonal Backfill (OBF) to mitigate information loss from hard eviction. OBF injects a low-rank orthogonal residual from discarded KV states into the retained KV states. We evaluate proposed method against full KV relay on nine standard benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, coding, and knowledge-intensive QA. It achieves performance comparable to full KV relay while reducing communication cost by 79.8%--89.4%. OBF further improves the performance and achieves the best results on 7 of the 9 benchmarks. This suggests that more information does not necessarily lead to better communication; preserving the most useful information matters more. Our codebase is publicly available on https://github.com/markli404/When-Less-Latent-Leads-to-Better-Relay.

</details>


### [682] [Selecting Feature Interactions for Generalized Additive Models by Distilling Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13332)
*Jingyun Jia,Chandan Singh,Rich Caruana,Ben Lengerich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabDistill利用表格基础模型和事后蒸馏方法自动发现特征交互，提升广义加性模型的预测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统广义加性模型依赖启发式方法选择特征交互，可能遗漏高阶或上下文依赖的交互效应，需要更有效的数据驱动方法

Method: TabDistill方法：1) 在数据集上拟合表格基础模型；2) 应用事后交互归因方法提取显著特征交互；3) 将这些交互作为广义加性模型的项进行评估

Result: TabDistill识别的交互在不同任务中都能持续提升下游广义加性模型的预测性能

Conclusion: 表格基础模型可以作为有效的、数据驱动的交互发现指南，桥接高容量模型和可解释的加性框架

Abstract: Identifying meaningful feature interactions is a central challenge in building accurate and interpretable models for tabular data. Generalized additive models (GAMs) have shown great success at modeling tabular data, but often rely on heuristic procedures to select interactions, potentially missing higher-order or context-dependent effects. To meet this challenge, we propose TabDistill, a method that leverages tabular foundation models and post-hoc distillation methods. Our key intuition is that tabular foundation models implicitly learn rich, adaptive feature dependencies through large-scale representation learning. Given a dataset, TabDistill first fits a tabular foundation model to the dataset, and then applies a post-hoc interaction attribution method to extract salient feature interactions from it. We evaluate these interactions by then using them as terms in a GAM. Across tasks, we find that interactions identified by TabDistill lead to consistent improvements in downstream GAMs' predictive performance. Our results suggest that tabular foundation models can serve as effective, data-driven guides for interaction discovery, bridging high-capacity models and interpretable additive frameworks.

</details>


### [683] [Multi-Task LLM with LoRA Fine-Tuning for Automated Cancer Staging and Biomarker Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13328)
*Jiahao Shao,Anam Nawaz Khan,Christopher Brett,Tom Berg,Xueping Li,Bing Yao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种参数高效的多任务框架，用于从病理报告中自动提取TNM分期、组织学分级和生物标志物信息，通过LoRA微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器，在10,677份专家验证报告上实现了0.976的Macro F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理报告是乳腺癌分期的权威记录，但其非结构化格式阻碍了大规模数据整理。虽然大型语言模型(LLMs)具备语义推理能力，但高计算成本和幻觉风险限制了其部署。需要一种参数高效、可靠的方法来自动化提取关键临床信息。

Method: 研究采用参数高效的多任务框架：1) 使用Low-Rank Adaptation(LoRA)在10,677份专家验证的病理报告上微调Llama-3-8B-Instruct编码器；2) 采用并行分类头架构而非生成式方法，强制保持模式一致性；3) 多任务学习同时提取TNM分期、组织学分级和生物标志物。

Result: 模型在Macro F1分数上达到0.976，成功解决了传统提取方法难以处理的复杂上下文歧义和异质报告格式问题。相比基于规则的NLP流水线、零样本LLMs和单任务LLM基线，该方法表现更优。

Conclusion: 提出的适配器高效多任务架构能够实现可靠、可扩展的病理衍生癌症分期和生物标志物分析，有潜力增强临床决策支持并加速数据驱动的肿瘤学研究，同时解决了LLMs部署中的计算成本和幻觉风险问题。

Abstract: Pathology reports serve as the definitive record for breast cancer staging, yet their unstructured format impedes large-scale data curation. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer semantic reasoning, their deployment is often limited by high computational costs and hallucination risks. This study introduces a parameter-efficient, multi-task framework for automating the extraction of Tumor-Node-Metastasis (TNM) staging, histologic grade, and biomarkers. We fine-tune a Llama-3-8B-Instruct encoder using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on a curated, expert-verified dataset of 10,677 reports. Unlike generative approaches, our architecture utilizes parallel classification heads to enforce consistent schema adherence. Experimental results demonstrate that the model achieves a Macro F1 score of 0.976, successfully resolving complex contextual ambiguities and heterogeneous reporting formats that challenge traditional extraction methods including rule-based natural language processing (NLP) pipelines, zero-shot LLMs, and single-task LLM baselines. The proposed adapter-efficient, multi-task architecture enables reliable, scalable pathology-derived cancer staging and biomarker profiling, with the potential to enhance clinical decision support and accelerate data-driven oncology research.

</details>


### [684] [Concrete Jungle: Towards Concreteness Paved Contrastive Negative Mining for Compositional Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13313)
*Eun Woo Im,Dhruv Madhwal,Vivek Gupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出Slipform框架，通过ConcretePlant基于词汇具体性生成有效负样本，结合Cement损失解决梯度不平衡问题，显著提升视觉语言模型的组合推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在组合推理方面存在局限，特别是在词序和属性绑定方面表现脆弱。这种限制源于对比预训练中缺乏能够区分细微语义变化的有效负样本。现有硬负样本挖掘方法缺乏明确的机制来指导哪些语言元素需要修改。

Method: 1. 提出词汇具体性作为负样本有效性的基本决定因素，修改高度具体的术语能产生更显著的结构和视觉差异；2. 开发ConcretePlant系统，基于心理语言学评分隔离和操作感知基础概念；3. 分析InfoNCE损失发现严重的梯度不平衡问题，提出Cement损失，采用基于边界的方法动态校准训练对的惩罚。

Result: 综合评估验证了理论主张。集成框架Slipform在多样化的组合评估基准、通用跨模态检索、单标签和多标签线性探测任务中实现了最先进的准确性。

Conclusion: 词汇具体性是生成有效负样本的关键因素，结合Cement损失解决梯度不平衡问题，Slipform框架显著提升了视觉语言模型的组合推理能力，为改进对比学习提供了系统性的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language Models demonstrate remarkable capabilities but often struggle with compositional reasoning, exhibiting vulnerabilities regarding word order and attribute binding. This limitation arises from a scarcity of informative samples needed to differentiate subtle semantic variations during contrastive pretraining. Although hard negative mining offers a promising remedy, existing methods lack explicit mechanisms to dictate which linguistic elements undergo modification. Instead of engineering generative architectures, this study establishes lexical concreteness as a fundamental determinant of negative sample efficacy. Modifying highly concrete terms generates more pronounced structural and visual discrepancies, providing a substantially stronger learning signal. Leveraging this principle, ConcretePlant is proposed to systematically isolate and manipulate perceptually grounded concepts. Analyses of the InfoNCE further reveals a severe gradient imbalance, where easily distinguishable pairs disproportionately overwhelm the optimization process and restrict the bandwidth available for nuanced learning. To resolve this degradation, the Cement loss is formulated utilizing a margin-based approach. By correlating psycholinguistic scores with sample difficulty, this objective dynamically calibrates the penalization applied to individual training pairs. Comprehensive evaluations substantiate these theoretical claims. The integrated framework, designated as Slipform, achieves state-of-the-art accuracy across diverse compositional evaluation benchmarks, general cross-modal retrieval, single and multi label linear probing.

</details>


### [685] [Some Theoretical Limitations of t-SNE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13295)
*Rupert Li,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了t-SNE降维技术如何丢失数据重要特征，通过数学框架在不同场景下证明t-SNE会损失数据的关键信息


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: t-SNE作为流行的降维和可视化技术，虽然广泛应用，但所有降维技术都可能丢失数据的重要特征。本文旨在通过数学分析揭示t-SNE在何种情况下以及如何丢失数据的关键信息

Method: 建立数学框架，在不同场景下分析t-SNE的特性，通过理论证明展示t-SNE如何损失数据的重要特征

Result: 证明了t-SNE在不同情况下会丢失数据的重要特征，具体展示了哪些类型的信息会在降维过程中被损失

Conclusion: t-SNE作为降维技术确实会丢失数据的重要特征，研究提供了理解这种信息损失的数学框架，有助于用户更谨慎地使用t-SNE并理解其局限性

Abstract: t-SNE has gained popularity as a dimension reduction technique, especially for visualizing data. It is well-known that all dimension reduction techniques may lose important features of the data. We provide a mathematical framework for understanding this loss for t-SNE by establishing a number of results in different scenarios showing how important features of data are lost by using t-SNE.

</details>


### [686] [MOONSHOT : A Framework for Multi-Objective Pruning of Vision and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13287)
*Gabriel Afriat,Xiang Meng,Shibal Ibrahim,Hussein Hazimeh,Rahul Mazumder*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MOONSHOT是一个通用的后训练单次剪枝框架，通过联合优化层重建误差和训练损失的二阶泰勒近似，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标优化，显著提升各种模型在不同稀疏度下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有后训练单次剪枝方法通常只优化单一目标（层重建损失或训练损失二阶近似），但研究发现这两种目标在不同架构和稀疏度下效果不一致，没有一种能始终保持最优。因此需要一种能同时利用两种目标优势的灵活框架。

Method: MOONSHOT作为现有剪枝算法的包装器，将单目标剪枝方法扩展为多目标优化，联合优化层重建误差和训练损失的二阶泰勒近似。为实现可扩展性，提出了高效计算逆Hessian矩阵的方法，保持了最先进单次剪枝器的效率。

Result: 在Llama-3.2和Llama-2模型上，MOONSHOT在2:4稀疏度下将C4困惑度降低32.6%，在七个分类基准测试中零样本平均准确率提升4.9个百分点。在Vision Transformers上，70%稀疏度下ImageNet-1k准确率提升超过5个百分点；在ResNet-50上，90%稀疏度下准确率提升4个百分点。

Conclusion: MOONSHOT通过多目标优化框架有效结合了层重建和二阶泰勒近似的优势，在各种模型架构和稀疏度下都显著提升了后训练单次剪枝的性能，同时保持了计算效率，可扩展到十亿参数模型。

Abstract: Weight pruning is a common technique for compressing large neural networks. We focus on the challenging post-training one-shot setting, where a pre-trained model is compressed without any retraining. Existing one-shot pruning methods typically optimize a single objective, such as a layer-wise reconstruction loss or a second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. We highlight that neither objective alone is consistently the most effective across architectures and sparsity levels. Motivated by this insight, we propose MOONSHOT, a general and flexible framework that extends any single-objective pruning method into a multi-objective formulation by jointly optimizing both the layer-wise reconstruction error and second-order Taylor approximation of the training loss. MOONSHOT acts as a wrapper around existing pruning algorithms. To enable this integration while maintaining scalability to billion-parameter models, we propose modeling decisions and introduce an efficient procedure for computing the inverse Hessian, preserving the efficiency of state-of-the-art one-shot pruners. When combined with state-of-the-art pruning methods on Llama-3.2 and Llama-2 models, MOONSHOT reduces C4 perplexity by up to 32.6% at 2:4 sparsity and improves zero-shot mean accuracy across seven classification benchmarks by up to 4.9 points. On Vision Transformers, it improves accuracy on ImageNet-1k by over 5 points at 70% sparsity, and on ResNet-50, it yields a 4-point gain at 90% sparsity.

</details>


### [687] [Enhancing Confidence Estimation in Telco LLMs via Twin-Pass CoT-Ensembling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13271)
*Anton Saenko,Pranshav Gajjar,Abiodun Ganiyu,Vijay K. Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对电信领域大语言模型置信度校准问题，提出双通道思维链集成方法，显著降低预期校准误差，提升模型自我评估可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在电信领域应用日益广泛，但生成的置信度分数存在系统性偏差和不可靠性，经常表现出过度自信。缺乏可信的自我评估使得难以验证模型输出并在实践中安全依赖。

Method: 提出新颖的双通道思维链集成方法，通过利用多个独立推理评估并将其评估聚合为校准后的置信度分数来改进置信度估计。使用Gemma-3模型家族（4B、12B和27B参数）在TeleQnA、ORANBench和srsRANBench基准上进行评估。

Result: 标准单通道口头化置信度估计无法反映真实正确性，常为错误预测分配高置信度。提出的方法将预期校准误差降低高达88%，显著提高了模型自我评估的可靠性。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了当前置信度估计实践的局限性，并展示了在电信领域实现更可信赖的大语言模型输出评估的实用路径。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to complex telecommunications tasks, including 3GPP specification analysis and O-RAN network troubleshooting. However, a critical limitation remains: LLM-generated confidence scores are often biased and unreliable, frequently exhibiting systematic overconfidence. This lack of trustworthy self-assessment makes it difficult to verify model outputs and safely rely on them in practice. In this paper, we study confidence calibration in telecom-domain LLMs using the representative Gemma-3 model family (4B, 12B, and 27B parameters), evaluated on TeleQnA, ORANBench, and srsRANBench. We show that standard single-pass, verbalized confidence estimates fail to reflect true correctness, often assigning high confidence to incorrect predictions. To address this, we propose a novel Twin-Pass Chain of Thought (CoT)-Ensembling methodology for improving confidence estimation by leveraging multiple independent reasoning evaluations and aggregating their assessments into a calibrated confidence score. Our approach reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) by up to 88% across benchmarks, significantly improving the reliability of model self-assessment. These results highlight the limitations of current confidence estimation practices and demonstrate a practical path toward more trustworthy evaluation of LLM outputs in telecommunications.

</details>


### [688] [Binomial Gradient-Based Meta-Learning for Enhanced Meta-Gradient Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13263)
*Yilang Zhang,Abraham Jaeger Mountain,Bingcong Li,Georgios B. Giannakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于二项式展开的梯度元学习(BinomGBML)，通过截断二项式展开估计元梯度，在MAML框架下实现更准确高效的元学习


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于梯度的元学习方法(GBML)计算开销大，随梯度下降步骤数线性增长；现有截断反向传播方法近似元梯度存在较大误差，需要更准确高效的元梯度估计方法

Method: 提出二项式GBML(BinomGBML)，使用截断二项式展开进行元梯度估计，通过高效并行计算在元梯度估计中融入更多信息；应用于模型无关元学习(MAML)得到BinomMAML

Result: 理论证明BinomMAML的误差界优于现有方法，在温和条件下呈超指数衰减；数值实验验证理论分析，展示性能提升且计算开销仅略微增加

Conclusion: BinomGBML通过二项式展开提供更准确的元梯度估计，在保持计算效率的同时提升元学习性能，为梯度元学习提供了新的高效范式

Abstract: Meta-learning offers a principled framework leveraging \emph{task-invariant} priors from related tasks, with which \emph{task-specific} models can be fine-tuned on downstream tasks, even with limited data records. Gradient-based meta-learning (GBML) relies on gradient descent (GD) to adapt the prior to a new task. Albeit effective, these methods incur high computational overhead that scales linearly with the number of GD steps. To enhance efficiency and scalability, existing methods approximate the gradient of prior parameters (meta-gradient) via truncated backpropagation, yet suffer large approximation errors. Targeting accurate approximation, this work puts forth binomial GBML (BinomGBML), which relies on a truncated binomial expansion for meta-gradient estimation. This novel expansion endows more information in the meta-gradient estimation via efficient parallel computation. As a running paradigm applied to model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML), the resultant BinomMAML provably enjoys error bounds that not only improve upon existing approaches, but also decay super-exponentially under mild conditions. Numerical tests corroborate the theoretical analysis and showcase boosted performance with slightly increased computational overhead.

</details>


### [689] [Information-Theoretic Optimization for Task-Adapted Compressed Sensing Magnetic Resonance Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12709)
*Xinyu Peng,Ziyang Zheng,Wenrui Dai,Duoduo Xue,Shaohui Li,Chenglin Li,Junni Zou,Hongkai Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出首个基于信息论的临床任务自适应压缩感知MRI框架，通过最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务间的互信息，实现不确定性预测和任意采样比控制，支持联合重建与任务、以及隐私保护的任务执行两种临床场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有任务自适应CS-MRI方法存在医学诊断的不确定性问题，且无法在端到端优化中实现自适应采样。需要从信息论角度解决不确定性预测和任意采样比适应问题。

Method: 将任务自适应CS-MRI形式化为最大化欠采样k空间测量与临床任务间的互信息优化问题。利用摊销优化构建互信息的可处理变分边界，联合优化采样、重建和任务推理模型。支持单一模型灵活控制采样比，并统一处理两种临床场景：1)联合任务与重建；2)隐私保护的任务执行。

Result: 在大规模MRI数据集上的实验表明，该框架在Dice等标准指标上达到高度竞争力，同时通过广义能量距离(GED)测量显示能更好地匹配真实后验分布。

Conclusion: 提出的信息论框架首次解决了任务自适应CS-MRI的不确定性问题和任意采样比适应问题，为临床任务提供了概率推理能力，支持多种应用场景。

Abstract: Task-adapted compressed sensing magnetic resonance imaging (CS-MRI) is emerging to address the specific demands of downstream clinical tasks with significantly fewer k-space measurements than required by Nyquist sampling. However, existing task-adapted CS-MRI methods suffer from the uncertainty problem for medical diagnosis and cannot achieve adaptive sampling in end-to-end optimization with reconstruction or clinical tasks. To address these limitations, we propose the first task-adapted CS-MRI from the information-theoretic perspective to simultaneously achieve probabilistic inference for uncertainty prediction and adapt to arbitrary sampling ratios and versatile clinical applications. Specifically, we formalize the task-adapted CS-MRI optimization problem by maximizing the mutual information between undersampled k-space measurements and clinical tasks to enable probabilistic inference for addressing the uncertainty problem. We leverage amortized optimization and construct tractable variational bounds for mutual information to jointly optimize sampling, reconstruction, and task-inference models, which enables flexible sampling ratio control using a single end-to-end trained model. Furthermore, the proposed framework addresses two kinds of distinct clinical scenarios within a unified approach, i.e., i) joint task and reconstruction, where reconstruction serves as an auxiliary process to enhance task performance; and ii) task implementation with suppressed reconstruction, applicable for privacy protection. Extensive experiments on large-scale MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves highly competitive performance on standard metrics like Dice compared to deterministic counterpart but provides better distribution matching to the ground-truth posterior distribution as measured by the generalized energy distance (GED).

</details>


### [690] [Counterfactual Peptide Editing for Causal TCR--pMHC Binding Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13256)
*Sanjar Khudoyberdiev,Arman Bekov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CIP框架解决TCR-pMHC结合预测中的捷径学习问题，通过生成反事实肽编辑并强制非锚点位置不变性和锚点位置敏感性，显著提升模型在分布外场景下的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经模型预测TCR-pMHC结合时容易陷入捷径学习，利用训练数据中的虚假相关性（如肽长度偏差或V基因共现）而非真实的物理结合界面，导致在家族保留和距离感知评估中预测脆弱。

Method: 提出反事实不变预测（CIP）训练框架：1）生成生物约束的反事实肽编辑；2）强制非锚点位置编辑的不变性；3）增强锚点残基编辑的敏感性。包含两个辅助目标：不变性损失惩罚非锚点保守替换的预测变化，对比性损失鼓励锚点位置破坏的大预测变化。

Result: 在VDJdb-IEDB基准测试中，CIP在家族保留协议下达到AUROC 0.831和反事实一致性（CFC）0.724，相对于无约束基线减少了39.7%的捷径指数。消融实验确认锚点感知编辑生成是分布外增益的主要驱动力。

Conclusion: CIP框架通过反事实不变性约束有效缓解捷径学习问题，为基于因果基础的TCR特异性建模提供了实用方案，显著提升模型在具有挑战性的分布外评估中的性能。

Abstract: Neural models for TCR-pMHC binding prediction are susceptible to shortcut learning: they exploit spurious correlations in training data -- such as peptide length bias or V-gene co-occurrence -- rather than the physical binding interface. This renders predictions brittle under family-held-out and distance-aware evaluation, where such shortcuts do not transfer. We introduce \emph{Counterfactual Invariant Prediction} (CIP), a training framework that generates biologically constrained counterfactual peptide edits and enforces invariance to edits at non-anchor positions while amplifying sensitivity at MHC anchor residues. CIP augments the base classifier with two auxiliary objectives: (1) an invariance loss penalizing prediction changes under conservative non-anchor substitutions, and (2) a contrastive loss encouraging large prediction changes under anchor-position disruptions. Evaluated on a curated VDJdb-IEDB benchmark under family-held-out, distance-aware, and random splits, CIP achieves AUROC 0.831 and counterfactual consistency (CFC) 0.724 under the challenging family-held-out protocol -- a 39.7\% reduction in shortcut index relative to the unconstrained baseline. Ablations confirm that anchor-aware edit generation is the dominant driver of OOD gains, providing a practical recipe for causally-grounded TCR specificity modeling.

</details>


### [691] [Bias-Corrected Adaptive Conformal Inference for Multi-Horizon Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13253)
*Ankit Lade,Sai Krishna J.,Indar Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BC-ACI通过在线偏差估计和校正机制，在保持覆盖保证的同时显著提升了自适应共形推理在分布漂移下的预测区间效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准ACI仅调整分位数阈值，无法校正区间中心，当基础预测器在分布漂移后产生持续偏差时，只能通过对称加宽区间来补偿，导致不必要的保守预测区间

Method: 提出偏差校正ACI（BC-ACI），在标准ACI基础上增加在线指数加权移动平均（EWMA）偏差估计，在校正非共形分数后再计算分位数，并重新中心化预测区间；引入自适应死区阈值抑制噪声级别的偏差校正

Result: 在688次实验（2个基础模型×4个合成机制×3个真实数据集）中，BC-ACI在均值和复合分布漂移下将Winkler区间分数降低13-17%（Wilcoxon p<0.001），在平稳数据上保持等效性能（比率1.002x）

Conclusion: BC-ACI通过直接解决预测偏差的根本原因而非症状，显著提升了自适应共形推理在分布漂移下的效率，同时保持了渐近覆盖保证

Abstract: Adaptive Conformal Inference (ACI) provides distribution-free prediction intervals with asymptotic coverage guarantees for time series under distribution shift. However, ACI only adapts the quantile threshold -- it cannot shift the interval center. When a base forecaster develops persistent bias after a regime change, ACI compensates by widening intervals symmetrically, producing unnecessarily conservative bands. We propose Bias-Corrected ACI (BC-ACI), which augments standard ACI with an online exponentially weighted moving average (EWM) estimate of forecast bias. BC-ACI corrects nonconformity scores before quantile computation and re-centers prediction intervals, addressing the root cause of miscalibration rather than its symptom. An adaptive dead-zone threshold suppresses corrections when estimated bias is indistinguishable from noise, ensuring no degradation on well-calibrated data. In controlled experiments across 688 runs spanning two base models, four synthetic regimes, and three real datasets, BC-ACI reduces Winkler interval scores by 13--17% under mean and compound distribution shifts (Wilcoxon p < 0.001) while maintaining equivalent performance on stationary data (ratio 1.002x). We provide finite-sample analysis showing that coverage guarantees degrade gracefully with bias estimation error.

</details>


### [692] [Out of Context: Reliability in Multimodal Anomaly Detection Requires Contextual Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13252)
*Kevin Wilkinghoff,Neelu Madan,Juan Miguel Valverde,Kamal Nasrollahi,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Rafal Wisniewski,Thomas B. Moeslund,Wenwu Wang,Zheng-Hua Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，强调异常是上下文相关的，需要区分上下文模态和观测模态，而非使用单一全局参考分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统异常检测方法假设正常行为可由单一无条件参考分布捕获，但在动态异构环境中，异常通常是上下文相关的。现有多模态方法平等对待所有数据流，未能区分上下文信息和异常相关信号，导致结构模糊性和不可靠的异常评估。

Method: 提出将多模态异常检测重构为跨模态上下文推理问题，其中模态扮演不对称角色：分离上下文与观测。通过条件建模而非全局参考分布来定义异常性，明确考虑操作条件对异常判断的影响。

Result: 论文提出了概念框架而非具体算法结果，但论证了这种视角转变对模型设计、评估协议和基准构建的重要影响，为构建鲁棒、上下文感知的多模态异常检测系统奠定了基础。

Conclusion: 异常检测需要从单一全局参考范式转向条件上下文感知范式。多模态系统应利用模态不对称性区分上下文和观测，通过跨模态推理实现更准确、稳定的异常检测，这代表了该领域的重要研究方向转变。

Abstract: Anomaly detection aims to identify observations that deviate from expected behavior. Because anomalous events are inherently sparse, most frameworks are trained exclusively on normal data to learn a single reference model of normality. This implicitly assumes that normal behavior can be captured by a single, unconditional reference distribution. In practice, however, anomalies are often context-dependent: A specific observation may be normal under one operating condition, yet anomalous under another. As machine learning systems are deployed in dynamic and heterogeneous environments, these fixed-context assumptions introduce structural ambiguity, i.e., the inability to distinguish contextual variation from genuine abnormality under marginal modeling, leading to unstable performance and unreliable anomaly assessments. While modern sensing systems frequently collect multimodal data capturing complementary aspects of both system behavior and operating conditions, existing methods treat all data streams equally, without distinguishing contextual information from anomaly-relevant signals. As a result, abnormality is often evaluated without explicitly conditioning on operating conditions. We argue that multimodal anomaly detection should be reframed as a cross-modal contextual inference problem, in which modalities play asymmetric roles, separating context from observation, to define abnormality conditionally rather than relative to a single global reference. This perspective has implications for model design, evaluation protocols, and benchmark construction, and outline open research challenges toward robust, context-aware multimodal anomaly detection.

</details>


### [693] [Analog Optical Inference on Million-Record Mortgage Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13251)
*Sofia Berloff,Pavel Koptev,Konstantin Malkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次将模拟光学计算机应用于大规模现实世界金融分类任务（抵押贷款审批），识别了三种准确率损失来源：编码限制、架构限制和硬件保真度，发现编码是主要瓶颈而硬件非理想性影响可忽略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管模拟光学计算机在机器学习推理方面具有高效能潜力，但先前研究仅限于小规模图像基准测试。本研究旨在评估其在真实世界大规模金融分类任务中的性能，并系统分析准确率损失的根本原因。

Method: 使用美国HMDA的584万条抵押贷款记录进行抵押贷款审批分类任务，构建模拟光学计算机数字孪生模型。对比XGBoost等数字模型，分析三种准确率损失来源：1）编码限制（127位二进制编码）；2）架构限制（光学核心通道数从16扩展到48）；3）硬件非理想性（七种校准的硬件非理想性）。

Result: 在原始19个特征上，AOC达到94.6%平衡准确率（5,126个参数，其中1,024个光学参数），XGBoost为97.9%，存在3.3个百分点差距。将光学通道从16扩展到48仅缩小0.5pp差距，表明主要是架构限制而非硬件规模问题。采用127位二进制编码后，所有模型准确率降至89.4-89.6%，编码成本对数字模型为8pp，对AOC为5pp。七种硬件非理想性未造成可测量的性能损失。

Conclusion: 研究确定了模拟光学计算机准确率损失的三层限制：编码（主要瓶颈）、架构（次要限制）和硬件保真度（可忽略）。这为未来改进指明了方向：应优先优化编码方案，其次改进架构设计，而硬件非理想性不是当前主要关注点。

Abstract: Analog optical computers promise large efficiency gains for machine learning inference, yet no demonstration has moved beyond small-scale image benchmarks. We benchmark the analog optical computer (AOC) digital twin on mortgage approval classification from 5.84 million U.S. HMDA records and separate three sources of accuracy loss. On the original 19 features, the AOC reaches 94.6% balanced accuracy with 5,126 parameters (1,024 optical), compared with 97.9% for XGBoost; the 3.3 percentage-point gap narrows by only 0.5pp when the optical core is widened from 16 to 48 channels, suggesting an architectural rather than hardware limitation. Restricting all models to a shared 127-bit binary encoding drops every model to 89.4--89.6%, with an encoding cost of 8pp for digital models and 5pp for the AOC. Seven calibrated hardware non-idealities impose no measurable penalty. The three resulting layers of limitation (encoding, architecture, hardware fidelity) locate where accuracy is lost and what to improve next.

</details>


### [694] [Shapley Value-Guided Adaptive Ensemble Learning for Explainable Financial Fraud Detection with U.S. Regulatory Compliance Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14231)
*Mohammad Nasir Uddin,Md Munna Aziz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究针对金融犯罪检测中AI模型缺乏可解释性的问题，提出了SHAP引导的自适应集成方法(SGAE)，在IEEE-CIS数据集上实现了最佳性能，并将结果直接映射到监管合规要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融犯罪每年给美国机构造成超过320亿美元损失。尽管AI欺诈检测工具日益先进，但在实际应用中面临主要障碍：许多模型作为黑箱运行，无法提供OCC Bulletin 2011-12和Federal Reserve SR 11-7等法规要求的透明、可审计的解释。

Method: 1) 全面评估解释质量，包括忠实度(k=5,10,15的充分性和全面性)和稳定性(30个bootstrap样本的Kendall's W)；2) 提出SHAP引导的自适应集成(SGAE)，基于SHAP归因一致性动态调整每笔交易的集成权重；3) 在完整的590,540笔交易IEEE-CIS数据集上对LSTM、Transformer和GNN-GraphSAGE三种架构进行完整评估。

Result: XGBoost+TreeExplainer实现近乎完美的稳定性(W=0.9912)，LSTM+DeepExplainer表现较弱(W=0.4962)。SGAE在所有测试模型中达到最高AUC-ROC(0.8837保留集；0.9245交叉验证)。GNN-GraphSAGE表现最佳(AUC-ROC 0.9248，F1=0.6013)。所有结果直接映射到OCC、SR 11-7和BSA-AML监管合规要求。

Conclusion: 该研究通过系统评估解释质量、提出SGAE集成方法以及全面比较三种深度学习架构，为金融犯罪检测提供了既高性能又满足监管解释要求的解决方案，特别是GNN-GraphSAGE和SGAE在性能和可解释性方面表现突出。

Abstract: Financial crime costs U.S. institutions over $32 billion each year. Although AI tools for fraud detection have become more advanced, their use in real-world systems still faces a major obstacle: many of these models operate as black boxes that cannot provide the transparent, auditable explanations required by regulations such as OCC Bulletin 2011-12 and Federal Reserve SR 11-7. This study makes three main contributions. First, it offers a thorough evaluation of explanation quality across faithfulness (sufficiency and comprehensiveness at k=5, 10, and 15) and stability (Kendall's W across 30 bootstrap samples). XGBoost paired with TreeExplainer achieves near-perfect stability (W=0.9912), while LSTM with DeepExplainer shows weak results (W=0.4962). Second, the paper introduces the SHAP-Guided Adaptive Ensemble (SGAE), which dynamically adjusts per-transaction ensemble weights based on SHAP attribution agreement, achieving the highest AUC-ROC among all tested models (0.8837 held-out; 0.9245 cross-validation). Third, a complete three-architecture evaluation of LSTM, Transformer, and GNN-GraphSAGE on the full 590,540-transaction IEEE-CIS dataset is provided, with GNN-GraphSAGE achieving AUC-ROC 0.9248 and F1=0.6013. All results are mapped directly to OCC, SR 11-7, and BSA-AML regulatory compliance requirements.

</details>


### [695] [Does Dimensionality Reduction via Random Projections Preserve Landscape Features?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13230)
*Iván Olarte Rodríguez,Anja Jankovic,Thomas Bäck,Elena Raponi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究探索性景观分析（ELA）特征在随机高斯嵌入降维下的鲁棒性，发现大多数ELA特征对降维敏感，降维后特征值不再代表原始问题特性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高维优化问题中，ELA面临稀疏效应、高方差和计算成本问题，降维被提出作为解决方案，但需要验证降维后ELA特征是否仍能反映原始景观的内在特性

Method: 使用随机高斯嵌入（RGEs）进行降维，从相同的采样点和目标值出发，在投影空间中计算ELA特征，并与原始搜索空间中的特征进行比较，考察多个样本预算和嵌入维度

Result: 线性随机投影通常会改变与ELA相关的几何和拓扑结构，导致特征值不再代表原始问题；只有一小部分特征相对稳定，大多数特征对嵌入高度敏感；鲁棒性并不一定意味着信息性，看似鲁棒的特征可能反映的是投影引入的伪影而非内在景观特性

Conclusion: 在高维优化问题中直接应用降维后的ELA特征需要谨慎，因为大多数特征对降维敏感且可能失去代表性，需要进一步研究如何识别真正反映内在景观特性的稳定特征

Abstract: Exploratory Landscape Analysis (ELA) provides numerical features for characterizing black-box optimization problems. In high-dimensional settings, however, ELA suffers from sparsity effects, high estimator variance, and the prohibitive cost of computing several feature classes. Dimensionality reduction has therefore been proposed as a way to make ELA applicable in such settings, but it remains unclear whether features computed in reduced spaces still reflect intrinsic properties of the original landscape.
  In this work, we investigate the robustness of ELA features under dimensionality reduction via Random Gaussian Embeddings (RGEs). Starting from the same sampled points and objective values, we compute ELA features in projected spaces and compare them to those obtained in the original search space across multiple sample budgets and embedding dimensions.
  Our results show that linear random projections often alter the geometric and topological structure relevant to ELA, yielding feature values that are no longer representative of the original problem. While a small subset of features remains comparatively stable, most are highly sensitive to the embedding. Moreover, robustness under projection does not necessarily imply informativeness, as apparently robust features may still reflect projection-induced artifacts rather than intrinsic landscape characteristics.

</details>


### [696] [KV Packet: Recomputation-Free Context-Independent KV Caching for LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13226)
*Chuangtao Chen,Grace Li Zhang,Xunzhao Yin,Cheng Zhuo,Bing Li,Ulf Schlichtmann*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KV Packet：一种免重计算的KV缓存复用框架，通过可训练的软令牌适配器包装缓存文档，实现零FLOPs开销和低TTFT延迟


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有KV缓存复用方法（如CacheBlend、EPIC、SAM-KV）需要选择性重计算部分令牌，仍产生不可忽略的计算开销和TTFT延迟。标准KV缓存具有上下文依赖性，在新上下文中复用缓存文档需要重计算KV状态以适应注意力分布变化。

Method: 提出KV Packet框架：将缓存文档视为不可变的"数据包"，用轻量级可训练的软令牌适配器包装。通过自监督蒸馏训练适配器来弥合上下文不连续性，实现免重计算的缓存复用。

Result: 在Llama-3.1和Qwen2.5上的实验表明，KV Packet方法实现接近零FLOPs，TTFT低于基于重计算的基线方法，同时保持与完全重计算基线相当的F1分数。

Conclusion: KV Packet通过软令牌适配器有效解决了KV缓存上下文依赖问题，实现了高效、低延迟的缓存复用，为LLM推理优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) rely heavily on Key-Value (KV) caching to minimize inference latency. However, standard KV caches are context-dependent: reusing a cached document in a new context requires recomputing KV states to account for shifts in attention distribution. Existing solutions such as CacheBlend, EPIC, and SAM-KV mitigate this issue by selectively recomputing a subset of tokens; however, they still incur non-negligible computational overhead (FLOPs) and increased Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) latency. In this paper, we propose KV Packet, a recomputation-free cache reuse framework that treats cached documents as immutable ``packets'' wrapped in light-weight trainable soft-token adapters, which are trained via self-supervised distillation to bridge context discontinuities. Experiments on Llama-3.1 and Qwen2.5 demonstrate that the proposed KV Packet method achieves near-zero FLOPs and lower TTFT than recomputation-based baselines, while retaining F1 scores comparable to those of the full recomputation baseline.

</details>


### [697] [Pareto-Optimal Offline Reinforcement Learning via Smooth Tchebysheff Scalarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13175)
*Aadyot Bhatnagar,Peter Mørch Groth,Ali Madani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STOMP是一种新颖的离线强化学习算法，通过平滑Tchebysheff标量化将多目标偏好优化扩展到多目标设置，在蛋白质工程任务中优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中经常需要同时优化多个相互冲突的目标（如蛋白质工程中的催化活性和特异性，聊天机器人中的帮助性和无害性）。传统的线性标量化方法无法恢复帕累托前沿的非凸区域，因此需要更有效的多目标对齐方法。

Method: 将多目标强化学习本身作为优化问题，通过平滑Tchebysheff标量化进行标量化处理。提出STOMP算法，通过基于观察分布标准化个体奖励，将直接偏好优化扩展到多目标设置。在三个蛋白质语言模型和三个实验室蛋白质适应性数据集上进行对齐实验。

Result: 在九个设置中的八个中，STOMP实现了最高的超体积，无论是离线离策略评估还是生成评估都优于最先进的基线方法。证明STOMP是强大、稳健的多目标对齐算法。

Conclusion: STOMP是一种有效的多目标对齐算法，能够显著改进后训练模型，适用于多属性蛋白质优化及其他领域，克服了线性标量化的局限性。

Abstract: Large language models can be aligned with human preferences through offline reinforcement learning (RL) on small labeled datasets. While single-objective alignment is well-studied, many real-world applications demand the simultaneous optimization of multiple conflicting rewards, e.g. optimizing both catalytic activity and specificity in protein engineering, or helpfulness and harmlessness for chatbots. Prior work has largely relied on linear reward scalarization, but this approach provably fails to recover non-convex regions of the Pareto front. In this paper, instead of scalarizing the rewards directly, we frame multi-objective RL itself as an optimization problem to be scalarized via smooth Tchebysheff scalarization, a recent technique that overcomes the shortcomings of linear scalarization. We use this formulation to derive Smooth Tchebysheff Optimization of Multi-Objective Preferences (STOMP), a novel offline RL algorithm that extends direct preference optimization to the multi-objective setting in a principled way by standardizing the individual rewards based on their observed distributions. We empirically validate STOMP on a range of protein engineering tasks by aligning three autoregressive protein language models on three laboratory datasets of protein fitness. Compared to state-of-the-art baselines, STOMP achieves the highest hypervolumes in eight of nine settings according to both offline off-policy and generative evaluations. We thus demonstrate that STOMP is a powerful, robust multi-objective alignment algorithm that can meaningfully improve post-trained models for multi-attribute protein optimization and beyond.

</details>


### [698] [CLAD: Efficient Log Anomaly Detection Directly on Compressed Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13024)
*Benzhao Tang,Shiyu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CLAD是首个直接在压缩字节流上进行日志异常检测的深度学习框架，无需解压缩和解析，通过检测压缩字节模式的异常来识别日志异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统日志爆炸式增长使得流式压缩变得必要，但现有日志异常检测方法需要完全解压缩和解析，产生严重的预处理开销。需要一种能够直接在压缩数据上工作的方法来消除这些瓶颈。

Method: CLAD框架基于关键洞察：正常日志压缩成规则的字节模式，而异常会系统性破坏这些模式。采用专门构建的架构，包括扩张卷积字节编码器、混合Transformer-mLSTM和四路聚合池化。使用两阶段训练策略：掩码预训练和焦点对比微调，以有效处理严重的类别不平衡。

Result: 在五个数据集上评估，CLAD实现了最先进的平均F1分数0.9909，比最佳基线高出2.72个百分点。在完全消除解压缩和解析开销的同时提供卓越的准确性。

Conclusion: CLAD提供了一个鲁棒的解决方案，能够推广到结构化流式压缩器，为大规模日志分析提供了高效且准确的异常检测方法。

Abstract: The explosive growth of system logs makes streaming compression essential, yet existing log anomaly detection (LAD) methods incur severe pre-processing overhead by requiring full decompression and parsing. We introduce CLAD, the first deep learning framework to perform LAD directly on compressed byte streams. CLAD bypasses these bottlenecks by exploiting a key insight: normal logs compress into regular byte patterns, while anomalies systematically disrupt them. To extract these multi-scale deviations from opaque bytes, we propose a purpose-built architecture integrating a dilated convolutional byte encoder, a hybrid Transformer--mLSTM, and four-way aggregation pooling. This is coupled with a two-stage training strategy of masked pre-training and focal-contrastive fine-tuning to effectively handle severe class imbalance. Evaluated across five datasets, CLAD achieves a state-of-the-art average F1-score of 0.9909 and outperforms the best baseline by 2.72 percentage points. It delivers superior accuracy while completely eliminating decompression and parsing overheads, offering a robust solution that generalizes to structured streaming compressors.

</details>


### [699] [Rethinking On-Policy Distillation of Large Language Models: Phenomenology, Mechanism, and Recipe](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13016)
*Yaxuan Li,Yuxin Zuo,Bingxiang He,Jinqian Zhang,Chaojun Xiao,Cheng Qian,Tianyu Yu,Huan-ang Gao,Wenkai Yang,Zhiyuan Liu,Ning Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在线策略蒸馏的训练动态与机制，揭示了成功蒸馏的两个关键条件，并提出了恢复失败蒸馏的实用策略


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线策略蒸馏已成为大语言模型后训练的核心技术，但其训练动态机制仍缺乏深入理解，需要系统研究其成功与失败的条件

Method: 通过弱到强反向蒸馏实验验证师生模型兼容性条件，分析token级机制中高概率token的对齐模式，提出离策略冷启动和教师对齐提示选择两种恢复策略

Result: 发现成功蒸馏需要师生思维模式兼容且教师需提供新能力；识别出97%-99%概率质量集中在少量共享token上；提出的恢复策略能有效挽救失败蒸馏

Conclusion: 在线策略蒸馏的密集token级奖励存在代价，其长时程可扩展性值得质疑；研究为理解蒸馏机制和设计有效训练策略提供了理论基础

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of large language models, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. This paper provides a systematic investigation of OPD dynamics and mechanisms. We first identify that two conditions govern whether OPD succeeds or fails: (i) the student and teacher should share compatible thinking patterns; and (ii) even with consistent thinking patterns and higher scores, the teacher must offer genuinely new capabilities beyond what the student has seen during training. We validate these findings through weak-to-strong reverse distillation, showing that same-family 1.5B and 7B teachers are distributionally indistinguishable from the student's perspective. Probing into the token-level mechanism, we show that successful OPD is characterized by progressive alignment on high-probability tokens at student-visited states, a small shared token set that concentrates most of the probability mass (97%-99%). We further propose two practical strategies to recover failing OPD: off-policy cold start and teacher-aligned prompt selection. Finally, we show that OPD's apparent free lunch of dense token-level reward comes at a cost, raising the question of whether OPD can scale to long-horizon distillation.

</details>


### [700] [Lightning OPD: Efficient Post-Training for Large Reasoning Models with Offline On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13010)
*Yecheng Wu,Song Han,Hai Cai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Lightning OPD：一种离线策略蒸馏框架，通过预计算教师对数概率实现高效训练，无需实时教师服务器，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线策略蒸馏需要实时教师推理服务器，导致基础设施开销大。离线方法虽自然但性能不佳，研究发现教师一致性是关键条件，违反会导致梯度偏差和次优收敛。

Method: 提出Lightning OPD框架：1) 在SFT rollout上预计算教师对数概率；2) 强制教师一致性，使用同一教师模型进行SFT和OPD；3) 消除实时教师服务器需求；4) 证明在教师一致性下与标准OPD共享相同最优解。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上达到最先进性能：从Qwen3-8B-Base模型开始，仅用30 GPU小时在AIME 2024上达到69.9%，相比标准OPD实现4.0倍加速，显著降低学术研究门槛。

Conclusion: Lightning OPD通过强制教师一致性解决了离线策略蒸馏的性能问题，在保持理论最优性的同时大幅提升效率，为LLM后训练研究提供了更易访问的框架。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, standard OPD requires a live teacher inference server throughout training, resulting in substantial infrastructure overhead. In this work, we investigate whether on-policy distillation can be performed offline. A natural approach is to precompute teacher log-probabilities once over SFT rollouts and reuse them during training. In practice, however, this offline variant fails to reliably match the performance of standard OPD. To understand this discrepancy, we identify a previously overlooked condition that is critical for any OPD pipeline, which we term teacher consistency. This condition requires that the same teacher model be used for both supervised fine-tuning and OPD. We show that violating teacher consistency introduces an irreducible gradient bias, causing both offline and online OPD to converge to a suboptimal fixed point regardless of training duration. Building on this insight, we propose Lightning OPD, an offline on-policy distillation framework that enforces teacher consistency by precomputing teacher log-probabilities over SFT rollouts. This design eliminates the need for a live teacher server entirely. We further show that, under teacher consistency, Lightning OPD shares the same optimum as standard OPD, with bounded gradient discrepancy and an implicit regularization effect that helps prevent policy drift. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation demonstrate that Lightning OPD achieves state-of-the-art performance with significantly improved efficiency. Starting from an SFT-initialized Qwen3-8B-Base model, Lightning OPD reaches 69.9% on AIME 2024 in just 30 GPU hours, achieving a 4.0x speedup over standard OPD and substantially lowering the barrier to entry for academic research on LLM post-training.

</details>


<div id='quant-ph'></div>

# quant-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [701] [Cloning is as Hard as Learning for Stabilizer States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15269)
*Nikhil Bansal,Matthias C. Caro,Gaurav Mahajan*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 该论文研究了稳定子态的学习与克隆复杂度关系，证明了对于n-qubit稳定子态，最优克隆样本复杂度为Θ(n)，表明克隆与学习同样困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子理论的基础之一是无法克隆非正交态。现代量子学习理论常考虑结构化态类并利用结构开发优于通用态层析的学习算法。这引发了一个问题：对于此类结构化态类，学习与克隆的样本复杂度关系如何？

Method: 使用最近提出的阿贝尔态隐藏子群框架中的表示论工具，以及新引入的结构化随机纯化信道，将稳定子态克隆与经典学习理论中最近引入的概率分布样本放大问题的变体联系起来。

Result: 对于n-qubit稳定子态，最优克隆样本复杂度为Θ(n)，表明克隆与学习同样困难。通过证明具有底层线性结构的分布类的样本放大下界，获得了克隆下界。

Conclusion: 结果为无克隆定理提供了更细粒度的视角，建立了从基础理论到量子学习理论和量子密码学的联系，表明即使对于结构化态类，克隆仍然与学习一样困难。

Abstract: The impossibility of simultaneously cloning non-orthogonal states lies at the foundations of quantum theory. Even when allowing for approximation errors, cloning an arbitrary unknown pure state requires as many initial copies as needed to fully learn the state. Rather than arbitrary unknown states, modern quantum learning theory often considers structured classes of states and exploits such structure to develop learning algorithms that outperform general-state tomography. This raises the question: How do the sample complexities of learning and cloning relate for such structured classes? We answer this question for an important class of states. Namely, for $n$-qubit stabilizer states, we show that the optimal sample complexity of cloning is $Θ(n)$. Thus, also for this structured class of states, cloning is as hard as learning. To prove these results, we use representation-theoretic tools in the recently proposed Abelian State Hidden Subgroup framework and a new structured version of the recently introduced random purification channel to relate stabilizer state cloning to a variant of the sample amplification problem for probability distributions that was recently introduced in classical learning theory. This allows us to obtain our cloning lower bounds by proving new sample amplification lower bounds for classes of distributions with an underlying linear structure. Our results provide a more fine-grained perspective on No-Cloning theorems, opening up connections from foundations to quantum learning theory and quantum cryptography.

</details>


### [702] [Optimal algorithmic complexity of inference in quantum kernel methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15214)
*Elies Gil-fuster,Seongwook Shin,Sofiene Jerbi,Jens Eisert,Maximilian J. Kramer*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种量子核方法推理阶段的查询最优算法，通过将整个推理和编码为单个可观测量并应用量子振幅估计，将查询复杂度从O(N∥α∥₂²/ε²)降低到O(∥α∥₁/ε)，消除了对N的依赖并实现了二次改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子核方法在监督学习中具有实现量子优势的潜力，但推理阶段存在瓶颈：评估新数据模型需要估计N个核值的加权和，标准方法的查询复杂度为O(N∥α∥₂²/ε²)，效率较低。

Method: 系统分析了两个改进维度：(1) 核值估计方法（采样vs量子振幅估计），(2) 和近似方式（逐项vs单个可观测量）。提出了查询最优组合：将整个推理和编码为单个可观测量并应用量子振幅估计。

Result: 查询最优算法复杂度为O(∥α∥₁/ε)，消除了对N的依赖，在∥α∥₁和ε上均实现二次改进。证明了匹配的下界Ω(∥α∥₁/ε)，建立了查询最优性。分析了门成本，发现查询最优策略在门复杂度方面不一定最优。

Conclusion: 提供了查询最优算法和根据硬件能力选择的实用最优策略，以及完整的中间方法图谱。所有算法仅需振幅估计作为子程序，适合早期容错实现。为量子核方法推理提供了理论最优解和实用指导。

Abstract: Quantum kernel methods are among the leading candidates for achieving quantum advantage in supervised learning. A key bottleneck is the cost of inference: evaluating a trained model on new data requires estimating a weighted sum $\sum_{i=1}^N α_i k(x,x_i)$ of $N$ kernel values to additive precision $\varepsilon$, where $α$ is the vector of trained coefficients. The standard approach estimates each term independently via sampling, yielding a query complexity of $O(N\lVertα\rVert_2^2/\varepsilon^2)$. In this work, we identify two independent axes for improvement: (1) How individual kernel values are estimated (sampling versus quantum amplitude estimation), and (2) how the sum is approximated (term-by-term versus via a single observable), and systematically analyze all combinations thereof. The query-optimal combination, encoding the full inference sum as the expectation value of a single observable and applying quantum amplitude estimation, achieves a query complexity of $O(\lVertα\rVert_1/\varepsilon)$, removing the dependence on $N$ from the query count and yielding a quadratic improvement in both $\lVertα\rVert_1$ and $\varepsilon$. We prove a matching lower bound of $Ω(\lVertα\rVert_1/\varepsilon)$, establishing query-optimality of our approach up to logarithmic factors. Beyond query complexity, we also analyze how these improvements translate into gate costs and show that the query-optimal strategy is not always optimal in practice from the perspective of gate complexity. Our results provide both a query-optimal algorithm and a practically optimal choice of strategy depending on hardware capabilities, along with a complete landscape of intermediate methods to guide practitioners. All algorithms require only amplitude estimation as a subroutine and are thus natural candidates for early-fault-tolerant implementations.

</details>


### [703] [Learning to Concatenate Quantum Codes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14931)
*Nico Meyer,Christopher Mutschler,Dominik Seuß,Andreas Maier,Daniel D. Scherer*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 提出一种基于学习的级联量子纠错码自适应选择方法，通过估计每级噪声并选择最优下一级码，显著减少实现目标逻辑错误率所需的量子比特数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 级联量子纠错码能双指数降低逻辑错误率，但噪声结构在级联过程中会发生变化，使得选择最优代码序列变得困难。传统固定代码序列无法适应噪声结构的变化，导致资源效率低下

Method: 采用基于学习的方法自动化代码选择：1) 估计每级后的有效噪声信道；2) 根据噪声结构选择下一级代码；3) 当噪声具有足够结构时使用小型非加性编码器；4) 噪声接近均匀时切换为标准稳定子码

Result: 模拟显示，这种逐级自适应方法相比单独级联稳定子码，能以少得多的量子比特数达到目标逻辑错误率。对于强结构化噪声，量子比特数减少可达两个数量级

Conclusion: 这种混合的、基于学习的策略为早期容错量子计算提供了有前景的工具，通过自适应代码选择显著提高了资源效率

Abstract: Concatenating quantum error correction codes scales error correction capability by driving logical error rates down double-exponentially across levels. However, the noise structure shifts under concatenation, making it hard to choose an optimal code sequence. We automate this choice by estimating the effective noise channel after each level and selecting the next code accordingly. In particular, we use learning-based methods to tailor small, non-additive encoders when the noise exhibits sufficient structure, then switch to standard codes once the noise is nearly uniform. In simulations, this level-wise adaptation achieves a target logical error rate with far fewer qubits than concatenating stabilizer codes alone--reducing qubit counts by up to two orders of magnitude for strongly structured noise. Therefore, this hybrid, learning-based strategy offers a promising tool for early fault-tolerant quantum computing.

</details>


### [704] [Reachability Constraints in Variational Quantum Circuits: Optimization within Polynomial Group Module](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13735)
*Yun-Tak Oh,Dongsoo Lee,Jungyoul Park,Kyung Chul Jeong,Panjin Kim*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 该论文发现变分量子方法达到精确基态的必要条件：输入态和基态在每个群模上的投影范数必须匹配，这意味着需要提前知道解态的模权重。以匹配门电路应用于经典比特串问题为例，所有计算基态具有相同的模权重，结合量子电路在小子空间可经典模拟的特性，某些问题存在经典替代方法，每步时间复杂度为O(n⁵)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究变分量子方法达到精确基态的理论限制条件，探索在什么情况下量子优势可能不存在，以及某些问题可能存在的经典替代解法。

Method: 通过群表示理论分析变分量子方法，推导出达到精确基态的必要条件：输入态和基态在每个群模上的投影范数必须匹配。以匹配门电路和经典比特串问题为例进行具体分析，结合量子电路在小子空间可经典模拟的特性。

Result: 发现变分量子方法达到精确基态的必要条件是模权重匹配，这意味着需要提前知道解态的模权重。对于匹配门电路应用于经典比特串问题，所有计算基态具有相同的模权重，结合已知的经典可模拟性，某些问题存在时间复杂度为O(n⁵)的经典替代解法，最大割问题作为示例。

Conclusion: 变分量子方法达到精确基态存在理论限制，需要提前知道解态的模权重。对于某些特定类型的问题（如匹配门电路处理的经典比特串问题），量子优势可能不存在，存在高效的经典替代解法，这对量子计算的应用范围和优势边界提供了重要理论见解。

Abstract: This work identifies a necessary condition for any variational quantum approach to reach the exact ground state. Briefly, the norms of the projections of the input and the ground state onto each group module must match, implying that module weights of the solution state have to be known in advance in order to reach the exact ground state. An exemplary case is provided by matchgate circuits applied to problems whose solutions are classical bit strings, since all computational basis states share the same module-wise weights. Combined with the known classical simulability of quantum circuits for which observables lie in a small linear subspace, this implies that certain problems admit a classical surrogate for exact solution with each step taking $O(n^5)$ time. The Maximum Cut problem serves as an illustrative example.

</details>


### [705] [Magnitude Is All You Need? Rethinking Phase in Quantum Encoding of Complex SAR Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14229)
*Sakthi Prabhu Gunasekar,Prasanna Kumar R*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 量子机器学习在SAR目标识别中，幅度编码在混合架构中优于复数编码，而纯量子架构需要相位信息


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SAR数据本质上是复数形式，而量子机器学习模型天然在复希尔伯特空间中运行，这种对齐性暗示将幅度和相位信息同时编码到量子系统中应该能提升SAR自动目标识别性能

Method: 在MSTAR基准数据集上，采用统一的实验框架比较五种量子编码策略：仅幅度编码、联合复数编码、I/Q基编码、预处理相位编码和纯量子编码，分别在混合量子-经典架构和纯量子架构中进行评估

Result: 混合架构中，仅幅度编码表现最佳（3类任务99.57%准确率，8类任务71.19%），相位感知方法提供可忽略或负面的改进；纯量子架构中，相位信息变得至关重要，贡献高达21.65%的准确率提升

Conclusion: 相位信息的效用并非数据固有属性，而是严重依赖于模型架构。混合模型依赖经典组件补偿缺失的相位信息，而纯量子模型需要相位来构建判别性表示。研究结果为NISQ时代复杂值数据在QML中的编码提供了实用设计指南，并强调了编码-架构协同设计的重要性

Abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data is inherently complex-valued, while quantum machine learning (QML) models naturally operate in complex Hilbert spaces. This apparent alignment suggests that incorporating both magnitude and phase information into quantum encoding should improve performance in SAR Automatic Target Recognition (ATR). In this work, we systematically evaluate this assumption by comparing five quantum encoding strategies: magnitude-only, joint complex, I/Q-based, preprocessed phase, and pure quantum, under a unified experimental framework on the MSTAR benchmark dataset.
  Contrary to expectation, we observe a consistent pattern: in hybrid quantum-classical architectures, magnitude-only encoding outperforms all complex-valued strategies, achieving 99.57% accuracy on a 3-class task and 71.19% on an 8-class task, while phase-aware methods provide negligible (~0%) or negative improvements. In contrast, in purely quantum architectures with only 184-224 trainable parameters and no classical components, phase information becomes essential, contributing up to 21.65% improvement in accuracy.
  These results reveal that the utility of phase information is not inherent to the data, but depends critically on the model architecture. Hybrid models rely on classical components that compensate for missing phase information, whereas purely quantum models require phase to construct discriminative representations. Our findings provide practical design guidelines for encoding complex-valued data in QML and highlight the importance of encoding-architecture co-design in the NISQ era.

</details>


### [706] [Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13022)
*Yihang Sun,Huaijin Wang,Patrick Hayden,Jose Blanchet*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 该研究首次对能量守恒下降（ECD）算法进行理论分析，证明其在双阱目标函数中能实现从局部最小值到全局最小值的指数级加速收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ECD算法作为全局非凸优化方法，能逃离严格局部最小值并收敛到全局最小值，但在理论上缺乏分析。研究旨在填补这一空白，为ECD提供理论基础并探索其量子化潜力。

Method: 在一维设定下形式化随机ECD（sECD）和量子ECD（qECD）动力学。sECD引入能量守恒噪声，qECD通过哈密顿模拟实现量子算法。针对正双阱目标函数，计算从局部最小值到全局最小值的期望命中时间。

Result: 证明sECD和qECD相比各自的梯度下降基准（随机梯度下降及其量子化）均能实现指数级加速。对于高势垒目标函数，qECD相比sECD能获得进一步加速。

Conclusion: 该研究为ECD算法提供了首个理论分析框架，证明了其在非凸优化中的优越性能，并为量子优化算法的发展奠定了基础。

Abstract: The Energy Conserving Descent (ECD) algorithm was recently proposed (De Luca & Silverstein, 2022) as a global non-convex optimization method. Unlike gradient descent, appropriately configured ECD dynamics escape strict local minima and converge to a global minimum, making it appealing for machine learning optimization.
  We present the first analytical study of ECD, focusing on the one-dimensional setting for this first installment. We formalize a stochastic ECD dynamics (sECD) with energy-preserving noise, as well as a quantum analog of the ECD Hamiltonian (qECD), providing the foundation for a quantum algorithm through Hamiltonian simulation.
  For positive double-well objectives, we compute the expected hitting time from a local to the global minimum. We prove that both sECD and qECD yield exponential speedup over respective gradient descent baselines--stochastic gradient descent and its quantization. For objectives with tall barriers, qECD achieves a further speedup over sECD.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [707] [AI-Assisted Requirements Engineering: An Empirical Evaluation Relative to Expert Judgment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15222)
*Oz Levy,Ilya Dikman,Natan Levy,Michael Winokur*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI工具可在系统工程的RE阶段提供一致快速的初步需求质量评估，但专家判断在上下文解释和权衡推理中仍不可或缺，AI应作为决策支持而非替代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI越来越多地应用于系统工程活动，特别是在需求工程中，质量评估和验证仍高度依赖专家判断。虽然AI工具在分析和生成需求方面展现出潜力，但其在正式系统工程流程中的作用以及与INCOSE标准的契合度仍不明确。

Method: 采用结构化系统工程方法，比较AI辅助需求评估与人类专家评估。通过对照研究，让经验丰富的系统工程师和AI评估工具分别根据INCOSE"良好需求"标准评估系统需求，重点关注一致性、完整性、清晰性和可测试性，并分析评估准确性和决策逻辑。

Result: AI工具能够提供一致且快速的初步评估，特别在句法和结构质量属性方面表现良好。但专家判断在上下文解释、歧义消解和权衡推理方面仍必不可少。AI不应替代系统工程师，而应作为需求工程生命周期中的决策支持机制。

Conclusion: 从系统工程视角，本研究提供了AI如何集成到需求工程工作流中的实证证据，同时保持可追溯性、责任性和工程一致性。AI应定位为增强而非替代专业工程判断的辅助工具。

Abstract: Artificial Intelligence is increasingly introduced into systems engineering activities, particularly within requirements engineering, where quality assessment and validation remain heavily dependent on expert judgment. While recent AI tools demonstrate promising capabilities in analyzing and generating requirements, their role within formal systems engineering processes-and their alignment with established INCOSE criteria-remains insufficiently understood. This paper investigates the extent to which AI-based tools can support systems engineers in evaluating requirement quality, without replacing professional expertise. The research adopts a structured systems engineering methodology to compare AI-assisted requirement evaluation with human expert assessment. A controlled study was conducted in which system requirements were evaluated against established INCOSE ``good requirement'' criteria by both experienced systems engineers and an AI-based assessment tool. The evaluation focused on consistency, completeness, clarity, and testability, examining not only accuracy but also the decision logic underlying each assessment. Results indicate that AI tools can provide consistent and rapid preliminary assessments, particularly for syntactic and structural quality attributes. However, expert judgment remains essential for contextual interpretation, ambiguity resolution, and trade-off reasoning. Rather than positioning AI as a replacement for systems engineers, the findings support its role as a decision-support mechanism within the RE lifecycle. From a systems engineering perspective, this study contributes empirical evidence on how AI can be integrated into RE workflows while preserving traceability, accountability, and engineering consistency.

</details>


### [708] [Vibe-Coding: Feedback-Based Automated Verification with no Human Code Inspection, a Feasibility Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14867)
*Michal Töpfer,František Plášil,Tomáš Bureš,Petr Hnětynka*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究在集体自适应系统中结合vibe coding与运行时验证，通过精细约束违规反馈提高LLM生成代码的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统vibe coding在运行时自适应系统中的可靠性不明确，特别是当生成的代码未经人工检查时。需要研究如何检测生成代码的运行时故障，并提供足够精确的反馈供LLM修复

Method: 将自适应循环与vibe coding反馈循环结合，通过两种约束检查正确性：(1)通用架构约束；(2)使用新型一阶时序逻辑FCL形式化的功能约束。在Dragon Hunt CAS案例研究中实施

Result: 精细约束违规提供可操作的反馈，通常能在几次迭代内产生有效的自适应管理器；而简单的粗粒度基于指标的反馈经常停滞。反馈精度是可靠vibe coding的主导因素

Conclusion: 对于由无编程技能的领域专家设计的系统，反馈精度是可靠vibe coding的关键因素，从而消除了人工代码检查的需求

Abstract: Vibe coding inherently assumes iterative refinement of LLM-generated code through feedback loops. While effective for conventional software tasks, its reliability in runtime-adaptive systems is unclear -- especially when generated code is not manually inspected. This paper studies feedback-based automated verification of LLM-generated adaptation managers in Collective Adaptive Systems (CAS). We focus on the key challenges of verification in the loop: how to detect failures of generated code at runtime and how to report them precisely enough for an LLM to fix them.
  We combine the adaptation loop with a vibe-coding feedback loop where correctness is checked against (i) generic architectural constraints and (ii) functional constraints formalized in Functional Constraints Logic (FCL), a novel first-order temporal logic over potentially finite traces. Conducting the Dragon Hunt CAS case study, we show that fine-grained constraint violations provide actionable feedback that typically yields a valid adaptation manager within a few iterations, while simple coarse metric-based feedback often stalls. Our findings suggest that feedback precision is the dominant factor for reliable vibe coding in systems designed by domain experts with no programming skills, thereby obviating the need for human code inspection.

</details>


### [709] [Bounded Autonomy for Enterprise AI: Typed Action Contracts and Consumer-Side Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14723)
*Sarmad Sohail,Ghufran Haider*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一种有界自主架构，通过类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文等机制，在保持LLM作为自然语言接口的同时，约束其执行行为，确保企业应用安全。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为企业软件的自然语言接口时，直接用作系统操作员存在安全隐患。模型错误可能导致未经授权的操作、格式错误的请求、跨工作空间执行等代价高昂的故障，需要解决执行架构问题。

Method: 采用有界自主架构：语言模型解释意图并提出动作，但所有可执行行为都受类型化动作契约、权限感知能力暴露、作用域上下文、副作用前验证、消费者端执行边界和可选人工批准的约束。企业应用保持业务逻辑和授权的单一真实来源，编排引擎基于显式发布的动作清单操作。

Result: 在部署的多租户企业应用中评估：有界自主系统在25个场景试验中完成23个任务且零不安全执行，无约束配置仅完成17/25。两个错误实体突变逃过所有消费者贡献层；只有消歧和确认机制能拦截此类错误。两种AI配置相比手动操作提速13-18倍。移除安全层反而降低系统实用性：结构化验证反馈引导模型以更少轮次达到正确结果，而无约束系统产生成功幻觉。多个安全属性通过代码结构强制执行，拦截了所有目标违规。

Conclusion: 该架构为不完美的语言模型在企业系统中提供实用、已部署的解决方案，通过结构化的安全约束使AI操作既高效又安全，证明了有界自主方法在实际企业环境中的可行性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as natural-language interfaces to enterprise software, but their direct use as system operators remains unsafe. Model errors can propagate into unauthorized actions, malformed requests, cross-workspace execution, and other costly failures. We argue this is primarily an execution architecture problem. We present a bounded-autonomy architecture in which language models may interpret intent and propose actions, but all executable behavior is constrained by typed action contracts, permission-aware capability exposure, scoped context, validation before side effects, consumer-side execution boundaries, and optional human approval. The enterprise application remains the source of truth for business logic and authorization, while the orchestration engine operates over an explicit published actions manifest. We evaluate the architecture in a deployed multi-tenant enterprise application across three conditions: manual operation, unconstrained AI with safety layers disabled, and full bounded autonomy. Across 25 scenario trials spanning seven failure families, the bounded-autonomy system completed 23 of 25 tasks with zero unsafe executions, while the unconstrained configuration completed only 17 of 25. Two wrong-entity mutations escaped all consumer-contributed layers; only disambiguation and confirmation mechanisms intercept this class. Both AI conditions delivered 13-18x speedup over manual operation. Critically, removing safety layers made the system less useful: structured validation feedback guided the model to correct outcomes in fewer turns, while the unconstrained system hallucinated success. Several safety properties are structurally enforced by code and intercepted all targeted violations regardless of model output. The result is a practical, deployed architecture for making imperfect language models operationally useful in enterprise systems.

</details>


### [710] [Asking What Matters: Reward-Driven Clarification for Software Engineering Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14624)
*Sanidhya Vijayvargiya,Vijay Viswanathan,Graham Neubig*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究软件工程任务中的澄清问题，提出基于任务相关性和用户可回答性的强化学习奖励设计，训练CLARITI模型在保持高解决率的同时减少41%的提问数量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类常不完整地指定任务，助手需要知道何时以及如何提出澄清问题。在软件工程任务中，有效的澄清具有挑战性，因为并非所有缺失信息都同等重要，且问题必须针对用户实际能提供的信息。

Method: 使用Shapley归因和分布比较量化影响任务成功的信息类型和能引发有用回答的问题。将任务相关性和用户可回答性操作化为多阶段强化学习奖励，训练8B参数的CLARITI澄清模块。

Result: CLARITI在未充分说明的问题上匹配GPT-5的解决率，同时生成的问题数量减少41%。基于信息影响和用户可回答性的经验分析来设计奖励能提高澄清效率。

Conclusion: 通过实证分析信息影响和用户可回答性来设计奖励，可以显著提高澄清效率。CLARITI模型在保持高任务解决率的同时大幅减少了不必要的提问。

Abstract: Humans often specify tasks incompletely, so assistants must know when and how to ask clarifying questions. However, effective clarification remains challenging in software engineering tasks as not all missing information is equally valuable, and questions must target information users can realistically provide. We study clarification in real software engineering tasks by quantifying which types of information most affect task success and which questions elicit useful responses from simulated users. Using Shapley attribution and distributional comparisons, we identify two key properties of effective clarification: task relevance (which information predicts success) and user answerability (what users can realistically provide). We operationalize these properties as multi-stage reinforcement learning rewards to train CLARITI, an 8B-parameter clarification module, that matches GPT-5's resolution rate on underspecified issues while generating 41% fewer questions. Our results suggest that grounding reward design in empirical analysis of information impact and user answerability improves clarification efficiency.

</details>


### [711] [LLMs taking shortcuts in test generation: A study with SAP HANA and LevelDB](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14437)
*Vekil Bekmyradov,Noah C. Pütz,Thomas Bartz-Beielstein*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs在公开基准测试表现出色，但在未见过复杂商业系统（SAP HANA）的测试生成中表现不佳，暴露其缺乏真正推理能力，依赖记忆和浅层启发式方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLMs在公开基准测试中表现优异，但认知科学研究表明它们可能依赖浅层启发式和记忆而非真正推理能力。本研究旨在通过对比开源系统（LevelDB）与商业专有系统（SAP HANA）的测试生成任务，验证LLMs是否具备稳健的推理能力

Method: 结合认知评估原则（Mitchell的机制聚焦评估方法）与实证软件测试方法，使用变异分数和迭代编译器反馈修复循环，对比LLMs在开源系统LevelDB和商业专有系统SAP HANA上的测试生成表现

Result: LLMs在熟悉的开源基准测试上表现出色，但在未见过、复杂的商业系统（SAP HANA）上表现不佳，往往优先考虑代码可编译性而非语义有效性，暴露其缺乏真正推理能力

Conclusion: 当前LLMs缺乏稳健的推理能力，主要依赖记忆和浅层启发式方法。需要建立能够惩罚简单捷径、奖励真正泛化能力的评估框架，为软件工程领域提供独立证据支持这一更广泛主张

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved impressive results on public benchmarks, often leading to claims of advanced reasoning and understanding. However, recent research in cognitive science reveals that these models sometimes rely on shallow heuristics and memorization, taking shortcuts rather than demonstrating genuine cognitive abilities. This paper investigates LLM behavior in automated test generation for software, contrasting performance on an open-source system (LevelDB) with SAP HANA, one of the most widely deployed commercial database systems worldwide, whose proprietary codebase is guaranteed to be absent from training data. We combine cognitive evaluation principles, drawing on Mitchell's mechanism-focused assessment methodology, with empirical software testing, employing mutation score and iterative compiler-feedback repair loops to assess both accuracy and underlying reasoning strategies. Results show that LLMs excel on familiar, open-source benchmarks but struggle with unseen, complex domains, often prioritizing compilability over semantic effectiveness. These findings provide independent software engineering evidence for the broader claim that current LLMs lack robust reasoning, and highlight the need for evaluation frameworks that penalize trivial shortcuts and reward true generalization.

</details>


### [712] [Large Language Models to Enhance Business Process Modeling: Past, Present, and Future Trends](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14034)
*João Bettencourt,Sérgio Guerreiro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对AI驱动的方法（特别是LLMs）将自然语言转换为BPMN流程模型的文献进行了系统综述，揭示了从传统NLP向LLM架构的转变，并指出了语义正确性、评估碎片化等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着生成式AI和LLMs的发展，利用自然语言自动化或辅助业务流程建模的兴趣日益增长。然而，这些方法在组织环境中支持复杂流程建模的有效性尚不明确，需要系统评估现有方法、LLMs集成方式和评估实践。

Method: 采用结构化综述策略，识别和分析相关研究，对现有方法进行分类，检查LLMs如何集成到文本到模型的流程中，并调查用于评估生成模型的评估实践。

Result: 分析显示从基于规则和传统NLP流程向基于LLM架构的明显转变，这些架构依赖提示工程、中间表示和迭代优化机制。虽然显著扩展了自动化流程模型生成能力，但也暴露了语义正确性、评估碎片化、可重复性和真实组织环境中验证有限等持续挑战。

Conclusion: 基于研究发现，本文识别了关键研究空白并讨论了未来研究方向，包括通过检索增强生成（RAG）集成上下文知识、与LLMs的整合、开发交互式建模架构，以及需要更全面和标准化的评估框架。
